C: 充满冒险精神的科学家，少女时代在故乡遭遇了搁浅的星穹列车。\n若干年后，当姬子终于修复列车驶入群星时，她意识到这只是个开始。在「开拓」新世界的道路上，需要更多的同伴——\n即使同行的人们面朝不同的方向，他们仍处于同一片星空下。
E: An adventurous scientist who encountered the Astral Express as a young woman when it got stranded in her homeworld.\nYears later, when Himeko finally repaired the Express and began her journey into the stars, she realized that this is only the beginning. On her journey to trailblaze new worlds, she would need many more companions...\nAnd while they may have different destinations, they all gaze at the same starry sky.

C: 黑塔女士还真是体贴啊，确实，「天才俱乐部」成员们研究的东西一般人可能连标题都看不懂。那我们还是聊点别的，空间站里都是您忠诚的支持者，大家对您的个人情况也充满了好奇。比如说您一直在写的手稿，请问黑塔女士，您打算什么时候出版最新篇章呢？ 「我认为这并不重要，更加重要的是，以利亚萨拉斯曾经说过，最具挑战性的挑战莫过于提升自我。因此，我们还要更加慎重地审视这个问题： 所谓写稿，关键是稿需要如何写——」  呃…呃…原来如此。不过，黑塔女士，我们非常关心您那本《我如何加入天才俱乐部》…… 「我认为这并不重要，更加重要的是，赞达尔曾经说过，一个人即使已登上顶峰，也仍要自强不息。因此，我们还要更加慎重地审视这个问题： 所谓加入天才俱乐部，关键是天才俱乐部需要如何加入——」  您现在是…自动应答模式吗？ 「我认为这并不重要，更加重要的是，余清涂曾经说过，为学者，立志之事也。因此，我们还要更加慎重地审视这个问题： 所谓自动应答，关键是应答需要如何自动——」
E: Madam Herta, you are so considerate. Indeed, the research that Genius Society members conduct are so complex that ordinary people may not even be able to understand the papers' titles. So, let's talk about something else: The space station is filled with your loyal supporters. Everyone is curious about your personal situation. For example, the manuscript that you're writing — when are you planning on publishing the latest chapter? "I don't think it really matters, but more importantly — Elias Salas once said that the most challenging thing of all is self-improvement. So, let's examine this question more carefully: When writing a paper, the key question is how to write that paper —" Um... err... I see. But Madam Herta, we all love your book How I Joined the Genius Society... "I don't think it really matters, but more importantly — Zandar once said that even those who have made it to the top still need to practice self-improvement. So, let's examine this question more carefully: When considering joining the Genius Society, the question is how does one go about joining the Genius Society —" Are you in... auto-answering mode? "I don't think it really matters, but more importantly — Yu Qingtu once said that being an academic is a matter of ambition. So, let's examine this question more carefully: When considering what is called auto-answering mode, the question is how to automate the answers —"

C: 雪夜的贝洛伯格，停滞的巨大座钟下，少女们的嬉笑声从某扇格栅窗中随温暖的灯光流溢而出。 「『贝洛伯格史前音乐研究』？！这也太扯了吧！可可利亚她就没追问吗？」稍显成熟的女性笑得前仰后合。 「请称呼她为可可利亚大人，希露瓦。」一位娇小的女孩撇了撇嘴，又将起了薄雾的圆框眼镜取下：「她肯定知道我在你的乐队里打下手。」 戴着猫耳绒帽的少女附和道——即使在室内，她也不愿摘下那顶可爱的帽子：「…真不愧是你。那可可利亚大人知道你的其他爱好是什么吗？」 「哈，她肯定不知道，」被称作希露瓦的女性从地铺上起身，「同住那么久，我就没见她读过小说——她说这东西纯属浪费时间……」 「好啦，佩拉、玲可——明天还要陪你们参加《奇谭》交流会呢，该睡了哦。」
E: One snowy Belobog evening, underneath the massive stopped clock, the laughter of girls spilled out from a warmly-lit window. "Studying prehistoric Belobog music!? That's just ridiculous! Didn't Cocolia bother to ask about that?" The slightly older woman rocks back and forth with laughter. "Please address her as Madam Cocolia, Serval." A petite girl pouts as she take off her steamed-up round glasses. "She has to know that I'm playing in your band." The girl in the cat ears hat — she is reluctant to take it off even when inside — chimes in. "...You really are a piece of work. Does Madam Cocolia know what your other hobbies are?" "Ha. No way." The woman named Serval gets up from her bedding on the floor. "I've lived with her for so long and never seen her pick up a novel — she says they're a complete waste of time..." "Okay. Pela, Lynx — We need to go to the Tale of the Winterlands fan meet tomorrow. Let's get some rest."

C: 口若悬河的倒货商人，只要有「利」的地方，就有桑博的身影。\n桑博手中绝无仅有的情报让人不得不接近他，不过成为他的「客人」并不是什么好事。\n毕竟只要价钱合适，「客人」也随时可以转化为「商品」。
E: A silver-tongued salesman. Where there is profit to be made, you can be sure Sampo is nearby.\nThe information that only Sampo possesses makes it hard not to approach him for help, but becoming his "customer" is not necessarily a good thing.\nAfter all, "customers" can quickly turn into "commodities" for the right price.

C: 昏迷复醒的藿藿被第一次带到十王司时，司内的一切对于她来说并非新奇，而是阴森恐惧。 白发判官察觉到小女孩的不安，以尽量温柔地语气询问她。 「小姑娘，我问问你，你是怎样遇到『那团火』的？」 「…我只记得，它孤零零地落在路边，就快要熄灭了，我…我想帮助它。」 「于是你把『那团火』放在了自己的尾巴上？为什么？」 「我、我也不知道，等我意识到了，就已经这么做了…对不起。」 「真是个善良的孩子，你不必道歉…不过从今天开始，你要接受我们的看护了。」 「嗯…谢谢大人。」 「我叫寒鸦。」 「啊，谢谢寒鸦大人，我…我叫藿藿。」 名叫寒鸦的判官思绪回到了几天前—— 十王司收到求救，她奉命出巡，找到了即将被岁阳吞噬的狐人小女孩。寒鸦见小女孩年幼柔弱，而那岁阳也并非泛泛之辈，若要强硬拔除，必然伤及性命。情急之下，寒鸦只得书写符敕，将岁阳镇伏于狐人小女孩的尾部——亏了岁阳先从尾巴下手，属实万幸。 「…这究竟是对是错呢？」 判官喃喃自语道。
E: When Huohuo awakes at the Ten-Lords Commission, she finds herself confronted not with novelty, but with an atmosphere that sends shivers down her spine. Sensing her unease, a white-haired judge addresses her with gentleness. "Tell me, little girl, how did you come across that fire?" "...It was along the roadside and about to extinguish, so I... I wished to help it." "So you put that fire on your tail? Why did you do that?" "I... I don't know... It happened before I realized it... I'm so sorry." "You don't need to apologize, kind-hearted girl. However, you'll be under our custody from now onwards." "Th—Thank you, Madam." "Call me Hanya." "Ah, thank you, Madam Hanya. I... my name is Huohuo." The thoughts of the judge named Hanya wanders back to a few days ago. The Ten-Lords Commission received a distress call, and she took on the task of locating the foxian girl who was about to be consumed by a heliobus. At the moment, Hanya couldn't repel the heliobus by force without causing harm to Huohuo, who was still a little girl. As a result, she had to seal the heliobus onto the girl's tail. Fortunately, the heliobus decided to start the possession from her tail, giving Hanya a chance to save her life. "...Was my decision right or wrong?" Hanya mutters to herself.

C: 尾巴最初与其他岁阳无异，打算「吃掉」藿藿，附身取代她的名字、身份，享用她的七情六欲。 后来，尾巴发现看藿藿吃瘪也是一种乐趣，反正总有一天要吃，也不急这一时。 「尾巴、尾巴！救救，救救！」 「关我屁事，你那句话怎么说来着…『要独当一面』，这机会来了不是吗？」 「下次再独当一面，救救啊！」 「先提醒一句，你若是嗝屁了，大爷我就自由了。不过…老子做事向来从始至终，不把你这块肥肉啃下，岂有随便离开的道理。」 「你身为十王司判官，死后妄纵妖物肆虐仙舟，何其失职…喂！干什么，你们这些小杂碎，只有老子才可以凶她。」 「啊啊啊呜呜呜！」 「闹他娘个天翻地覆！」 尾巴附身让藿藿犹如蜜糖之于花蝶，烛火之于飞萤，屡屡被各路妖物关照。 藿藿总是抱怨这「贞凶之命」与尾巴脱不开干系，尾巴也觉得自己当年撞上藿藿也算是倒了血霉了。可是漫长的时间过去了，尾巴也会在藿藿吃瘪够了之后答应帮忙，但它依旧不会承认这一份交情。 「奉十王敕：冥差藿藿，艺精业勤，资赋具足，可堪要任。即日擢为判官。」 十王司下达了她的升职通令，至此，藿藿的见习判官生涯开始了。
E: Initially, Tail was no different from any other heliobi, intending to devour Huohuo and take possession of her name and identity, stealing all of her desires and emotions. Later, Tail found pleasure in witnessing Huohuo's frustrations in her failures. "Anyway, I'm not in a hurry to devour her at all. She can't escape me after all." "Tail, Tail! Help... Help me!" "It's none of my concern. What did you say back then...? Oh, you've got to 'stand on your own feet.' Now this is the perfect chance, isn't it?" "No! I'll stand on my feet next time! Please help me!" "A reminder, once you die, I'll be free. But... well, I always finish what I start. I won't leave until I devour you." "You're a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, but you've neglected your duty and allowed those monsters to wreak havoc on the Xianzhou. What a disgrace... Hey! What do you think you're doing, small fry!? I'm the only one who can scold her!" "Roaaaarr!" "You want to get physical, huh? Good, you asked for it!" Since being possessed by Tail, Huohuo has become highly sought-after by evil spirits, like moths to a flame. Huohuo always blames Tail for her ominous title as the "cursed one," and Tail finds having a host like Huohuo can be frustrating at times. However, years have passed, and Tail hasn't harmed Huohuo in the slightest. Although Tail never fails to help her after witnessing enough frustration, he denies any notion of friendship. "Issued by the Ten Lords, Huohuo the spiritfarer has performed extraordinarily during her tenure and has proven to be reliable for crucial tasks. She is hereby promoted to the position of 'Judge.'" The Ten-Lords Commission decreed her promotion, and thus begun Huohuo's new tenure as a trainee judge.

C: 「工作时间，他是个经验丰富、处事不惊的治安官。辉煌之时已过，他手软了许多，雄心与壮志也随着白日梦的破碎消磨殆尽。下班后，他去往老酒馆消磨漫长的夜晚，为自己和老朋友亲手调上几杯饮料。酒杯相撞之际，那些话语如同泡沫一样翻涌开来，旋即幻灭。 他回忆着自己的黄金岁月，那时的他即便身受监禁依然向往自由。他们一起反抗欺压，将性命全数托付给伙伴。他们梦想着自由的领土，随时会死却仿佛将无数个美好的明天攥在手中。然而到底寡不敌众，熟悉之人一个个逝去，理想破灭，荒诞横行—— 『那是你经历的事情吗？你…你是在开玩笑吧？』客人打断了他幽幽的自语。 『当然了，怎么可能是真的嘛。』他笑笑，继续着手上的活。 ——加拉赫是我最真实的谎言。有时，我甚至分不清他与我之间的界限。」 ——《手记•加拉赫》
E: "During working hours, he presents himself as a seasoned and composed security officer. His prime has passed, he is more lenient, and his ambitions and aspirations have faded with the shattering of his dreams. After work, he would head to the familiar lounge to spend the long nights, mixing drinks for himself and longtime friends. As glasses clink, those conversations flow and fizzle like foams, then instantly disappear. He reminisces about the golden years when he yearned for freedom despite his captivity. Together, they fought against oppression, entrusting their lives to one another. They dreamed of a free land. They might die any moment, yet acted as if they already held countless wonderful tomorrows within their grasp. However, there were not enough of them to fight back. Familiar friends perished one by one. Ideals crumbled, and atrocities prevailed... 'Is that something you lived through? You... you must be kidding, right?' The guest interrupts his gloomy soliloquy. 'Of course not. How can it possibly be true?' He smiles and resumes his work. ...Gallagher is my most truthful lie. Sometimes, I can't even distinguish between him and myself." — Note: Gallagher

C: 时至今日，沐浴神性的织机仍在不停轮转，众多衣匠飘摇于半空，无人知道它们是为何而舞动，又是为何而休止。 「衣匠，请前往广场，那里有我们远道而来的客人……」 这样的场景似乎重复过很多次。以往是她走向别人，现在是别人走向她。 彼时彼刻，那身着银白铠甲的青年站在此处，稚气未脱的脸庞被仇恨和血污浸染。 紫裙的少女静默无声，她所行之地，冰冷的死亡会掺杂着幽深的花香。 还有一位飞贼像猫儿似的从奥赫玛消失，但她仍当这是场滑稽的恶作剧。 那如微光般温暖的女孩，也曾治愈过她的伤痕。 还有那异邦的王储，高傲的学者—— 「如果一根丝线不够，那么就让千千万万根丝线拉起天穹……」 她寻找着，牵引着各异的命运之线，将他们连缀为强韧的网，然后，那网会扑向泰坦的火种，令它们在新的世界再度燃烧。 「黄金裔们，会一同编织出璀璨夺目的未来。」 在等待的间隙，她来到窗边，俯瞰着熙熙攘攘的奥赫玛城。 「衣匠，再为我沏一杯热茶吧。」 她感到些许寒冷，但她的心已不再为往事的悲伤而悸动。 无形的金线自她的指尖向外延展，城邦的脉搏与心跳，风声与雨声，都在她的指尖跃动、颤抖，就像浪漫之神诞下的灵感，孕育着新生命的搏动—— 她端详已久，终是收起了少女时代裁剪的华服。 「哪怕，最后只能身着素衣……」 相传每一位「墨涅塔」的信众，往往都会耗费一生的辛劳，向神明献上自己所认为「至美」的作品。 她已很久没有编织过美丽的衣物了。 但她从未停下过织造命运的脚步。
E: To this day, the divine loom spins relentlessly, with numerous Garmentmakers hovering in midair. No one knows why they dance or why they rest. "Garmentmaker, please head to the plaza. We have guests who have traveled from afar..." This scene had unfolded countless times before. In the past, she was always the one reaching out, and now, it was others who sought her. At that moment, a young man in silver-white armor stands there, his youthful face marred by hatred and bloodstains. The girl in the purple dress remains silent, leaving a trail of chilling death mingled with the deep fragrance of flowers wherever she goes. A thief, as stealthy as a cat, vanishes from Okhema, but she dismisses it as merely a silly prank. The girl, warm as a faint light, had once healed her scars. And then there is the crown prince from the outlands, the proud scholar — "If one thread isn't enough, then let a myriad of threads lift the sky..." She seeks out diverse threads of fate, intertwining them into a resilient net. This net would launch toward the Titans' Coreflames, rekindling it afresh in a new world. "The Chrysos Heirs will together weave a dazzlingly bright future." During a brief pause, she steps up to the window, overlooking the bustling city of Okhema below. "Garmentmaker, brew me another cup of hot tea, please." She shivers slightly, yet her heart is no longer stirred by the sorrows of the past. Invisible golden threads spill from her fingertips, intertwining with the city-state's pulse and heartbeat, with the whisper of wind and patter of rain — all resonating under her touch, like inspiration conjured by the god of romance, pulsing with the promise of new life. After deep thought, she carefully packs away the ornate garments she had crafted in her youth. "Even if, in the end, I must wear nothing but plain clothes..." Legend holds that every disciple of Mnestia devotes their entire life to crafting what they deem to be the "ultimate beauty" to present to their deity. It's been a long time since she crafted beautiful garments. Yet, she has never ceased weaving the threads of destiny.

C: 在行动条上添加【外包】，每次【外包】行动时，会召唤公司员工。
E: Attaches Outsourcing to the action bar. Every time Outsourcing takes action, summons IPC Workers.

C: 丹恒：坼树之下，探渊索珠
E: Dan Heng: Pearl-Diver Beneath the Ruined Tree

C: 阿兰似乎担心自己会拖累你们，但你们在说服他这点上已经产生了一种微妙的默契，难道这就是同伴么？\n和同伴一起，抓紧时间去往最上层吧。
E: Arlan seems to worry that he would be a hindrance, but you as a group already developed a sort of delicate rapport in how to persuade him. Could this be what it means to be companions?\nHurry and reach the top floor with your companions.

C: 你们平安着陆雅利洛-Ⅵ，却发现此处只有冷冽的霜风和无垠的雪原向各位表示欢迎。\n毫无头绪的你回想起姬子的话：成功的开拓需要「探索」、「了解」、「建立」和「连结」…现在大概是正处于「探索」的阶段吧——\n无论如何，现在恐怕只剩下在风雪中前进，或者等星核自己找上门这两种选择了。
E: You land on Jarilo-VI safely, but now find yourselves standing in frigid winds among barren snowfields stretching as far as the eye can see.\nFeeling stuck, you recall Himeko's words: Successful trailblazers must learn to explore, understand, establish, and connect... Maybe this is what exploring looks like.\nIn any event, your options are now clear: Push through the snow or wait for the Stellaron to miraculously appear by itself.

C: 三月七试图说服你，但结果呢？你突然不是那么在乎了，因为你在此时此刻遭到了小朋友的挑衅。\n这你可忍不了！——是时候让小朋友感受成年人世界的严酷了。\n这群小鬼还不知道的是，刚才的演练不过是热身罢了…真正残忍的「捉迷藏游戏」才刚刚开始！
E: March 7th attempts to convince you but you no longer care for it as much anymore, because the kids have started taunting you.\nYou will not stand for this! It's time to show these children the cruelty of the grown-ups' world.\nLittle do they know that the practice just now was just a warm-up... The cruel and real Hide-and-seek is only about to begin!

C: 你们抵达了孤儿院门口，也大致了解了布洛妮娅困惑的原因——尽管目前仍只是个猜测，但她或许曾在这里生活过一段时间…\n总之，先在此处搜索娜塔莎需要的物资吧。
E: You arrive at the orphanage entrance and have somewhat understood what's bothering Bronya — although it's just speculation, she might have lived here in the past...\nAnyways, first search this place for the supplies that Natasha wants.

C: 你在这个神秘的空间醒来，被朦混的星空笼罩，被琥珀色的命运包裹。\n你记得自己的身体被可可利亚的枪尖贯穿——这里是死后的世界吗？但你的意识如此清醒，身体也轻盈如初…脑海中某个浑厚的声音似乎在指引着你，告诉你「我还活着」。\n也许你的同伴们还在与可可利亚厮杀。无论如何，你必须找到办法回到他们的身边。
E: You wake up in a strange place surrounded by nebulous stars, seemingly enveloped by an amber-colored destiny.\nThe last thing you remember is being pierced by Cocolia's lance... Could this be the afterlife? But your mind is still very clear and your body still has strength... These resounding voices in your head seem to be guiding you, telling you that you are still alive.\nYour companions might still be in fierce combat with Cocolia. You have to find a way to get back to their side, no matter what.

C: 可可利亚已经战败，星核的影响也随着她的消亡而减弱。\n为了让第一世界的人们坦然接受大守护者战死的事实，布洛妮娅编织了一个善意的谎言。\n希儿带着被疲劳击穿的布洛妮娅赶回了上层区。同时，必须也有人将胜利的讯息带给下层区的人们。
E: Cocolia was defeated and the influence of the Stellaron weakened with her demise.\nBronya had fabricated a white lie to let the people of Belobog accept the passing of their Supreme Guardian in battle.\nSeele then returned to the Overworld with Bronya, who was utterly exhausted. At the same time, someone also needs to bring the news of the victory to the Underworld.

C: 在同卡芙卡缠斗时，太卜司之首符玄出现，奉景元的命令将犯人带往太卜司。\n在筹备审问事宜前，你们被暂时留在「长乐天」静候太卜司引路人的消息。
E: Fu Xuan, head of the Divination Commission, appears while you are engaged in combat with Kafka. She then takes Kafka back to the Divination Commission as per Jing Yuan's orders.\nYou are temporarily left in the Exalting Sanctum as Kafka's interrogation is being prepared and are told to wait for the guide from the Divination Commission.

C: 按照景元所想，欲得知星核猎手的真正意图，普通的审问手法毫无作用。唯有借太卜司中名为「穷观」的法阵，鉴往知来，演算真相。\n但此刻阵基停转，符箓熄灭。景元再度使出兵法中「来都来了」之计，请你们出手相助。
E: Jing Yuan postulates that ordinary interrogations will not be effective in learning the true motive of the Stellaron Hunters. Such a goal can only be achieved using the computational algorithm named Matrix of Prescience in the Divination Commission, which can examine the past and future and calculate the truth.\nHowever, the base terminals are currently out of commission and their talismans deactivated. Once again, Jing Yuan employs the stratagem of "Since You Are Here" to ask for your help.

C: 「建木」的根系缠紧洪炉，自工造司各处汲取力量，生成名为「丰饶玄鹿」的灵兽拱卫自身。\n一番奋战，你们却发现玄鹿生机不绝，倒地亦能复生。唯有切断其供输来源，方有胜机。
E: The Ambrosial Arbor's roots wrap tightly around the furnace and absorb power from all over the Artisanship Commission, creating the Abundant Ebon Deer to protect itself.\nYou discover during battle that the Ebon Deer appears immortal and revives as soon as it is defeated. The only chance you have of victory is to cut off its energy source.

C: 受符玄之托，你们要前往天舶司将「停云」留下的扇子送交驭空。无论幻胧究竟是幻化伪装停云，抑或是操控了她，这其中都潜藏着某种危险的可能性——那位停云也许遭遇了不测。\n驭空司舵在悲伤中撑持，力主举办一场「仪式」，来安抚所有人内心的伤痛。司辰宫中，你们与岩明一同整理了停云所留的物品，其中有些竟是尚未送出的礼物……
E: Fu Xuan had entrusted you to head to the Sky-Faring Commission and give to Yukong the fan "Tingyun" left behind. Whether Phantylia was disguised as Tingyun or mind-controlled her — both spell out dangerous possibilities. The real Tingyun might have suffered a lethal accident.\nBarely holding herself up in her immense sorrow, Helm Master Yukong insists on holding a "soul-soothing ceremony" to appease the pain everyone must be feeling. You and Yanming work through the items Tingyun left behind in the Palace of Astrum, only to discover that some were in fact gifts yet to be sent out...

C: 姬子和瓦尔特已经先行一步，前去为列车组众人办理入住手续。和三月七一起前往「白日梦」酒店前台，同他们会合吧。
E: Himeko and Welt have gone on ahead to help everyone check in. Head to The Reverie's reception with March 7th and meet with the others.

C: 武者声称自己叫作「黄泉」，是一名巡海游侠。\n继续跟上她的步伐，离开这座陌生的梦吧。
E: The warrior calls herself "Acheron," a Galaxy Ranger.\nContinue to follow in her footsteps and leave this strange dream.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 尽管谈判进程一度扑朔迷离，但好在结果皆大欢喜。在黑天鹅的陪同下，你们应该能在「真正的忆域」中免于危险。\n将银狼提供的代码输入入梦池，准备好一睹梦境的真容吧。
E: Although the negotiation process was a little uncertain at times, at least everyone is happy with the results. With Black Swan's company, you should be able to avoid any danger in the "real Memory Zone."\nEnter the code that Silver Wolf gave you into the Dreampool and prepare to witness the true nature of the Dreamscape.

C: 得知了伙伴们失散的消息后，黑天鹅带领你在忆域中继续前进。途中，你们意外遇到了正在此地探寻秘密的巡海游侠（尽管她给出了充分的理由，但你有理由怀疑她大概是又迷路了）。\n有了这位游侠的协助，你们抵达大堂应该不成问题——但黑天鹅似乎有些忌惮她，为什么？
E: Having learned of how your companions have become scattered, Black Swan continues to lead you forward in the Memory Zone. Along the way, you unexpectedly encounter the Galaxy Ranger, who is here searching for secrets (though she gave sufficient reasons for her to be here, you have reasons to suspect that she just got lost again.)\nNow, with the assistance of this Ranger, it should be no trouble for you all to make it to the hotel lobby — However, Black Swan seems a little apprehensive of her... Why could this be?

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n忆域正在不断变化。有时候，你们得依靠一些的小技巧才能找到真正的出口。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nThe Memory Zone keeps transforming. Sometimes, you may have to rely on certain tricks to find the true exit.

C: 你拜托博学的拉帝奥教授帮你前往沉思室找一座弹珠机模型。真为他感到开心！
E: You ask the knowledgeable Dr. Ratio to help you look for a pinball machine model in the Meditation Room. So happy for him!

C: 万事俱矣——是时候重返舞台，献上令世界激醒的最后安可了。
E: Everything is in place... It is time to return to the stage for the final encore that will jolt the world awake.

C: 缭乱•忍侠的过往如浮世绘画卷般徐徐展开，在她飒爽的身姿与笑容之暗面，究竟隐藏着何种不为人知的血泪秘事呢…你已经完成了忍法宗师•苦茶大师的试炼，依照大师先前所言，你此刻已经拥有了成为「忍徒」的资格。\nAK-A-3，忍者的游戏好玩吗？
E: The Dazzling Ninja Hero's past unfurls like a Ukiyo-e scroll. Just what kind of untold sorrow and pain is hiding behind her determined facade and cheerful smile...? Having passed the challenges set by the Ninja Grandmaster, Master Kucha, you are now eligible to bear the title of a ninja initiate as he had previous stated.\nAK-A-3, are you enjoying your little ninja game?

C: 纷争泰坦「尼卡多利」突袭奥赫玛，情急下我们伸出援手，跟随白厄一路击败泰坦眷属、保护居民。
E: Nikador, the Strife Titan, launched a surprise attack on Okhema. In a moment of desperation, we stepped in to assist. Following Phainon's lead, we defeated the Titankin and protected the residents on the way.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 为尽可能安全地推行计划，遐蝶与{NICKNAME}决定融入祭典，与一名沉默的斗士组成三人小组，向悬锋城深处进发。
E: To execute their plan as safely as possible, Castorice and {NICKNAME} decided to blend into the festival celebration, forming a trio with a silent warrior and venturing deeper into Castrum Kremnos.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 白厄找到了禁闭中的那刻夏，似乎不单是为了叙旧。
E: Phainon finds the confined Anaxa, apparently not just for catching up.

C: 你决绝地否定了悬锋人千载的荣耀执念，决定独自还乡，接下尼卡多利抗击黑潮的使命。在迈上回乡之路之前，你还需与城中的友人们一一作别。
E: You decisively reject the Kremnoans' centuries-old obsession with glory, opting to return home alone and assume Nikador's duty against the black tide. Before starting your homeward journey, you need to say goodbye to your friends in the city.

C: 得知阿那克萨戈拉斯投奔元老院之后，为了掌控火种动向，阿格莱雅立刻动身前去黎明云崖质问元老院。\n将万敌传来的警告告诉阿格莱雅。
E: After discovering Anaxagoras had fled to the Council of Elders, Aglaea rushed to Dawncloud to confront the Council.\nDeliver Mydei's warning to Aglaea.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n一切都指向斯缇科西亚最高处的塔，那里曾留下过巨龙的痕迹。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nEverything points to the highest towers at Styxia. There, remains left by the great dragon linger.

C: 在风堇的呼唤中，索拉比斯恢复了神智。既而，塞涅俄丝的两位随伴翼兽愿意为我们带路，前往艾格勒的所在处。
E: Responding to Hyacine's call, Solabis regained its sanity. Then, Seliose's two companion winged beasts offered to guide us to Aquila's location.

C: 塞涅俄丝的过往似乎与故事所述相差甚远，在她曾经的两名随伴奇兽陪同下，我们即将揭示被掩藏的古老真相。
E: Seliose's past seems to diverge greatly from what was told in bygone stories. Now, accompanied by her two mythical companion beasts from ages past, we stand poised to unveil the ancient and hidden truths.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 黑潮的造物连同那位盗火行者在此间步步紧逼，而刻法勒的火种却仍不见踪影。我们选择相信被托付火种的赛飞儿，向着云石天宫不断奔跑。
E: Black Tide Creatures, along with the Flame Reaver, are closing in step by step, yet Kephale's Coreflame remains nowhere to be found. We choose to trust Cipher, who was entrusted with the Coreflame, and keep running toward Marmoreal Palace.

C: 击败塞涅俄丝的同时，风堇与迷迷不约而同地感应到奥赫玛发生的异变，留给我们思考的时间不多了。
E: At the moment of Seliose's defeat, both Hyacine and Mem sensed a strange happening in Okhema at the same time. Our window of consideration is narrowing by the second.

C: 世界之外，天才们藉现有信息进行推演，令翁法罗斯的本质逐步浮出水面。
E: Worlds beyond, the geniuses compile the present information to begin their extrapolation, compelling Amphoreus's quintessential nature to surface.

C: 每场远征之前，必经一场预示命运坎坷的风浪。于神话之外的观剧台上，唯一的观众将你引入英雄未死之前的故事，拉开一场悲剧的序幕。
E: Every expedition begins with a storm that foretells the hardships to come. On the audience's seats in the Exomyth, the only audience member leads you into the story titled "Before Their Deaths," and thus draws the curtain on a tragedy.

C: 「我告别这美丽的世界，只为在你的回忆中，以我渴望的方式重逢。」 「你会在往昔的涟漪里，看见我留下的足迹。」 「在这记忆之外，我不曾拥有其他命运。」 「请用『爱』铭记我，就像所有逝去的诗篇里，唯一不变的尾注。」 「现在，翻开这本书吧——」 「我会在过去等你。」
E: "I bid farewell to this beautiful world, so that we can reunite in your memories in the way I want." "You will see the footprints I left behind in the ripples of past reverie." "I have never had any other fate beyond this memory." "So, please remember me with 'love,' like that eternal footnote in all the faded sagas." "Now, open this book." "I'll be waiting for you in the past."

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n神悟树庭灵水淤积，按「贼灵」的说法解决难题吧。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nThe spirit water has stagnated in the Grove of Epiphany. Resolve this with the Spirithief's tricks.

C:
丹恒，你最信任的列车护卫，「开拓」之旅中最靠谱的伙伴。
他接受了「大地」的神权，只为与你，与黄金裔的伙伴们一起，并肩面对新世界，以及即将到来的决战——仅仅是知道他回到了翁法罗斯，就让你多了一份、不，一百份的安心感。

当他的神识深入无人可及的忆潮中时，他既是层岩，他也是海浪，他还是霜风…
他是大地，亦是其上的万物。
他为你而来，现在你们要为小三月而去。

烈阳已经指明了方向，继续前进吧。
E:
Dan Heng, your most trusted Express Guard, and the most reliable companion on your Trailblaze journey.
He accepted Earth's divine authority, solely to stand alongside you and the Chrysos Heir friends, facing the new world and the impending final clash together. Just knowing he's back in Amphoreus gives you not just one, but a hundred times more peace of mind.

When his consciousness delves into the memoria tide where no one else can reach, he is the bedrock, the waves, and the frosty gales...
He is the Earth and all that exists upon it.
He came for you, and now you will both go for March.

The blazing sun has shown the way. Press onward.

C: 临近「最后的再创世」之前，各方势力皆需做好准备。\n为了胜利，也许我们还需要更多的盟助……
E: As the "final Era Nova" approaches, all factions must be prepared.\nFor victory, we may need to seek more allies...

C: 翁法罗斯与外界的隔绝状态被打破，三位无名客先行者成为新世界的泰坦。圣城居民向「负世」的{NICKNAME}祈祷，虔诚等待全世的神谕降临。
E: The isolation of Amphoreus has been shattered, and the three Nameless forerunners have become Titans of the new world. The holy city's residents pray to the Worldbearing {NICKNAME}, devoutly awaiting the divine prophecy to descend upon the world.

C: 智械哥留下关于「墓碑」的注释作为遗言。种种迹象表明，德谬歌的确存在。该是与智械哥对峙的时候了，他的忌惮正是不容忽视的证据。
E: Old Intellitron left notes about the "tombstone" as his final message. All signs indicate that Demiurge does indeed exist. It's time to confront old Intellitron, for his apprehension is the undeniable proof.

C: 愿望，只是救世主执念的一部分。深入归墟的旅途中，我们又与刻律德菈、海瑟音、缇安、缇宁等伙伴重逢。每位黄金裔都目睹了白厄一路走来的孤独抗争，也都毫不犹豫地化身同行的记忆，只为与救世主并肩作战。
E: Wishes are but a part of the Deliverer's obsession. During our journey deep into the ruin, we reunited with other companions such as Cerydra, Hysilens, Trianne, and Trinnon. Each Chrysos Heir witnessed Phainon's solitary defiance along the way, and they transformed without hesitation into memories that walk with us, only to be able to fight alongside the Deliverer.

C: 在黄金裔们的陪伴下，我们终于来到归墟的最深处，白厄的英魂就在此处镇守「毁灭」的劫火。当空白的愿望烧灼为负世的意志，我们终将为卡厄斯兰那带来解脱，并接过他的责任与最后的心愿——击败铁墓，拯救翁法罗斯，乃至全银河。
E: Accompanied by the Chrysos Heirs, we finally reached the deepest part of the ruins, where Phainon's heroic soul guards the cataclysmic fire of the Destruction. As the blank wish is transformed through fire into the will to bear the world, we shall finally bring release to Khaslana and inherit his responsibility and final wish: to defeat Irontomb, help Amphoreus, and save even the entire cosmos.

C: 我追上了德谬歌的记忆，踏入一处静谧的花园——这是一页永恒的美好记忆。
E: I caught up with the Demiurge's memories and stepped into a tranquil garden... This is an eternal page of beautiful memories.

C: 如果觉得累了，就在这里好好睡一觉吧——一切珍贵的回忆，都会如温暖的毛绒，包裹着你进入梦乡。
E: If you feel fatigued, feel free to take a respite here. All your precious memories will wrap around you like warm fleece as you drift into dreamland.

C: 从一页永恒返回战场吧。让记忆与爱成为我们的弓矢，平息那无首巨匠的劫火，为银河的未来做出截然不同的证明——宇宙的答案绝非「毁灭」，在沉重的终幕背后，会亮起希望的起始。
E: Return to the battlefield from An Eternal Page. Let remembrances and love be our bow and arrow to quell the headless giant's karmic flames and prove a different path for the Cosmos's future. The answer to the universe will never be the Destruction. Hope's beginning shall shine forth behind the heavy curtain of the final act.

C: 帕梅拉告诉你，谣言的制造者是位「戴黑框眼镜斜刘海的小伙」。\n遵从着上述信息，你开始努力寻找符合上述特征的男性科员。
E: Pamela said that the rumor maker is "a guy with black-framed glasses and side-swept bangs."\nFind the male researcher that fits the description.

C: 维修人员接过备用电源，成功重启了电梯，你乘坐电梯前往下层。\n迎接你的不知会是「瓜农」帕梅拉，还是未知的危险。
E: The Maintenance Staff took the backup batteries and successfully restarted the elevator. You step into the elevator to make your way down.\nThere's no telling whether you will be greeted by the Gossipmonger, Pamela, or unknown danger.

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 列车…竟被巨真蛰虫吞进了腹中？！
E: Has the Express somehow... been swallowed up by a Giant Sting!?

C: 穿梭空间的特性果然很难缠，冥火再一次在你眼前逃脱
E: The infernal fire has once again escaped from before you. Its ability allowing it to warp between locations is certainly difficult to deal with

C: 尤利安被吓坏了，一切的症结竟是…？
E: Julian has been scared to death. Just what could have caused all of this...?

C: 你从跃渊那儿得到了古海与漂流瓶的近况，不愧是罗浮，一切井然有序，而无名客的善举也得到了应有的嘉奖。
E: You received a message from Yueyuan about the recent goings-on with the ancient sea and the Drift Bottles. As expected of the Luofu, everything is in order and the good deeds of the Nameless have been duly rewarded.

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区开始。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Starting from the Overworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n结局圆满。人人都有光明的未来。完美。\n帕姆注：算了…我还是去看姬子的日报帕……
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nHappy end. Everyone has a bright future. Perfection.\nPom-Pom's Notes: Never mind... I'm gonna go read Himeko's daily report...

C: 保姆是四位嫌疑人中的一位，没有不在场证据，需要仔细盘问，才能听出破绽。\n据斯薇塔介绍说这几位嫌疑人曾经都十分信任费斯曼老爹，一定是发生过什么，才会在彼此之间出现了裂隙。
E: The helper is one of the four suspects. They have no alibi, and you need to question them in detail to see if they're hiding the truth.\nAccording to Swetta, these suspects used to trust Fersman with all their hearts. Something must have caused a rift between them.

C: 你在铁卫禁区再次遇到了希莉儿…她已经不再是一个小女孩了。\n你帮助希莉儿解决了第四个箱子谜题。\n和她聊聊…或许她准备好告诉你真相了。
E: You bump into Cyrille again in the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone... And she's no longer a little girl.\nYou've helped her solve the fourth box puzzle.\nTalk to her... Perhaps this time, she'll finally be ready to tell you the truth.

C: 你与娜塔莎一同前往雪原，试图在一片白皑中寻找瓦赫生活过的痕迹。\n在同一群银鬃铁卫交流过后，你们得知瓦赫已经成功地研制出了「风雪免疫」的样品。\n带着铁卫赠予的药物和最后一丝希望，你们继续走向雪原深处。
E: Natasha and you head towards the Snow Plains, searching for traces of Vache's life.\nAfter communicating with a group of Silvermane Guards, you learn that Vache had successfully developed a sample of "Blizzard Immunity."\nWith the medicine the guards gave you, you go even deeper into the Snow Plains.

C: 会谈各方已经就位——虽然这诊所里可供落座的地方少得可怜，但你不妨也找个位子旁听这场「官方」会谈吧。
E: The two parties of the meetings have arrived. Though there are very few places to sit in the clinic, you might as well find a spot to audit this "official" meeting.

C: 玲可似乎因为佩拉有些触动。她请求你陪她一起返回机械屋「永动」，且似乎有话想对自己的哥哥姐姐说。\n陪同玲可一道返回机械屋「永动」吧——你总是无法拒绝别人的请求，不是吗？
E: Lynx seems to be emotionally affected because of Pela. She asks you to go back to the Neverwinter workshop with her, and seems to have something to say to her siblings.\nGo back to the workshop with her. You've always found it hard to refuse other people's requests, don't you?

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆的展品遭遇了一连串的莫名失窃。\n为了找回失窃的展品，你和佩拉决定前往大矿区调查。\n下层区的铁卫发来消息，他们在歌德大饭店发现了失窃的「流星碎片」。去看看情况吧。
E: There has been a series of thefts in the Belobog History and Culture Museum.\nTo find the lost exhibits, Pela and you decide to head to the Great Mine to investigate the matter.\nThe Silvermane Guards from the Underworld sent news that they discovered the stolen Meteor Fragment in the Goethe Grand Hotel. Go check it out.

C: 你帮助贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆找回了一件珍贵的失窃展品。\n从佩拉处得知，博物馆临近开放，现在正缺一位兼职的运营经理。\n这项业余活动提起了你的兴趣，去和博物馆的大堂助理艾丽斯打个招呼吧。
E: You helped the Belobog History and Culture Museum recover a valuable stolen artifact.\nYou learn from Pela that, as the museum is about to open to the public, they need a part-time operation manager.\nThis after-hours activity piques your curiosity. Go and say hello to Eris, the museum's lobby secretary.

C: 陶德意在研究持明族的历史，但传闻中能见证持明族历史变迁的「鳞渊境」他却进不了。无奈之下陶德拜托你去往鳞渊境，为他拍摄几张照片，以供他完成研究。
E: Todd intends to study the history of the Vidyadhara. However, he couldn't enter Scalegorge Waterscape, where rumors say the history of the Vidyadhara race can be viewed. With no other alternative, Todd asks you to go to Scalegorge Waterscape and take some photos for him to complete his research.

C: 从梅姐那里没有打听到什么有用的信息，还是得问问其他的目击者。在事故现场四处找找，肯定有人发现了值得关注的线索。
E: You fail to get anything useful out of Mei and have to ask the other witnesses. Look around the scene of the accident. Someone must have found some pertinent clues.

C: 在协助地衡司确认嫌犯的过程中，事情发生了意料之外的展开——地衡司的人还没急，瓦尔特倒是先急了。他一看见罗刹那张俊美的脸庞，当时就愣住了，冷汗浸透了衬衫。你当然不知道这是为什么，但杨叔如此紧张，必然有他的道理，还是和他一起调查一下这位罗刹先生吧。\n话说三月七怎么这么兴奋…还有，她什么时候多了个「名侦探」的人设？
E: In the process of helping the Realm-Keeping Commission in identifying suspects, something unexpected happened. The Realm-Keeping Commission isn't too anxious about it, but Welt was. The moment he saw Luocha's flawless face, he was stunned and cold sweat drenched his shirt. You don't know the reason, but Welt must have a good reason for being so unnerved. Continue to investigate this Mr. Luocha.\nSay, what is March 7th so excited about, and since when did she have a "Genius Detective" tacked onto her name?

C: 你领到了快递，希望能和白露一起拆开。\n虽然这不是寄给你们的包裹，但是半夏已经不在了，看看梁沐都说了些什么吧。
E: You receive the parcel and want to open it with Bailu.\nThis isn't a parcel sent to either of you, but since Banxia is no longer around, look at what he wrote.

C: 三月七不认识这里，她很确定这并不在自己的记忆之中。她分不清这究竟是穷观阵的演算结果，还是「信使」的又一个把戏。\n但「信使」温柔地为她指引着方向，似乎当真愿意为她展现她的「起点」。\n三月七谨慎地跟着「信使」的指引前进，心中竟觉得有些释然——毕竟无论在前往等待着她的是什么，都会成为她崭新的「记忆」。
E: March 7th doesn't recognize this place. She is certain this is not her memory. She can't tell whether this is the Matrix of Prescience's calculation result or yet another trick from the Messenger.\nHowever, the Messenger is gently pointing the way for her, as if they genuinely wish to show March 7th her "beginning."\nMarch 7th cautiously moves forward following the Messenger's guidance, and actually feels rather relieved — No matter what lies ahead in wait, it will surely become a new "memory" for her.

C: 自己身边的侍女竟然也只是权力安插的眼线，白露还能相信谁呢？她想和丹恒再聊聊，也许是思绪杂乱，又或许是有了新的想法……\n要不是那些刺客捣乱，他们两个早就该聊聊了，此时不谈，更待何时呢？
E: With even her personal maid revealed to be a spy planted to monitor her at the behest of another authority, who else can Bailu trust? She wants to talk more with Dan Heng. Perhaps her thoughts are in disarray, or maybe she has something new in mind...\nFrankly, if it weren't for those assassins, they should have begun talking some time ago. Well, there's no time like the present, right?

C: 仙舟上人来人往，何愁没有一场感人的离别？你很敏感，你能发现离愁别绪。\n这或许和你熟悉的情景有关，人总得经历「离别」，无论是意料之中，或是意料之外。
E: People come and go on Xianzhou, so why worry about not having a touching parting? You are sensitive and can feel the sorrow of parting.\nThis may be related to situations you are familiar with. People always have to experience "parting," be it expected or not.

C: 鳞渊境中，故旧重聚。正如景元所说「旧事重提犹如搅乱一潭浑水，徒然惹引不快」。但关于一个时代的过往恩怨，理当有人为之画上句点。
E: Past friends reunite in the Scalegorge Waterscape. It is as Jing Yuan said, "Raising old nets only darkens the water — an exercise in unhappiness." But someone ought to end the grudges lingering from an era past.

C: 不出意外，孤云被偷走了！现在嫌疑最大的人就是云璃，这也不出意外。但是云璃是个说到做到的女孩儿，她答应了你不会对孤云出手，你可以相信她。\n现场的人和物能提供关键的证据，不仅能帮助云璃脱离嫌疑，甚至可以找到真正的凶手……
E: To no one's surprise, Guyun has been stolen! And lo and behold, the prime suspect is none other than Yunli. But Yunli has promised she wouldn't do anything to the sword, and you know you can trust her because she is someone who makes good on her word.\nWitnesses and items at the scene of the crime form crucial evidence that may not only help to clear Yunli of suspicion, but also lead you to the true culprit...

C: 云璃的爷爷怀炎将军似乎打算瞒着云璃接收异乡送回的宝剑。不管有没有什么隐情，云璃是不会错过「传奇宝剑」的。\n关于宝剑的事，向赠剑使者询问一下如何？
E: Seems like General Huaiyan is planning to accept the repatriation of the sword while keeping it a secret from his granddaughter Yunli. Even if there's a catch, Yunli would never miss an opportunity to lay her eyes upon the legendary sword.\nIt might be a good idea to learn more about the sword from the envoy involved in the repatriation.

C: 幽囚狱中，来历不明的机械与劫狱者横行无忌，意在救出步离战首。而曜青的使节生死不明。受寒鸦请托，你们不得不深入幽囚狱之底，确认犯人是否依然在押……
E: In the Shackling Prison, unidentified machines and prison breakers wreak chaos with impunity. Their goal is to rescue the borisin Warhead. Meanwhile, the Yaoqing messenger's fate is unknown. At the behest of Hanya, you all have no choice but to delve deeper into the Shackling Prison to confirm if the convict is still behind bars...

C: 幽狱失守，群狼破枷，在演武仪典即将正式召开前，这场惊变打乱了一切计划。仙舟街巷间的一切看似平静如旧，但能变化形貌的狼已潜蹑于人群中。\n对天击将军而言，一场狩猎势在必行。
E: The Shackling Prison has fallen, and a pack of wolves has broken free. This startling development has upset everyone's plans before the Wardance ceremony could even commence. While the Xianzhou alleyways seem as calm and peaceful as ever, wolves capable of shapeshifting have already hidden themselves in the crowd.\nTo the Merlin's Claw, hunting them down is of paramount importance.

C: 誓言为部族带回狼之生存方式的呼雷发出宣言：他将如猎食者行于孱弱的牧群，他将教仙舟人知晓恐惧何物，以他的血和他的子裔。
E: Vowing to bring the wolves' way of survival back to his tribespeople, Hoolay declares that he shall be a wolf walking among sheep, and his blood and his scions shall teach the Xianzhou people the meaning of fear.

C: 竞锋舰上，等待的焦灼与悬危的气氛令云璃也坐立不安。她决定在擂赛开始前巡视竞锋舰各处，确保一切安全无虞。
E: Aboard the Skysplitter, the tense atmosphere and anxiety from waiting are starting to make Yunli uneasy. She decides to conduct a thorough patrol of the Skysplitter before the tournament begins to ensure that nothing untoward is happening.

C: 去找庞德拿到他想给柯柯娜的东西，之后便能够一起离开了吧。
E: Go find Pound and retrieve what he wishes to give to Cocona. Once you have it, you can leave this place together.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 名为查德威克的老人居然曾经是天才俱乐部的一员——他为何会在筑梦边境滞留？\n你决定将他的消息转发给你认识的天才俱乐部成员。
E: Surprisingly, the old man named Chadwick was once a member of the Genius Society. Why is he stranded at the Dream's Edge?\nYou decide to inform other members of the Society — the ones you know, that is — about Chadwick's situation.

C: 英雄或罪人？也许两者都不。\n真正能决定我们去往何方的，从来不是具体的某个人，而是意愿的碰撞——若对现状不满，就去碰撞，让世界知道你的态度。
E: Hero or sinner? Perhaps neither is correct.\nIt is never a single person that truly decides the direction that one takes. It is the collision of wills. If you are dissatisfied with the status quo, charge in and let the world know where you stand.

C: 在迷迷的帮助下，你们闯入了这位眷属的记忆。这是独属于她的往世，也是已然发生过的注定之事，你在这里能做的只有见证与解疑。\n悬锋城人为什么要在牢房周围放一堆能打开牢房的机关？是出于对劫狱者的尊重？还是天天打架真的会影响智力？
E: With Mem's help, you successfully enter the Titankin's memories. This is a past that belongs solely to her. It is also an unchangeable fate that you will only be able to witness.\nWhy would the people of Castrum Kremnos place mechanisms that can open the prison doors placed all around the cells? Are they showing respect for those who would perform a jailbreak? Or has fighting every day taken its toll on their brain power?

C: 今天预言家不上班，不上班，不上班。
E: The prophet isn't working today. They're not working, not working.

C: 科员以斯帖正在为自己的形象而苦恼，她正在研究撞色搭配的事。带着你独特的审美，过去指导一下以斯帖吧！
E: Researcher Esther is having a rough day with her appearance. She's trying to learn about how colors match and clash. With your unique perspective on beauty, go and advise Esther!

C: 向空间站的科员打听，寻找出传闻中晋升为科室骨干的科员，并调查出「幸运签怪谈」的真相。
E: Ask around the space station, find the researcher rumored to have been promoted to the backbone of the department, and investigate the truth behind the Legend of the Fortune Leaf.

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n你买好了花——现在，把老吉尔伯特的信和花束一起转交给莉拉吧。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nYou bought the flowers — Now, pass old Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you as a Trailblazer to infiltrate the Genius Society's simulated universe and see if you can glean the secret behind the Aeons and Paths from out of the simulated Aeons.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 「幽灵」托付给你一件物品，并希望你能将它带向天空。试着达成她的心愿吧。
E: The "ghost" entrusts you with an item and hopes that you can bring it to the sky. Try to fulfill her wish.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 将找到的纽扣还给帕姆吧，但话说回来…好好的纽扣为什么会掉？
E: Return the button you found to Pom-Pom. Speaking of which... Why would a button fall off just like that?

C: 帕姆找不到果汁配方表了，去帮帕姆找找看吧。
E: Pom-Pom lost their Juice Recipe. Help them find it.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 偌大的云石天宫，一定有办法调查到宁芙的下落。
E: There must be a way to find Nympha in a place as big as the Marmoreal Palace

C: 在风堇的委托下，你答应去拜访那些树庭牺牲者的家属，了解一下他们的近况。\n但或许除此以外，你能做的还有很多。
E: You promised to visit the families of those who lost their lives at the Grove and find out about how they're doing at Hyacine's request.\nAside from this, however, you might be able to do something more...

C: 要解救被困的刻牢刻和克利克，必须先把游荡的黑潮造物解决。\n从来没有黑潮造物能在你的球棒下幸存，你决定亲自上阵。
E: To rescue the trapped Kelok and Kilik, you must first eliminate the roaming Black Tide Creatures.\nNo creatures of the black tide have ever survived the weight of your falling bat. You decide to settle matters personally.

C: 为了在不断来袭的黑潮中守住这里，两位小贩提出去取回自己被没收的货物，搭建起一处壁垒。\n虽然你对他们这批货的品质深表怀疑，但也没有其他办法，先目送他们出发吧。
E: To defend against the relentless onslaught of the black tide, two merchants are determined to retrieve their confiscated goods and build a makeshift barricade.\nThough you're deeply skeptical of the quality of their wares, there's no alternative — you watch them depart, hoping their plan holds.

C: 心酿的祭台…不管是为报酬，还是单纯对这个物品感兴趣，你接下了修复它的委托，去找「海洋」司祭来帮忙吧。
E: The soul brew altar... Whether for the reward or simply out of interest in this item, you've accepted the request to repair it. Go find the "Ocean" Priest to help out.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据旧照片找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on an old photo.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往机械聚落，收集「自动机兵•甲虫」的战斗数据，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to collect Automaton Beetle combat data at the Robot Settlement to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了地火的干部希儿。代她们前往大矿区，了解希儿是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on Seele, senior member of Wildfire. Head to the Great Mine in their stead, and see whether Seele is interested in the position.

C: 照片中的黑影有些眼熟，应该是收容舱段中的某样东西……
E: The shadowy object in the photo looks somewhat familiar. It must be something from the Storage Zone...

C: 西衍先生想将你的冒险故事改编成一部评书。但基于某些商业上的理由，他希望能对你的故事做一些…改编。
E: Mr. Xiyan wants to adopt your adventure into a storytelling tale. However, due to some commercial reasons, he would like to make some... modifications to your experience.

C: 在这段胡编乱造的故事中，初代司鼎为后来者设计了一系列的试炼。只有通过这些试炼，才能够炼制出使自己脱胎换骨的灵丹妙药。
E: In this made-up story, the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission designed a series of trials for their successors. Only by passing through these trials can one concoct the elixir that can make oneself be born anew.

C: 西衍先生悠悠地说：「龙尊造像上散发出阵阵异样的空气，似乎暗示了它并不是一尊普通的造像。也许，它能指引{NICKNAME}在这鳞渊境中找到战胜敌人、拯救的良方。」
E: Mr. Xiyan says slowly: "There are strange fumes coming off the Statue of the High Elder, indicating that it is no simple stone. Perhaps it can guide {NICKNAME} to victory over the enemy and salvation for Scalegorge Waterscape."

C: 由于争取到了会长的支持，原本支持会长的商户现在也放下心结，希望能和商会、码头建立合作。\n素裳已经在尚滋味等你了，她可真是个热心肠的好姑娘啊，赶快和她汇合吧。
E: After obtaining the president's support, the merchants who once supported him have also let go of their worries and now hope to establish partnerships with the merchant guild and the docks.\nSushang is waiting for you at Spices Supreme. What a warmhearted girl. You should go meet with her as soon as you can.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「美馔阁」与商会建立合作关系。但「美馔阁」的老板矮阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Short Auntie, owner of Delicacy Pavilion, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Short Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「寿考堂」与商会建立合作关系。但「寿考堂」的老板小天此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Longevity Hall to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietress Little Tian has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n据希露瓦和佩拉所说，这里的试炼是点亮全部的「照雪灯炉」...很难不让人怀疑她们在白嫖挑战者的劳动力。总之，为了得到资格徽章，将这片区域的谜题通通解决吧！
E: In order to challenge the championship contender for each Victory Zone, you must complete the corresponding trial in the Zone.\nAccording to Serval and Pela, the trial here is to light up all the Snowshine Lamps... It really makes one wonder whether they're exploiting the challengers' free labor. Anyways, let's go solve all the puzzles in this Zone and get the Mastery Marks!

C: 除了你以外，本次大赛还有四匹实力非凡的黑马。若想挑战冠军，必须先将他们一一击败才行。
E: Aside from you, this competition also has four other dark horse contenders with serious prowess. If you want to make a run for the championship, you need to take them out one by one first.

C: 符玄似乎陷入一种思维死角中，她想向你证明「既有命中注定，那么一切便是徒劳」，你与捉鬼小队反将这样的邀请当作解开禁锢的钥匙。\n继续与符玄交谈吧，看看能不能唤醒她。
E: Fu Xuan seems trapped in a deadlock of thoughts, attempting to prove to you that "if everything is predestined, then everything is futile." You and your squad members decide to instead use this invitation as the key to unlocking her confinement.\nKeep talking with Fu Xuan and see if you can wake her up.

C: 被岁阳迷惑的藿藿，只好在幻障中寻找尾巴的踪迹。她还不知道自己将要遭遇什么——岁阳会找到宿主最为忌惮、最为脆弱的情绪，并将它放大。
E: Huohuo, beguiled by the heliobus, can only searches for traces of Tail in the illusion. She is yet unaware of what she will encounter — heliobi will find the host's most painful and vulnerable emotions, and amplify them to unbearable heights.

C: 驭空大人答应去绥园协助十王司调查，在你们回到绥园之前应该和晴霓打声招呼。\n不过，她担忧驭空被岁阳控制了心智，她的担忧不无道理。
E: Madam Yukong has agreed to head to Fyxestroll Garden and assist the Ten-Lords Commission in their investigation. Before returning to Fyxestroll Garden, you should let Qingni know.\nHowever, Qingni is concerned that Madam Yukong has been possessed by a heliobus, and her worries are well-founded.

C: 黑塔等人给「扩展装置」加了一个新的演算分支：他们给它起名叫「黄金与机械」。斯蒂芬•劳艾德这一次似乎为你制作了一个「自定义骰」，他保证这次比之前的觐见之骰都更加有趣。
E: Herta and others have added a new Calculation branch named "Gold and Gears" to the Expansion Module. This time, Stephen Lloyd has created a "custom dice" for you, promising it to be even more interesting than any previous Audience Dice.

C: 许多监狱区划都被这些古怪的迷钟占据了。你需要想办法修好它们，以免影响美梦小镇的重建工作。
E: Many prison areas have been taken over by these strange Tickers. You have to find a way to fix them, so they don't interfere with the rebuilding of Dreamville.

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n片场准备好了，快去进行拍摄吧。
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nThe location has been set up. Head there to film.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•演技派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「演技」的考验……\n演技是什么？你完全不理解这个词的意思。对你而言，真诚永远是最强的必杀技。
E: The first choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia: Acting Challenge arena. According to the guide's instructions, your "acting" skills will be tested here...\nWhat are acting skills exactly? You have no idea. For you, sincerity has always been the ultimate instrument.

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n十五日中，你们多次与藿藿一同经历「江湖奇遇」，也许可以向藿藿寻求一点建议。
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nYou've both experienced numerous "wanderlust escapades" with Huohuo during this period. It could be a good idea to ask Huohuo for some advice.

C: 卡美丽很害怕波提欧，因为他是公司的通缉犯。\n你肯定不怕波提欧——你们甚至一起经历过不少事。\n卢卡不知道你们谁对波提欧的描述更准确，只在潜意识中留下了一个朴素的认知——和公司对着干的人，应该不会是坏人。
E: Carmella is very scared of Boothill as he is a criminal wanted by the IPC.\nYou're definitely not scared of Boothill — You've even gone through a lot together.\nLuka doesn't know which version of your descriptions of Boothill is more accurate. He only walks away with a simple understanding in his subconsciousness — Those who go against the IPC probably aren't bad guys.

C:
来到罗浮以后，我总觉得有什么压在身上，令我喘不过气。
最初，我以为是运动损伤。后来，又担心是不适应重力。最后，我终于为自己找到了病因——
我是贝洛伯格<unbreak>700</unbreak>年来第一位去天上打比赛的运动员。
我背负着我的整个故乡。
E:
I've felt there's a weight pressing down on me and making it hard to breathe ever since I arrived on the Luofu.
Initially, I thought it might have been an injury, then I was worried it might be my body not adapting to this gravity. At the end, I finally found the cause of the symptoms —
I'm the first athlete in Belobog in <unbreak>700</unbreak> years to go fight a competition in sky.
I'm carrying my entire home planet on my shoulders.

C: 查看过往的记忆，只有两个人知晓的故事，与僧人们一路的点点滴滴。
E: Review the past memories, a story known only by two people, and the daily lives of the monks on this journey.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到垃圾桶组合的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of the trashcan group's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n达凡绮似乎有事情找你，先在校园里和她会合吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nDafanchy seems to have something to talk with you about. Meet up with her on campus.

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 为了复原「特调配方」，你受邀成为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师。在黑塔的协助下，你完成了第一份配方。接下来，又会有怎样的客人不期而至呢？
E: To restore the "Special Recipe," you've been invited as a guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. With Herta's help, you've completed the first recipe. Now, what unexpected guests will walk through the door next?

C: 空间站的角落里，属于造物们的定向越野大赛正在悄然举行。去看看都有些什么好玩的吧！\n前往禁闭舱段与艾丝妲对话，了解更多关于造物越野大赛的信息。
E: In a corner of the space station, the exciting great obstacle race for creations is secretly underway. Let's check out what fun awaits!\nHead to the seclusion zone and talk to Asta to learn more about the great obstacle race.

E: Welcome the next guest

C: 去找驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大，看看发生了什么？
E: Go find Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas and see what's going on.

C: 感知训练
E: Acuity Training

C: 坚韧训练
E: Tenacity Training

C: <unbreak>-80%</unbreak>
E: <unbreak>-80%</unbreak>

C: 最后1次行动：训练消耗全部心情，每消耗#1点心情，效率提高#2%
E: For the final action: Training consumes all Mood and for every #1 Mood consumed, efficiency increases by #2%

C: 安排至少2次感知训练：本日所有行动额外提高#1点感知
E: Plan at least 2 sessions of Acuity Training: All actions today additionally increases Acuity by #1

C: 假期前高效
E: Pre-Holiday Powerup

C: 高段
E: Culmination

C: 中段
E: Progression

C: 请选择本日想要青雀提供的协助
E: Please select the assist you want Qingque to provide you today

C: 距离第一次试剑
E: Time to First Sword Trial

C: 距离最终试剑
E: Time to Final Sword Trial

C: 距离最终试剑
E: Time to Final Sword Trial

C: 四时剑意•花月
E: Blade Speaks in Seasons: Springrise

C: 瑞叶
E: Glacial Leaves

C: 三月七拯救了禁书中的剑魔，却也失去了剑谱。
E: March 7th saved the Blade Demon in the forbidden text but also lost the swordplay volume she sought.

C: 面对损毁金人束手无策，三月七提醒银狼尝试机械降灵术。
E: Faced with the damaged aurumaton and lacking a plan, March 7th reminds Silver Wolf to try the Art of Spiritus Ex Machina.

C: 别紧张，{NICKNAME}！我跟丹恒都是「开拓」的老手啦，跟着我们保证有肉吃——呃，前提是那个星球上找得到肉！
E: Relax, {NICKNAME}! Dan Heng and I are experienced trailblazers! We got your back!

C: 雅利洛-Ⅵ「开拓」小分队，现在出发咯！
E: Alright! Here comes, the Jarilo-VI Trailblaze Team!

C: 哼，就知道你还是想听星核猎手的。算啦，你再好好想想。
E: Hmph, I should've known you'd listen to that Stellaron Hunter. Whatever — but you should think before you do that.

C: 我是谁我在哪我要干什么！？
E: Wait, what am I supposed to do!?

C: 星核猎手一定别有所图，但考虑到他们的名声，和卡芙卡言语的侧重：仙舟里有一颗星核应是不会错的。
E: The Stellaron Hunters clearly have ulterior motives. However, knowing what they're all about and given the focus of Kafka's words, I have no doubt that the Xianzhou is dealing with a Stellaron.

C: 唉…每次我都以为，那家伙能变得更合群些……
E: *sigh* There I was thinking this guy would gradually open up...

C: 「星核」怎么样了？
E: What happened to the Stellaron?

C: 欢欣或痛苦，圆满或遗憾，都是旅途的一体两面。只要行走在「开拓」的命途上，这些感悟就会一路相随，直到成为习惯。
E: Be it joy or pain, success or regret, it's all part of the journey. Those feelings will accompany you as long as you tread on the Trailblaze, and one day you'll grow used to them.

C: 为此，这颗被黑塔捕获并封印的星核，将别有它用。当银狼解开封印时，你就要拿走它，把它放进早已为此刻准备多时的「容器」里……
E: That's why the Stellaron that Herta sealed away will be put to another use. Once Silver Wolf breaks its seal, you'll have to take it and place it inside a kind of "vessel" that's been waiting for just this occasion...

C: 欢迎来到黑塔空间站，请在此享受知识之海的馈赠——并自负溺亡的风险。
E: Welcome to Herta Space Station. Here, you can savor the bounty of the ocean of knowledge. Please also beware of the risk of drowning.

C: 谁知道追随「智识」的这帮人脑子里在想什么。
E: Who knows what's in the brains of those following the Erudition?

C: 居然输了，好可惜。
E: That's a shame.

C: 我和丹恒是星穹列车的乘员，请多关照啦！
E: Dan Heng and I are members of the Astral Express crew~

C: 想了解空间站。
E: I'd like to learn about the space station.

C: 前不久，我借出了一份她的手稿作为资料参考，应该还在主控舱段里，你有兴趣的话也可以看看。
E: Anyway, I lent out one of her manuscripts as a resource reference not long ago. It should still be in the master control zone. You can take a look if you wish.

C: 而我，「黑塔•银河法政科」的优秀科员卢卡奇，有责任叫醒那些装睡的人！
E: And I, Lukacs, outstanding researcher of the Herta Department of Galactic Geopolitics, must awaken those pretending to sleep!

C: 「奇物编号<unbreak>752</unbreak>：定分枪。该枪会给视线范围内的生物评分，打分逻辑不明。」
E: "Item number <unbreak>752</unbreak>: Rating Pistol. This weapon rates creatures on sight, using unknown scoring logic."

C: 这把枪不会是在逗你吧……
E: Is this gun pulling your leg...

C: 「无法测定！」眼珠在转动了三圈后突然瞪大，在僵持了片刻后，它疲惫地合上了眼皮。
E: "Rating invalid!" Its eyeball swivels around three times before suddenly widening. After a brief impasse, its eye shuts, wearily.

C: 这里…就…交给……
E: I'll be here, you've got to fend them off...

C: 嗯，我敢保证，你们的杨叔正在赶来的路上。
E: Hmm, I can almost guarantee that your Mr. Yang is already on his way.

C: 我现在感兴趣，什么都愿意迁就。身体里有颗星核哎，多有意思！谢恩吧！我出手帮你，这可是星际和平公司花钱都请不着的服务。
E: I'm very interested now, so there's almost nothing I won't accommodate. A Stellaron in your body, how interesting is that! Be grateful that I'm offering to help you out. This is a service even the IPC can't buy.

C: 有阵子我对列车很感兴趣，写了不少研究报告，忘记丢哪儿了，现在什么都不记得了。
E: I was very interested in the Express for a while, and wrote a lot of papers, but forgot where I left them. Now I can't remember anything about it.

C: 我不知道车厢是什么样的。
E: I don't know what the carriage is like.

C: 不，等下——你身体有颗星核啊——你还是走吧，偶尔回来瞧瞧，久住还是太危险了。
E: No, hold on — you have a Stellaron within you. I think it's better if you left and came back occasionally. It might be dangerous if you stay for too long...

C: 我真的很想留在空间站。
E: I really want to stay.

C: 他不会来啦，咱们不用管他。
E: He won't be here, so just leave him be.

C: 好了好了，赶紧找个地方坐下来，不要像三月七乘客一样在列车里乱跑。
E: Okay everyone, hurry up and find a place to sit down. Try not to be like March, always running around the Express like a headless chicken.

C: 「毁灭」的星神只有湮灭宇宙的念头，「智识」的星神一心求解万物的答案；「存护」的星神无休止地铸造着墙壁，「神秘」的星神致力于让确凿无疑的信息变得混沌不清……
E: The Aeon of Destruction seeks only to destroy the universe, while the Aeon of Erudition wants to find the answer for all that exists. Meanwhile, the Aeon of Preservation continues to forge walls, and the Aeon of Enigmata devotes themself to obscuring all that is known...

C: 也带我一个。
E: Can I tag along?

C: 哈，你们对着坏掉的加热器，还能聊这么久呢？
E: Hah, you guys sure have a lot to say about that broken heater.

C: …三心二意！
E: ...Can we focus, please?

C: 我们必须找到星核，而且越快越好——最好在可可利亚有所行动之前。你能给我们指个方向吗？
E: We must locate it as soon as possible — ideally before Cocolia takes action. Can you tell us the way?

C: 啊，正好，佩拉小姐回来了！
E: Ah, right on time, Miss Pela is back!

C: …「谜语人」是什么？
E: ...What is a Riddler?

C: 从老巴拉金的谜题，到有惊无险的栈桥事故，再到奇妙的钻头饰品，你和佩拉一五一十地向二人汇报了此次裂界之旅的见闻。
E: From old Balakin's puzzles, to the gear bridge incident, to the strange drill ornaments, you and Pela tell them everything you experienced on this trip to Fragmentum.

C: 成、成功了！
E: W—we did it!

C: 我…好像明白了。我从小就脾气差，其他孩子都不愿意跟我玩在一块。工作了以后，我也经常因为一些看不过眼的小事跟别人发生争执。
E: I... I think I get it now. I've always had a bad temper, ever since I was little, and all the other kids shunned me. Things didn't get better even after I got a job. I've gotten into quite a few fights with people over some very trivial things.

C: 咦…克拉拉原来这么矮吗？我还以为……
E: Huh...? Am I really that short? I thought...

C: …欸？你的拍照技术…还挺不错的嘛。而且…画面居然这么清晰？
E: ...Wait, that's a nice picture! And... it's crystal clear.

C: （发个短信给瓦尔特先生吧……）
E: (Let's send a message to Mr. Yang...)

C: …你的情况我了解了，希露瓦。我尊重你的选择。
E: ...I understand your circumstances, Serval. I respect your choice.

C: 她生前并不爱好音乐。我猜想它或许和你有联系……
E: She was never a music lover, so... I thought this might be connected to you...

C: 据我所知，前任大守护者没有类似的爱好。
E: If she did, I never knew about it.

C: 谁知道我跟着{NICKNAME}上车之后，什么时候才能回一趟家呢，你说对吧？你以后就是想帮我收拾行李，恐怕也没机会咯。
E: I'm about to go traveling with {NICKNAME} — who knows how long it'll be before I can visit home again. You should help me pack while you still have the chance.

C: 这可能是你家里唯一一盆看起来还活着的植物。
E: It's the only plant here that looks like it's still alive...

C: 行啊，怎么修？
E: Sure. How do I fix it?

C: 不，不是…我听说下层区有很多老旧的能源中枢，整个贝洛伯格恐怕只有你能给那些装置做彻底的检查了。
E: N—No, it's not that... I've heard there are a lot of old energy hubs in the Underworld, and you're probably the only person in Belobog who knows how to inspect them.

C: 在其它的世界里，路灯是鸟儿喜爱的栖息地；而在贝洛伯格，路灯是如此孤零零。
E: In other worlds, street lamps make wonderful roosts for birds, but in Belobog, they stand all alone.

C: 长椅的设计非常符合人体工学，但它们的投放者显然没有考虑环境的因素。
E: The benches are ergonomic in design, but their placement doesn't take the environment into consideration.

C: 陌生人孤身来到这座城市，他的面容坚毅，他的动作迟缓，他翻找垃圾桶的模样，就像拥抱失落的爱人。
E: The stranger came to the city by himself. His face is stoic, and his movements sluggish. He rummaged through the trashcans as if he was embracing a lost lover.

C: 那你就会在自己的舱室里睡一天。
E: By which you mean: Spend a day asleep in your cabin.

C: 垃圾分类的知识涌入你的脑海。
E: Garbage-sorting knowledge comes flooding into your brain.

C: 几位姐们儿，哥们儿，别袖手旁观啊！这事可万万不能闹大呀……
E: M—My friends, don't just stand there! This drama really doesn't need any more bystanders!

C: 咦？那不是医生姐姐吗？
E: Huh? Isn't that the doctor lady?

C: 咦，看你气色挺好的呀？抱歉，我得先替伤重的人治疗。这几天矿工和地痞起了激烈冲突，还有不少人受伤。
E: Oh? You look fine to me. Sorry, I need to prioritize the wounded. There have been violent clashes between the miners and local thugs in the last few days — many people are injured.

C: 这都能睡着…好厉害的睡功！
E: Falling asleep in a place like this... impressive!

C: 肚子都填不饱了，要脸管个屁用——我懂喽，你就盼着咱们全饿趴下，给你们矿队省点口粮喽。
E: Where does disgrace come into it when we can't even fill our stomachs, huh!? I know your game — you're just waiting for us to starve to death, so there's more food for your mining team.

C: 他的机器人好像不大友好…
E: His robots don't seem too friendly...

C: 史瓦罗为什么走了？
E: Why did Svarog leave?

C: 一言为定～那我们来玩吧……咦？
E: Well, that's settled then~ Okay, let's play... Huh?

C: 智慧却如同小孩……
E: ...With a child's brain...?

C: 你当我是文盲嘛！
E: Hey! I read books y'know!

C: 呃…嗨！原来是你们啊，我说怎么有几个人跟在后面，寻思是不是遇见劫道的了，忍不住越走越快…早知道是你们，我就张开双臂来相见了呀。
E: H—Hey! It's you! I was just thinking to myself: "Am I getting robbed? Who are these people following me?" So, y'know, you start to walk a little faster, and... Anyhoo if I'd just turned around, I could've thrown open my arms and said a big "hi" to my old friends.

C: 带路吧…这回别坑我们。
E: Lead the way... and don't try and pull anything this time.

C: 放一万个心吧！还是那句话，桑博绝对不让帮过咱的伙计吃亏。
E: Have a little faith! It's like I said: "Sampo never lets friends who've helped him come to harm." Hehe...

C: 刚见面时觉得挺嚣张，现在一副心事重重的样子，咱也不好问。
E: When I first met her I thought she was kinda scary, but now it seems like there's something on her mind. I'm too nervous to ask her.

C: 你知道星核在哪里吗？
E: Do you know where the Stellaron is?

C: 过去，上层区的士兵们不断在前线丢掉性命，但裂界扩张的脚步却丝毫没有减缓。
E: In the past, Overworld soldiers on the front line would lose their lives in droves, and yet the Fragmentum's advance would remain unaffected.

C: 我想，大矿区里的流浪者也许是走投无路了吧？居然把手伸向无辜的矿队。
E: I'm surprised the vagrants in the Great Mine go after the mining teams, they must be desperate.

C: 不了不了。
E: No, no, that won't be necessary.

C: 原来如此，怪不得睡这么久。
E: ...So that's why you slept for so long.

C: 金发大美人和金发大帅哥，啧啧，遗传基因真厉害呀。
E: Blonde, tall, good-looking... *sigh* Those Landau genes sure are something else.

C: 好嘞！吃的喝的可都得带足了，这一路可得爬不少阶梯啊。
E: Wonderful! Remember to bring enough food and drink to refuel on the way. We have a lot of steps to climb!

C: 当然。你是没看到约书亚的表情，那家伙差点就哭出来了。
E: Of course... Heh, you didn't see the look on Joshua's face. He could barely hold back his tears.

C: 你以为我是在故意针对你？是，我是签了不少拳手，但那帮家伙除了按训练里学到的套路出拳以外，啥也不会！稍有点品位的观众早就看腻那群小丑了。
E: You think it's about you? Nah. Yes, I may have signed a few boxers, but they know nothing but cliched routines from their training! Any audience with a bit of taste would've already been sick of these clowns.

C: 这怪物的盔甲到底拿来做什么？
E: What do you plan to do with the monster armor?

C: 这套盔甲就是拿来给人穿的。
E: This armor is to be worn.

C: 这下你该满意了吧？别再来烦我了，拿着奖金回去歇着吧！嗯…接下来…该让哪个废物试试这套盔甲呢……
E: Are we good now? Now get out of my face with your money! Hmmmm... so now... which poor fool should try this armor on...

C: 哟，原来是大名鼎鼎的{NICKNAME}啊，刚才忙晕了没仔细看，失敬失敬！
E: Oh! It's the famous {NICKNAME}! Sorry I didn't recognize you right away.

C: 我这就去把后面几场的票定了，等着看我「怪物盔甲」大佬夺冠吧！
E: I'm going to get the tickets for the next few games, and wait to see my Monster Armor win the championship!

C: 不过我得承认，看这「怪物」打拳属实有点意思，也难怪有这么多人追捧那家伙。
E: But I have to admit, it's quite interesting to watch this monster punch, and it's no wonder this many people are cheering for him.

C: 没问题，您要是有想法了随时和我说！
E: No problem, come back any time!

C: 开玩笑的，这里根本没人在意输家——让我们把目光聚焦在本场比赛的胜者身上！观众们，请把你们最热烈的掌声献给今天的胜利者——{NICKNAME}！
E: Just kidding, no one cares about losers here. Let's focus on the winner of this match! Viewers, give it up to our winner of the day— {NICKNAME}!

C: 呃，应该也不是…
E: Eh, not an avalanche either...

C: 妈妈，上层区的小朋友们都穿什么衣服呀？
E: Mommy, what do children in the Overworld dress like?

C: 但在布洛妮娅大人的引领下，银鬃铁卫会重新肩负起未尽的责任，重整秩序。到时候，你就不必再为自己和家人的安全担忧了。
E: But under Lady Bronya's leadership, the Silvermane Guards will atone for past mistakes and bring relief to the people. From now on, you don't need to worry about the safety of your family.

C: 他们是一个魔法学院的同学…
E: They are a trio that went to a wizarding school...

C: 塞得满满当当的巨大垃圾箱。各种垃圾混杂在一起，产生了奇妙且酸臭的化学反应。但地下的居民们毕竟有一点可以聊以自慰：他们还不需要进行垃圾分类。
E: A huge dumpster filled to the brim. The mixture of all kinds of trash results in a putrid odor. However, those who live in the Underworld have some consolation: They don't need to go through the trouble of sorting their garbage.

C: 你看见沙袋，它的工作就是挨揍。
E: You see a sandbag, its job is to take a beating.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 你将指腹抵在信封上轻轻施力，便将其推入了邮筒深处的无边混沌与黑暗，接着再没有了声音。它就像坠入深海的石子，入水的那一刻起，便与此世的一切再无关联了。
E: You lightly press against the envelope and push it into the dark and unknowable depths of the mailbox. Like a pebble dropped into the ocean, it lost connection with the outside world the moment it vanished into the abyss.

C: 「星穹列车」的客人，你们好。
E: Greetings, guests from the Astral Express.

C: 我没有别的问题了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你很不情愿啊…
E: You seem reluctant...

C: 你先说！
E: Why don't you go back yourself?

C: 前方戒严，禁止通行！
E: A lockdown has been imposed up ahead! No passage will be permitted!

C: ——甚至有过之而无不及。如果传闻属实，那么星核猎手的每一步看似虚无的动作，实质上都是对「可能性」的选择。
E: ...in fact, it may even be superior. If the rumors are true, every seemingly meaningless action taken by the Stellaron Hunters may actually be a choice based on those "possibilities."

C: 要不是溜出来的时候身上没带够钱，本小姐也不至于……
E: If I hadn't left my purse at home, I wouldn't have to...

C: 啊，那是一段孽缘。我不小心卷入一场争斗，平白无故担了人情，只好帮忙把一具遗体送还仙舟。
E: Ahh, that was some ill luck. I got involved in a conflict by accident and ended up owing a favor, so now I have to help send a deceased body back to Xianzhou.

C: 你看这照片，我虽然没有见过她，但是我看她容貌姣好，在我心里就把她当作是旧相识了，今天就是我们久别重逢，
E: Well, I may not have seen her in person, but her beauty feels like a long-lost acquaintance... How wonderful to be reunited with her after so long!

C: （展示停云的照片）
E: (Show Tingyun's photo.)

C: 琼实鸟串、貘馍卷、热浮羊奶…刚才还有一位狐人小姐姐，点了份鸣藕糕，也非常好吃。
E: Berrypheasant skewers, tuskpir wraps, steamed puffergoat milk... Oh, a foxian lady just ordered a songlotus cake — they're great too.

C: 我见那姑娘从这儿路过，往小吃摊的方向去了，客人可以去那边逛逛。
E: I remember, she walked past my shopfront and headed over to the food stalls. I'd recommend asking over there.

C: …你以为是打比赛啊还有平局？我看倒下的都没几个云骑军，这一仗仙舟应该打得很漂亮。
E: ...A draw? This isn't a tournament, y'know! I can't see many Cloud Knights — the Xianzhou must have fought well!

C: 你很机灵嘛。
E: Sharp as always.

C: 你误会了魔阴身，它不是专对人类生效的诅咒。狐人不易魔阴身，是因为他们虽为长生种，寿命却并不无限；而持明凭借「蜕鳞」抛却旧世。仅就魔阴身而言，长生种是平等的……
E: You misunderstand the nature of the mara-struck condition — it is not a curse unique to humankind. foxians don't usually succumb to it because their lifespan is not eternal, yet they are still a long-life species. The Vidyadhara rely on molting to discard the old world. All long-life species are equal in the face of mara...

C: 快逃！这家伙是…「药王秘传」！
E: Run! She's... a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus!

C: 他不再言语，仿佛耗尽了力气，又像是在等你们离开。
E: He stops talking. It could be because he is exhausted, or he's waiting for you to leave him be.

C: 你认得咱们？
E: You recognize us?

C: 如今外面「药王秘传」的妖人正潜伏着，到处乱走太危险了，请您在这儿暂作停留，等太卜大人的情报吧？
E: There are Sanctus Medicus sorcerers hiding out there — it's too dangerous to roam. Please wait here for the master diviner's return.

C: 啊，那我倒安心了，我正好什么都不记得。
E: Phew, I do — I never had memories to begin with.

C: 他们说你是真龙再传，真的吗？
E: They say that you are Long's power incarnate. Is that true?

C: 你的名字只是被十王司从公众面前抹去了。但身为太卜，本座知道、也应当知道罗浮上的陈年公案、旧事秘辛，以备不时之需。
E: Your name was only erased from the public eye. But as the master diviner, I know — and should know — all the records of years gone by... Such archives are of great importance in times of need.

C: 他们放逐了你，但罗浮还是你的家乡。
E: They may have banished you, but the Luofu is still your home.

C: 符玄正向云骑布置因应的方略，还是不要打扰她为好。
E: Fu Xuan is currently laying out war plans with the Cloud Knights. It's best not to interrupt her right now.

C: 是啊，将军。我们虽然本事低微，但云骑军卫蔽仙舟的职责在身，岂有呆在后方，反而让异乡旅客为我们冒险的道理！如果不嫌弃，请让我来为各位开路。
E: Yes, General! We may not be the mightiest force, but it's our duty as Cloud Knights to protect the Xianzhou — how can we let outworlders face the danger while we stay behind the lines!? With your permission, sir, allow me to lead the way.

C: 怎么这会儿没了动静？
E: My, it's gone a little quiet...

C: 看来要留下你们，非得用上这招了！
E: I only have one choice...

C: 但能与蝼蚁打得如此有来有回，你也可称得上绝灭大君之中头一个了。
E: So much effort to crush us, and met with so little success... I wonder what the other Ravagers would think.

C: 关于这把弓，我想我知道停云小姐想把它送给谁了。
E: About that bow — I think I know who Miss Tingyun intended to gift it to.

C: 礼物？他终于良心发现，要补偿咱们这一路的辛苦了吗？
E: Two gifts? Has his conscience finally gotten the better of him? Is he going to make up for all our hard work along the way?

C: 「建木」重生，除了帝弓的光矢之外，恐怕没什么能伤其根本。依靠持明族的力量，或许能加以抑制。但以如今持明族内的纠葛牵扯，恐怕此事也难以善了……
E: The Arbor was resurrected. Aside from the Arbiter's Lux Arrow, I'm afraid that nothing can materially harm it. We might be able to suppress it with the help of the Vidyadhara, but with internal strife ravaging their ranks, I'm afraid it's a long shot...

C: 事情总算告一段落，好在你们平安无事。
E: Things have come to a close for now. It's good that you came through unscathed.

C: 你接下来有什么打算？
E: What are your plans from here?

C: 应该…没有了。
E: Uhh... don't think so...

C: 匹诺康尼。还记得吗？在卡芙卡发来邀请前，咱们本来打算去那里。
E: Penacony. Do you remember? Before Kafka's proposal, that was our original destination.

C: 我不是谦虚，还是找丹恒吧…
E: I think Dan Heng is a better match for you...

C: 我已做好最坏的打算，以军团的作风，那位天舶司接渡使本人怕是…凶多吉少。
E: I'm already prepared for the worst. Considering how the Legion operates, I fear the fate of the Sky-Faring Commission Amicassador may be a bleak one.

C: 呵呵，{NICKNAME}，你还是这么冷静啊。小三月可是像要去春游的孩子一样，激动得不得了呢。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're the picture of calm as always. Meanwhile, March 7th's buzzing around like a kid on a sugar rush.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>请问…你还记得我吗？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>I would ask... Do you still remember me?</color>

C: 找麻烦？连你也这么觉得？就没人相信我真的只是想和他们交朋友？
E: You mean you don't believe me when I say I truly wish to befriend them?

C: 这是怎么了？
E: What's going on?

C: 但也有些势力始终对家族保持关注，认为他们温和的言语中另有它意…但考虑到家族对访客一贯的友好态度，我们暂时不用过分担心。
E: But some factions have always been wary of The Family — suspecting that their benevolence and eloquence belie an ulterior motive... So far, it seems to me that The Family treats their guests with courtesy, so I don't think we need to worry about that for now.

C: 开玩笑的，怎么可能嘛。
E: Just kidding, how could that be possible?

C: 你是…？
E: You are...?

C: 钟摆震荡。你期待着自己会进入哪一片梦中，昏昏欲睡……
E: Pendulum swings. You wonder what dream you'll delve into and slowly drift into drowsiness...

C: 我只是稍微调整了一下你的精神状态，让你感觉舒服些。
E: I've merely changed your state of mind for you to feel more at ease.

C: （奇怪…我的房间门怎么开着？）
E: (Odd... Why's my room door open?)

C: 等等等等——总计四十六起恶性事件！你是否承认，它们皆由你所为？
E: And that's not even half the list! There are a total of <unbreak>46</unbreak> cases of malicious conduct! Do you admit to being the culprit in every case?

C: …不，你不是帕。
E: ...No, you are not.

C: 这是你自己做的吧…但我确实拿走了列车锅。
E: The first one is clearly a result of your own doing... But I do admit to consuming the last serving of the Express Special.

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 这枚梦泡现在的价格是<unbreak>999,999,999</unbreak>信用点，不支持现金交易。
E: The current price for this dream bubble is <unbreak>999,999,999</unbreak> credits. We do not take cash.

C: 她往那边跑了——抓住她！
E: She went that way. Get her!

C: 呃…是因为动画风格比较复古吧。
E: Um... I guess it's because the animation has a retro style.

C: 一共有多少代币呢？
E: How many tokens are there?

C: 它浩瀚，又深沉。像一片海洋，就连籍籍无名的小人物也可以安眠其中。
E: It's vast and deep like an ocean. Even the humblest people can find solace here.

C: 我是。至少现在是。
E: I am. At least for now.

C: 这不是没给我其他选项吗？
E: Seems like I'm left with no other options.

C: 哈哈哈，没关系！美梦小镇已经被我变成了迷宫——你可别想从管道里钻到对面去！
E: Hahaha, it doesn't matter! I've turned the whole of Dreamville into a maze! Just don't try to get to the other side through the pipes!

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What's going on?

C: 我说得很清楚了——要出人命啦！救命！
E: Didn't I make myself clear? Someone is dying! Please help!

C: 应该…是的吧？不然，他怎么会哭成这个样子呢？
E: It... must have been? Otherwise, why would he be in tears all of a sudden?

C: 所有人在这里平等地睡去，无论缘由，尽管我们确实各怀目的……
E: Everyone falls asleep here equally, regardless of our different agendas...

C: 噢，天哪……
E: Oh my goodness...

C: 没关系，我喜欢垃圾桶。
E: But trashcans are important! I like them!

C: 从刚才开始，这些文字就不停地浮现、消失，它们是谁的心声吗？「米哈伊尔」又是谁……
E: These words have been appearing and then vanishing persistently for awhile now. Whose thoughts are they? And who is this Mikhail...

C: 我等不堪受辱，誓要举起天火的大旗，令垃圾之王改邪归正。但我们不敌那邪恶的王…他散布恶毒的谣言，分化众桶，令{RUBY_B#心}垃圾袋{RUBY_E#}不再能彼此感应……
E: The humiliation was too much for us. We intended to help Garbage King mend his ways under the banner of the Skyfire... But we were no match for the sinister king, who spread vicious rumors among the trashcans to divide us against each other. As a result, we could no longer communicate with one another using {RUBY_B#Heart}trashbags{RUBY_E#}...

C: 我愿献上我的一切——身体、灵魂、生命、垃圾袋——只为报答你的恩情！
E: I shall offer everything I have — my body, my soul, my life, even my trash bags — just to repay your kindness.

C: 在职责之外，我也有些…个人的美学追求。我是忆者，也是一位收藏家，我也想见证那些晶莹、璀璨的宝贵记忆——这种想法很好理解，不是吗？
E: Apart from my duty, I also have some... personal pursuit in aesthetics. I am a Memokeeper, and a collector. I, too yearn to experience those luminous, dazzling, cherished memories. That's simple enough to understand, no?

C: 我和他交过手。
E: I fought him before.

C: 但家族构建的美梦中，任何不幸都不应发生。它严重破坏了梦境的秩序与和平…多么可恨。
E: In the utopian dreamscape envisioned by The Family, such sorrowful incidents shouldn't arise. It profoundly undermines the equilibrium and serenity of the dreamscape... How detestable.

C: 但从邀请函的密文，和家族的反应来看…前者的可能性更高些。
E: But from the encrypted message on the invite, and The Family's reaction... The former is more likely.

C: 你不回房间吗？
E: You're not returning to your room?

C: 这只怪物的残骸被某种利器洞穿，其外壳下的组织似乎在短时间内因高热而爆发性地尽数蒸发。你不能再靠得更近——那自残骸体内寻隙而出的蒸汽毫无疑问会灼伤你。
E: The remains of this creature, pierced by an unknown weapon, reveal inner tissues that have been seemingly evaporated rapidly due to intense heat. You cannot approach any closer — the steam escaping from the shattered body would undoubtedly scorch you.

C: 情况开始变化了，似乎那位同行者…背离了原先的计划。
E: The situation has changed, and it seems that companion... has deviated from the original plan.

C: 思考再三，你拒绝了砂金的邀请。这次他没再挽留，只是看着你离开了那片忆域。
E: After careful consideration, you decline Aventurine's invitation. This time, he simply watches as you depart from the Memory Zone without asking you to stay.

C:
主演
 ？？？  饰  流萤
？？？ 饰  黄泉
 ？？？ 饰  黑天鹅
  ？？？  饰  砂金
E:
Starring
???  as  FIREFLY
???  as  ACHERON
???  as  BLACK SWAN
???  as  AVENTURINE

C: 暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成开拓任务「是谁杀死了…」
E: Unable to leave the current area. Please complete Trailblaze Mission "Whodunit"

C: 是「死亡」杀害了知更鸟吗？
E: Did "Death" kill Robin?

C: 有两种可能：匹诺康尼的梦境崩溃开始加速了，这让「死亡」变得异常躁动，家族的庇护也开始脆弱；又或者，所有的行动都在某个人的计划之中。
E: Two possibilities: The collapse of Penacony's Dreamscape has started speeding up, making "Death" extremely agitated and weakening The Family's protections. Or, everything has been planned out and executed by someone.

C: 从这边离开吧。然后我们就该告别了。这一切就像是…一场噩梦。
E: This way... This is where we part ways. All of this is like... a nightmare.

C: 满盘皆输——顺便把你送上了审讯台。
