E: A complete and utter loss — incidentally, it seems to have resulted in your rather undignified arrival on the interrogation stand.

C: 你还有选择的余地。留下那只八音盒，然后走吧。
E: You still have room to make a choice. Leave the music box behind, and then go.

C: 欢迎来到「黄金的时刻」基底模型。
E: Welcome to the Golden Hour base model.

C: 谁能保证我不会出卖你呢？
E: Who's to say I won't sell you out?

C: 那就拭目以待吧。等见到那位控制欲溢出的{RUBY_B#星期日}橡木家主{RUBY_E#}，我自有办法从他嘴里撬出答案。
E: We'll see. When we meet the {RUBY_B#Sunday}authoritarian master{RUBY_E#} of the Oak Family, I'll pry an answer out of him.

C: 上次来时还没这缺口，显然是那个男人有意布置。
E: There wasn't a gap before. That man must have done it intentionally.

C: 你凭什么觉得他做不到，非得委托一个立场对立的公司人？
E: On what basis do you believe he's incapable, necessitating the delegation to someone from a rival faction, the IPC?

C: 您确实没理解错，因为邪恶正在您的身边悄然滋生。
E: You weren't mistaken, for depravity is creeping in around you.

C: 砂金先生如此为我着想，是我莫大的荣幸——那么你这样无私慷慨的人，应该不会要求回报吧？
E: I'm immensely honored by your concern for me, Mr. Aventurine — since you're so selfless and generous, I believe you wouldn't ask for anything in return, would you?

C: 哟，好大的沙盘…等存够钱，我也想给自己盖栋这么高的楼。
E: Wow, that's an enormous sandpit... I'd love to build a tall building for myself once I have enough savings.

C: 你认错人了…吧。
E: This ain't it, chief. You've got the wrong {F#gal}{M#guy}.

C: 只是要解开误会，不算做坏事吧！
E: It's not bad if we're resolving a misunderstanding!

C: …至少他不会再拦着我们了。走吧，去找那位加拉赫，和他仔细聊聊案情。
E: ...At least he won't be getting in our way again. Let's go find that Gallagher and ask him the intricacies of the case.

C: 不不不不不用…你站在这儿就好了，听话哈……
E: No no no! No need! Standing is just fine. You don't need to do that...

C: 但是，这一次，我会斩断这悲剧的锁链——你们无论如何都不能过去，除非跨过我的尸体！
E: However, this time, I will sever the chains of tragedy — the only way any of you will pass, is over my dead body!

C: …呵，你是懂戏剧性的，教授。
E: You catch on pretty fast, Doctor.

C: 如果你真想要公司入主匹诺康尼，想要到实在受不了…那炸翻牌桌也不失为一种办法。大不了从头来过嘛！公司擅长的就是这个，对吧？
E: If you're really so desperate for the IPC to take over Penacony... blowing up the chessboard isn't a bad idea. Start from scratch! That's where the IPC excels, right?

C: 用这杯「再见，吾爱」向你致意，寻索真相者——
E: Here's to you, seeker of truth, with this glass of "Farewell, My Lovely"...

C: 都被你们看见了，还有什么可瞒的。一座城市有光鲜亮丽的表面，就肯定有不可告人的背面，成年人的事不用我多说。
E: You've witnessed it, so there's no need to hide. Even the shiniest city has its dark side. We're all adults here, surely I don't need to explain too much to you.

C: 你们肯定知道匹诺康尼曾经是公司的监狱星，对吧？犯人们被押送来这里，帮流光忆庭打捞大孔洞里泄漏的忆质……
E: You know that Penacony used to be the IPC's prison planet, right? All the prisoners were brought here, helping the Garden of Recollection salvage the leaking memoria from the Macro Void...

C: 如果那真是米哈伊尔的幽灵作祟，我还挺想见见他的。看不起我的人可以绕酒店三圈，但愿意正眼瞧我的人…哎，死一个就少一个了。
E: If it really is Mikhail's ghost, I want to meet him, if only for the last time. Those who despise me could form a line from here all the way to the entrance of the hotel, but those willing to look me in the eye and hear me out... Let's just say, there won't be many.

C: 就到这里吧…似乎没什么值得注意的了。
E: That's all for now... Nothing more noteworthy.

C: 踏入大门前，我设想过种种与家族打交道的场面，可没想到迎接我们的只有一座空宅……
E: Before coming here, I had all sorts of scenarios in my head about dealing with The Family... I did not expect an empty mansion...

C: 抱歉，星期日先生。我们没找到任何可以通报的人员，才擅自进入贵府，还请您多加原谅。
E: Our apologies, Mr. Sunday. Nobody came to greet us, so we entered without permission. I hope you can forgive us.

C: 「本案嫌疑人来自茨冈尼亚-Ⅳ，是『第二次卡提卡-埃维金灭绝案件』的幸存者之一，且并未持有星际难民旅行证——」
E: "The case's main suspect originates from Sigonia-IV, and is one of the survivors of the Second Katica-Avgin Extinction Event, who does not carry an Interstellar Refugee Travel Permit..."

C: 我要钱。
E: I want cash.

C: 妈妈只留给我们两件首饰：一条项链，一枚护身符。不会再有第三件了。
E: Mama only left us with two pieces of jewelry: A necklace and a lucky charm. There won't ever be a third piece.

C: 你和天上的黑衣人一样？可你没有穿黑色的衣服。
E: Are you the same as those men in black in the sky? But you're not wearing black.

C: 但我愿意相信你，我对你的信任更多来自…个人的主观判断。
E: But I chose to believe you, and my trust in you stems more from... my own personal judgment.

C: ——愿尽绵薄之力。
E: ...If my meager strength is required.

C: 加拉赫先生，我的耐心不多。消极怠工——
E: Mr. Gallagher, my patience is wearing thin. Neglecting duties...

C: 哦！你说到点子上了…我就是为此而来的！告诉你们也无妨，游侠们在追杀一个「冒牌货」，一个穿我们衣服冒名顶替的小可爱，她现在就在匹诺康尼。
E: Oh! You've hit the nail on the head... This is why I'm here! It's fine if I tell you — the Rangers are pursuing an imposter, a son of a nice lady posing as one of us. She's on Penacony right now.

C: 当然。谐乐大典开幕在即，我们也会尽全力做好准备，请放心。以示歉意，家族为宾客们准备了这份礼物。感谢各位的理解。
E: Of course. With the Charmony Festival about to commence, we will spare no effort in our preparations, rest assured. To express our apologies, The Family has arranged this gift for the guests. Thank you for understanding.

C: 唉，知更鸟小姐，我实话跟您说，大家心里头都在犯嘀咕呢。本来这么多派系齐聚匹诺康尼就够让人不安的了……
E: Miss Robin, to tell you the truth, everyone has been talking about it. The myriad factions on Penacony have already been causing unease for everyone...

C: 说不定…会发生非常有趣的事哦？
E: You never know... something VERY exciting might happen!

C: 「闭上眼睛」…这就是答案。很不可思议吧，一直被我们视作「死亡」的怪物，其实是流放之地的守卫。它遵循某种特定的规律，将美梦中的人掳走，带往这里。
E: "Close your eyes"... This is the answer. Isn't it incredible? The monster that we have always known as "Death," is actually the guardian of the land of the exiles. It abides by a certain rule, abducting people from their dreams and bringing them here.

C: 不过，她也有些秘密没有完全袒露。我总有种感觉，那女孩的状态与一般的入梦者不同…但愿不会造成危险吧。
E: But, she didn't reveal all her secrets. I just can't shake the feeling that her situation is different from that of the typical dreamer... And I hope that doesn't lead to any dangerous predicaments.

C: 瓦尔特先生童心未泯啊！
E: Mr. Yang, you're still young at heart!

C: 不如这样吧！既然各位客人是初次拜访流梦礁，我来担任向导，先带你们找到同伴，再一起去拜访知更鸟小姐。
E: How about this! Since it's your first time here in Dreamflux Reef, I'll be your guide and help you find your companions, and then we can all go visit Miss Robin together.

C: 拜见流梦礁之鬼三月七！
E: Now you shall pay respect to March 7th, Ghost of Dreamflux Reef!

C: 呵呵…用加拉赫先生的口头禅来说，就是「天意弄人」吧。
E: Hehe... to borrow Gallagher's catchphrase, "what an unpredictable twist of fate."

C: 看起来是只小谐乐鸽。
E: Looks like a fledgling Charmony Dove.

C: 笼子…那它不就没办法自由飞翔了吗？
E: A cage... but then it won't have the freedom to fly, right?

C: 你又在扯谎了！
E: You're pulling our leg again!

C: 「钟表匠，拉格沃克•夏尔•米哈伊尔。」
E: Mikhail Char Legwork, the Watchmaker.

C: …哥哥？你还好吗？
E: ...Brother? Are you alright?

C: 让所有人幸福一直是我们兄妹二人的愿望…因此，我们会向梦主尽力争取。只要讲明个中原委，梦主应该能表示理解。
E: It has always been our wish to make everyone happy, so... we'll do our best to explain everything to the Dreammaster. I'm sure he'll understand.

C: 知更鸟小姐！我们又见面了。谐乐大典的准备还顺利吧？我们都很期待呢。
E: Glad to meet you again, Robin! How are the preparations for the Charmony Festival coming along? We're all so excited about it!

C: …我明白了，衷心祝愿你能过得幸福。
E: ...I see. I genuinely wish you all the happiness in the world.

C: 于律法之中，人类构建社会……
E: Within the foundation of law, humanity establishes civilization...

C: 现状不妙啊。刚在列车上你也试过了，他们确实没回你的消息。
E: I have a bad feeling about this. You tried to contact them on the Express earlier, but they didn't respond.

C: 别聊这个了，听说了么？梦里好像发生了事…你们有消息么？
E: Anyway, let's forget about that. Have you heard about the... uh, unsettling things happening in the Dreamscape?

C: 剑与玫瑰！守护纯美！纯美纯美！魁梧奇伟！
E: The Sword and Rose! Protect the Beauty! The Beauty, the Beauty! Magnificent and majestic!

C: 哼。
E: Hmph.

C: 你们也和其他挑战者一样，想要深入我的内心吗？那就请进吧。但你们不会有任何收获…因为我只是一个失败品。
E: You guys are just like the other challengers. You want to enter my inner self? Then please, be my guest. But you won't find anything worthwhile... I'm just a failed piece.

C: 啾！救救，救救啾！这家伙的身体也太烫了啾！
E: Tweet! Help, help help, tweet! This fella's body is boiling hot, tweet!

C: 欢迎，这里不是匹诺康尼梦境的任何一角。而是我的内心世界。面前的景象之所以没有变化，是因为各位的意识提取了相似的概念予以补全。
E: Welcome. This isn't any location in Penacony's Dreamscape. It's my inner world. The reason the scenery before you remains unchanged is because your consciousness has drawn on similar concepts to fill in the gaps.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>是采取我们最初的方案，用软垫在原地为小谐乐鸽打造鸟巢？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Stick to the original plan, and build a nest with soft net where the Charmony Dove fell?</color>

C: 对于你做出的选择…我深表遗憾。接下来，让我们进入第二个抉择吧。这次…是一位逐梦客的故事。
E: As for the choice you made... I am deeply sorry. Now, let us advance to the second decision. This time... it's the story of a Dreamchaser.

C: 那就拜托你了。
E: I'm counting on you then.

C: 房间里有朦胧的声音…折纸小鸟？是好朋友的名字。
E: I heard some noises from the room... Origami Bird? That's a friend of mine.

C: 唉，这种心情，我也不是不能体会……
E: *sigh* You know, I quite understand such sentiments...

C: 米哈伊尔，你要去哪里？
E: Where are you going, Mikhail?

C: 而「钟表匠」…就是「无名客」啊。
E: And the Watchmaker... is just a Nameless.

C: 还有我的帽子。那个为我领航的人把它扣在我的脑袋上，从此安下一个不切实际的念想：「开拓」之旅永远也不会结束。
E: And my hat, too. The one who navigated for me placed it on my head and planted a fanciful thought in my mind — the Trailblazing expedition will never end.

C: 哎呀，你快别说了！
E: Aaah! Stop it!

C: 「自由存在于任何地方，唯独不存在于软弱的灵魂。它襄助不了任何人，只能襄助信它存在的人。」
E: "Freedom permeates every corner except fragile souls. It gives solace only to those who believe in its existence."

C: 「我留下难以察觉的痕迹，在一个静夜中走过。不必恒久地记住我，或追念梦的魂魄。」
E: "In the hushed expanse of a nocturnal reverie, I leave faint traces behind. No need to remember me or to recall the essence of dreams."

C: 无上功德颂神主！
E: Praise the Great One!

C: 不必谦虚，你的成长大家都有目共睹。我以前认识非常多的战士，能像你一样成长的人，在我的故乡…至少要评为S级吧。
E: Don't downplay your achievements, everyone has witnessed your growth. I've known many warriors in my time, and only a few achieve the kind of growth you have. Back home, where I'm from you'd be rated at least an S-tier.

C: 不愧是领航员小姐。
E: Nothing escapes your attention, Miss Navigator.

C: 第二个选择是瓦尔特提供的<color=#dbc291ff>「玛瑙世界」梅露丝坦因</color>。据说那里是星核之灾的原爆点之一，也是「纯美」伊德莉拉的飞升之地，现在是一颗永存不灭之美的美丽星球帕。
E: The second choice is the <color=#dbc291ff>"Agate World" Melustanin</color>, suggested by Welt. It's famed as one of the initial sites of the Stellaron Disaster and the place where "the Beauty" Idrila ascended. Today, it's celebrated as a planet of undying allure.

C: 花火
E: Sparkle

C: 独立战争末期，她为探明原初梦境的秘密，独自驾驶穿梭机消失在忆域中。
E: Towards the end of the War of Independence, she piloted a shuttle on her own and disappeared into the Memory Zone in search of secrets about the Primordial Dreamscape.

C: （列车什么时候变得这么热闹了…？）
E: (When did the Express become so lively...?)

C: 流萤就是在这里发现了真相。
E: This is where Firefly uncovered the truth.

C: 这就是「记忆」，它是由过去创造，却能在遥远的未来绽放意义的事物。
E: Such is "memory," a creation of the past that blossoms into significance in the distant future.

C: 你专程打电话来，就是为了调侃我？
E: Are you just calling to poke fun at me?

C: ——以尔神躯，为我等乐园奠基！
E: ...Your divine being will become the foundation of our paradise!

C: 同一时间 黄金的时刻
E: At the same time - Golden Hour

C: 这枚梦泡显然不同寻常——或许是方法不对，你如是想着，屏息凝神，闭上双眼，单膝跪地，将额头抵上包裹着忆质的薄膜。
E: The dream bubble is clearly extraordinary. Perhaps the approach was wrong, you think, holding your breath and closing your eyes. With one knee on the ground, you press your forehead against the thin film coated in memoria.

C: 如何，现在可以走了吗？还是你有什么别的事想说？
E: Well, can we go now? Or is there something else you want to talk about?

C: 接着为您介绍——「晖长石号」在匹诺康尼的梦海上空巡游了整整一个琥珀纪，但却因为此前发生的「震荡」而不得不停航……
E: Please allow me to continue with my introduction. The Radiant Feldspar had been cruising over the Sea of Dreams in Penacony for an entire Amber Era, but its voyage was temporarily halted due to the recent reverberation...

C: 还是那么放不开呢。抛开那些上下关系，把我当成你的平级就好，不必要的称谓都可以省去——比如「女士」，比如「您」。
E: You're still so formal, aren't you? Forget about the hierarchy and treat me as your equal. No need for unnecessary titles like "madam."

C: 而终有一日，我们将魂归同处。
E: And one day, our souls will return to the same place.

C: 现在，我们可以打开天窗说亮话了。你相信吗，奥帝？过去十个琥珀纪，你不是唯一一个亲历了宇宙市场变迁的「商人」。
E: Now, we can speak frankly and openly. Do you believe what I said, Oti? You're not the only merchant who has seen the changes in the cosmic market over the past ten Amber Eras.

C: 你看，这就是「投资」，机遇的种子被埋在土中，只需一点养料便可生根发芽，而我们要做的，就是耐心等待。
E: You see, that's what "investment" is all about. The seeds of opportunity are already sown, they only need a little bit of nourishment to take root. And then after, all we need to do is to wait patiently.

C: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。晚点有机会再找你聊天吧。）
E: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I'll catch up with you later.)

C: 我…愿意！
E: I... I will!

C: 啊？！真、真的吗？
E: R—really!? I mean... really?

C: 而当人们窥见他人的欲望得到满足时，自己也会产生同等的欲望，无穷无尽。最后，我就能从这片漩涡中捞起我想要的东西。
E: When people see others' desires get fulfilled, they develop their own desires. It seems like an endless cycle but it does have a goal. In the end, I will get what I desire from this whirlpool.

C: 因为，总得来说…我们是「同类」。
E: Simply put... you and I are the same.

C: 该打爆哪个呢？
E: Which one should I pop?

C: 谐乐大典的开幕式应该快开始了，去现场看看吧。
E: The Charmony Festival's opening ceremony is starting soon. I should head down and take a look.

C: 我就免了。不过，祝你玩得开心，不介意的话，回头我们再玩上两把。
E: I'll pass, but I do hope you guys have fun. If you don't mind, let's play a few rounds next time.

C: 想跳槽了。
E: I'm in the mood for a job change.

C: 如果哪天你真的累了，想换换工作环境、坐个办公室什么的，随时联系我！
E: If one day you're tired and looking for a change in work environment or you want a desk job, just contact me!

C: （还有这么多炸弹…别在这种时候回收伏笔啊！我一个人绝对来不及，先拉个群告诉所有人吧。）
E: (There are still so many bombs... Now's not the time for the plot payoff! I can't handle this alone — time to create a group and inform everyone.)

C: 小灰毛大人？到底是大是小？
E: Great gray-haired little one? So am I great, or little?

C: 你通过了「垃圾桶」娃娃的试炼。果不其然，一只貌似花火的娃娃就躺在桶底。令人遗憾的是，它的本质只是一团棉花，并非枪式或收聚式击发装置及其组合。
E: You have passed the trial of the "Trashcan" doll. As expected, a doll that looks like Sparkle lies at the bottom of the can. Regrettably, it is nothing more than a clump of cotton, devoid of any projectile or aggregative firing devices and their combinations.

C: 祝你找到真正的糖衣炮弹——我是说，炸弹。拜拜！
E: I hope you can find the real sugar-coated cannonball — I mean, bomb. Bye bye!

C: 我来这里时，正巧看见一个孩子捧着它。他说这花是翠丝阿姨准备的，为了「钟表匠」，和他挂念了一辈子的战友。
E: When I arrived, I happened to see a child holding it. He said the flowers were prepared by Aunt Jessie, for the Watchmaker, and the war comrade he'd missed his whole life.

C: 我该出发了。
E: I should be on my way.

C: 呜呜…列车长…列车长才不会哭！才没有…没有在伤心！
E: *sob*... The con... conductor never cries! Pom-Pom... is never sad!

C: 我说过，这是一份交易，而且不需要你立刻回应。收获不在一朝一夕，我最擅长的事情就是等待。美梦还在继续，夜晚还长，你有的是时间慢慢考虑。
E: As I mentioned earlier: It's a trade, and you don't have to give me an answer right now. Rewards are not reaped in a day, and if there's one thing I'm best at, it's waiting. The sweet dream still continues, and the night is still long — you have plenty of time to contemplate your answer.

C: 据说「折纸大学」是寰宇皆知的顶尖艺术学府，我也很想见识一下。
E: I hear that Paperfold University is well-known throughout the universe as a top arts school. I would love to check it out too.

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 多么震撼！忍者猛然敲击你的眉心，强劲的力道透过身体直击魂魄，刹那间五感尽断，猴鸣声也一并消弭。
E: How shocking! The ninja strikes your forehead with such force. Its powerful impact reverberates through your body, striking your very soul. In an instant, all your five senses are severed, and the sound of monkeys ceases.

C: 皆因无情无泪的御猿•邪忍，施展邪术令百姓沉沦，纵容邪祟倚势凌人，引得天下共愤。
E: Soulless Evil Ninja Osaru, agent of the vile, cast the masses into sin by foul arts and guile. Fiendlings indulgent in evil gone wild, enraged the hearts of all — man, woman, and child.

C: 我也是！
E: I am too!

C: 学术造假？你在胡说些什么……
E: Academic fraud? What are you talking about...?

C: *学院派粗口*，就是她！
E: *Academic vulgarity*, it's her!

C: 哟——面对奇兵天降，横行霸道的町奉行退却了！忍者大胜利！
E: Hah! The tyrannical official retreated in the face of such extraordinary fighters! Victory for the ninjas!

C: 忍符…哦，就是纪检部的学生提到的「乱涂乱画」吧。
E: Seals? Oh, the grafitti the student from the Disciplinary Committee was talking about.

C: 我很喜欢，歌曲最重要的意义就是任何人都能唱，怎样的苦难都无法夺走人们的歌声。
E: I love it. A song finds meaning in its existence only when it can be sung by anyone and everyone. No matter how hard or tough an ordeal is, it can never take song away from the people.

C: 明天过后，欢迎大家再来「睡蕉大道」玩。
E: We welcome you to visit Slumbernana Avenue again for more fun after tomorrow!

C: 啊，是那些四处宣传睡蕉小猴的社员吗？那不就是说……
E: Ah, are they the association members going around promoting Slumbernana Monkey? Then that means...

C: 一定是出现了什么故障——牛仔可从不承认自己在某些科技面前略显笨拙。
E: Something must have malfunctioned — Cowboys would never admit to their technological ineptitude.

C: 你猜猜我信没信？
E: Hmm, should I believe that or not...

C: 可能是他交完学费花光了积蓄，可能是他发现折纸大学的食堂并不好吃，可能是他在入学的时候发现自己高中暗恋的女生挽着学长的胳膊。
E: It might be that he emptied his savings to pay tuition, or that he discovered that the cafeteria food at Paperfold University isn't great, or that he found out that the girl he had a crush on when he first enrolled is holding an upperclassman's arm.

C: 不用每个人都打一遍招呼吧…乱破小姐也是来上课的吗？
E: You don't need to individually greet everyone... So, are you also here for the class, Miss Rappa?

C: 小猴的生活很让人羡慕。
E: Because people want to live like Slumbernana Monkey.

C: 施展钟表把戏！
E: Here comes the Clockwork!

C: 为什么？因为令尊太累了蕉。我问他有没有后悔过，他说没有。但当我撕开那层蕉皮伪装，看到的却是那封被你藏起来的退学警告书。
E: Why? Because your dad was simply too tired. I asked if he ever had regrets, and he said no. But when I stripped away that banana peel facade, what I found was the expulsion warning letter you had hidden.

C: 什么！这里怎么会有忍者！
E: Gah! How did a ninja get in here!?

C: 竟然是…虾蟇•忍者？
E: It's... Ninja Gama?

C: 蕉…是巨星同学呀。哎，真羡慕你们，我做梦都想出演芮克先生拍的电影。
E: Bana—Oh, it's you, Superstar. I'm so envious of you guys! Being cast in Mr. Reca's film is my ultimate dream...

C: 这次我可收手了。
E: I went easy this time.

C: 这就是「睡蕉小猴」的真面目？
E: Is that what Slumbernana Monkey is?

C: 但这里的人们却选择了粗劣的模仿：修筑高楼、建立都市、印刷货币，然后自愿成为宇宙市场中的一块拼图。
E: It's a pity those on Penacony just had to be second-rate copycats. What with constructing skyscrapers, building cities, printing currencies, and even making the decision to become like the other cogs in the cosmic marketplace.

C: 「仇恨是一切弱者的弱点」。
E: "Hatred is the frailty of the weak."

C: 我去把蒙塔娜也叫醒，动作快点——
E: I'll go wake Montana. Hurry!

C: 你可以称我为「普利蒙蕉授」。
E: You can call me Profnana Primon.

C: 大岚神在上！何等坚毅的忍•魂。诚然，如此纯度的忍者，应当以忍侠相称。
E: O mighty Aeon of The Hunt! What indomitable ninja spirit she has! Indeed, one as devoted as you rightfully deserves the title of Ninja Hero.

C: 那段往事已是如浮云般久远的过去。但如今，若毗乃昆尼的明日需要它，便让我等拨开云雾重见天日吧。
E: That memory has long become a story I leave behind in my past, though if Pinecany's future hinges on it... I am willing to bring back that memory and face it once more.

C: 以影片的第三幕而言，称得上是一种精彩的展开。
E: As the third act of a film, this can well be considered as a masterful development to the overall plot.

C: 乱破忍徒，准备好了吗？邪忍对你施展的幻惑邪术就要被祛除了！
E: Ninja Initiate Rappa, are you ready? The illusory sorcery that the Evil Ninja cast upon you is about to be broken!

C: 干得漂亮，缭乱•忍者。这样邪忍的阵法就无法限制我等的通讯•忍术了。
E: Good work, Dazzling Ninja. This way, the Evil Ninja's matrix will no longer be able to stop our communication ninjutsu.

C: 居然、居然欺骗实验品，欺骗学术伙伴，欺骗研究猿——第十七实验室最大的过错，就是让你这种学术骗子混了进来！
E: H—How dare you deceive the experimental subject, your fellow research partners, and the Research Apes!? The biggest mistake Laboratory <unbreak>17</unbreak> ever made was to allow a research fraud such as you to infiltrate this place!

C: 是啊，听说校庆突然延期，我们就尽早结束了研讨会，也想来凑个热闹。
E: That's right. We heard the anniversary celebration had been delayed, so we wrapped up the conference early and came straight here to see if we could catch the fun.

C: 各位同学们，你们好。很高兴能为大家主持这次的「彩梦校庆」。
E: Hello, students. I'm very happy to be hosting the Dreamlight Anniversary this year.

C: 希望大家能在折纸大学找到自己的梦想，然后用一生来贯彻它。
E: I hope that all of you will be able to find your dreams at Paperfold University and will dedicate your lives to realizing them.
Bana...

C: 毕业了！
E: Time for graduation!

C: 声势浩大的遗产争夺战拉开序幕。众多派系先后入场，因势而动，家族东道主也意图借机将「钟表匠」捉拿归案，令谐乐大典如期召开。
E: A grand struggle for a legacy begins. Numerous factions enter one after another, acting in response to the situation. The Family hosts also plot to capture the Watchmaker with this opportunity and ensure the Charmony Festival takes place as scheduled.

C: 全剧终
E: The End

C: 天外的援军，高贵的战士，{NICKNAME}与丹恒——
E: {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng, our reinforcements from beyond the sky, warriors of high esteem—

C: 就你一个？丹恒呢？
E: Why is it just you? Where's Dan Heng?

C: 下一个，就是你！
E: You're next!

C: 懦弱的王啊…去死吧…！
E: Face your death, cowardly king...!

C: 他是谁？
E: Who is he?

C: 彼此彼此。
E: You, too.

C: 我一定会撕开你的胸膛，泰坦…正如我对先王所做的那样。
E: I will rip your chest apart, Titan... In the same way I ripped apart that former king.

C: 请问，刚才缇安大人和缇宝大人在谈些什么？
E: Excuse me. If you don't mind, could you tell me what Lady Tribbie and Lady Trianne were discussing just now?

C: 我要出去玩！
E: Let's go out and play!

C: 那我们岂不是没办法进去了？
E: So, we have no way in?

C: 与此同时 奥赫玛
E: At the same time, in Okhema

C: 当务之急是尽快确认并转移火种，搜寻幸存者，以便厘清树庭之灾始末…就这么转告{M#他们}{F#她们}吧。
E: Please let them know that for now, the most pressing task is to identify the Coreflame and transfer it to a safe place as quickly as possible. We must also search for survivors and find out exactly what happened to the Grove.

C: 定期召开的公民大会上，对逐火之旅表决的反对票里，也总会有一票出自他之手。
E: During our regular citizens' assemblies, he always votes to oppose the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 怪物的躯壳如荆棘般盘根错节，拒绝一切生命靠近。
E: The monster's body is twisted like brambles, not allowing any living being to approach.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，看你们的样子…是找到有价值的记忆了么？
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, judging from your reaction, you must have found a useful memory.

C: 阁下…真的可以么？
E: Can you... really do it?

C: …无法反驳。
E: ...I cannot deny that.

C: …很遗憾，看起来它就是无动于衷。
E: ...Yet, regrettably, it remains unmoved.

C: 既然汝从初时起便明白吾并非其人，怎到了现在才戳穿？
E: Since you knew from the start that I was not who I said I was, why did you wait until now to expose me?

C: 只须得各位，在那斗士剑下为吾多争取些时间…一旦火种铸成，吾便能及锋一试。
E: I just need you to buy me some time against the warrior's blade... Once the Coreflame is re-formed, I'll be able to show my hand.

C: 但愿这不是她的陷阱……
E: Let's hope that this is not a trap set by her...

C: 呵呵，没多少。只是似乎听见蜜蜂嗡嗡振翅的声音了。
E: Hehe, not too much. It's just that I seem to hear the sound of a bee buzzing around.

C: 您、是您讲得太生动了，听得我精神焕发！您继续，大人……
E: I—It's your storytelling, my lord. You're weaving such a captivating tale that it got my blood pumping. Please, go on...

C: 我期待你的好消息，风堇。
E: I look forward to your good news, Hyacine.

C: 是的。啊，你是信使吗？哎呀，我就说消息怎么来得这么迟，原来是换了个人呀。
E: Yes. Oh, are you a messenger? No wonder I haven't heard any news for so long. There's been a change in personnel, hasn't there?

C: 没想到，是我先暴露了软肋…呵。
E: It seems I was the one who exposed my vulnerabilities first... Heh.

C: 呼哇，好厉害！我可以当这个船长吗？
E: Wow, that's amazing! Can I be the captain?

C: 你指的是……
E: You mean...

C: 缇宁，你刚才……
E: Trinnon, did you...

C: 来啦，*我们*看看……
E: Coming! We'll take a look...

C: 你看到的，或许是只雅努萨野兔，被*我们*吓到就一溜烟跑走了。
E: What you saw was likely a Janus hare. We must have startled it away.

C: *我们*…变成好多好多个了！
E: There are... so many of us now!

C: 呵，雕虫小技！
E: Hmph, such petty tricks!

C: 奥赫玛 创世涡心
E: Vortex of Genesis, Okhema

C: 所以，你是来向死去的{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}祈祷的？
E: Is that why you're here? To pray to the dead {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}?

C: 翁法罗斯会迎来新生的，迈德漠斯…只是，带领人们抵达终点的不一定要是你我。
E: Mydeimos, a new chapter awaits Amphoreus... Yet, the one who guides the people to the destination need not be you and I.

C: 哈…当然可以，来吧。
E: Hah... Sure. Let's do it.

C: 白厄的事，我会记得。归乡去吧，勇敢的王。
E: Keep Phainon in mind, I will. Return to your home, brave king.

C: 对了，你是来找缇宝和缇宁大人的吧？她们不在，有什么话需要我转述吗？
E: Right. You are here looking for Lady Tribbie and Lady Trinnon, no? They're not around at the moment. Is there a message you'd like me to pass on to them?

C: 你现在…能感受到{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}吗？
E: Can you... feel {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} right now?

C: 看，战士们归来了！
E: Look, the warriors have returned!

C: 「纷争」的火种，最终还是给了悬锋人啊……
E: They really gave the Coreflame of "Strife" to a Kremnoan at the end...

C: 我们也融化过真正的冰川…
E: We've melted a real glacier before...

C: 我们到了，此处就是记忆汇聚最多的结点。
E: This is it, the node where the most memories converge.

C: 书架上满满当当啊。怎么都是各个城邦的地理志？还有各种泰坦信仰的文献……
E: The shelf is packed full, but all I see are annals of geography for various cities. There are also documents about various kinds of Titan worship...

C: 妈妈…你明天就要去参加*那个仪式*了吗？
E: Mama... are you going to that ritual tomorrow?

C: 这是我最后一次让步。如果你们中有人想要建功立业，平步青云……
E: This is your last chance. If anyone wants to earn a promotion and rise through the ranks —

C: 到底是谁在帮助缇里西庇俄丝出逃？
E: Who has been aiding Tribios in her escape?

C: 不过，每次回想共同经历的冒险，有些细节总会变得模糊起来。这个叫做「圣杯」的奇物真是古怪。
E: However, every time I think back to our adventure, some details get a bit hazy. That so-called "Holy Grail" is such a bizarre Curio.

C: 你俩为什么出现在这里？
E: Why are you two even here?

C: 喂喂，苜蓿草家系就算再怎么是个钱串子，也不可能忍心向这么可爱的孩子索要授权费吧？
E: Hey, hey, even the money-loving Alfalfa Family wouldn't charge such a cute kid a licensing fee, right?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>……人生中还有什么非实现不可的愿望？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Now, tell me. What's left for such a person to wish for?</color>

C: …更多的钱和权力？谁会嫌这两样东西多呢？我不知道。您就直说吧，奥帝先生。
E: Uh... more money and power? No one ever thinks they've got too much of either, right? I don't know. You tell me, Mr. Oti.

C: 你就是我的从者吗？
E: Are you my Servant?

C: 其实你不必解释那么多…
E: You really don't have to explain all that...

C: 那就五十个吧！我身边这位小姐正是需要补充能量的时刻。
E: Then make it fifty. The lady next to me needs to replenish some energy.

C: 很感谢你请我们吃天环翅堡。
E: Thank you so much for treating us to the Halovian Winged Burgers.

C: 让大家团结起来！
E: Let's unite everyone!

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬！十分感谢阁下的告诫。所以，我这不正在为圣杯赋予新的价值吗？一档比许愿机更值得投资的娱乐节目。
E: Ohohoho! I appreciate the advice, truly. In that case, am I not giving the Holy Grail a new purpose? It'll become an entertainment spectacle much more worthy of investment than some wish-granting chalice.

C: 说起来，A叔，你难道不觉得，自己不属于这里吗？
E: C'mon, Uncle A, don't you ever feel like you don't belong here?

C: 我可是模范科员。
E: I'm a model researcher employee.

C: 列车还缺人吗？
E: Is the Express still in need of passengers?

C: 于是他们夺走了它的艺名，找来一只全新的雏鸟替代银幕上的她，又用污浊的流言和臆想将她扼死在不名誉的结局里。
E: They stripped away her stage name, replaced her with a fresh-faced chick, and smothered her with slander and rumors, leading her to a disgraceful end.

C: …所以，你想报复那些令你蒙受污名的人？
E: ...So, you seek revenge on those who tarnished your name?

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 他们明白，自己只是想要逃避沉重的生活，而非一场随时会交代掉小命的冒险。
E: They know they are just seeking an escape from their stressful lives, instead of actually wanting an adventure that could cost them their life.

C: 怎么看都是个陷阱吧……
E: It's obviously a trap...

C: 天哪，斯科特也是发达了，居然连知更鸟这种大明星都知道你的名字。
E: Unbelievable. Skott's really made a name for himself, even the acclaimed Robin knows who he is.

C: 你谁啊？
E: Who are you?

C: 等等——
E: Wait—!

C: 不，你刚才舍身保护御主的姿态已经证明，你是一位相当优秀的从者。
E: No. The way you shielded your Master just now proves you're an exceptional Servant.

C: 当然是因为，我受他召唤。唉，即便死去，被人遗忘，匹诺康尼也像个守财奴一般，贪婪地握紧我们的灵魂。想开些甜心，这一次至少有机会改写生前的失败。
E: Because he summoned me, of course. Even in death, forgotten by the world... Penacony clutches our souls like a miser. But hey, sweetheart — at least we have a chance to rewrite our past failures this time.

C: 现在和解…还来得及吗？
E: Is it still possible... To make it up to you now?

C: 「骑乘」技能的含金量。
E: That's what the "Riding Skill" is for!

C: 虽然形象粗制滥造，但从名字可以推断，犬形的怪物应该是《钟表小子》动画的经典形象，狼人哈努兄弟的翻版。
E: Despite its rough design, the dog-shaped monster's name suggests it's modeled after a classic figure from the Clockie cartoon, likely a derivative of the werewolf Brother Hanu.

C: 就在不久前，整个空间天塌地陷，重新站稳的时候，身边突然就多了…一位知更鸟小姐！
E: Just a moment ago, the whole space cracked and collapsed. When I regained my footing, bam, there was Miss Robin right next to me!

C: 我这样的人吗？…哼，你拍电影的水平不怎么样，拿捏观众的眼光倒不差。
E: Someone like me? ...Hmph, you may be a terrible filmmaker, but you're not bad at reading people.

C: 知更鸟们向你投来饱含祝福的目光，虽然你根本看不见她们的眼睛。
E: Robins cast their blessing-filled gaze your way — not that you can actually see their eyes.

C: 都别演了
E: Everyone, please stop acting

C: 说是持续调查，但哪用得着啊，危险早都过去了，现在也只是做做样子。
E: They say this is all part of "ongoing investigations," but is there even any point to doing this? The threat's long been neutralized. They're just putting on a show.

C: 哼，陈述事实而已。我一直觉得这名字更适合你。
E: Hmph, I was just telling the truth. I've always found this name to be more suitable for you.

C: 现在想来，那或许是我第一次实践「秩序」。
E: In hindsight, that was probably the first time that I enforced Order.

C: 算了吧你，球棒都没法分。
E: Forget about it, how are you gonna clone your bat?

C: 「无论看见什么，你只需记得一件事。」
E: "No matter what you see, you only need to remember one thing."

C: 「要么与『毁灭』的伤痕一同死去，坠入黑暗。」
E: "You can fall into the darkness and die alongside these scars of the Destruction."

C: 送他一支奇兵。
E: Send him a division of elite fighters.

C: 可事实却要早得多呀。
E: But it was much earlier than that.

C: 是谈话的对象离去了么？
E: Did the person you wanted to say them to leave?

C: 你的意思是，他是你的一部分？这倒是出人意料，你们看起来截然不同。
E: Are you saying that he's a part of you? That's quite surprising, given that you two looked nothing alike.

C: 那如果你做不到呢？
E: But what if you can't do it?

C: 直至最后，我将和弱者一同…将双手伸向天际。
E: And with my last breath, I'll join the weak... in reaching my hands toward the sky.

C: 现在，我该怎么称呼你？星期日先生，还是万维克先生？
E: Well, how should I address you now? Mr. Sunday or Mr. Wonweek?

C: 此后一时无言。「启程」往往与「离别」难分难解，但她们是如此幸运，不必在二者之间犹疑。
E: A moment of silence lingers after that. "Departure" is often indistinguishable from "Parting," yet they are fortunate enough not to have to waver between the two.

C: 让控制狂彻底失控！
E: Let the control freak lose all control!

C: 别担心。以防万一，我还留了个「后备方案」。先卖个关子，等需要时再揭秘吧。
E: But we'll be fine. Let's just say I have a backup plan. I'll reveal it when the time comes.

C: 什么玩意？
E: Our what now?

C: …钱的事不归我管。你不如去问艾丝妲。
E: ...I'm not in charge of finance. Go pose that to Asta instead.

C: 原来如此。那黑塔女士，经过你的专业判断——是哪个扇区出故障了？
E: I see. So, Madam Herta, can you use your professional judgment to tell which zone the glitch is in?

C: …不过，也不一定要扇自己？你再次看向丹恒。
E: But, come to think of it, you don't necessarily need to slap yourself, right? You take another glance at Dan Heng.

C: 车厢被击中后，你失去了意识，我把你抬出来后也昏过去了。幸好有车厢保护，否则我们都要粉身碎骨。
E: You passed out when our car got hit. I blacked out too, but not before dragging you out. It's a good thing we were in the car, or we would've been crushed to pieces.

C: 我们初来乍到，心中仍有许多疑团。二位若能保障我们的安全，结伴同行自然是更好的选择。
E: We've just arrived and still have many questions. If you two can ensure our safety, traveling together would certainly be the best choice.

C: 打的车到了，人还没出门？
E: Your ride is here. Why isn't everyone out yet?

C: 为什么要单独聊天，当然是因为越安静的地方越适合交流啦。
E: As for why we should speak in private, that's because quiet places are better suited for communicating with one another.

C: 大伙儿都坐稳了吗？那我们就出发吧——目的地，奥赫玛！
E: Is everyone properly seated? Then we're off! Next stop: Okhema!

C: …泰坦，请保佑我的族人们……
E: ...Titan, please bless my people...

C: 希望奥赫玛是个安全的地方。
E: Hopefully, Okhema is a safe place.

C: 是你漏了半句，「保护市民，扫清外敌」——她的原话。解决掉{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，圣城危机自可迎刃而解。
E: It is you who forget the second half of her words. Her original words were, "Protect the citizens and eliminate the invaders." The crisis in the holy city will be resolved once we've eliminated {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}.

C: 一段史诗如果在开篇就戛然而止，也许会令人惊叹不已。
E: An abrupt ending to an epic that has barely begun might also amaze the people.

C: 她的眼神…
E: Her gaze...

C: 「那就是召集一群强大的英雄，强大到能够挑战十二位泰坦，重新点亮它们的「火种」。这样一来，神的愤怒就会平息，世界就能回归和平。」
E: "Assemble a band of heroes powerful enough to take on the twelve Titans and reignite their Coreflames. Only then will their divine wrath abate, and peace return to the world."

C: 呵…我终于明白了，你并非怀疑我，只是想展露自己叛逆的一面。
E: ...I understand now. You do not really distrust me, you just wish to show your rebellious side.

C: 但在这里，我们尽可放下掩饰，流水会拉近你我的距离。
E: This place though, is where we can drop our cloaks of pretense, for the waters shall bring us closer together.

C: 缇宝大人！{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}在上，这样就不用劳烦二位英雄了。
E: High Priest Tribbie! O {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} on high, our prayers are heard! We won't need to trouble you any further, kind warriors.

C: 传信石版…？
E: Teleslates...?

C: 我就知道…
E: I knew it...

C: ——糟了！
E: Oh no!

C: 感觉这副山羊面具藏着什么玄机…碰一下试试吧。
E: It feels like this ram mask is hiding something... Let's try touching it.

C: 这可不兴讲啊。
E: Sorry, can't do that.

C: 达米亚诺斯若有所思地离开了。
E: Damionis left thoughtfully.

C: 两位在城中游荡时，有人始终在留意你们的行动。很遗憾…你们背弃了诺言。
E: While the both of you were roaming the city, someone was paying attention to your every move. Unfortunately... you have broken your promises.

C: 第三问。
E: Question Three.

C: 留下来，你会继续监视我们？
E: If we stay, will you continue to monitor us?

C: 眼下奥赫玛正需要援手，我不想就这样失去两位盟友。
E: At present, Okhema is desperate for aid, and I am loath to lose two allies just like that.

C: 当下，人们愿意相信神谕，才团结在黄金裔周围。但有朝一日，倘若世人的信念发生动摇…一切都会崩塌。
E: Right now, it is people's faith in the prophecy that unites them around the Chrysos Heirs. Should a time come when their faith is shaken... all will crumble.

C: 我赞同你的观点。纵使神性已经流逝殆尽，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}仍是不可轻视的大敌。
E: I concur with your opinion. Though their divinity has faded, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} remains a formidable adversary.

C: 这可不像你啊？万敌的万，难道不是「以一敌万」的万吗？
E: That's not like you at all, Mydei. Don't tell me you're scared?

C: 你们对这里一无所知，我先让你们十步。
E: You don't know the lay of the land, so I'll give you a ten-step head start.

C: 不是你的问题。悬锋城毕竟是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，恶劣的环境会阻隔你和{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的共鸣。
E: It's not your fault. Castrum Kremnos is {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory, after all. The environment is cutting off your ability to resonate with {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}.

C: 这次也许得用它把障碍吹走。
E: This time, we might be able to use it to blow away the barrier.

C: 现在想想，我们的确有可能战死在这里，对吗？
E: On second thought, this could very well be where we meet our end, right?

C: 不把它「处理」掉吗？
E: Aren't you going to "take care" of it?

C: 看来又得拜托它了。
E: Looks like we'll need to use the hand again.

C: 而传言中，悬锋城那位战无不胜的王储，万敌——他的天赐就是「拒绝死亡」。
E: Legend has it that Mydei, the invincible crown prince of Kremnos, has a talent for "defying death."

C: 你的残酷不亚于悬锋城的刽子手。
E: Your ruthlessness is akin to that of the executioners in Castrum Kremnos.

C: 尤其在这动荡的时代，值得托付后背的同伴…弥足珍贵。
E: Especially in these tumultuous times, friends who you can trust completely are a rare and precious find.

C: 接着赶路吧，不能让那家伙太得意。那扇紧闭的大门，也许可以用预言算碑打开。
E: Let's keep going. We can't let Mydeimos get too full of himself. The Prophecy Tablet might be able to unlock that closed gate.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「现在置于左侧托盘的配重…代表着翁法罗斯的命运。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Weights in the left weighing pan... represent the fate of Amphoreus."</color>

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: {F#她}{M#他}会让世界的记忆重新完整…{F#她}{M#他}会找到…母亲……
E: {M#He}{F#She} will make the memories of this world complete once again... {M#He}{F#She} will find... Mother...

C: 星核猎手…消失了。
E: The Stellaron Hunters... disappeared.

C: 前面有路障。
E: There's an obstacle ahead.

C: 天外的神明……
E: A god from beyond the sky...

C: 包在我和迷迷身上吧。
E: Just leave it to me and Mem.

C: 污秽之物，显形吧——
E: Show yourself, worm—

C: 留下你的非法所得，然后我会放你离开。
E: Return what you've stolen, and I'll let you go.

C: 我奉劝你……
E: I urge you—

C: 但他们还是倒在了最后一步！天谴先锋手起刀落，将他们剁成了肉泥…愿{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}承认他们的骁勇，接收他们的英灵。
E: And yet, they collapsed at the final hurdle! The Furiae Praetor swiftly hacked them down, reducing them to mere mincemeat... May {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} recognize their valor and embrace their heroic spirits.

C: …可以进去了吗？
E: ...Can we enter now?

C: 愿你们的战魂能取悦{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}，成为悬锋城征战的养料。
E: May your courageous souls satisfy {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} and fuel the conquests of Kremnos.

C: 最灼热的流星…
E: Blazing star...

C: 亡魂…告诉我，你听到了什么？
E: Lost souls... Tell us, what have you heard?

C: 「以现在的兵力？这是彻头彻尾的疯狂……」
E: "With just the handful of soldiers we have? They're absolutely out of their minds..."

C: 冷静，{NICKNAME}阁下…我认为他没有恶意。
E: Calm yourself, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... I believe he has no ill intent toward us.

C: 咳…为被夹在生死两界之间的灵魂引渡，居然如此痛苦……
E: *cough*... I never knew ferrying souls stuck in limbo could bring this much pain...

C: 如此一来，便能令{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的神躯不死…但在开始对泰坦的改造之前，他要先用眷属进行实验。
E: That's how he would immortalize {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divine body... Of course, he had to test it out on a Titankin before going on to remold the Titan.

C: 可以再次利用时空的力量。
E: We can tap into the power of time again.

C: …我的同伴在和尼卡多利战斗。
E: ...My companions fighting against Nikador.

C: 没有头绪…只能先付诸行动。
E: There's no trace... Let's just start with these first.

C: 消磨斗士的耐心，无聊至极。
E: A meaningless challenge to erode the patience of warriors.

C: 咳！咳、咳……
E: *cough* *cough* *cough*

C: 我能感应到火种的温度…做得好，白厄。
E: I can feel the Coreflame's warmth... Well done, Phainon.

C: 他很疲惫，先一步回去休息了。
E: He was exhausted, so he already went back to rest.

C: 本以为要鏖战到纪元的尽头…做得好。
E: Well done on them... I was prepared to fight till the end of time.

C: 果然如此……
E: Just as I feared...

C: 蝶能这么平静地讲述，也很不简单呢……
E: It mustn't have been easy for Cas to narrate this story so calmly...

C: 好暖心的故事…
E: What a touching story...

C: 我社会学就没及格过。
E: I have never once passed my sociology class.

C: 我现在就想歇着。
E: I just want to rest right now.

C: 若你已准备好成为翁法罗斯的支柱，便上前来。
E: If you have already made your preparations to become a pillar of Amphoreus, please step forward.

C: 没错！你看你看，不知道为什么——人家能说话啦！喂喂喂，一二三，喂喂喂，一二三……
E: That's right! Look, look! I don't know what happened, but I'm able to talk! Testing, testing, one, two, three. Testing, Testing one, two, three...

C: 你很累了，对吗？漫长的岁月里，你一直在守护翁法罗斯的命运。人们从记忆中汲取力量，每一丝涟漪都落在你的肩上。
E: Aren't you tired? Throughout the long years, you have always been protecting the fate of Amphoreus. Each time people draw strength from within their memories, every single ripple falls onto your shoulders.

C: 没什么。只是每次登上<color=#dbc291ff>黎明云崖</color>前，我都会思考：对泰坦而言，「陨落」是否等同于「死亡」？
E: Nothing really. It's just a question that I contemplate every time before I ascend <color=#dbc291ff>Dawncloud</color>: For the Titans, does the falling equate to death?

C: 哼，不知道…没准你才是我临死前臆想出来的幻象呢。
E: Hmph, beats me... For all I know, you're just an illusion I conjured up in my dying moments.

C: （晚安，迷迷。晚安，奥赫玛……）
E: (Goodnight, Mem. Goodnight, Okhema...)

C: 只是开个玩笑。
E: I was just kidding.

C: 我要投票！我要投票！怎么投票？
E: I want to vote! Tell me how I can vote!

C: 泰坦们总是公平的…只要我们不再侵犯它们，就不会遭受神罚。
E: The Titans are just... So long as we do not overstep our bounds again, we will not incur divine wrath.

C: 狂热如哀地里亚的冥军战士，接纳死亡也不在一朝一夕。第一次踏上战场时，新兵往往都会变成逃兵。
E: This won't be the first time that Aidonia's fanatical netherwarriors have faced death. On the contrary, recruits new to the battlefield often run away from their first fight.

C: 遐蝶和你谈起她送给其他黄金裔的礼物，不知不觉就走到「你的礼物」前。
E: Castorice talks to you about the gifts she gave to other Chrysos Heirs, and before you know it, she arrives at "your gift."

C: 这样…也算是不留遗憾了吧。
E: With that... I won't have any regrets.

C: 当然，我明白，这道预言对你无比沉重，我也从未对「诡计」半神的逃避有所苛责。
E: I understand this prophecy weighs on you immensely. That is why I have never reproached the demigod of Trickery for running away.

C: 「门径」的神力已所剩无几。我需要另一位半神护送遐蝶，去完成她毕生之所求。
E: The divine power of Passages is running out. I need another demigod to escort Castorice and help her fulfill her lifelong wish.

C: 喏，接着——！
E: Here, catch!

C: （这是哪儿…我的房间吗？我怎么回来的？）
E: (Where am I...? Is this my room? How did I get back here?)

C: 孩子啊…盾牌永远不可能铸成，也不需要了……
E: My child... that shield can never be cast, and there's no need for it anymore...

C: 你怎么在这？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 小蝶…你还好吗？
E: Cas... Are you all right?

C: 阿格莱雅很信任你。
E: Aglaea trusts you unreservedly.

C: 所以…「死亡」并非冰冷、绝望之物，而是……
E: Therefore, "Death" is not a thing of fear and desperation, but...

C: 即便…我将「赐死」的权柄强加给与我素不相识的你？
E: Even though I forced the authority of "granting death to humanity" upon you, a total stranger?

C: …我明白。但你看，玻吕茜亚，无论如何…我回到了这里。
E: ...I know. But don't you see, Polyxia? I made it back anyway.

C: 生死将再度流转。你亲手播下的这片花海，今后将承载无数或悲或喜的灵魂，永远焕发生机。
E: The cycle of life and death will flow once again. This sea of flowers you sowed shall bear countless joyous or sorrowful souls, and bloom evermore.

C: 哼，承蒙谬赞。
E: Hmph, should I thank you for the compliment?

C: 好，我为您带路。
E: Alright. This way, please.

C: 猎户伽尔巴，他张弓的双臂，最终怀抱着他挚爱的幼子披索，二人双双死去；皮西厄斯，孩子们的老师，她拼命救下了所有学生，燃烧的梁木却压垮了她的脊梁……
E: Galba... He was a hunter. But in the end, those arms that once drew a bow instead embraced Piso, his beloved son, as they both breathed their last. Pythias, the teacher, risked her life to save her students, but a burning beam fell on her, crushing her...

C: 我对于罪人的所作所为概、概不知情…他的一切罪行皆与元老院无关…！
E: I—I had no knowledge of his transgressions...! He did that on his own! The Council of Elders bears no responsibility for his actions!

C: 赞成！赞成！
E: Agreed! Agreed!

C: 那么，依据「一致欢呼」结果……
E: Then, in light of the "people's voice"...

C: 现在，「死亡」已是我指尖的涟漪，它曾引渡世间的亡魂来到这里，但我——要洞开冥府的大门，令你回到生者的世界……
E: Now, Death is the power at my fingertips. It once led the souls of the deceased here, but I... I shall open the gate of the netherworld and return you to the realm of the living...

C: 别回头，别让遐蝶后悔。
E: Don't look back. Don't make Castorice regret this.

C: 小小灰，那边才不是明天！
E: Little Gray, you won't find tomorrow there!

C: 成为半神的感觉，很奇妙呢。仿佛冥河就在我灵魂深处流淌，于呼吸间化作温润世界的细雨……
E: The sensation of becoming a demigod is truly wondrous. It's as if the River of Souls is winding its way through the depths of my spirit, transforming with each breath into a fine rain that nourishes the world...

C: 那一般人呢？对他们来说，「我们」又究竟为何物？——
E: So, what are "we" when it comes to regular mortals?

C: 我衷心为这场凯旋感到欣喜……
E: I'm gladdened by your triumphant return...

C: 情况很相似。只是那会儿，列车上没有一位忆者能替她诊断。
E: Her condition was very similar. It's just that at that time, the Express did not have a Memokeeper who could diagnose her condition.

C: 我跟她没什么好谈的…你在我脑子里，大可自己检索。
E: I have nothing to talk about with her... Since you're in my brain, you can look for the reason yourself.

C: 又见面了…你们应该不介意多个听众吧？
E: So, we meet again... I'm sure you wouldn't mind a snooping ear?

C: 连外号也是大地兽？汝是真的喜欢大地兽。
E: Your nickname is "dromas" as well? You must really like those creatures.

C: （泰坦与星神，二者截然不同。前者能与人对话，能被人战胜，甚至能在陨落后，由人类接替神职。）
E: (Titans and Aeons are two distinct classes of beings. Titans can communicate with us humans, and it is not impossible for us to overpower them. Upon their demise, we can even take over their divinity.)

C: 嗯？不用这么委婉的…简直是强盗一般的行径呢！
E: Nice? No need to hold yourself back, Dannie. You can just tell it like it is: Their behavior was no different from bandits!

C: 课题三：将会飞的鸟儿置入火筒以指导火筒飞行方向的可行性，申请研究。回复：过于异想，暂不批准。
E: Topic 3: Investigating the feasibility of placing flying birds into rocket tubes to guide the direction of the rocket's flight. Permission to research. Reply: Too fanciful, not approved.

C: 然而，最重要的是：我身为将死之人，对金血和灵魂的思考只能通过直觉怀疑，而无法付诸实践。黄金的血脉在我体内如此稀薄，我不愿再去思考本就无力证明的猜想。
E: But above all else, my days are numbered. Instinctively, I have my doubts about the golden blood and the human soul, yet I have no means of verifying them. The golden blood in my veins is woefully thin, and I am loath to waste what little time I have left obsessing over a hypothesis that cannot even be proven in the first place.

C: 尊敬的各位议员，我无比怀念那些诗歌里的美好时代。彼时，翁法罗斯存在过近千座不同信仰的城邦，神明行于世间，与凡人相亲。
E: Dearest councilors, let it be known that I sorely miss the blissful times portrayed in lyrical poems. Back then, Amphoreus was home to nearly a thousand cities — each with their own local faith — while gods walked the earth and shared close bonds with humans.

C: 其实，他为我展示了一段……
E: In actuality, he showed me...

C: 嗯，这么做是最稳妥的。
E: Yes, this is the safest course of action.

C: 我并没觉得自己虚度了人生。恰恰相反，当我终于来到终点，回首望去时，发现来时路上早已鲜花遍野……
E: I don't think that my life was wasted — just the opposite. When I finally arrived at this destination and looked back at the journey I took, I discovered that flowers had long since bloomed along the path I walked...

C: 你们所谓的「修复」，难道不是对心灵和肉体的双重折磨吗？
E: Your so-called "reshaping" is nothing more than torment, both in body and mind.

C: 但我猜他们没能成功，对么？
E: But I'm guessing their plan failed, didn't it?

C: 和彼时的塞涅俄丝一样，你也必须踏出这一步。
E: Just as Seliose once did, you must take this step too.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>因为除去那些肮脏的劣根，作为凡人…坚韧亦是我们集体的品德！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Because beyond our flaws, the virtue that we all share is tenacity!</color>

C: 但是*我们*还不能停下，因为还有许许多多的人需要救助…
E: Yet we can't stop now. There are still so many people who need saving.

C: 这边，身后！那道门通向外面——
E: This way, behind! That door leads outside —

C: 所以说嘛，怎么可能单凭面相就判断出一个人的品性优劣？不靠谱，根本不靠谱。
E: Appearances can be deceiving. It's a fool's game to judge someone's character just by their looks.

C: 「…还算为逐火…做了点贡献吧？」
E: "...At least I did something for the Flame Chase..."

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold..."

C: 天空之子……
E: The Skyfolk...

C: 塞涅俄丝大人？
E: Lady Seliose?

C: 先不展开这个话题。那智械哥——叫「来古士」是吧——还没死透呢。那大概率只是一具假身，藏在它背后的东西…还在违抗我们。
E: Let's not expand on that topic just yet. That Intellitron — Lygus, was it? He's not completely dead. That was probably a fake body. Something behind it... is still defying us.

C: 嚯…你可真受欢迎啊。但凡事讲究先来后到，先陪我搞定宝贝的事，我再送你俩去树庭呗？
E: Heh, aren't you a popular one? But I got to you first, so help me with the treasures, and then I'll send you two to the Grove.

C: 姑且确认一下：假如等会儿的场面变得难看…你会出手相助吗？
E: Just to confirm: if things turn ugly later... will you help?

C: 眼前的卷轴显示屏上映出一串小字：「非常规读物，借阅后请放回原处，切勿被任何一位树庭教授发现，叹号乘十。」
E: The scroll at hand shows a line of small text: "Non-standard reading material. Please return to its original place after borrowing. Do not let any Grove professor discover it — ten exclamation marks!"

C: 桀桀桀，谢大姐头赏赐，谢谢！
E: Hehe, thanks for the gift, Boss! Much appreciated!

C: 多洛斯起码还剩下我这个独苗…这座城想必就没那么幸运了吧？
E: At least Dolos still has me left... Guess this city wasn't so lucky, huh?

C: 咱俩搭伙作案一千年，能相互分享的话题早就说尽了。唯独那段在黎明云崖的经历，我不曾跟你聊过。
E: We've been partners in crime for a thousand years. We've talked about everything there is to talk about. Except for that one experience at Dawncloud. I never told you about that.

C: 啊…记得，当然记得！桀桀桀……
E: Ah... I remember, of course! Hehehe...

C: …没关系，请直说吧。
E: ...It's fine. Just tell me.

C: 但我清楚，自己不能与常人一样在睡梦中安然离去。那些毒蛇，它们畏惧被金线割断蛇头，因此才会一直匍匐于黑暗中。
E: But I knew I couldn't simply fade away in my sleep like anyone else. The serpents have always lurked in the darkness, terrified of their heads being cut off by the golden thread.

C: 比想象中好些，现在看来。
E: Better than I expected, you seem.

C: 你大概还想到了下一步：要把它卖出一个好价钱，然后把得来的财富分给圣城的穷人、难民……
E: And your next move is probably trying to sell it to the highest bidder, then distribute that money to the poor and the refugees in the holy city.

C: 在树庭求学的这段时间里，我读遍翁法罗斯的英雄史诗，也发现了它们的千篇一律之处——
E: I've read all of Amphoreus' heroic epics while studying at the Grove, and a common thread came to my attention.

C: 我虽然不是一名战士，但也绝对不会逃避在血脉中流淌了千年的使命。
E: Though I'm not a warrior, I will not turn away from the mission that has flowed through our blood for a thousand years.

C: 一番交谈过后，风堇从祖母雅辛缇娅处获得了第三道天空赐福。
E: After a discussion, Hyacine obtained the third sky blessing from her grandmother, Jacyntha.

C: 愿「晨昏之眼」永不闭合，永昼笼罩大地……
E: May the Eye of Twilight never close. May eternal daylight embrace the land...

C: …再见了，我的族人。我会记住你们曾经赐予我的，如绵绵细雨般微薄却清沁的温柔。
E: ...Farewell, my kin. I'll always remember the tenderness you once showed me. Meager but refreshing, like gentle rain.

C: 艾格勒发出落败的尖啸后，我们望向了地面。
E: After Aquila's defeated scream, we looked to the ground.

C: 塞涅俄丝大人…与泰坦融为一体后，你还维持着人类的意识吗？我希望你能看到，自己种下的种子结出了怎样的果实。
E: Lady Seliose... do you still have your humanity after merging with the Titan? I hope you can witness the harvest of the seeds you once sowed.

C: 据说黑潮是来自天外的灾厄，若真是如此…天空的防线自然是最先受到冲击的。
E: It's said the black tide is a calamity from beyond the sky. If that's true... the sky's defenses would naturally be the first to be breached.

C: 我不会为她流一滴泪。
E: I will not shed a single tear for her.

C: 放弃和它沟通吧……
E: Just give up on talking sense to them...

C: 你这一生都在锻造荣光，老朋友——为别人，也为你自己。愿你在新世界里能度过没有战乱的一生。
E: You've been forging nothing but glory your entire life, old friend — for others, and for yourself. May you never see the slightest glimpse of war in the new world.

C: 抱歉，{NICKNAME}。这次是我自作主张了。
E: My apologies, {NICKNAME}. I acted on my own this time.

C: 桀桀桀…正是如此！怎么样，还不快谢过本大爷？
E: Heeheehee... Just so! How about it? Let's hear some groveling gratitude, eh?

C: 如此一来，最后的一颗火种就能归位啦。
E: With this, the final Coreflame can be returned to its rightful place.

C: 盗火行者没有追来…真的是某种奇迹显灵了么？
E: The Flame Reaver isn't pursuing us... Could this really be some kind of divine intervention?

C: 先和列车取得联系，再讨论下一步行动吧。这是最稳妥的做法，我们也需要更多信息。
E: For now, let's get back in contact with the Express and plan our next move. That's the safest course of action. We need more information.

C: …为这个我们深爱的世界，写下不同以往的结局吧。
E: ...To write an ending unlike any before for this world we so deeply love.

C: 起床啦——
E: Rise and shine!

C: 有这种地方吗？记忆里好像是有的，掉进去很深很深……
E: A cellar? I think I remember one... It was deep... so very deep...

C: 血色的红日，枯萎的麦草，正在焚烧的村庄——
E: A sun red as blood, wheat fields turning to dust, and in the heart of it all, a village aflame—

C: 现在，「沉浸式戏剧」推进到了第二幕。
E: And now, Act Two of our immersive drama unfolds.

C: 这里就是「岁月」泰坦的神殿啊，也不知道昔涟的求学之路是否顺利…自从踏上旅程，我们就很少联系对方了……
E: Here we are, at the temple of the Time Titan, and I don't even know how Cyrene's studies are progressing... We haven't really had much contact since I set out...

C: 嘻，放心吧。我敢打赌，那位王储不会发现的~
E: Hehe, relax, our dear crown prince won't have a clue~

C: *我们*只能认为，这是你的命令。
E: And so, we can only assume that this is on your orders.

C: 呵呵，奇怪的问题。你可曾想过，在千万次演算中，翁法罗斯已然踏上不同于「智识」的另一条命途。它也早已将神明的赐福，平等地分给了每个孩子……
E: Heh, curious question. Have you ever considered that, after millions of extrapolations, Amphoreus is already following a different Path from the Erudition? It has long since granted divine blessings equally to each child...

C: 你们将从一串冰冷的数字，升格为真正的生命，与所有逝去的存在一同，奔向现实宇宙，完成翁法罗斯的夙愿——
E: You will come to life from a string of cold numbers. Along with all those who have passed, you will run toward the real universe, fulfilling Amphoreus's long-held wish—

C: 一切如常。很高兴，最后还能回望它一眼。
E: Everything is as it was. It feels good to take one last look.

C: 因为这世上不存在两全其美。昔涟已经拥抱了她的命运……
E: Because there is no perfect solution in this world. Cyrene has already embraced her fate...

C: 当岁月的浪潮终于平息，已是光历<unbreak>3870</unbreak>年。
E: When the waves of time finally calmed, it was the year <unbreak>3870</unbreak> of the Light Calendar.

C: 哼…如果其他阿那克萨戈拉斯只知对诸神顶礼膜拜，那我一定会想办法跨越轮回，把他们扼杀在摇篮里——
E: Hmph... If the other Anaxagorases actually worshiped the gods, I'd make sure to find a way to break the cycles to crush them in their cradles—

C: 当然。火种本来就为救世而生，依我看，高贵的泰坦们绝无拒绝的理由……
E: Of course. The Coreflames were meant to save the world, and in my opinion, the noble Titans have no reason to refuse...

C: …一百三十四。
E: ...One hundred thirty-four.

C: 做出你们最大的努力抗争，或是接受命运，将火种交给我……
E: Make your biggest effort to resist, or accept fate and hand over the Coreflame to me...

C: 这是第多少次了？再提醒我一下吧…我的记忆也有些模糊。
E: How many times has it been? Remind me again... My memory is a bit fuzzy.

C: 第 <unbreak>33550336</unbreak> 次永劫回归
E: The <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th Eternal Recurrence

C: 我的使命到此就结束了，但回想起来，还是觉得很幸运……
E: My mission ends here, but looking back, I still feel lucky...

C: 太卜大人说得没错。只要继续沿这条命途之路走下去，你就能在尽头找到自己丢失的「记忆」。
E: The Master Diviner is right. Continue down this Path, and you'll be able to find your lost "memories" at the end.

C: 继续向前吧，三月。
E: Keep going, March.

C: 就是伙伴们在的地方。
E: ...is right beside my friends.

C: 哎呀，别上当啦……
E: Oh no, don't fall for it...

C: 你是昔涟，还是迷迷？
E: Are you Cyrene or Mem?

C: 在如我所书里写下他的名字…
E: Write his name in "As I've Written"...

C: （有太多困惑了，我也很在意丹恒和三月七的情况。希望识刻锚能正常运作，我需要解答……）
E: (I have so many questions... I'm also worried about how Dan Heng and March 7th are doing. Here's hoping the Chronocognitive Anchor can still function normally, because I really need answers...)

C: 「去往▄█▄光历<unbreak>3960</unbreak>年▄▀█塔兰顿陨落的年代▄▀█得到「律法」的控制权▄█▄」
E: "Travel to ▄█▄Light Calendar Year <unbreak>3960</unbreak>▄▀█The era of Talanton's fall▄▀█Gain control of the 'Law'▄█▄"

C: 「那紧随其后，率先起舞的，是一名身姿如游鱼的少女，穿梭于无边血海。」
E: "The first to dance was a maiden following closely behind, weaving through carnage like a fish in the sea."

C: 任务有些艰巨呢，得加快脚步啦。先想办法到奥赫玛去吧。那里人来人往，方便打听消息……
E: It'll be tricky, so let's pick up our pace. To Okhema first. We can learn more from the crowds there...

C: 试问——
E: I ask you...

C: ——倘若旧律完美无缺，又怎会被我轻易踏碎？
E: If the old laws were so perfect, why did they crumble beneath my feet?

C: 不仅如此，我还知道，其人第二十七名传承者和你们有不少过节，险些断送了第二次逐火之旅……
E: Moreover, I know that the <unbreak>27</unbreak>th person to inherit this role bore many grudges against you and nearly doomed the second Flame-Chase Journey...

C: 口无遮拦。你真该庆幸自己没有在同盟会议上桌的权利。
E: No filter, huh? You should be glad you don't have a seat at the Alliance Meetings.

C: …不管哪里都耳目众多，就没有人少一点的地方吗？
E: ...There are eyes and ears everywhere. Is there any place where we can have some privacy?

C: 你在这里做什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 凯撒到底要做什么……
E: What exactly is the Imperator doing...?

C: 两位四处徘徊，也不与旁人交杯，莫非是侍从招待不周？
E: You two have been wandering around the venue and haven't mingled with anyone. Have the attendants not taken care of you well?

C: 为了征服，就算没有「律法」的试炼，他们也早已宣誓牺牲。所以，告诉我……
E: Even without the trial of "Law," they've already sworn to give their lives for my conquest. So, tell me...

C: 妄图用「押送」这种拙劣的借口，保全「救世主」的安全？
E: ...Use such a clumsy excuse as "imprisonment" to ensure the Deliverer's safety?

C: 现在，运用你的身份，再加入一点点经验和魅力…向凯撒证明吧，就像我们承诺的那样。
E: Now, use your identity, and add in a bit of experience and charm... and testify to the Imperator as we promised.

C: 呃，蜜酿有些喝多了…
E: That was a bit too much honey brew...

C: …你来就是为了说这个？
E: ...That's all you have to say?

C: 集中精神，与「同谐」同调。
E: Focus and resonate with the Harmony.

C: 「记忆」可以帮你回到翁法罗斯，但未必要以他们提供的方式。当然，也不需要你做出任何交易…付出任何代价。
E: While Remembrance can help you return to Amphoreus, there's no need for you to do it the way they want you to. Of course, there's also no need for you to make any deal... or pay any price.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>然后，就用这枚被「记忆」祝福的火种，回应他们的期许，开拓未来吧。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Then, with this Coreflame blessed by the Remembrance, respond to their hopes and blaze a trail to the future.</color>

C: 为了阻止来古士，*我们*不得不归还了「律法」、「浪漫」、「海洋」三枚火种，可即便如此……
E: We had to return three Coreflames of Law, Romance, and Ocean to stop Lygus. But even so...

C: 不仅要找到藏匿火种的方法，还要从来古士手中争取足够多的时间……
E: We need to find a way to hide the Coreflame, and we must buy enough time to keep Lygus at bay...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>昨晚，她又做了那个梦。在梦里，泰坦的声音前所未有地清晰……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>She had that dream again last night, but the Titan's voice was clearer than ever this time...</color>

C: …呵，树庭男孩，人们都说你疯，我看这话一点不假。
E: ...Heh. I guess people weren't wrong when they said you're insane, Grove boy.

C: 既然那神礼观众和我一样喜好表演，就叫他好好期待你我献上的剧目吧——
E: Since that Theoros loves a good performance as much as I do, let's make sure he enjoys our show to the fullest.

C: 抱歉，我来迟了…
E: Sorry I'm late...

C: 做个短暂的道别，然后就出发吧，像我们启程时约定的那样……
E: So say a short goodbye, then set off, just like we promised at the start...

C: 身为海妖的我，生来便是潮汐的容器。既然使命完结，承诺又无法兑现……
E: I am a sea siren, a vessel born to contain the tides. Now that my task is done, and the promise is broken...

C: 不确定自己该游向何方吗？没关系……
E: Not sure which way to swim? It's okay...

C: 快逃吧…维吉妮娅……
E: Run... Verginia...

C: 海瑟音是怎么选的？
E: So... what did Hysilens choose?

C: 两位篡改了「律法」的天才，还有这一世牺牲的所有黄金裔，他们——你们——合力削弱了我的力量，但无法剥夺我的意志。
E: Two geniuses who defied "Law" and all the Chrysos Heirs who sacrificed themselves in this cycle worked together to chip away my strength, but they — you — can never affect my will.

C: 「诡计之半神」赛法利娅，生于光历<unbreak>3942</unbreak>年，逝于光历<unbreak>4534</unbreak>年。
E: Cifera, the Demigod of Trickery. Born Light Calendar <unbreak>3942</unbreak>. Deceased Light Calendar <unbreak>4534</unbreak>.

C: 是呀，一千年的时光，真的好久好久……
E: Yep. A thousand years was suuuch a long time...

C: {NICKNAME}总是这么认真，所以才令人安心呢。对了，说到「携手」……
E: {NICKNAME} is always so serious, and that's why you always feel so reassuring. By the way, speaking of "joining hands"...

C: 那边——这段记忆里，{NICKNAME}好像在和黑塔女士聊天呢。
E: Look, over there. Looks like {NICKNAME} is talking to Madam Herta in this memory.

C: 但是，凯撒，贝洛伯格没有您想的那样软弱…不信，您听？
E: Imperator... Belobog isn't as weak as you imagine. Listen.

C: 人家的心思，真是一下子就被凯撒看穿了呀。
E: You really saw right through me, Imperator.

C: 不，凯撒！您尊贵无匹，怎能亲临前线？还是让我来担任旗手吧——
E: Imperator! Wait! How could someone of your status come to the front lines? Let me be the flag-bearer.

C: 他们拒绝了招降。还说，此次答复将作为对我们的最后通牒。
E: They refused to surrender and said this letter is their last warning to us.

C: 而是三月七取回了「我」的记忆？
E: Rather, it's March 7th who regained "my" memories.

C: 他们本可以登上「毁灭」的王座，却囿于星神算计，成了「智识」的囚徒。很有趣，二世身为血肉之躯，却自我认知为无机生命，猜猜看，是谁的阴谋？
E: They could have ascended to the throne of Destruction, but they were thwarted by the Aeons' plots and became prisoners of the Erudition instead. What's interesting is, while the second emperor had a body made of flesh and blood, he considered himself an inorganic being. Guess who was the one who influenced his thinking?

C: 只是这「石子」必须由你亲手磨砺，它需要「你」全部的记忆。
E: But you must polish this "pebble" with your own hands, and it will require all of "your" memories.

C: 「对，所以列车才无法捕捉到降落信号。」
E: "That's why the Express wasn't able to receive any landing signal."

C: 不，我一定在哪里见过它们……
E: No, I've definitely seen them before...

C: 如此一来，陷阱就解除了吧？
E: Is the trap now taken care of?

C: …就得到了一句不容忽视的结论。
E: ...You come to a conclusion that can't be ignored.

C: 为了打捞记忆，不惜与「毁灭」为伍…难道是「焚化工」？
E: They would not hesitate to associate with the Destruction in order to salvage memories... Could they be The Cremators?

C: 你的状态明显好些了，姬子。
E: Himeko, you seem to be feeling much better now.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>并为{NICKNAME}和丹恒施以保护，让他们在突破封锁的同时，免于被窃忆者挟持。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Then I protected {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng and made sure that they were spared from the Memosnatchers' clutches when they broke through the seal.</color>

C: 或许，「无名的追忆」正和这些符文一一对应。先接触看看吧。
E: Maybe the Nameless Recollections match these runes. Let's try linking them first.

C: 如我所书是「记忆」的载体…
E: "As I've Written" became the Remembrance's medium...

C: 但有一件事，我始终没有头绪…她到底在和谁对话？
E: But I still haven't figured out one thing... Who exactly was she talking to?

C: 你看，我带来的这些「记忆」，它们存在过，闪耀过……
E: Look at these "memories" I've brought to you. They once existed, once sparkled under the sun...

C: ——说出你知道的一切。
E: ...Tell us everything you know.

C: 来吧，「负世」的火种就在我手中。只需安然睡去，银河便能得到拯救。
E: Come. I hold the Coreflame of Worldbearing. Just fall asleep, and we'll save the cosmos.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>对象：回归#33550337。进程：<unbreak>31.313%</unbreak>——</color>

C: 「新的生命若要萌芽，它的种子须是死的。」
E: "If a new life is to be born, its seed has to be dead."

C: 等一下——！
E: Wait!

C: 拍你吗？
E: Do I take a photo of you?
Hah...

C: 到时候，我可要使劲拉着你们合影，把储存卡都塞满！
E: So when we get there, I'll make sure we take tons of pictures together, until the memory card's bursting!

C: （三月…什么时候放在这儿的？一点动静都没听到……）
E: (March... When did she leave this here? I didn't hear a thing...)

C: 「飞翔吧，挣脱忆质的牢笼。让谐乐成为你的翅膀……」
E: "Soar! Break free from the cage of memoria. Let harmony become your wings..."

C: 激动人心的「英雄救美」！
E: A thrilling "damsel-in-distress rescue"!

C: 我们都活在「剧本」里。但为台词增添几分色彩，从来不是禁忌。

C: 你本该待在美好的记忆里，等待一切劫难过去啊。

C: 又是窃忆者的把戏？
E: Is this another Memosnatcher trick?

C: 那位陌生人在我眼前掠走了「救世主」。我号令众水奔涌追逐，却被层岩阻断了流向……
E: The stranger snatched away the "Deliverer" right before my eyes. I commanded the waters to surge after them, but layered cliffs blocked the water's current...

C: 「开山者」，山之民的英雄。若我不在这里得胜，他必将在「不朽」的妄执中丑陋死去。这不该是他的结局。
E: "Mountainbreaker," hero of the Mountain Dwellers. If I do not stay here and triumph over him, he will die an ugly death in delusions of the Permanence. That should not be his destiny.

C: 你寻找的「长夜月」，正是从其中走出。在她之前，无人知晓其存在。
E: The one you seek, "Evernight," walked out of that place. Before her arrival, no one knew of its existence.

C: 每一次…从梦中醒来的片刻……
E: The fleeting moments... when one wakes from a dream...

C: 结束了么……
E: Is it over...?

C: 那片忆潮中，她无处不在……
E: She was everywhere in the memoria tide...

C: 似乎和{NICKNAME}有过接触。
E: ...Seem to have had contact with {NICKNAME}.
Huh...?

C: 你是…「三月七」？
E: Are you... "March 7th"?

C: 可它们的样子，与黑潮造物大相径庭。
E: But they look very different from the usual Black Tide Creatures.

C: 内心深处，我唯独希望：你和{NICKNAME}阁下，能为我带来答案。
E: Deep down, I only wish that you and the esteemed {NICKNAME} could bring me an answer.

C: 那辉煌的灵魂已临到此地，行走过熙熙攘攘的黑夜；{F#她}{M#他}携来黄金的火与血，胜利地步入白昼——
E: The radiant soul has arrived, having walked through the bustling nights, bearing the golden fire and blood, stepping with pride into daylight.

C: 无论如何，公司会在<unbreak>48</unbreak>个系统时内，确保医疗体系内的星域实现针对性疫苗覆盖。
E: In any case, the IPC can guarantee targeted vaccine coverage within <unbreak>48</unbreak> system hours in all star zones within the medical system.

C: 为何尽是些「欢愉」垂迹之地？
E: Places that the Elation has visited?

C: …是姬子小姐吗？
E: ...Miss Himeko, is that you?

C: 布洛妮娅小姐……
E: Miss Bronya...

C: 桌上的果盘是新切的，浴池的水温也恰到好处。「记忆」告诉我，这里刚刚还人声鼎沸……
E: The fruit on the table is freshly cut, and the bath temperature is just right. The Remembrance tells me this place was bustling with people just moments ago...

C: 还真是…令人期待。那，{NICKNAME}变成了什么样子？
E: How... intriguing. So, what does {NICKNAME} look like now?

C: 「由『岁月』守望昨天，由『大地』拱卫今天，直到『开拓』再度踏入翁法罗斯，沉睡的『救世主』便会苏醒……」
E: "Time watches over yesterday. Earth guards today. And when the Trailblaze steps into Amphoreus once more, the slumbering Deliverer shall awaken..."

C: 当然，会以「开拓」的姿态显现。
E: Of course, it would manifest in the form of the Trailblaze.

C: 那就祈祷我们用不上吧。
E: Then let's hope we never have to use it.

C: 欢迎踏上「创世」的小径，{NICKNAME}。
E: Welcome to the trail of "Genesis," {NICKNAME}.

C: 然后，再在史诗的后记，署下她的姓名。
E: Then, inscribe her name in the epilogue of the epic.

C: 自那悲恸的土壤中，开出释然的花。
E: And may this grieving soil bear the bloom of acceptance.

C: 「准备好了，就启动仪式，重走他的来路吧。」
E: "If you're ready, begin the ritual and retrace the steps he once took."

C: 最后，那「憎恨」的烈火也被一阵风拂去……
E: At last, the raging fire of "hatred" is swept away by a breeze...

C: 「纹丝不动哪。灰子，只一会儿没见，退步成这样了？」
E: "Not budging an inch, huh? Really, Gray Mystery? I leave you alone for a bit and you're already this rusty?"

C: 目中所见的景色愈发广阔，扛起的事物也愈发沉重。
E: The farther his gaze reached, the more weight he came to bear.

C: 可不能乱发脾气呀，小白——
E: Now now, don't lose your temper, Snowy.

C: 我来兑现承诺了。
E: I'm here to fulfill it.

C: 她就在这里。所有牺牲的伙伴。愿望。都在这里。
E: That she's right here. All the companions who sacrificed themselves. Their wishes. It's all here.

C: 铁墓。在学习。它在利用…你的「爱」。
E: Irontomb. Is learning. It's using... your "love".

C: 「我们」…「最好」…都是很美的词呢。
E: "We." "Best." ...Those are such beautiful words.

C: 去面对一份……
E: And face...

C: 「但现在，它们仍是纯洁的种子。将这些『记忆』捧在掌心，我就能创造出一片停滞的忆域。」
E: "But they are still pure seeds for now. If I hold these 'memories' in my hands, then I can create a stagnant Memory Zone."

C: 当然。开朗、美丽、乐观，就像是我幻想中…自己长大的样子。
E: Of course you do. Cheerful, beautiful, optimistic... Just how I imagined I'd look as a grown-up.

C: 这是浴盐。
E: That's bath salt.

C: 可惜，回答错误♪
E: Oops, wrong answer ♪

C: 无人再有机会修订，也没人再能续写。
E: No one will have the chance to revise it, and no one can continue writing it.

C: 功成事了，就该断然离去，留后人评说是非。众爵——下次开疆拓土时再会。
E: Once the deed is done, one should leave decisively, letting posterity judge right from wrong. Until we meet again in our next conquest, my dear dukes.

C: 对。虽然你活在「当下」，但你的「记忆」存在于过去。
E: Yes. You live in the "now," but your "memory" remains in the past.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>就像「记忆」的星神，也只是一簇记忆。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Just like the Aeon of Remembrance, a being made entirely of memories.</color>

C: 博识尊…为我揭示了两条路。
E: Nous... has revealed to me two paths.

C: 那你可能已经错过告别的机会了。
E: Then you may have already lost the chance to say goodbye.

C: ——回眸「初遇的瞬间」。
E: Look back to the "moment we first met."

C: 话虽如此，人家可不喜欢眼泪。
E: Anyway, I don't like tears.

C: 「『哀丽秘榭』这个名字，明明取自众神的哀伤……」
E: "But the name 'Aedes Elysiae' came from the unpleasant sorrows of the gods..."

C: >>>桃子的记录#8128，已归档。
E: >>> Peach's Record #8128. Archived.

C: 「翁法罗斯，就不会被放弃。」
E: "Amphoreus won't be forgotten."

C: 「电信号序列：SkeMma<unbreak>720</unbreak>。路径：理性。」
E: "Electrical Signal Sequence: SkeMma<unbreak>720</unbreak>. Track: Reason."

E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Process error: Analyzing...</color>

C: 不许它。打断你。
E: Won't allow it. To interrupt you.

C: 「如果没有新的『空白』，史诗又该如何被续写呢？」
E: "If there are no new 'blank spaces,' how can a saga continue?"

C: 「好啦，别让气氛这么沉重嘛。」
E: "Alright, alright, let's not make things so gloomy."

C: 我是…最初的智种，翁法罗斯之心，德谬歌。
E: I am... The first Nouspore. Amphoreus's Heart. The Demiurge.

C: 生命是一首充满告别的诗，但只要被写进「心」的书页，就不会轻易逝去。如今，所有逐火者与「开拓」的足迹，都汇入这本《如我所书》……
E: Life is a poem full of farewells, but if you write something into the pages of your "heart," then that will not easily fade away. Now, all the footsteps of the Flame-Chasers and the Trailblaze have come together within this book As I've Written...

C: 可惜，真相水落石出后，我便能断定：弱小的德谬歌已无力改变实验结果。
E: What a pity. When the truth surfaced, I knew at once that the Demiurge was far too feeble to ever alter the result of the experiment.

C: 黑塔，你知道我的态度：无论成功与否，你的计划都正中「毁灭」下怀。
E: You know what I think about this, Herta. Whether it succeeds or fails, your plan plays right into the Destruction's hands.

C: （我们心中，只有「好奇」这一种感情么？）
E: (Is "curiosity" the only thing we can feel, even at moments like this?)

C: 这是威胁：要么放下手术刀，要么跟着全银河一起完蛋。这场会唯一的目的，就是希望各位放下傲慢，别来添乱。
E: Consider this a threat: Either put down your scalpel, or die with the entire cosmos. The only goal I have for this meeting is to ask all of you to put aside your pride and not cause me any trouble.

C: 单就这句话而言，我没什么好反驳的。
E: I'm not gonna argue with that.

C: {NICKNAME}██计划成功了█
E: {NICKNAME} ██ plan was a success █

C: 黑塔
E: Herta

C: 放心，一只末日兽也来了。
E: Relax. A Doomsday Beast is also here.

C: 好了，过来吧。
E: Done. Come over.

C: 嗯。那我就在这儿，哼着小曲儿等你~
E: Hmm. And I'll be waiting for you here, humming some tunes~

C: 怎么样，备用电源还在吗？
E: Well, did you find the backup power source?

C: 好了，现在你可以下去了，注意安全。
E: Alright, you can use it now. Be safe.

C: 妈耶，吓死姑奶奶我了…你、你怎么才来啊！
E: Holy mackerel, you scared the stars out of me... Y—You took your time!

C: 唉，朋友也分很多种…这种呢，就是不照面的时候才能当朋友……
E: *sigh* There are many types of friend... She's the type you can only stay friends with if you never meet her.

C: 她这个付款方写私人账号，显然就是公款私用啊！
E: The payer here is her private account. She's totally embezzling station funds for herself!

C: 这意味着我们和她的时间流速不一致。
E: It means the velocity of our time is different from hers.

C: …我有什么好担心的！路是你们年轻人自己选的，遇到风险就得自己承担，我这种老头子，也只能在旁边干着急。
E: Not at all! You choose your own path and suffer your own consequences. An old man like me can do nothing but worry.

C: 他比我想象中要脆弱。
E: He's more fragile than I thought.

C: 呼…好了。做得很好，亚伯拉罕。
E: Phew... Okay. Well done, Abraham.

C: 我会证明给你看，在死亡的长夜降临之前，我一定会勇敢地迈出那一步。
E: I will prove to you that I have the courage to take that step before the long night of death.

C: 啊？这难道不能算好事一桩吗……
E: Huh? Isn't this a good thing?

C: 不会错的。我虽然老了，星神的隐秘也忘得差不多了。但这些录像带的数量，我都当身家性命一样记着——年轻人来得正好，如果有空，帮我把东西寻回来吧。
E: I know I am right about this. I may be getting old. I may have forgotten all about the Aeons... but I keep track of the number of these tapes like my life depends on it. Kid, you came just in time. If you have time, go find them for me.

C: 「天鹰堡」已经被毁灭，他说，这就是星神力量最直接的证明。人所追求的正义在一颗星球注定的亡兆面前，不值一提，殊为可笑！
E: Eagle Castle has been destroyed, he says. This is the most direct proof of the power of the Aeons: In the face of the destruction of the planet, the justice sought by men is laughably insignificant.

C: 无论是什么，我都已经替你清除了精神污染。现在，你最好<color=#dbc291ff>没事走两步</color>，感受一下有无其他不适症状。
E: Whatever it is, I have cleared the mental contamination for you. Now, you'd better <color=#dbc291ff>go for a walk</color>, and see if you have any other symptoms.

C: 你曾经离开过空间站？
E: Have you ever left the space station?

C: 这《剧本》里的大部分内容，竟然与希拉回答问题所说的话一模一样。
E: This script is exactly what Sheila said when she answered my questions.

C: 还有这位古恩•科诺列夫，他所提到的实验到底是什么？
E: And this Gunn Konolev — what experiment was he talking about?

C: 希拉在重复他事先写好的剧本。
E: Sheila has been reciting the script you wrote in advance.

C: 而她的原型，法政科的联合创始人，以及…我的爱人，希拉•诺娃，早在很久以前就已经葬身于茫茫星海之中。
E: She was modeled after the co-founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, and... the love of my life, Sheila Nova. She died in the vast ocean of stars a long time ago.

C: 不论我们如何处理希拉，我都拜托你们，不要将这个实验公之于众。这其中涉及的伦理问题，必然会受到法政科的追究。
E: No matter how we deal with Sheila, I beg you, please don't make this experiment public. The ethical issues are bound to be investigated by the Department of Galactic Geopolitics.

C: 我只是个旁观者，我说了不算。{NICKNAME}，我想现在有三条路摆在你的面前。
E: I'm just a bystander, it's not my decision. {NICKNAME}, I think you have three choices right now.

C: 谢谢你，年轻人，我认为你做出了正确的选择。
E: Thank you, young one. I think you made the right choice.

C: 这种动荡时期，想刷个高绩效不是很正常吗？怎么，难道你想看到自己的研究预算被砍？
E: It's not that unusual for people to try to get a high performance indicator during such turbulent times. You wouldn't want your research budget to be cut, would you?

C: 提示我错误代码<unbreak>505</unbreak>？
E: Prompted error code <unbreak>505</unbreak>?

C: 别急，我有几个问题想问。
E: Hold on, I have a few questions.

C: 只剩中央房间的大门没打开了，这应该就是那里的密钥。
E: The only door still locked is the one in the central room. This should be the key.

C: 当前敌人已击败，信标数据已提取。
E: The current enemy has been defeated. Beacon data extracted.

C: 看来这位确实是隐藏在人群中的波少资深粉丝，我们还是大意了。
E: You must be one of those super fans that stayed under the radar. *sigh* We've been careless.

C: ……虽不中亦不远矣。
E: ...They're not correct, but not wrong either.

C: 这里的侵蚀程度远比我想象中要严重。辛克尔夫人也反映过部分区域的清理工作进度缓慢……
E: The extent of the corrosion here is a lot worse than I imagined. Mrs. Hinkel did say the clean-up had been slow in places...

C: 不必为自己辩解。虽然这张手卡上面的署名是卡波特教授，但是你的笔迹习惯是无法抹消的。尤其是这个弯钩，和你小时候的手写日记一模一样。
E: No need to explain! This is Professor Capote's autograph alright, but you can't hide your handwriting. The way you join your letters is no different to your childhood diary entries.

C: 抱歉…我会之后修好它的。
E: Sorry... I'll get it fixed later.

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 但我从来没听说过这种奇物……
E: I've never heard of a Curio called that...

C: 跟上去看看。
E: Let's follow them.

C: 先做个自我介绍。我叫伦纳德，是这座空间站的网络安全工程师。
E: Allow me to introduce myself. I'm Leonard, a cybersecurity engineer here at the space station.

C: 跟我有什么关系？
E: What does this have to do with me?

C: 请问你是…
E: Sorry, you are...?

C: 呃，你倒是把我问住了，对话推进得太过自然，完全没意识到这个问题……
E: Ugh, you got me there. I got caught up in our conversation. I wasn't paying attention...

C: 好像多了个人…
E: There seems to be an extra person...

C: 但是你看！和我猜的一样，这涂鸦果然是道加密，破译之后，咱们就能看到被隐藏起来的信息。
E: But look! Just like I guessed, this graffiti is encrypted! If we decipher it, we can see some hidden information.

C: 这真的很难冷静啊，你看，要不是有你在，我这会儿估计已经躺地上了。
E: It's really hard to stay calm... Y'know, if it wasn't for you, I'd probably be lying on the ground right now.

C: 「走吧…假身份信息已经录入……」
E: Your fake ID info is ready...

C: 怎么可能！是、是她盗用了我的身份信息！
E: How is this possible!? Sh—She used my identity!

C: 「其次，那不是什么游戏光碟，那可是以太卡带——骇客的第二双眼睛、第二个大脑、第二颗心脏。」
E: "Secondly, it's not some kind of video game cartridge. It's an Aether Cartridge — it's the second pair of eyes, second brain, and second heart of the hacker."

C: 看，银狼小姐着实是位才华横溢的骇客，她计算一切，留足了变量与后手。
E: Miss Silver Wolf is truly a talented hacker. Not only did she calculate everything ahead of time, she has numerous variables and aces still to play.

C: 游戏就只是为了游戏，仅此而已！
E: "A game is a game and that's all there is to it!"

C: 哈，你发现了我埋藏的小彩蛋。
E: Hah, you found the little easter egg I hid.

C: 我还没准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 不怎么样。我尽力把病毒程序的影响范围控制在了监控室内，至少没让它扩散出去，但也仅此而已了……
E: Oh, nowhere. I've done my best to quarantine the intruder's viral influence to the monitoring room. It didn't spread outside, but that's all I could do...

C: 它们还未从繁殖的胚胎变成幼虫，但它们的生长很可能比我们想象的要迅速。
E: They're embryos for now, but their transformation into larvae could be imminent... and their growth may exceed our initial estimates.

C: 我认为不妥。
E: I am not fond of this idea.

C: 哼…你…我真搞不定你。行吧。
E: I... You... Hmph... You're impossible. Fine...

C: 呜哇！这是发生什么了！
E: Oh no! What was that!?

C: （辛克尔之外的另一个人应该是<color=#dbc291ff>密卷科</color>的，快想想是谁……）
E: (The other person should be from the <color=#dbc291ff>Department of Insight</color>. I need to remember who it is...)

C: 你们不是在遛狗么？
E: Aren't you supposed to be walking the dog?

C: 不告诉不告诉，我这么严的嘴，还能走漏风声？
E: Of course! My lips are sealed — not a word to anyone.

C: （人体自燃…这应该就是事件的全貌了。）
E: (Spontaneous combustion of the human body... that is most likely the truth.)

C: 没错，但<color=#dbc291ff>前提是「寻常」的奇物</color>。
E: Sure, but you're the one saying <color=#dbc291ff>the Curio in question is "ordinary."</color>

C: 别装了，请你闭嘴。
E: That's enough pretending. Please be quiet.

C: 牵强附会，差不多得了。
E: Tenuous connections. Enough of this nonsense.

C: 袖手旁观才是真正的医治：这世上有种顽疾名为「愚钝」，比任何病症都更难根除。
E: To stand aside and observe is the best treatment one can give. There is a disease called "foolishness" that is harder to cure than any ailment.

C: 甜美的糕点总让人想起花绽开的模样，一口、一口吃下去，香气就会留在唇齿之间。
E: Delicious desserts remind people of how flowers look when they bloom. Ingest this dessert one bite at a time, and the sweetness will linger in your mouth.

C: 嗯，空间站的秘密远比你想的更多，黑塔也是。
E: There's much you don't know about the space station, and even more about Herta.

C: （用来监控阮•梅培育的生物生长情况…？）
E: (Used to monitor the growth of Ruan Mei's creations...?)

C: 你是躲在糕点里了吗？
E: Are you hiding in the dessert?

C: 现在我可以确定，本次培育结果为：不合格。
E: I'm now certain that the outcome of this cultivation is: Failure.

C: 走廊，危险，嘶嘶。
E: Corridor, danger, *buzz*.

C: 可正是这些看似微不足道的小事，构成了真正的开拓之旅。
E: But, it is precisely these kinds of small, menial tasks that form a trailblazing expedition.

C: 奥列格很重视这件事，他和铁卫沿路调查了一宿，但什么也没发现。
E: Oleg is extremely concerned about this. He and the Silvermane Guards patrolled the area for the whole night, but they didn't find anything.

C: 哎，这不是…这身影好眼熟啊，喂，这位朋友——
E: Oh, if I'm not mistaken... I know that face! Hello, my friend—

C: 在更新完通讯模块之后，我们就立刻收到了这封感谢信。是仙舟地衡司的官方信函，旨在感谢你对波月古海环境保护工程的关心与认可。
E: When we updated the communication system, we immediately received this thank you letter. It is a formal letter from the Xianzhou's Realm-Keeping Commission, thanking you and recognizing your contribution toward the Lunarescent Depths environmental protection project.

C: 呃，还记得我说的银鬃铁卫吗？就是他们了……
E: Uh, you remember the Silvermane Guards I mentioned? That's them...

C: 两位去找托帕的这段时间，我也会思索一下应对的策略。祝你们好运——啊，还有，一定要注意安全。
E: While you're out looking for Topaz, I'll see if I can think of a strategy to deal with the situation. Best of luck, and stay safe.

C: 两位去找托帕的这段时间，我也会思索一下应对的策略。祝你们好运——啊，还有，一定要注意安全。
E: While you're out looking for Topaz, I'll see if I can think of a strategy to deal with the situation. Best of luck, and stay safe.

C: 哈哈哈，真不错，好羡慕你们轻松融洽的氛围啊~那我们先走一步咯，回见！
E: Hahaha, you two make a cute pair! Anyway, I'd better be on my way, see you next time!

C: 既然是要收集民意，那肯定得兼顾上下层区居民的心情吧？
E: Alright, if we want to make an informed decision, we need to hear from both the Overworld and the Underworld, right?

C: 不管对方的承诺有多美好，这纸合同代表的都是一场赌局。作为领袖，我绝对不能因为相信星运，就代替全城民众签下卖身契。
E: Regardless of how alluring their promises may be, this contract is nothing more than a gamble. As a leader, I cannot let the future of Belobog hinge on a roll of the dice.

C: 就是这里。
E: Destination reached.

C: 我信。来这之前，我翻阅了无数个案例，得出了一致的结论：凡是受到过「星核」侵扰的世界，最后没有任何一个能够逃离消亡的命运。
E: Yes. I've gone through countless case studies and they all point to the same conclusion: Any world that comes into contact with a Stellaron is doomed.

C: 太好了！这样应该行得通。接下来的汇报流程，以及后续可能的追责……
E: Fantastic! That might just work. As for the reports and potential accountability...

C: 嗯，我得想想……
E: Right... I need a little time to process this...

C: 扣就扣吧~反正我早就过了纯为挣钱而工作的那个阶段了。
E: If that's what they want to do, then so be it. I've long passed the stage of working just for money.

C: 对。我们在这里结束了一切……
E: Yes... This is where we put an end to it all...

C: 你看我有拒绝过你吗？
E: Have I ever refused you?

C: 这点道理还用你说吗？别劝我了，我已经想清楚了……
E: You think I need you to tell me? Don't try and persuade me, I've already thought this through...

C: 不收钱的医生，我信不过…
E: Free medical care? I don't believe it...

C: 我听说这儿的药很便宜。
E: I heard the medicine here is pretty cheap.

C: 哼，下次跟人做生意，记得少说点废话…我的时间宝贵得很。
E: Hmph, cut the small talk next time... my time is valuable.

C: 她会变成这样就是这个原因吗？
E: And that made her become like this?

C: 骗谁呢？你这家伙明明就是那个女医生的跟班，你以为我们「互助会」没有自己的情报网吗？
E: Who are you trying to kid? You're that clinic woman's lackey. Did you think the mutual aid society didn't have its own intel?

C: 哟，您来了！揭幕战下一场对手已经就绪，观众们也都迫不及待了——如果您也准备停当，我们即刻为您安排开赛！
E: Yo, you're here! Your next opponent for the tournament is ready, and the crowd couldn't wait any longer. The match will start as soon as you got ready, so chop-chop!

C: 答案或许出人意料！此刻站在擂台上的，竟是来自遥远矿镇的传奇机械武斗家——
E: The answer might surprise you: Standing in the ring is a legendary mechanical warrior from the faraway mining town...

C: 没错，只有应物科的温姓科员会这么说话。
E: Yes, only the researcher called Wen in the Department of Implement Arts would speak like that.

C: 啊？！难道卡波特先生说的那些事，也是它冒充我做的？可它没必要这样做吧……
E: Huh!? Did it do those things that Mr. Capote is accusing me of? But why...

C: 你怎么早不开窍…
E: Why didn't you say this earlier...

C: 相信？多么廉价的词语。别说其他人，现在连拉明娜也不信你。
E: Believe? What a joke. Not even Lamina believes you right now, let alone the others.

C: 当听说有人开始调查水魈与共犯一事，我就下定决心，要铲除对手，保护自己。
E: When I heard that someone began investigating the Xenohydro and its accomplice, I made up my mind to eradicate my opponent and protect myself.

C: 不好意思，各位粉丝，你们别听那女人乱讲…大家不要聚集在此处，以免干扰研究秩序，引来防卫科的大哥们。
E: Sorry, everybody, don't listen to that woman... Let's not gather here. We don't want to disturb the researchers and attract any unnecessary attention from security.

C: 到底发生了什么事，为什么那个大守护者突然派人来抓我们啊？
E: So what happened back there? Why did the supreme guardian send people to arrest us?

C: （只能去找人帮忙了。对这种奇异事件有了解的人…只能想到他了。）
E: (Got to find someone to help. Someone who understands this weird stuff... and I can only think of him.)

C: 旋转栈桥——被锁定了——
E: The gear bridge... it's locked...

C: 每年他们的结婚纪念日，爸爸都会送妈妈一束红纸包扎的「球牡丹」。
E: Each year for their anniversary, my dad would send my mom a bouquet of Ball Peonies wrapped in red paper.

C: 我明白了，要一株「侯爵夫人」对吗？稍等，我马上帮您挑选……
E: Aww... Marquises, is it? One second, I'll get it ready for you...

C: 虽然你们的态度很诚恳…但想让我相信这些话，未免也……
E: I can't say you sound suspicious, but... I can't just take your word for it either...

C: 展品丢了？
E: The exhibit disappeared?

C: 所以，接下来我们只要找到举止怪异的机器人，把零件从它们身体里一个个取出来就行了。
E: Now we just need to find all the malfunctioning robots and retrieve the sculpture pieces one by one.

C: 唔…我明白你的意思，但是……
E: Uh... I get what you're saying, but...

C: 真是乖孩子~那我们去下一片区域排查吧。
E: Thanks, Clara⁓ Let's get on to the next area, then.

C: 谢谢你，克拉拉。我看看……
E: Good work, Clara. Let's see here...

C: 嘿嘿，感兴趣吧？
E: Hehe, have I piqued your curiosity?

C: …那怎么行，就算是搞普查也得讲究方法呀，否则效率就太低了。
E: ...That won't do. Even a survey requires rigorous methodology, let alone an investigation.

C: 嗯，让我回忆一下…编辑部最近在招人，新来的实习责编被主编骂了几次，其它还有……
E: Well, let me think... the editorial department has been recruiting recently — the new editor intern was scolded by the editor-in-chief a few times, and then...

C: 先拍张照片，留下证据再上去吧。
E: Take a picture first for evidence. Then we can make a move.

C: 华劳斯托我向你问好！
E: Wallace says hi!

C: 哼，干了坏事还想不受惩罚，做梦！
E: Hmph, if you think you can commit crimes and go unpunished, dream on!

C: （他开始怀疑我了…这可不妙。）
E: (He's starting to suspect me... that's not good.)

C: …这才像话嘛！就知道你小子刚才又在跟我开玩笑，把我吓出一身冷汗。
E: Now that's more like it! You had me in a cold sweat with those jokes...

C: （接受）行吧，就这么办。
E: (Accept) Okay, it's a deal.

C: 他从我眼皮子底下跑了。
E: He escaped from under my nose.

C: 他…「噗」地一下就消失了。
E: He... vanished into thin air.

C: 那我在博物馆前台等你。
E: I'll wait for you at the museum reception.
