C: 谢谢娜塔莎小姐…我们继续吧。不过话说回来，您的履历非常漂亮，性格和能力也无可指摘…只要经过规范培训，您是一定能胜任这个职位的。
E: Thank you, Miss Natasha... Let's continue. But having said that, your resume is beautifully written. Both your character and ability are beyond reproach... Once you've gone through the standard training, you'll be a shoo-in for this position.

C: 咦？这不是荣誉队员克拉拉嘛！你也来做志愿者吗？
E: Eh? Aren't you Clara, one of our honorary members? Are you here to be a volunteer too?

C: 好家伙，这么麻烦？
E: My goodness, is it that much of a hassle?

C: 既然她想听，那就说给她听！
E: Since she's so interested, just tell her!

C: 一码归一码。你虽然不是本地人，但看着还是有学养的，当个导览员对你来说肯定小菜一碟。
E: But you're different. Even though you're not a local, you still seem well-educated to me. So, being a guide must be easy-peasy for you.

C: 总之，希儿和{NICKNAME}，请你们和我一起到休息区吧——面试会在那里进行。
E: Anyway, let's head to the Rest Area, Seele and {NICKNAME}. The interview will be held there.

C: 话是这么说没错。但绝大部分都是些不值一提的腌臜事…我想没有写进来的必要。
E: Indeed, but none of them is decent... I don't think it's necessary to include them.

C: 我明白。不过，在博物馆的话，应该不会有那种程度的纠纷让你处理了。
E: I understand. However, there won't be such kind of dispute at the museum for you to deal with.

C: 放心吧，在博物馆里的话…应该不会有你发挥「特长」的空间。
E: Don't worry. I don't think your "skills and expertise" will be put to use here.

C: 有也没事，我能搞定。
E: Even if there were such a dispute, I could handle it.

C: 虽然但是，我们应该没有这种机制吧……
E: Ugh, you need to log out once in a while.

C: 这和犯人有关吗 ？
E: What does this have to do with the culprit?

C: 费斯曼老爹就在矿区里，虎克大人好像是听说老爹出事了才冲进去的。
E: Fersman is in the mines. It seems like the boss heard some bad news about him, then just ran in there.

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}可别逞强了，你这一身伤得及时处理。
E: Quit acting tough, {F#young lady}{M#young man}. Your injuries must be treated right away.

C: 我猜也是。那设备是能探测地髓矿脉的古代遗物，非常稀有，我还没见过第二个。
E: I guess so. It's an ancient relic that can detect Geomarrow veins. It's very rare — I haven't seen a second one in my life.

C: 但是经历了矿脉事件之后…避难所的气氛就变得微妙了起来。
E: But after what happened over at that Geomarrow vein... the atmosphere at the shelter became a bit tense.

C: 走吧。
E: Keep it moving.

C: 怎、怎么会呢！我又没干什么坏事……
E: O—Of course not! I didn't do anything wrong...

C: 啊？你的意思是…我们搞错了？
E: Ah? You mean... we got it wrong?

C: 你们…你们是不是觉得我好欺负，所以才这么对我！呜……
E: You... you just think I'm a pushover. That's why you're treating me like this! Wah...

C: 费斯曼有充分的原因…
E: Fersman has his reasons...

C: 别急嘛，我都说了，肯定会给你解释……
E: Relax... I'll explain everything to you...

C: …啊，你们来了！准备好，接下来我们要配合步兵线列，向矿区纵深处开路。
E: Ah, you're here. Get ready, we need to help the infantry lines drive deep into the mine.

C: 再说，我烦他的原因也不是因为他太过严厉……
E: Besides, my problem with him wasn't that he was a strict father...

C: 总之，那对姐弟现在安然无恙。你也快向矿区大桥撤离吧，铁卫联手「地火」在那里建立了安全区。
E: They'll be okay now. You should head back to the bridge too — the Guards and Wildfire have set up a safe zone there.

C: …这家伙，好吵啊！裂界造物居然还会碎碎念吗？
E: ...Ugh, that noise! Do Fragmentum monsters usually sound like this?

C: 杰帕德，希露瓦…
E: Gepard, Serval...

C: 可不管我们怎么旁敲侧击，她都不肯告诉我到底要去见谁…嗐，我这姐姐当的，真是憋屈。
E: But no matter how Gepard and I asked and probed, Lynx simply refused to tell us who she was gonna meet... *sigh* I'm such a failure of a sister.

C: 平整干燥、背风背阴、地势要高……
E: Flat, dry, sheltered, facing the sun, high elevation...

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}，我和老弟刚刚才聊到你呢。
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! We were just talking about you.

C: 玲可的那件事…怎么样了？
E: How was it... with Lynx?

C: 向朗道姐弟汇报了雪原中的见闻……
E: Tells the Landaus everything that happened in the Snow Plains...

C: 她在整理间里面——我们一起等等她吧。
E: She's in the storage room. Let's wait for her.

C: 佩妮娅女士生前委托了同事，请他把自己的终端机和软盘带回贝洛伯格。据说，那里面存着她给佩拉留下的「宝物」。
E: Madam Penya asked a colleague to take her terminal and floppy disk back to Belobog — she said they contained a "treasure" for Pela.

C: 走吧，当心点脚下。我很久没回来过了，里头怕是有不少怪物。
E: Let's go, and watch your step. I haven't been here in a long time. There are probably some monsters around.

C: 能分我们些物资吗？救人用。
E: Can you share the materials? They're to help injured people.

C: 嗯，那我就稍微陪你走神一小会儿吧。
E: Okay, I'll indulge in old memories with you for a while.

C: 「地火」的大家，想要带人们离开下层…但是史瓦罗先生希望大家留在这里。因为在他的计算里，地上已经不再安全了。
E: Wildfire wants everyone to leave the underground... But Mr. Svarog wants everyone to stay here. According to his calculations, the overground is already unsafe.

C: 他怎么和大守护者一个德性。
E: Sounds a lot like the Supreme Guardian.

C: …还要多听娜塔莎的话。
E: ...And start listening to Natasha.
█Pain█hurt██. Pain█hurt pain███!█Hurt██hurt? Pain██—

C: 检测，确认，各模块，正常，功能，连接。
E: Testing, verifying, all modules, working, connected.

C: 嘿…不用啦，诊所交给我就好。你们三个还有更重要的事要做吧？奥列格——还有那两位小伙伴，他们正等着呢。
E: Um, no need. I'll handle the clinic. I assume you three have more important things to be getting on with, right? Oleg will be waiting, not to mention your two companions.

C: 哈，这有什么，不打招呼就消失的纪录保持者在这儿呢！
E: Ha, that's nothing — the unannounced disappearance record-holder is right here!

C: 希望你言行一致。
E: Let's hope you can walk the talk.

C: 「内燃机说唱大赛」的总冠军是？
E: Who is the reigning champion of the Internal Combustion Engine Rap Tournament?

C: …喂喂，别把我的话当耳旁风啊？
E: ...Ugh! Did anyone hear what I just said?

C: 又回去了？真没想到，这才隔了多久，咱们又得回去找人了。
E: She went back? But we were just there. *sigh* Sounds like we better head over again.

C: 看那边！克拉拉乘升降机下去了。
E: Over there! Clara went down on the elevator.

C: …我回来啦，提米。
E: ...I'm back, Timmy.

C: 克拉拉，危险！快找地方躲起来！
E: Clara, it's dangerous here! Find somewhere to hide!

C: 啊…销毁的话未免过于浪费了。找人重置一下它的系统，然后把它安置到下层去吧。我听说开拓团正缺有自卫功能的机器人。
E: Ah... It would seem a great waste to destroy it. Find someone to reset its system and then arrange for it to be sent to the Underworld. I hear that the development group is in need of a robot with defense capabilities.

C: …{NICKNAME}，能来跟我聊聊吗？我知道，大家都需要时间来消化这些信息，但我们还是得尽早决定下一步的计划。
E: ...{NICKNAME}, can I have a word with you? I know that we'll need time to process this new information, but we have to decide on our next plan as soon as possible.

C: 我是问你干嘛瞒着我们？
E: I'm asking why you went behind our backs.

C: 评估中…语言模块运作正常。谢谢你，克拉拉。
E: Assessing... Language module operating as normal. Thank you, Clara.

C: 外来者！我记得你，莫非你也想在拍卖会上淘些宝贝？
E: Outsider! I remember you. Perhaps you're hoping to find some treasures at the auction, too?

C: 竟敢在虎克大人面前做坏事，你们可真是大胆！看我不用洞洞机收拾你们！
E: You dare steal from a kid in front of Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!? Let's see how brave you are against Diggertron!

C: 哈哈，你真该照照镜子，听到钱眼睛都放光了。
E: Haha, you should check your reflections. Your eyes light up whenever money's involved.

C: 你们竞价怎么一点规律都没有呀？该不会是乱叫的吧！
E: Order! Order! You're just throwing bids out at random!

C: …老爹？
E: ...Daddy?

C: 「造物引擎」是你的兄弟吗？
E: Old friend of yours?

C: …不许拉踩！
E: ...If you haven't got anything nice to say right now, zip it!

C: 开始评估个体状况——稍等，克拉拉。
E: Initiating assessment of the robot's condition. Please wait, Clara.

C: 捡破烂是我的特长…
E: I'm an expert at scavenging...

C: 已抵达第一个目标地点。该机体型号为「齿狼」，报废原因为——在「机械宠物」决斗中受到贯穿伤，引发电锯燃料箱殉爆。
E: We have arrived at our first destination. This model is known as the Direwolf, and was scrapped after it sustained piercing damage during a battle with another robot pet, which caused the chainsaw's fuel tank to burst.

C: 唔…虽然外形变化很大…不过总的来说，应该还算成功吧？
E: Although its appearance has changed a lot, I think we did a good job.

C: ██异常██异█常██异常异█异常异常异常异常██████——
E: ██Incompatible██in█com██incomatiblein█incompatibleincompatibleincompatibleincompatible██████—

C: 唔…让克拉拉想想该怎么解释……
E: Well... How should I put it...

C: 危险，克拉拉——
E: Watch out, Clara...

C: 但…如果选择了格式化，帕斯卡一定会彻底失去情感智能……
E: But, once the formatting is complete, Pascal's emotional intelligence will vanish...

C: …或许还有一种办法。
E: ...Maybe there's another way.

C: 「保护机械智能发展出的自主意识」——我会适当提高该事项的权重比例。
E: Protecting a consciousness created by artificial intelligence. I shall give this more consideration.

C: 我好像不认识它们啊……
E: But I don't know them...

C: 等等，这是…欸，这不是希露瓦大姐头吗？好久不见！
E: Wait, isn't that... Ah! Serval! Long time no see!

C: 啊…啊？我轮岗之前才刚——
E: Uh... I showered right before my shift—

C: …嗯？再说一遍？
E: Hmm? What did you say?

C: 哈，总算好了！这下我们有操作栈桥的权限了，动作快！
E: Phew! We did it! We've gained access to the gear bridge. Let's move.

C: 你有把握说服他吗？
E: Are you sure you can convince him?

C: 姐姐…真的是你。
E: Serval... it really is you.

C: 说得好啊，姐姐！
E: Well said, Serval!

C: 上吧，为了贝洛伯格！
E: For Belobog!

C: 「星核」的模样…记得拍张照给我啊，小姑娘。
E: Hey March! Don't forget to take a picture of the Stellaron for me.

C: 可我该从哪里开始？我在追求的到底是什么？什么都想不起来，什么都…我需要他的帮助……
E: But where should I start? What is it that I'm looking for? I can't think of anything... nothing... I need his help...

C: 什么时候的事？发生在哪？
E: When did this happen? Where did it happen?

C: 哦，对了——我去查了下「斯捷潘」这个名字，但在部队的名册里没有相关记录，也包括已经处于退役状态的铁卫。
E: Ah yes — I checked up on that "Stefan" character you mentioned. There's no record of him among our registers, including retired Silvermane Guards and veterans.

C: 我说…你们有没有觉得这地方很诡异？感觉就像…感觉就像我们在被好多双眼睛一直盯着。
E: Guys... does this place feel weird to you? It feels like... like there are loads of eyes staring at us.

C: 你之前提到过的那些梦境，还记得吗？
E: Do you still remember those dreams you mentioned to us?

C: 管你是什么鬼怪离奇，别想挡我们的路——上吧！
E: I don't care how strange it is, it's blocking our way... Let's get it!

C: 喂，坚持住！可就差这临门一脚了呀！
E: Hey, stay with it! This is the final push!

C: ——这都是「开拓的精神」！
E: This is the spirit of trailblazing!

C: …你没事吧？！
E: ...Are you okay!?

C: 陌生人，我能感受到你的强大。与懦弱的我相比…你散发着如此坚强、镇定的气场。
E: Stranger, I can feel your power. Compared to my cowardice... you exude such a strong, calm aura.

C: 瓦尔特说得对。至于该去哪里了解这段历史嘛……
E: Welt is right. As for where you should go to learn about this history...

C: 我需要补全列车组的智库档案。
E: I'm on a research mission for the Express' data bank.

C: （原来在寒潮来临前发生了这些事……）
E: (So that's what happened before the Eternal Freeze occurred...)

C: 尝试着联系。
E: Try to contact this number.

C: 吃着芦慧送来的仙舟甜点，你详细叙述了你了解的事故经过……
E: While enjoying the Xianzhou snacks Luhui brought, you recount the incident in detail...

C: 不太像智力有问题呀。
E: She doesn't seem like a mentally challenged person.

C: 三两句应该没有办法感受到，她和我朝夕相处，感受很明显。
E: You probably won't feel it from a quick chat. Having her around day and night does make me more aware of her struggles.

C: …我看你们有话要说，等会儿吧。现在我们先完成事故调查。
E: ...I see you have some things to discuss. Please hold that thought. Let's complete the investigation first.

C: 你要是想在它面前拍张照也是可以的。
E: You can take a photo with it if you want.

C: 赔偿的事怎么样了？
E: How about compensation?

C: 天舶司之后还会去联系梅姐的，你现在告诉他们「抓住了肇事者」就好。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission will contact Mei later. For now, you can just tell them that we have arrested the suspect.

C: 真是走运！{NICKNAME}，有没有兴趣做我的助手……
E: What luck! {NICKNAME}, are you interested in becoming my assistant...?

C: 先别急着拒绝，我能开出的报酬可是非常优厚的。现在仙舟上大乱方平，许多化外民的生计都颇为艰难……
E: Don't be in a hurry to reject me! I can offer you a hefty pay. The Xianzhou is in utter chaos right now, and many outworlders are struggling to even earn enough money to eat...

C: 就这样了？
E: That's all?

C: 按这个抓药服一下不就知道了。
E: Just make this medicine and ingest it to find out.

C: 这下好点了吗？
E: Feeling better?

C: 「我只是一朵蘑菇。」
E: "I'm just a mushroom."

C: 你的诗人回来了。
E: Your poet is back.

C: 保重。
E: Take care.

C: 你要是继续反对的话，我是不会交出灵感玉兆的。
E: If you keep protesting, I won't hand over my Inspo Jade Abacus.

C: 「子女远行与父母分别」。
E: "The parting of children who travel far from their parents."

C: …我试试吧。
E: ...Let me try.

C: 「我给你我的哲思中所能蕴含的一切悟力，以及我生活中所能有的创造力与直率。」
E: "I offer you whatever insight my reflections may hold, whatever creativity and frankness my life."

C: 以前有个男人甚至还说把一颗星星的命名权送我…噁，拜托，仙舟一开动，我连这颗星在哪儿都见不着了……
E: A guy even wanted to gift me the right to name a star once... Oh, please! Once the Xianzhou sails off, I can't even see the star anymore...

C: 你没听明白，我是说这工作也太没有营养了！这是勤务该做的工作吗？
E: You don't get it. The job is so meaningless! Is that within the job description of an orderly?

C: 谢邀…
E: Thanks for inviting me...

C: 但是我能够理解。
E: But I can understand.

C: 听上去你讲得也不太情愿…那这句话到底是什么意思呢？
E: It sounds like you were saying that with the utmost reluctance... What does it mean?

C: 请输入物流信息。
E: Please enter delivery information.

C: 为什么？我可不相信那些「保持距离」「距离产生美」的说辞。
E: Why? I don't subscribe to those beliefs that promote the idea of "keeping a distance" or "distance makes the heart grow fonder."

C: 「狐仙聊天就是用花言巧语骗取钱财」…我心里也很清楚，她想要钱，我想要她的甜言蜜语。她每次都想把钱退给我，但是我觉得这是她应得的报酬。
E: "The Foxian Beauty Chat sweet-talks people into spending their money..." I know that. She wants money, and I want her soothing words. She wanted to return the money to me every time, but I felt like that was a remuneration she deserves.

C: 那个经纪人绝对有问题，我们从没听说过黛青小姐姐有什么经纪人！
E: There's definitely something fishy going on. We've never heard of any manager for Ms. Daiqing!

C: 抱歉，让我再挣扎一下…
E: I'm sorry. I need more time to think about it...

C: 当然你如果执意想让我亲临现场，我也很乐意。只是恐怕你没法接受自己背着我进行考察吧？
E: Well, if you insist on me being there myself, I'd be more than willing to oblige. However, I'm afraid you can't accept the idea of carrying me on your back when doing the investigation.

C: 啊，这就是研究。以一句「为什么」开始，以一句「我就知道事情不会这么简单」结束……
E: Ah, this is what research is like. It starts with a "why" and ends with an "I knew it wouldn't be so simple"...

C: 学会对仙舟历史有系统的记录，虽然也有魔阴身这般被极力隐藏的秘密……
E: The Guild has a systemic way of recording Xianzhou history. Indeed, there are secrets like the mara-struck that are kept well-hidden.

C: 所以，他画下这些图案，然后放弃了自己的学术生命，再也没有回学会任教。
E: So, he drew these drawings, gave up on his career as a scholar, and decided never to return to his teaching post at the Guild.

C: 陶德颤颤巍巍地从药盒里取出一枚药片，艰难吞了下去。片刻后，他被疼痛折磨的苦脸明显舒展了开来。
E: Todd takes out a pill from a pillbox with his trembling hand and struggles to swallow it. A while later, his face distorted by pain looks more relaxed.

C: 可我们这些朝生暮死的短生种，真的想永远永远活下去吗？…我们只是想多享受享受青春罢了。
E: Do we, short-life species, really want to live forever? We just want to stay youthful for as long as possible.

C: （图案上有几艘船，难道是…最初的几艘仙舟？）
E: (There are some ships in this drawing. Could they be... the first few Xianzhou ships?)

C: 你，我认得你，你是景元将军请来的客人。
E: You, I recognize you. Aren't you General Jing Yuan's esteemed guest?

C: 现在你又知道我要找的是什么人了。我反倒要问问，你是什么人？
E: ...Say, now that you know who I'm looking for, why don't you tell me who you are?

C: 你也是从丹鼎司洞天过来的？
E: Did you come from the Alchemy Commission delves?

C: 看来你知道的不少，我得好好问问。
E: Still, it's clear you know something... I'm not done questioning you.

C: 跟踪你们的人都已经处理了。
E: The person following you has been dealt with.

C: 你看，这位{F#少女}{M#少年}还是值得信任的吧？
E: See? I told you this {F#girl}{M#guy} was trustworthy.

C: 你听说过「药王秘传」…
E: You've heard of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus...

C: 那种感受又甜蜜，又痛苦。我这辈子从来没体会过，我没想过自己会爱上一个短生种。
E: It's something I never expected to experience in my lifetime — falling in love with a short-life species... such a bittersweet feeling.

C: 我们有事要找你。
E: We want to ask you a favor.

C: 大部分人这一生除了童年外，少有无忧无虑的快乐。成长、求学、工作…不停追逐这追逐那。
E: Most people rarely get to enjoy such a carefree feeling, except in childhood. Growing up, studying, working... Always chasing this or that thing.

C: 救、救命啊判官大姐姐！我们前不久才从被封锁的洞天里逃出来…那、那群坏家伙紧咬着咱们不放，这位医护小姐怕得都站不稳啦。
E: H—Help us, Miss Judge! We only just managed to escape before the delves were locked down... Those evil men have been chasing us — this nurse is so scared she can barely stand!

C: 这个时候了还在说什么「交易」，那是约定，我会治好他的，你不要担心！
E: Stop calling it a deal! I made a promise — I'll heal him. Don't worry...

C: 刚才的魔阴身怪物就是半夏。
E: That mara-struck monster just now was Banxia.

C: 没事儿了，没事儿了…要不，你们也喘口气，一路上肯定不容易吧。
E: It's alright, it's alright... take a breath. You must've been through a lot to get here.

C: 等等，你、你们要做什么？
E: Wait... wh—what are you doing?

C: 你就当我是个路灯吧！
E: Just imagine I'm a street lamp, barely even here!

C: 我要是让你当龙尊，你会生出尾巴来吗？
E: If I let you be High Elder, will you grow a tail?

C: 等等，{NICKNAME}，你感觉到了吗？有人在靠近！
E: Wait, {NICKNAME}. Can you feel it? There's someone coming!

C: 恢复繁衍的能力。
E: Restore the ability to reproduce.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 没关系，「直觉」也是地衡司查案的重要伙伴。直觉上认为一个人有问题，我也有过很多次，结果往往是对的。所以我愿意相信您。
E: That's alright — instinct is an important part of any Realm-Keeping Commission investigation. There are times when my gut tells me something's not right, and there's usually a reason for it. I'm with you on this one.

C: 放心吧，我们列车组最讲义气了，从不恩将仇报。
E: Don't worry, the Express Crew keeps its promises. We won't disappoint you.

C: 怎么样？有什么头绪吗？正确的顺序是什么？
E: What do you think? Any idea what the correct order is?

C: 太可惜了，我还想看打架呢…
E: More's the pity — I wanted to see some action...

C: 罗刹，快上来，该走了！
E: Climb aboard, Luocha! Time to get out of here!

C: 我就是希望大家都能登场露个脸嘛！
E: No one gets left out of my stories!

C: 抱歉，让二位见笑了。之后见。
E: Please excuse us, benefactors. I look forward to our meeting.

C: 你是说当妈的一面？
E: You mean a scary mom side?

C: 不过是些家事罢了，两位刚才应该听到只言片语了吧？
E: Family issues, I'm afraid. You probably heard a thing or two just now?

C: 不，不是我。是我那天才无双的妈妈。
E: No, not me... My genius mom did...

C: 这应该不是驭空司舵遗落的东西，实在太大了。
E: Well, this is too big for a trinket.

C: 护身符？
E: A lucky charm?

C: 这台术算机的桌面图片是一行飘逸的书法字：「岩明工位，闲人勿动。」
E: The desktop background on this calculation device is a line of floating calligraphy — "Yanming's work station, unauthorized personnel prohibited."

C: 不过我们要找的东西似乎不在这里。
E: ...but what we're looking for isn't here.

C: 晴霓小姐为人热情，带我们去星槎海游览了一番。在路上听说她想和驭空司舵重归于好，又有些羞怯，于是便冒昧地陪她一起来了。
E: Miss Qingni kindly agreed to show us around Starskiff Haven. She mentioned she was trying to mend things between you, but was feeling shy about it. We volunteered to come with her.

C: {NICKNAME}，不要盲目自信，这很危险。
E: Easy, {NICKNAME}, let's not get ahead of ourselves.

C: 如果对于帝弓司命来说，碾碎那些敌人如同呼吸般简单…那么，我们的牺牲又算什么呢？
E: If crushing our enemies was as easy as breathing for the Reignbow Arbiter... then what purpose did our sacrifices serve?

C: 明天，我会去帮你办理手续。你会先从一个地勤人员做起，正如我和采翼当年那样。我相信…你会成为一个了不起的斗舰飞行士。
E: I'll take you to fill in the paperwork tomorrow. You'll start as ground crew, just like Caiyi and I did. I believe that one day... you'll make an outstanding fighter pilot.

C: 这样的可能性也许存在…可是，{NICKNAME}，你会做出那样的选择吗？如果你现在走开，随后发生的一切都将与你无关。我对你抱持的期望与需要，也都会化为乌有。
E: Such a possibility may exist... but, {NICKNAME}, is that a choice you would make? If you walk away now, everything that happens afterwards will not involve you. All the expectations and needs that I have for you would also vanish into thin air.

C: 我不会留下。
E: No, I'm leaving.

C: 卡芙卡对你熟视无睹。她口中念念有词，这些具有威力的言语就是「言灵」。
E: Kafka turned a blind eye to you. She mutters some words in her mouth, and these powerful words are known as "Spirit Whispers."

C: （真话）我觉得你挺好。
E: (Truth) I think you're pretty good.

C: （真话）我讨厌你。
E: (Truth) I dislike you.

C: （说谎）我讨厌你。
E: (Lie) I dislike you.

C: （作弊）我不想再见到你。
E: (Disobey the rules of the game) I don't want to see you again.

C: 于是，艾利欧就看见了新的未来可能性。
E: ...and so Elio saw a new future possibility.

C: 卡芙卡对彦卿施展了「言灵」，让他走开，这才长舒一口气。
E: Kafka used Spirit Whisper on Yanqing and told him to leave, then breathed a sigh of relief.

C: 和云骑军起了冲突？有瓦尔特先生在，应该不至于……
E: A conflict with the Cloud Knights? Hm... Not likely, Mr. Yang wouldn't let that happen...

C: 不对啊，这儿应该有条通道的…怎么不见啦？
E: There's supposed to be a passage... Why can't I see it?

C: 你且等等。丹恒先生，这边说话。
E: Please wait. Dan Heng, can I speak to you for a minute?

C: 想来龙女大人是有麻烦了？我也同去。
E: Are you in trouble, Dragon Lady? I'll come along as well.

C: 说起来，不知最近几日是否有缠着绷带的人前来求龙女大人看诊？
E: By the way, among those you've treated in recent days, did you notice a person in bandages?

C: 我的前世已经结束了。
E: My past life is over.

C: 谁都没有想起…
E: Nothing to think of...

C: 唉，罗浮这是招惹了什么煞星，妖魔鬼怪一齐作乱。
E: *sigh* What foul demons found their way across the stars to wreak havoc on the Luofu?

C: 这儿的孽物怕是已被你剿灭干净了，咱们不妨换个地方。
E: It would seem we've cleared every abomination from the area. Let's find another location and continue our contest.

C: 猎物既然留下痕迹，那就好办了。
E: The best prey is one that leaves traces.

C: 听说您找我有事？
E: I heard you require my assistance?

C: 重新自我介绍一下，我是药王秘传的「莳者」。之前在长乐天不便暴露身份，但现在可以放心大胆地告诉你们了。
E: Allow me to reintroduce myself... I am a member of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. I was unable to expose my true identity in Exalting Sanctum, but now I can reveal everything.

C: 不是让你们把阿财用起来吗？怎么还招惹了警报？
E: Didn't I say to let Acai do the heavy-lifting? Now the alarm's going off!

C: 没、没关系的！来都来了。是骡子是马，都得当活的医！
E: I—I'm okay! Let's do it! Only way to find out is to give it a go!

C: 来，张弓搭箭，射向那个符玄。
E: *sigh* Draw your bow and fire an arrow at that Fu Xuan.

C: 这个女孩子说的话很可信啊。
E: This girl seems quite trustworthy.

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 还真有点不好解释……
E: It's kinda hard to explain...

C: {NICKNAME}，一起去司辰宫瞧瞧？
E: Let's head to the Palace of Astrum together, {NICKNAME}?

C: 但是对不起归对不起，我还是会亲手熔断…这柄魔剑！我绝不会让它落在任何人手里！
E: I'm sorry for making a scene, but I have to melt down this cursed sword! I won't let it fall into anyone else's hands!

C: 别看了，说话！
E: Stop watching me, and say something!

C: 你不会是爷爷派来找我的吧？
E: Did Grandpa send you to look for me?

C: 装着孤云的剑匣被打开，剑不翼而飞，但同处一室的其他剑却安然无恙，这说明——
E: The box containing Guyun was opened, and the sword went missing, but none of the other swords in the room were touched, which means...

C: 嫌疑人识得剑匣，也识得宝剑。
E: The suspect knew about the box and the sword.

C: 是啊。若是觉得剑匣费事，难道带着剑堂而皇之地离开就不惹眼吗？
E: Yeah, maybe. But if the case was too much trouble, wouldn't it be too conspicuous to carry around the sword like that in plain sight?

C: （为什么这片花瓣会出现在匣子里……？）
E: (Why is this flower petal inside the case...?)

C: 纯美骑士，就是你偷走了孤云剑对吧？把它留下！你根本不知道那魔剑是有多危险。
E: Knight of Beauty, you're the one who stole Guyun, right? Hand it over! You have no idea how dangerous that cursed sword is.

C: …谢谢你，老友。
E: ...Thank you, my old friend.

C: 所以，这就是卡勒瓦拉人所说的英雄之剑的过去？你帮助那个世界的人类结束了战斗？
E: So, this is the past of the Kalevalan people's Sword of Heroes? You helped the people of that world bring an end to war?

C: 我的孙女在听闻「米卡•奇瓦沙」讲述的英雄传说后，备受鼓舞，特地要求我带着她来这儿看看。
E: Well, my granddaughter was inspired by the heroic legends told by the Miekka Kivessä, so she dragged me here to take a look.

C: 哦…我是否可以理解为，一位假面愚者向我发出了合作的邀请？
E: Oh... am I understanding this correctly? A Masked Fool, inviting me to work together?

C: 我说了…为什么不能呢？
E: I said... why not?

C: 知道啦，我就是随口说说，别当真嘛。一个两个都这样……
E: Fine, I'm just spitballing here. Don't take it so seriously...

C: 不必了。
E: That won't be necessary.

C: 咳咳…花火大人来到这家服装店，想为自己购买一条崭新的领带。可她进入试衣间后，久久都没有出来。
E: Ahem... Miss Sparkle came to this fashion store to buy herself a brand-new tie... She didn't come back out.

C: 真不愧是黑天鹅警探，你就像我弗兰克姨夫家车库顶棚上的那窝喜鹊一样机敏！
E: You live up to your reputation, Detective Black Swan. As smart as the nest of magpies roosting in the roof of my uncle Frank's garage!

C: 花火大人经商失利，濒临破产。她路过常去的服装店，却偶遇宿敌、一直欺凌的店员、和被自己毁了人生的赌徒……
E: Miss Sparkle's business failed, and she was on the brink of bankruptcy. As she passed by her regular fashion store, she ran into her old nemesis, the bullying shopkeeper from the store, and the gambler whose life she'd ruined...

C: 没有奇怪的美梦剧团，也没有满地的证据…咱们终于追上她了。呃，可那是什么东西…一个贝洛伯格的垃圾桶？在匹诺康尼？
E: There's no weird Sweet Dreams Troupe, nor is there evidence strewn all over the place... We've finally caught up with her. Um, but what's that thing... A Belobogian trashcan? In Penacony?

C: 关于现场的美梦剧团…
E: Regarding the Sweet Dreams Troupe present at the scene of the crime...

C: 似乎是袭击者从别处偷来的美梦剧团，故意放在这儿的…真气人，简直就是不把公共秩序放在眼里。
E: Seems like the assailant stole the troupe from elsewhere and deliberately placed them here. What nerve... They don't even have the slightest consideration for public order.

C: 关于现场的证物…
E: Regarding evidence at the scene of the crime...

C: 呃…是这样吗，感觉证据有点对不上号啊？要不，再想想？
E: Er... is that so? I feel like the evidence doesn't really match? How about you think it over again?

C: 就这么白白坐着，万一有什么意外，将军如何担得起损失？！
E: You've been sitting on that this whole time? How will you justify the losses if something goes wrong, General!?

C: 那么，要平安回来喔，记得来「长乐天」找我玩。
E: Well then, get back safely. Remember to come find me in Exalting Sanctum!

C: 听说在罗浮仙舟受赐建木之初，「丹鼎司」丹士们的势力一时无二。他们能借着建木的力量，以种种奇术幻化肉身，呼风唤雨，乃至点化闻所未闻的奇禽灵兽。
E: They say that when the Xianzhou Luofu was first granted the Ambrosial Arbor, the alchemists in the Alchemy Commission wielded tremendous influence. Using the power of the Arbor, they transformed mortal bodies, manipulated the weather, and even brought never-before-seen creatures into being.

C: 明白了。
E: Fair enough.

C: 三人嬉皮笑脸地逃开，你趁机带着小姑娘离开了这个是非之地。
E: While the three run away provokingly, you take the chance to lead the girl away from this site of conflict.

C: 仙舟没有义眼之类的技术吗？
E: Does the Xianzhou have the technology to help with such impairments?

C: （呼…似乎稍微缓解了一些，但还是不太舒服……）
E: (Whew... Seems to be calming down a little, but still uncomfortable...)

C: 这样吧，你把那个「餐云承露丹」交给我，我去找人化验。
E: How about this, leave this Brumedew Concentrate Pellet with me, and I'll find someone to run a few tests on it.

C: 不要再在这里纠缠了，小心我去地衡司告你诽谤罪。
E: Don't make a scene here, or I'll sue you for slander at the Realm-Keeping Commission.

C: 这谁知道呢，天威难测啊。
E: Who knows? The will of the divine is unpredictable.

C: 哎哎哎，你先别走嘛…等我劝劝他们。
E: Hey, please don't go... I'll mediate their dispute.

C: 好啦，各位，先别吵了。
E: Everyone, please stop fighting.

C: 别问我…我就是一「矿泉水人」，和那三位放生大师的食物链没啥关系。
E: Don't ask me... I'm just a "mineral water guy" — I don't have anything to do with the food chain of those three great ones.

C: 观察你们两位的手艺，真是让我学到了不少。
E: I'm learning a lot by observing you two at work.

C: 那么就此别过了。
E: Goodbye.

C: 我已经向放生帮的几位大善人发出了邀请。
E: I've sent out invitations to the Benevolent Ones.

C: 机械生物到处都是啊，仙舟满天飞的都是些机巧鸟。您上次来不还带了一条谛听？这怎么算得上是濒危生物呢？
E: Mechanical creatures are everywhere, and the sky is full of those cycranes. Didn't you bring a Diting with you the last time you were here? In what sense are they endangered species?

C: 贝娜小姐和公司贸易代表关系不错，一定听过这个世界的名字。听说它最近才刚刚重回贸易联合体的怀抱。
E: Miss Benna, I believe you must have heard of this planet before, since you're close with the trade reps of the IPC. I heard that the planet has just resumed its trade lately.

C: 像猛兽一样露出獠牙吧！我的战士们！你们充满活力的战斗之姿，正是药师大人的神力昭彰！
E: Show your ferocious side like the beasts, my warriors! Your valor is the manifestation of the divine power of Yaoshi!

C: 呸，冬妮娅和希斯曼那两个伪善的家伙！我要他们一起替我认缴罚款，他们说什么也不干！
E: Oh, please! Tonya and Heathmann are just hypocrites! They refused to pay when I asked them to share the fine!

C: 呜呜呜…那我这岂不就是…没得选吗……
E: *Sob*... You're leaving me with no choice at all...

C: 那几位不是还在受罚吗？
E: Aren't they being punished?

C: 鬼是五毛特效？
E: The "ghosts" were cheap special effects?

C: 弹幕感觉全是机器人发的…
E: The comments all look like bots wrote them...

C: （真的吗？你敢说在心底没有一丝把她抛下的念头？）
E: (Oh, but you did... and can you swear that you don't want to leave her behind? Not even a little?)

C: …团建吗？
E: ...Team-building?

C: 他自由了。
E: He's free now.

C: 离开这个孩子。
E: Leave the kid alone.

C: 去调查其他铜镜。
E: Investigate other mirrors.

C: 穿过铜镜。
E: Pass through the mirror.

C: 没关系，多了解并不是坏事。
E: That's fine. No harm in learning more.

C: 我从来没有感觉这么好过…请别担心。
E: I've never felt this good before... Please don't worry about me.

C: 什么「心灵慰藉特调」…令人恶心……
E: This so-called Soulheal Special Mix... It's disgusting...

C: 抱歉，刚刚在…清点货物。上次的那件大衣，您还满意吗？
E: My apologies, I was... taking stock. Were you satisfied with the long coat the other time?

C: 求求您……
E: Please...

C: 姐妹说的是。我起初也有怀疑，但自从看到这潇洒的签名…我就知道！我就知道星间众神不可能那么有眼无珠，眼睁睁地看着一颗冉冉升起的新星殒落。
E: The young lady is right! I was suspicious at first, but when I saw this elegant signature... I was sure! I knew the Aeons would not be so blind as to allow a rising star to come crashing down so soon!

C: 你、你就别揶揄我了…剪报在这里，你自己看吧。
E: D—Don't tease me... The snippet is here. Take a look for yourself.

C: {NICKNAME}。
E: {NICKNAME}.

C: 我的直觉可是敏锐得很！那家伙身上缺了某样东西——一旦缺了东西，就不能被称作完整的人了！嘀嗒！
E: My instincts are razor-sharp! That person is missing something... As soon as someone is missing something, they can no longer be called a complete person! Tick tock!

C: 我听说那位客人是因为赊欠房费被强行赶走的。他好像已经在匹诺康尼住了很久了…但他看上去实在不像什么有钱人。
E: I heard that this client was forced to leave as he was behind on his room fees. He had been in Penacony for a very long time... But he didn't look like a rich man to me.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您愿意再帮我一次吗？我想<color=#dbc291ff>唤醒那些创造出我的人们</color>。
E: {NICKNAME}, would you help me once more? I wish to <color=#dbc291ff>summon the people that created me</color>.

C: 不知道这位女士经历了什么样的人生。我们走吧，{NICKNAME}…
E: I wonder what kind of life this woman has lived. Let's go, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我…我没事！真的没事……
E: I... I'm fine! I'm honestly fine...

C: …怎么突然不说话啦？笑一笑嘛！平时那个活泼开朗的芙洛拉跑哪去了？
E: ...Why are you so quiet all of a sudden? Give us a smile! Where's that bubbly, happy Flora we know and love gone?

C: 放心，我们天环族的审美绝不会令您失望。
E: Don't worry, you'll never go wrong with a Halovian's aesthetics.
(...Shut up!)

C: （那是…砂金，还有托帕？！）
E: (Is that... Aventurine? And Topaz!?)

C: 可惜他们人多势众…没关系，我的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}很快就会来救我们出去的！
E: But we're outnumbered... Don't worry. My {F#sister}{M#brother}-in-arms will help us get out soon!

C: 你想象着桂乃芬街头直播卖艺的模样，以哈努兄弟的二头身材轻松做出了一套丝滑的倒立、回旋、空翻小连招——十分！
E: Picturing how Guinaifen does her street performances, you easily pull off a handstand, a pirouette, and a somersault with Brother Hanu's short body. Ten out of ten!

C: 啊，这是多么…多么令人费解的景象。即便博爱如伊德莉拉，恐怕也不会将目光投向此处吧……
E: Ah, what a perplexing sight. I'm afraid not even the altruistic Idrila would cast her gaze upon this place...

C: 狂热的「四尺圣堂」教徒们奋力跳起来敲打波提欧和银枝的膝盖……
E: The zealous followers of Four-Foot Hall jump with all their might and strike at Boothill and Argenti's knees...

C: 把小命搭在这儿可太不值了，先跑为敬！
E: It's not worth it to risk my life here. Let me run while I still can!

C: 但这次的过程好像也太…顺利了点？你看啊，那个罗伊罗伊被你们打败以后就直接灰溜溜地跑了，也没有哭着喊着求饶、或者讲一大堆他自己的难处之类的……
E: But things have gone too... smoothly this time. Think about it — that Royroy just slunk away after being defeated by you. He neither cried for mercy nor prattled on about his grievances...

C: 列车组成员也算是往返罗浮多次了，倒也并不需要什么送别，我们几个随意一些也无妨。三月说你差点赶不上的另有其他的事情——
E: The crew have run to and from the Luofu many times, so there's no need to go to all the effort of a formal send-off, surely? March said you were late because you had something else —

C: 明白了，我就在这里等候。
E: Okay, I'll wait here.

C: 很好，不过你容易惯着她！
E: Good, no spoiling her like you normally do!

C: 也没那么遗憾啦！我听说彦卿守擂得胜，宝剑也算是握在合适的人手中。
E: I'm not that sad! I heard Yanqing took victory as the ringmaster. So the sword still rests in worthy hands.

C: 不就是找不到东西而已，至于吗？
E: Their toolboxes are a bit messy. So what?

C: 铖杰说啦！莱恩的愿望是造出星槎，{NICKNAME}，你再想想？
E: But Chengjie said that Mr. Ryan's wish is to create a new starskiff, right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 你的意思是说，连这份「损坏的星槎设计稿」也不交给他…这不太好吧？
E: Are you telling me that we shouldn't even give him this damaged starskiff design manuscript...? That's wrong, isn't it?

C: 这么一说，一眨眼师傅已经去世了…唔，快一百来年了，我始终没有勇气面对他的手稿。结果……
E: Just like that, before I knew it, my master had passed away... It's been almost a hundred years now. I still don't have the courage to face his manuscript. And now...

C: 工造司从来不拒绝来自仙舟外的学生。他们充满活力、满脑子想法，也期盼着能从仙舟上学得一技之长…莱恩老师就是这样的化外民。
E: The Artisanship Commission has never turned away any students from outside of the Xianzhou. They are full of energy and ideas, and are always looking to learn knowledge and skills from the Xianzhou... And Master Ryan was one of those Outworlders.

C: 现在出师也不算迟。
E: It's never too late to graduate.

C: 这…{NICKNAME}，你看？
E: Hmm... {NICKNAME}, how about it?

C: 开始了，开始有感觉了…心底泛起了一丝生气。等等，唉，它又消失了。
E: I'm feeling it... There's a spark of anger rising deep down inside me. Hold on. Alas, that feeling's gone.

C: 感觉星槎运行得很稳定。
E: Feels like the starskiff is moving with high stability.

C: 果然，我其实应该找个厂打工或是支个早点摊糊口的。我其实，没有一丁点儿的天赋。
E: I really should have worked at a factory or set up a food stall for a living. I really have zero talent for craftsmanship.

C: 当然。你最近好像不忙？要是需要帮手，我随时联系你。
E: Of course. You're not too busy these days, right? I'll give you a shout if I need help.

C: 这地方最不缺的就是被四处乱丢的无人机。动嘴不如动腿，走吧！
E: Missing drones are a bit of a regular occurrence down here. Come on, move those legs!

C: 等、等会儿，你们怎么知道这机器人的名字？难道你们是——
E: H—Hold on a second. Who told you the name of this robot? Don't tell me it's—

C: 开拓者。「地火」的希儿。还有……
E: The Trailblazer, Seele of Wildfire, and...

C: 我准备好了，史瓦罗！我们随时可以开始！
E: I'm ready, Svarog! We can start any time!

C: 「小飞」和「大奔」就拜托你们了！
E: Please, I'm depending on you for Little Fay and Big Ben!

C: 卢卡——你经常帮人找东西吗？
E: Luka... Do you often find stuff for other people?

C: …不…不行，还没完！
E: ...N—No! It's not over!

C: 既然他发出邀请，于情于理，我都应该去看看老朋友。
E: Since he has extended an invitation, it's only right that I visit my old friend.

C: 那就太好了，你们知道在这「罗浮」之上，有什么值得一去的景点吗？
E: That's great! Do you know any must-see attractions on the Luofu?

C: 听说曜青的飞霄将军年纪轻轻，却勇冠三军。云骑军里同僚们将她传得神乎其神，说她一身西瓜般的腱子肉，一拳下去便能轰碎十来头孽物…也不知是真是假。
E: I heard General Feixiao of the Yaoqing is a young and dauntless lady. My peers say that she's like a goddess of war, capable of crushing dozens of abominations with a single punch... I wonder if it's true.

C: 快走吧，咱们别让将军久等了。
E: Alright, let's not keep the general waiting.

C: 真是客气，您都谢了好多回了。
E: That's so kind of you. I mean you've already thanked us so many times.

C: 走吧，将军让彦卿招待我们，显然是有要事讨论。咱们就别呆在这儿耽误时间了。
E: We should leave. General Jing Yuan asked Yanqing to entertain us, so obviously, he has important matters to discuss. Let's not waste any time here.

C: 这是青镞姐刚才发过来的案呈，让我看看……
E: This is the report Qingzu just sent me. Let me take a look...

C: 问责？不至于吧。药王秘传的坏家伙和反物质军团入侵罗浮大搞破坏，罗浮不是受害者吗？哪有受害者被问责的道理啊？
E: Hold him accountable? Come on, didn't the Luofu fall victim to the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and the Antimatter Legion? Why would they blame the victim?

C: 联盟可以和你签署保密协议，这样就不用担心他们窥探了吧？
E: The Alliance can sign a non-disclosure agreement with you. That way, you won't have to worry about any infringements, right?

C: 先恶心他一下再说
E: Start by making him feel uncomfortable.

C: 我不怀疑天舶司的财力…但是！这也不是钱的事儿！
E: I don't doubt the financial strength of the Sky-Faring Commission... However! This is not just about money!

C: 没错，当得一句年少有为。
E: Yeah, exactly. He's young and talented.

C: 呵呵，我算是明白了～用你们的话说，这叫「趁火打劫」，对吧？
E: Heh, I think I get it now. In your words, this is called "looting a burning house," right?

C: 倒也不是这个意思。剑都拔出来了，不让比一比，你们俩谁也不会高兴不是？
E: I didn't mean it that way. Since you've already drawn your swords, you'd be disappointed if you didn't get to test one another, right?

C: 三月，你还是从了吧！
E: Just accept your fate, March!

C: 听说你练过射艺，有受训武事的底子，所以第一课当然要摸摸你的根基扎实不扎实。
E: Well, I heard you have some experience with archery and martial arts. The first thing we're going to do is see just how strong your fundamentals are.

C: 姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
E: Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?

C: 唔，我想想…仙舟的剑器里，哪一种最厉害啊？单剑、重剑、还是飞剑？
E: Hmm, let me see... Which sword is the most powerful? Single sword? Greatsword? Or maybe a flying sword?

C: 刚才那个云骑，完全认不出彦卿师父…这确实很蹊跷。
E: That Cloud Knight didn't recognize Master Yanqing at all... That's really weird.

C: 他们要离开了，快些跟上他们！
E: They're leaving. We should catch up to them, quickly!

C: 老朽本来担心这是一场唇枪舌剑的会面。是我多心了！两位既然都做出决定，互解难题，那真是再好不过！
E: I was worried this would turn into a heated argument, but it seems like both of you are on the same page, solving each other's problems! I couldn't have asked for a better outcome!

C: 若两位已经准备好了，我便打开狱门。
E: If you're ready, I'll open the gate for you.

C: 我们到了。
E: Here we are.

C: 待我启动机关，各位再向前走，务必小心脚下。
E: Please let me activate the mechanism before we all move forward, and please watch your steps.

C: 要问此处到底有多少层？让两位见笑了，即便身为判官的我也不知道。
E: As for how many floors there are...? Well, not even us judges know for sure.

C: 您复仇的机会，近在眼前。
E: Your opportunity for revenge is right in front of you.

C: 三月小姐真是冰雪聪明！老朽的意思嘛，就是这么个意思。
E: You caught on quickly, Miss March! That's exactly what I mean.

C: 将军，你在这做什么？
E: What brings you here, General?

C: 「为何步离人能控制月狂？」「狐人能否破除这一诅咒？」…总会有人问起这样的问题。
E: "Why can borisin control the power of Moon Rage?" "Can we foxians break free from this curse?" ...These questions were asked frequently.

C: 说起猎狼，妾身很担心那位被劫走的曜青使者。呼雷在幽囚狱中许久未曾摄食、饥馁至今…也不知那位使者能否在他的狼口中安然渡劫。
E: Speaking of the Wolf Hunt operation, I'm truly worried about the Yaoqing messenger who was taken hostage. Hoolay was starving in The Shackling Prison for centuries... I don't know if the messenger can survive in that wolf's clutches.

C: （我也许可以试着偷偷向外发出警告…不，也许我有机会可以直接离开这儿……）
E: (Perhaps I can try to warn the Cloud Knights... No, perhaps I can just escape...)

C: 等等…我认得你，你是那个失联的曜青使节。你怎么在这儿？
E: Wait... I recognize you... You're the lost Yaoqing messenger. How are you here?

C: 高大的男人伸出一根手指，以快到看不见的动作在你的肩胛上一点。
E: The tall man stretches out a finger and touches your shoulder blade with a movement so fast it's not visible.

C: 遵命！
E: Yes, ma'am!

C: 实在不好意思，我必须先专注眼前的工作了。有问题稍后再谈。
E: I'm sorry, but I need to focus on my work right now. If you have any questions, we can discuss them later.

C: 如果那样做，我和你们也就别无二致了。
E: If I were to do that, I wouldn't be any different from you.

C: 可他们又再一次奔向战场。于是，我听到了他们的死讯。他们死在你们的爪牙之下，在星槎坠毁的火焰里，在帝弓的光矢中……
E: But once again, they rushed into battle, and then I heard of their deaths. They died under your claws, in your jaws, amidst the flames of crashing starskiffs, and under the Lux Arrow of Reignbow...

C: 呵呵…我在你身上嗅到了深入骨髓的绝望。
E: Heh... I can smell your desperation, all the way down to your bone marrow.

C: 那你看看我，我的战斗力是多少？
E: Take a look at me, then. What is my combat power rating?

C: 你好，我就是三月七。
E: Hello, I am March 7th.

C: 放心吧，我只是个练习剑术时长半个月的剑士。
E: Don't worry, I'm a newbie swordmaster who's only been practicing the art of swordplay for half a month.

C: 根据一些不可靠的小道消息，我听说彦卿骁卫现在身负重伤，请问这是真的吗？
E: This is just gossip from unreliable sources, but I hear that Lieutenant Yanqing is seriously injured. Is this true?

C: 很感谢你接受采访，谢谢！
E: Thank you very much for accepting my interview. Much appreciated!

C: 讲讲眼下云骑的部署规划？
E: Tell me about how the Cloud Knights are currently deployed.

C: 也祝你们宝剑常锋，登擂夺胜！
E: May your blades be sharp and your victories glorious!

C: 到底你是医士我是医士啊？你就对自己的判断这么自信吗？
E: Are you the healer or am I!? Are you really that certain of your own judgment?

C: 没想到，生平第一次，我在战场上迟到了。不，也许该说是你们几个年轻人的剑太快了些。
E: Who would have imagined that I would arrive late to the battlefield for the first time in my life? ...No, perhaps you young ones' blades were just too fast for me.

C: 每次战斗结束，怒火褪去，你面对士兵们又敬又怕的眼神，听闻他们窃窃私语的流言，你明白自己永远没法成为他们中的一员。
E: At the end of every battle, as your rage faded away, you would look into your fellow soldiers' eyes and see both respect and fear. You would hear their whispers, knowing that you could never become one of them.

C: 那些前来营救我的都蓝子裔，全心期待着当我重获自由时就能扭转战局，改变一切，让所有步离猎群再度兴盛！但这不过是受有心人操弄的美梦罢了。
E: The descendants of Duran who came to rescue me hoped with all their hearts that once I regained my freedom, I would be able to turn the tide of battle and change the fate of our people, allowing the borisin to return to their former glory! But this was just a dream used by someone with ulterior motives to manipulate the borisin.

C: 在随后的岁月里，我和云骑战友无数次追逐那道光的轨迹，又无数次看着它落下。
E: In the years that followed, I followed the trail of that light alongside my Cloud Knight allies, and saw it fall countless more times.

C: 心兽，听我号令！
E: Inner beast, heed my command!

C: 妾身来这儿，本就是来听听长老的解释。但没想到长老除了擅长讲大道理外，小动作也做得不少啊。
E: I came here to listen to your explanation. But I never imagined that, besides being good at preaching, you'd also have quite a few tricks up your sleeve.

C: 好啦！别玩了，该去探望我的师父们了。
E: Alright! Enough playing. It's time to visit my masters.

C: 真是麻烦您了，陛下。
E: I'm really sorry for troubling you, Your Majesty.

C: 嘿，还带着保镖来了？
E: Heh, brought an imperial guard with you too, eh?

C: 我以为你不想报警…
E: I thought you didn't want to involve them...

C: 没事没事，送纺锤花就好。即便做了皇帝，他也仍然是我哥哥，我最了解了。
E: It's fine. Spindleblooms will do just fine. Even if he's the Emperor, he's still my older brother. No one knows him better than I do.

C: 对呀，这就是我的目的——让陛下重新想起来，他妹妹有多可爱～
E: Yes, that's exactly my goal — to remind His Majesty of how totally adorable his younger sister is!

C: 殿下…殿下…灰骑士，快带着殿下逃……
E: Your Highness... Your Highness... Gray Knight, you must take Her Highness and flee...

C: 朕很清楚，他们迟早会杀了朕。
E: It was clear to me that they intended to kill me sooner or later.

C: 随便挑一杯给她端过去吧。
E: Just pick any glass and bring it to her.

C: 我不是灰骑士。
E: I am not the Gray Knight.

C: 如果你需要任何帮助，或者遇到了任何麻烦，都可以来找朕帮忙～
E: If you are in need of help or are in any kind of trouble, feel free to approach me.
Hmm...

C: 这就是我后半生的故事……
E: This is the story of the latter part of my life...

C: 信件的封面上用潦草的字体书写着：「寄出不予批准，建议退回」。
E: On a letter cover, written in hasty handwriting: "Unauthorized send request. Return recommended."

C: 没错。艺术与现实总是相辅相成——据我所知，《钟表小子》动画中的折纸小鸟正代表了曾经为建造梦境奉献一切的筑梦师们。
E: That's right. Art and reality always complement each other. According to what I know, the origami birds in Clockie's cartoons symbolize the Dreamweavers that gave their all to build the Dreamscapes.

C: 找到想要的信息了吗？
E: Found the info you wanted?

C: 一只身体圆滚滚，羽毛滑溜溜，和我们长得一模一样的折纸小鸟？啾啾？
E: A rotund, ruffled, origami bird that looks just like us? Tweet tweet?

C: 也希望…我们能成为你的「家人」。
E: And we hope... that we will become your family.

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 工作？可别提工作了！我正为这事发愁呢。
E: Work? Don't even mention that word! I'm tearing my hair out because of it.

C: 对此我持保留意见。
E: I reserve judgment on this.

C: 如果你实在对他们不感兴趣，也可以把我的邀请当作一份委托——等回到奥赫玛之后，我请你吃饭。
E: If you're really uninterested in them, you can treat my invite as a commission — I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.

C: 哎呀，您果然识货。喏，我这儿还有些水果，一并送你当赠品好了。
E: Hah, I knew you had a good eye. Oh, I have some fruit here too, take 'em as a gift.

C: 又见面了，可爱的小家伙。有什么想吃的水果吗？
E: We meet again, my adorable friend. Any fruit you want to eat?

C: 可惜咱们的交流没能再深一些，不然我一定会和你探讨苹果的美味，以及其他更多事情……
E: 'Tis a pity we didn't get to know each other better, otherwise I would surely discuss the wonderful flavor of apples with you, along with many other matters...

C: 你们会释放他吗？
E: Will you release him?

C: 三天后，刻法勒广场
E: Three days later, Kephale Plaza

C: 可我们圣城公民哪里对不起外邦人了？我们有害过他们吗？我们只是不让他们进城而已。
E: But when have our holy city's citizens mistreated outlanders? Have we harmed them? We merely turned them away at the city gates.

C: 那么，讨论结束，请各位投票……
E: Well, the discussion has concluded. Everyone please cast your vote...

C: 外邦人的命运，决定权不在我或者元老院，而是在各位公民手中。
E: The fate of the outlanders does not lie with me nor the Council of Elders, but with the citizens.

C: *无名客詈语*！
E: *Nameless curses*!

C: 我猜他肯定不住在奥赫玛——这圣城上下的人都光顾过我的店铺，每个客人的名字我都记着呢！
E: I am certain that he doesn't live in Okhema. People from all over this holy city have frequented my store and I remember the name of every customer!

C: 真不想回答你这种没脑子的种类，那当然是因为她打了败仗，比那打了胜仗的俘虏还可悲。
E: I don't want to sit and answer your brainless questions. Obviously it's because she was defeated in battle. That is more shameful than an enemy soldier that battled victoriously.

C: 等等，我怎么觉得这家伙不太对劲……
E: Wait. There's something not quite right about them...

C: 那又如何。身为尼卡多利的造物，战败便是对吾父最大的亵渎，理应投身死潮向其谢罪。
E: So what? As a creation of Nikador, defeat is the greatest blasphemy against my father. It is only natural that I should cast my body into the waves of death to apologize for my failure.

C: 哈抱歉抱歉，我只在战报和故事里听说过纷争的眷属，有点激动了。
E: Ho, I apologize. I have only ever read of the Titankin of Strife in battle reports and stories — I got a little startled.

C: 或许我能修好。
E: I may be able to fix it.

C: 嗯？陌生人，别趁着醉意在这里说胡话了，你要如何让这碎片重新聚合？
E: Hm? Stranger, do not allow your drunken revelry to speak nonsense for you. How would you possibly restore these fragments?

C: 你想杀戮。
E: You want to kill.

C: 哈哈，她一直是个容易害羞的姑娘，你又不是不知道。
E: Haha, she's always been the shy type. You know this.

C: 这不是你们的错…
E: This is not your fault...

C: 帕里斯，快做出决定吧…守卫马上就要来了，我可不能帮一个想要潜逃的士兵洗脱罪名。
E: Paris. Make a decision quickly... The guards are coming. I cannot help clear the name of a soldier who attempts desertion.

C: 怎、怎么了？
E: Wh—What is it?

C: 帕里斯应该已经带着雕像小姐已经进城了，她会在哪里接受治疗呢……
E: Paris must have already taken the statue lady into the city. Where will she be able to receive treatment, though?

C: 雕像小姐，你的记忆，我们会记住的……
E: Statue lady... Your memory... We will never forget it...

C: 伙伴，快抓紧时间吧！
E: Friend! We have to be quick!

C: 即便有人因为没被选中而诋毁她，说她是骗子，也只是一笑置之。唉，要是我能替她分担一些烦忧就好了——闲聊就到此为止吧。
E: Even if people slandered her and called her a liar because they weren't chosen, she just laughed it off. *sigh* If only I could share some of her burdens — let's stop the chit-chat here.

C: 「伟大的永夜之帷，这双盲眼已无法再窥见您的……」
E: "Veil of Evernight, these blind eyes can no longer get a glimpse of your..."

C: 我也希望如此……可是，塔兰顿已经不在了。
E: I hope so too... But Talanton is gone.

C: 吞下那些剧毒的草药！
E: Swallow those poisonous herbs!

C: 好的，我会一直在这里等你。
E: No problem. I will wait here for you.

C: 别担心，重建计划没有受到影响。但不得不说…宇宙的一丝涟漪，落到边陲星球就是一股滔天巨浪啊。
E: Don't worry, the reconstruction plan hasn't been affected. But I must say... even a tiny ripple in the universe becomes a tsunami when it reaches frontier planets.

C: （寄语啊…写点什么呢？）
E: (A message... what should I write?)

C: 不过…我们真的能像虎克老大一样坐星际航班，去翁法罗斯旅行吗？
E: But... can we really take an interstellar flight to Amphoreus like Boss Hook?

C: 怎么会有人从下卷看起？
E: Who starts reading from the Volume 2?

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 呜呜伯将一个范围较大的坐标标注在了你的终端地图上。
E: The Wubbaboo marked a relatively large area on your terminal map.

C: 才没有呢，如果不是老师给我自由发展的机会，我就不会知道原来自由是这么宝贵的东西，更加不会有机会见识到外面的广阔。
E: No, if you didn't give me this opportunity to explore who I really am, I wouldn't realize that freedom is such a precious thing, and I wouldn't have the opportunity to see how big the outside world is.

C: 辛苦你忙了一天，这里是老头子我的一点心意，就当是我代希拉给的谢师礼吧。
E: You've been working hard all day. Here is a little token of my appreciation. You can take it as a gift from Sheila.

C: 喔，有道理，这样就识别不到具体位置了。
E: Oh, that makes sense. It can't figure out its exact location.

C: （看来亲历者是他们的同事，应该就在附近吧。）
E: (Seems like the person involved in this case is their close colleague. He should be close by.)

C: 我也买了，但是还没到货，借你的用几天呗。
E: I bought it too, but mine hasn't arrived yet. Lemme borrow yours for a few days.

C: 我这就告诉你故事的后续，但事先说好，那一部分我还没有定稿，所以表达上或许缺乏一些文学性，请你见谅。
E: I'll tell you the rest of that story right now. But be warned, I haven't finalized that part yet, so it may lack a certain level of artistry in expression. Please excuse me.

C: 那倒不是，只是我买了染发剂后，发现色差很大，但聚会在即，重新买又来不及……
E: No... I bought the dye, but the color was different from what I imagined. The party was coming up, and I had no time to buy another one...

C: 来吧，来黄金歌剧院的大门口找我。该让你看到华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀不一样的一面了。
E: Come and meet me at the gate of the Golden Theater. It's time to show you a different side of me.

C: 不错，不错…你抓住了精髓。不瞒你说，我对音乐剧颇有研究，像《雪国往事》和《白衣之后》这类经典剧目，我都欣赏过不下二十遍。
E: Good... This is a great photo. As a matter of fact, I have done a lot of research on musicals. I have enjoyed classic dramas such as "Once Upon a Snowsieged Country" and "Beneath the White Cloak" more than twenty times.

C: 好呀，我答应了。
E: Sure, I can be his friend.

C: 我猜那位女士对音乐剧并不感兴趣…这种建立在功利之上的友谊，肯定算不上「真心」。我想我不得不拒绝她了。
E: It seems she is not interested in musicals... Friendships of utility are not true friendships. Looks like I have to refuse to be friends with her.

C: 这下糟了，我也不知道啊！你还记得什么细节吗…比如从哪儿听说的，或是谁拜托的你……
E: That's too bad, me neither! Do you remember the details... Like where did you hear it or the person who told you?

C: 一个纸团孤零零地藏在地髓之间，是纸团，总会被发现。
E: A paper ball is buried within the Geomarrow. Paper balls will always be found.

C: 偷偷告诉你，这都是「鼹鼠党振兴计划」的第一步哦——找到「地火」工作中的疏漏，然后靠我们敏捷的行动力把空缺补上！
E: It's a secret, but I'll tell you. This is the first step of The Moles Reinvigoration Plan — find the work that Wildfire has neglected and take it up right away!

C: 我…我没事！谢谢你们，{NICKNAME}，还有尤利安……
E: I... I'm fine! Thank you, {NICKNAME}, and Julian...

C: …奥列格说什么了？
E: What did Oleg say?

C: 唔…我好像听虎克老大说过这个名字，好像是个住在机械聚落的怪姐姐……
E: Umm... I think I've heard Boss Hook mentioning this name before. She's a quirky girl living in the Robot Settlement if I remember correctly...

C: 他是在跟自己过不去…
E: He's too hard on himself...

C: 咦？您的意思是……
E: Hmm? Do you mean...

C: 如何，您知道答案了吗？深蓝帅哥应该打开哪扇门才能获得财宝呢？
E: Do you know the answer? Which gate should Tall, Blue, and Handsome open to get the treasure?

C: 小女子最近在想，塔米拉小姐对菲丝小姐说的那句话…「在温暖的卧室中伴着花香反复阅读这本书，真是太幸福了。」
E: I've been thinking about what Tamila said that time to Fizz back at the store... "It's such a blessing to read this book over and over again in a cozy warm bedroom with my flowers."

C: 老人枯槁的手指在液晶屏上颤颤巍巍地四处移动，呼出了似乎是「相册」的应用程序。
E: The old man's wrinkled fingers shake as they glide over the display, calling up a program that seems to be an album.

C: 您的妻子为何离去了？
E: What do you mean, your wife left you?

C: 谢谢，年轻人…谢谢。
E: Thank you, kid... Thank you.

C: 这里其实是过去的贝洛伯格。
E: This is the Belobog of the past.

C: 你别说话了，坚持住！
E: Stop talking! Hang in there!

C: 根据地衡司的反馈，他们目前没有收到走失人口的报案，这「落难者」大概率是「虚构情节」，在获得确凿证据之前，护珠人不会再出动海上救援了。
E: According to their feedback, they have not received any reports of missing persons, and this "castaway" is likely a fabrication. The Pearlkeepers will not be dispatched for ocean rescue again before obtaining conclusive evidence of their existence.

C: 杜老板为你亲自斟茶，倒了满满一杯茶。
E: Boss Du personally pours a cup of tea for you.

C: 「金丝裁缝铺」
E: "Golden Thread Tailor"

C: 还是停一停吧，这里随处都是信徒。
E: Better stop it for now, there are disciples everywhere.

C: 人人都知道，收获月里，您总有一天会来到这里，似是与人有约，却又谁也不见。
E: Everyone knows that you would come to this place one day during the Month of Reaping. It is as if you had arranged to meet someone, yet you are alone.

C: 圣女大人，您又来采火山玻璃了么？
E: Great Holy Maiden, you are here to collect volcanic glass again?

C: 不屑诡计翻覆，以卫荣耀之冠冕；
E: Unyielding to conniving treachery, protecting the crown of honor.

C: 把树种交给认真的学者。
E: Give the Seed to the earnest scholar.

C: 空旷的房间里，沉默的蒲团是唯一的见证者，默默守护着被困于此的纯真孩童。
E: In the empty room, the silent meditation mat stands as the sole witness, quietly guarding the innocent child confined here.

C: 翻越了万千门径的勇敢女孩，最终在此处停下脚步。
E: The brave girl who crossed the myriad passages eventually stopped here.

C: 那么，今天读什么好呢？金苹果选美…弥卡斯王…歌耳戈猎狮…这些你都听了好多遍了吧？
E: Well then, what story should we read today? The golden apple beauty contest... The story of King Mikas... Gorgo and the Lion... You've heard them all lots of times, haven't you?

C: 您不必如此失态。如今我早已失去了圣女的所谓传谕权，按我们的约定…我只负责聆听泰坦之声。
E: There is no need for such outrage. I have long since lost the so-called prophetic rights of the Holy Maiden. According to our agreement... I am solely responsible for listening to the word of the Titans.

C: 年轻时我因家庭暂时放弃了这个理想，好在到了这个岁数，还能有机会在树庭燃烧智慧。如今黑潮覆灭树庭将即，我便也无处可去了。
E: I temporarily gave up on this ideal when I was young because I had a family. Fortunately, I had the opportunity to re-ignite my wisdom here in my old age. Now that the black tide has come to destroy it, I have nowhere left to go.

C: 你看着火焰不断跃动，仿佛听见了有老妇说着「火已渐熄，然位不见王影」……
E: You watch the flames dance, as though you hear an old woman's voice saying, "The fire fades, and the lords go without thrones..."

C: 一个曾经听过的哲学难题。
E: Here's a philosophical question I once heard.

C: 别怕，我迟早砸碎这一切！
E: Don't worry. I'll smash it all sooner or later!

C: 吼吼吼！瞧瞧，是谁又来拜访本狮了？是异乡的勇士啊。
E: Ho-ho-ho! Let's see, who has come to visit my majestic self again? A warrior from outlands!

C: 这种简单的问题，竟然能难倒富有智慧的勇士吗？答案远在天边，近在眼前——就是正在和你说话的这头狮子吼吼！
E: Such a simple question, and yet it can confound a Warrior of wisdom like yourself? The answer is far away, and yet right before your eyes — it's the lion speaking to you now!

C: 若虫是我的助手，我的使者，我的眼线。我们共享「织者」的名号，唇齿相依。如果可以，我希望圣城也能为它们提供庇护。
E: The nymphs are my assistants, my messengers, my eyes. We share the title of "Weavers," an inseparable bond. If possible, I hope the holy city can provide them sanctuary as well.

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>瀑布前</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>before the waterfall</color>...

C: 有趣的问题，贵客。我要先声明一点：预言并非只能望向未来，有时它也能为我们提供线索、揭露一些不为人知的真相。
E: A fascinating question, esteemed guest. First, I should point out that prophecies don't only show the future — they can also offer clues and reveal hidden truths.

C: 我还是比较喜欢当船长。
E: I prefer being the captain.

C: 葡萄叶装饰你的额头…
E: Grape leaves decorate your forehead...

C: 要是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}在场，你的勤勉与节制绝对能获得它的嘉奖。可惜它并未回应…真令人遗憾。
E: If {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} were here, your diligence and self-control would have no doubt been commended. Unfortunately, there was no response... That's truly unfortunate.

C: 当你开始为旅途过久该如何筹备饮食而忧心忡忡的时候，伴随着「喀啷」一声，马身剧烈地摇晃了一下，随后便如大地般沉静了下来——你意识到，「彼岸」就在眼前。
E: Just as you begin to worry about what provisions to prepare for the journey, there's a loud "clank," and the wooden horse jerks violently for a moment before settling back down as quietly as the earth beneath you. That's when it hits you — the "other shore" is right in front of you.

C: 现在吃颗<color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒的火种</color>算什么呀。
E: What's wrong with eating <color=#dbc291ff>Kephale's Coreflame</color> on top of all those?

C: …你是说…我们的力量，诡计的力量…骗过了这世上所有的白痴、恶徒和灾难，拯救了翁法罗斯？
E: ...You mean... our divine power, the power of Trickery... has deceived all the world's fools, villains, and even the very calamities themselves? We saved Amphoreus?

C: 诺杜斯先生，我在周围打听了一遭，即便是刻法勒的祭司，也对黎明机器的突变毫无头绪……
E: Mr. Noldus... I've asked around, but even Kephale's priests are baffled by the Dawn Device's sudden change...

C: 缇里西庇俄丝大人…正在引导奥赫玛的民众疏散，前往广场暂避。
E: Lady Tribios is leading the citizens to evacuate to the square, seeking temporary shelter.

C: 救命——我被关在里面出不去啦！有没有哪位好心人，用伟大的翻飞之手把木马打碎，救我出去啊！
E: Help! I'm trapped inside! Is there anyone who'll use the mighty Whimsy Hand to smash this wooden horse and get me out?

C: 在墓志铭的末尾，一行尚未刻完的铭文——
E: At the end of the epitaph, a line left unfinished...

C: 当不成泰坦，还可以当星神…
E: Can't make it as a Titan? There's always the Aeon path...

C: 来自天外的尖端学术…
E: Advanced studies from beyond the sky...

C: 不过是睹物思人罢了。
E: Just seeing it reminded me of someone, that's all.

C: 记忆…在对我说话？
E: The memory... is talking to me?

C: 没错，他们可不知道你们的名字，以及<color=#dbc291ff>真正的星空</color>。
E: Exactly. They don't know of your names, nor the <color=#dbc291ff>true starry sky</color>.

C: 无论如何，三月七爱着你们，不要辜负她的心愿。
E: No matter what, March 7th loves you all, so don't let her wishes be in vain.

C: 若我下一步这样走，你要怎么办？
E: If I take this step next, what will you do?

C: 检查一下车厢，看看有没有什么奇怪的地方吧。
E: Check the coach and see if there is anything out of the ordinary.

C: 我什么时候认知过那些概念…
E: When did I come across those things before...

C: 呃，你可以说是一株相位灵火，或者异问魔。它们出现消失都很常见，应该能糊弄过去……
E: Erm, you can say that it's just a Phase Flame or an Inquisition Spirit. They often suddenly appear and then vanish. You should be able to get past them with that...

C: 我们去研究对策，列车长，放心吧。
E: We'll come up with something. Don't worry, conductor.

C: 你长什么样？
E: What do you actually look like?

C: 你感到异样，那毛茸茸的一团，似乎是你的…脚？
E: You feel strange. That fluffy pile, it appears to be your... feet?

C: 你是说，那个奇怪的罐头吗？
E: You mean, that strange can?

C: （不需要进食就算高级？那小机器人岂不是比佩佩还高级？呸呸呸！）
E: (Not needing food means it's advanced? Then the little robot is more advanced than Peppy? Phooey!)

C: 人家也好急！但现在能做的，似乎也只有耐心等待了，就在梦里…你也会回来的，对不对？
E: I'm so eager, too! But for now, waiting patiently in dreamland is all I can do... You will return, won't you?

C: 不！可！以！敲你的小脑袋哦！用粉红色的魔杖敲！
E: No! Way! I'll bonk you on the head — with my pink wand!

C: 师生。
E: Teacher and students.

C: 都是很久很久以前的故事呀…有些没听够呢。
E: All these stories are really, really old... but I haven't had enough of them yet!

C: 嘻嘻！人家猜到了哦？没想到吧。「你坏心思好多」——人家才不会这么说。
E: Hehe, Guessed it, didn't I? Betcha didn't see that coming. "You're so mischievous" — but I won't say that, no way.

C: 你问倒我了。
E: You've stumped me there.

C: 不是一回事吧！人家也不知道怎么概括，应该说是…「真正的自己」？
E: That's not quite the same! I'm not sure how to explain it, but maybe I'm talking about... "a true me"?

C: 别这样，吓到我啦。
E: Don't do that. You scared me.

C: 「翻阅时会不自觉笑出来的纪念册」——听起来就很棒吧？
E: "A yearbook that makes you smile without even realizing it when you flip through the pages" — doesn't that sound lovely?

C: 唔…突然发生了很多事呢。告别总是那么仓促，让人没办法说清心里话。
E: Hmm... So many things happened all of a sudden. Farewells are always so abrupt, making it hard to say what's truly in one's heart.

C: 呀，这样说，人家可要有些后悔了…的确是该留到最后的话语呢。
E: Oh, saying it like that... I might end up regretting it. That really should be saved for the final moment, shouldn't it?

C: 滴答，模块卡住了！
E: Tick, tock. The module is stuck!

C: 看来我之前都错怪我的徒弟们了，不是他们不想来，而是他们不够聪明，不知道怎么躲过云骑军到工造司里来。
E: It seems that I was wrong about my apprentices before. It's not that they didn't want to come, they just were not smart enough to evade the Cloud Knights and come to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 没事，等你方便了之后再来找我吧。
E: All good. Just come find me when it's convenient for you.

C: 您吉星高照，不必担心。是绘星我前途不妙啊……
E: Your star is still shining, so don't worry. It's mine whose situation isn't looking so good...

C: 下，现在就下。
E: Yes. Let's play right now.

C: 你会回来找我的，因为你想和我下棋！
E: You'll be back! Because I KNOW you want to face me in chess!

C: …你是不是觉得你每次说完，我都要问你一下，你会很烦躁？
E: ...Do you get annoyed that I need to banter with you every time you finish a line?

C: 你猜我会不会输？
E: Wanna guess whether I'll lose?

C: 你好，这里是「枘凿六合•Remake」第四开发部。请问有什么事？
E: Hi, this is Department IV of the "Hexanexus: Remake" Developers. How may I help you?

C: 只能说您不想玩，可千万不能说您玩不到。
E: Unless you're not keen to play, there's simply no reason you can't play it.

C: 都说是假设…算了，确实能选难度。你随便说。
E: I already said it was hypothetical... Forget it. Yes, you can choose your difficulty level. Just say whatever you want.

C: 我想换成*普通难度*。
E: I'd like to change to *Normal Difficulty*.

C: ——所有事都会顺利诶！恭喜你，这是非常好的结果！游客！笑一个笑一个！
E: ...Everything will go smoothly! Congrats, this is an excellent result, guest! Smile!

C: 但您只需动动手指，把时针拨回某个静寂无人的深夜，我就能大摇大摆地走进去，把它轻而易举地取出来——
E: But all you would need to do is waggle that little finger of yours, turn the clock back to a quiet evening with no one around, and I can walk right in and snap it up with ease...

C: 世间还有公道吗？还有正义吗？还有法律吗？塔兰顿要是知道这回事，都要泣不成声了！
E: Is there any fairness in this world? Is there any justice? Are there no laws anymore? If Talanton knew of this, they would burst into tears!

C: 我什么时候揪过你的尾巴？
E: When have I ever pulled on your tail?

C: 法吉娜女士当年和我诚然关系不错。她的宴席上，我的祝词总能让大伙笑得前仰后合。
E: Phagousa and I enjoyed great relations back in the day. At their banquet, my compliments had everyone roaring with laughter.

C: 晴空、青草、遛弯的公民们…扎格列斯老祖有云：「无所事事的午后，连思考都是罪过。」
E: Clear skies, green grass, citizens out and about... Our ancestor Zagreus once said: "The slightest thought is a sin on an idle afternoon."

C: 这开场白还真是一模一样。
E: The same exact introduction, huh?

C: 谁知道呢？
E: Who knows?

C: 好啦，刚才咱也只是随口瞎编个故事…这里毕竟是跟凡尘俗世完全不同的冥界，鬼才知道天上挂着的究竟是些什么——不过风景是真漂亮。
E: Fine, I was just spinning a tale... This is the nether realm after all, worlds apart from the mortal realm — who knows what those things in the sky actually are? Though I must admit, the view is absolutely killer.

C: 「世界是命运的重复叠加。所谓的真相，往往远没有诡计来的公平。」
E: "The world is a stack of recurring destinies. Truth is often less fair than trickery."

C: 做事论迹不论心，承认吧，您和巴特鲁斯早就是要好的朋友了。
E: We judge by actions, not thoughts. Face it, you and Bartholos became good friends long ago.

C: 你肚子里还塞得下这个？
E: Your stomach's got room for that?

C: 嗯，我自己也试过挑战它，侥幸通过了不那么凶险的几关。也正因为如此，我才弄到了这个——在开始挑战或者点亮世界的时候，我们能听到的那些古泰坦语的翻译。
E: Yes, I challenged them too, and was fortunate enough to pass the ones that weren't so dangerous. That's how I got this — the translations of the ancient Titan language that we can hear when the challenge starts or when the world is illuminated.

C: 你说什么都行，因为我没兴趣。
E: Whatever, I'm not interested.

C: 恩维尔带你来到了一个相对僻静的角落……
E: Avilius takes you to a relatively quieter corner.

C: 一种嫉妒的心情在你的心头蔓延开来。考虑到自己这个时不时废寝忘食的大忙人不可能真陪他在这里虚耗时间，你给那位「提灯找人」老师发个了「快来照顾这个傻子」的消息，然后就迅速离开了。
E: A hint of jealousy begins spreading within you. You're so busy that you sometimes don't even have time to eat or sleep, so why are you wasting your time here? You send a message to Scholar Light-Hunter to "come and look after this idiot" before swiftly making an exit.

C: 《成为昨日的明天》
E: As Tomorrow Became Yesterday

C: 你想知道他的名字吗？
E: Do you wish to know his name?

C: 来自信徒丝西涅——「我父亲的智力去哪里了？」
E: From a follower named Siphone — "Where has my father's intelligence gone?"

C: 你越来越娴熟了，辅祭，有兴趣在圣殿正式就职吗？先来看看石板上的结果吧。
E: You're getting better at this, acolyte. Have you considered formally joining the temple? First, let's look at the results on the slate.

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 嗯…愿你的前路明晰，辅祭。门径会永远为你敞开。
E: Hmm... May your path be clear, acolyte. The Passage will always remain open to you.

C: 天父啊…伊来内呢？阁下，您有没有看到伊来内？
E: O, sky father... Where's Alain? {NICKNAME}, have you seen him?

C: 不重要了…请您将余火送下黎明云崖，让它保护更多人吧。
E: It doesn't matter anymore... Please, take the ember to the Dawncloud. Let it protect those who still remain.

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 吊坠微颤，将你引向更下方。
E: The pendant quivers slightly, leading you further down.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「对。」</color>黑塔兴奋地喊道，<color=#dbc291ff>「那是浮黎，祂以为你是已陨的阿基维利，主动向你搭话——成功了！比我想得还棒，浮黎几乎是最有价值的星神了，祂知道的事情仅次于博识尊！出来吧，{NICKNAME}，我要升级『模拟宇宙』，以后你要在里面待更久一点！」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Yes!"</color> Herta yells with excitement.<color=#dbc291ff> "That was Fuli. THEY thought you were the fallen Akivili, so THEY actively started a conversation with you — we did it! This is even better than I could've hoped. Fuli is basically the most valuable of all the Aeons. THEY know almost as much about everything as Nous does! Come on out, {NICKNAME} — I want to upgrade the Simulated Universe so you can stay in there even longer in the future!"</color>

C: 不知为何，你突然被吸入黑暗中。这是时空曲率膨胀至极限的重力场，任何物质和光线都无法逃脱。
E: For some reason, you are suddenly sucked into darkness. This is a gravitational field where the curvature of space-time expands to its limit, and nothing – neither matter nor light – can escape.

C: 继续…
E: Continue...

C: 「欢愉」是个很奇怪的星神，祂混乱又清醒，同时不像别的星神那样固执。阿哈不会停留在单一的概念里，或许祂看破了「模拟宇宙」的本质。
E: Elation is a very strange Aeon. THEY are both confused and clear-minded, and not as stubborn as the other Aeons. Aha won't stay confined to a single concept. THEY may have seen right through the nature of the Simulated Universe.

C: 打开强化界面。
E: Open the Enhance screen.

C: 第一世界就这样了，你可以去挑战下一个世界。第二世界会出现更强的敌人。
E: That's World 1. You can push on and challenge the next world, with stronger enemies appearing in World 2.

C: 「停！我把模拟宇宙暂停了。你压根抵御不了诱惑！贪饕的星神竟会在这里出现。」黑塔给你弹了个脑瓜崩，「离远点，别被吞进去了，奥博洛斯可不会绕着你——祂的嘴好大！我得再观赏一下。」
E: "Stop! I have paused the Simulated Universe. You can't resist the temptation at all! I didn't expect the Aeon of Voracity to be here." Herta flicks your forehead and warns, "Stay away from THEM so that you won't be eaten. Oroboros isn't going to go around you. What a massive mouth THEY have! Let me admire it again."

C: 我！
E: Me!

C: 我可以捉弄他吗？
E: Can I tease him?

C: 你不安地搓了搓脚，悲哀地对自己的*动脚能力*予以肯定。
E: You rub your feet uneasily, sadly reaffirmed about your ability to move your own feet.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>艾洛蒂亚城邦亲卫队信号</color>：一位失去臂膀的士兵正在水果铺前用手驱赶飞舞的零星蝇虫，此时距离他所居住的城寨被蝗虫全部淹没只差三天。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A signal from an Elothean city guard</color>: A soldier who has lost one of his arms is shooing away flies in front of a fruit store, completely unaware that his city will be overrun by locusts in merely three days.

C: 八十七件小衣服，七千多双小鞋子——你很熟悉，但已想不起来在哪里见过。
E: Eighty-seven tiny garments and over seven thousand pairs of little shoes. They are familiar to you, but you fail to recollect where you saw them before.

C: 老者称自己在此地以沙制成石头、岛屿，建起琼楼、高阁，由一捧沙建立起一整个微缩的奴隶之都，看着它走向繁盛、帝国、衰微、陨落。对此他已十分熟练：他甚至曾在一片只剩尸体的土地上重建起了「文明」…他似乎厌倦了，准备离开，前往下一个世界。
E: The old man explains that he has created buildings, islands, pavilions, castles, and even a miniature metropolis for slaves... all out of sand. He has witnessed his miniature empire rise, thrive, decline, and ultimately fall. According to him, he is so skilled in this craft that he once even restored "civilization" in a land possessed of naught but corpses. However, now he seems exhausted and is ready to depart for the next world.

C: 他跳了起来，那一刻地动山摇！他又想打个喷嚏，你连忙制止了他！这位「筑城者」自称他们从克里珀的锤音中获得了预警，正在众多星系紧急修筑障壁。但他不明白个中用意为何，便决定暂停手中的工作。
E: He jumps to his feet with such force that it shakes the very earth! And he attempts to let out a sneeze, but you hastily stop him! This Architect claims they got a warning from the hammerings of Qlipoth, and are repairing the barriers of multiple star systems urgently. However, he knows not for what reason, and decides to pause what he is working on.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了虚空。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the void itself.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了金属与黄金互相碰撞而发出的轰鸣。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face and THEIR voice turns into a cacophonous clash between metal and gold.

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 「我十分荣幸。」螺丝咕姆说，「你的到来像画面中点缀上一只缺少的蝴蝶，完整的图景令模拟宇宙变得栩栩如生。我十分期待与你共同前进的旅程。」
E: "It's my honor." Screwllum says, "Your presence is akin to a butterfly that completes the scenery that brings the entire Simulated Universe alive. I look forward to the journey ahead with you."

C: 「呃…呃，我很抱歉。」斯蒂芬•劳艾德现身，他畏畏缩缩地暂停了模拟宇宙，「那个…跟你解释一下。你…闯进了浮黎的『善见天』。」
E: "Ooh, err... I'm really sorry." Stephen Lloyd appears, hesitantly pausing the Simulated Universe. "That was... I should explain it to you. You... intruded on Fuli's Eden of Blessed Insight."

C: 「严丝合缝， 就像『命运』。」阮•梅瞪大了眼，她仿佛也被震撼，口气摇摆不定，「第二场『战争』的开始，是一群有机生命触发了反有机方程……」
E: "Seamless, like fate." Ruan Mei's eyes widen in shock, her tone wavering. "The Second War began when a group of organic beings sparked the Anti-Organic Equation..."

C: 嘘…祂来了。「博识尊」的身影由数据电流汇聚而成。你深呼吸，准备接受祂的一瞥——为何世界要走向终结？为什么宇宙会爆发战争？你脑海内充满了困惑。为什么所有的生命都要走向死亡？你也会死去吗？…有人逃得掉吗？
E: Shh... Here THEY are. Nous's figure takes form as data currents converge. You take a deep breath to ready yourself for THEIR gaze. Why is the world coming to an end? Why are wars happening everywhere in the universe? Your mind is full of doubts. Why does death happen to all life? Will I die too? ...Can anyone escape this fate?

C: …祂向鲁珀特投下瞥视的那一日，便已计算到这步吗？
E: ...Did THEY already foresee this on the day he gazed at Rubert?

C: 判定「自我认知」 - 政治重要。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — Politics above all else.

C: 创造星辰。
E: Create stars.

C: 当然，作为一名老道的收藏家，他仍会在二次检定后才能交出这笔巨款。但你的节目已经开始，当他意识到这出猴子打字机诱发的闹剧时，蒂玫德早就乱成了一锅粥。
E: Of course, as an experienced collector he will only be stumping up such an astronomical sum after the second appraisal viewing. But your show has already begun, and by the time he realizes it's all just monkeys tapping on typewriters, Demeter has become a mess.

C: 「离开这里，你我都能有个体面的结局。」来自共<unbreak>23</unbreak>个方位的狙击将你瞄准，你试图骇入这里的系统，但整个环境已对你完全封闭。
E: "Leave this place and we can both keep our heads held high." Snipers are locked onto you from <unbreak>23</unbreak> different angles. You tried to hack the system, but it's completely locked down.

C: 但这些你都已经做过，毁灭的公式里，不需要信息饱和的样本。
E: But you have done all of this before. The Formula of Destruction no longer requires samples saturated with information.

C: 用更简洁的方式？
E: Use a simpler method?

C: 一个长得像存储仪的人。
E: A person that looks like a memory storage device.

C: 「你真以为靠那所谓的遗产，他们就能把混沌滤得清澈？」
E: "You think that this so-called legacy is enough to filter clarity from chaos?"

C: 很少见你对人评价这么高。
E: It's rare to see you hold someone in such high regard.

C: 「第一次利用火，第一次对重力产生困惑，第一次意识到时间和空间的关系。人类历史上，每当有学者走出知识圆圈，都会对整个世界产生巨大的冲击。」
E: "From the initial discovery of fire, the early questionings of gravity, then to the first recognition of the relationship between time and space — each instance where a scholar has stepped beyond the boundaries of the Circle of Knowledge led to a significant impact on the world."

C: 公正与辩论之星斯波菲亚，瓜分战利品的「未来学大会」，享用鲁珀特魂灵的宴席。学士们像肥皂泡般将看台挤满，你穿过人潮的缝隙，站到报告会场的前沿。
E: The Futurological Congress at Sipohia, the planet of fairness and debate, divvied up the spoils and held a banquet where attendees consumed Rubert's soul. Scholars throng the stands like soap bubbles. You weave through the crevices of people, and stand at the forefront of the assembly.

C: 但和通常的「涟漪」不同，无论在哪个位置，波纹数值都完全一致，不存在衰减，不受时空扭曲的影响，就像……
E: But it is different from ordinary "ripples." No matter which position it is in, the wave pattern data is completely identical, does not decay, and unaffected by space-time distortion, just like...

C: 数千台「权杖」被学士们的问题占满，耗尽算力，成为太空垃圾。「权杖」系统全线瘫痪之后，学派间放下隔阂，重现回到了交流合作的和谐氛围，学者笔下的历史如此言说。因荒唐的预言而起，留一地鸡毛而散。
E: The thousands of Scepters were completely overrun with the questions of scholars, exhausting their computational power and turning them into space trash. Once the Scepter system was completely crippled, the harmonious atmosphere of communication and cooperation returned between Schools, according to the history recorded by scholars. It began with an absurd prophecy and ended with meaningless waste.

C: 检测到非法登录，防火墙阻拦失败，「不可知域」权限更改，禁止任何弹出申请，访客申请验证……
E: Illegal login detected. Firewall interception failed. Unknowable Domain permissions changed. All requests blocked, verifying visitor request...

C: 「你，杀死天才，试图限制宇宙知识的增长，是为了把整个宇宙都变成自己的『全知域』吗？」
E: "You murder geniuses in an attempt to stem the growth of cosmic knowledge... Is it just so you can turn the entire universe into your own Knowable Domain?"

C: 模拟宇宙，疯了。这并非代码错误导致的混乱，而是天才们精心设下的戏码。调用，复制，调用，复制……宇宙图景释放了所有资源，试图用疯狂将迫近的「全知杀手」挤出舞台。万物仿佛高喊着，此处没有你的立足之地，波尔卡！
E: The Simulated Universe descends into madness. This chaos isn't caused by coding errors, but a carefully orchestrated plan by the geniuses. Call, copy, call, copy... The cosmic scene deploys all its resources, trying to force the approaching "Omniscient Killer" off the stage with chaos. Everything seems to scream, "There's no place for you here, Polka!"

C: 一切事工已毕，祂说——
E: THEY rested from all the work of creating that THEY had done, and said...

C: 将你从危机中解救后，纯美骑士们仍然不愿离去。他们认为你对星神的信仰十分虔诚…
E: After rescuing you from danger, the Knights of Beauty are reluctant to leave. They consider you a devoted follower of the Aeons...

C: 一个悲悼伶人骑着银河巨象，缓步步入你的视线…她不知为何仍在哭泣。接着，她从银河巨象走了下来，她祈愿为你展现一场「不收费」的奇妙伶人戏法。
E: A Mourning Actor riding a cosmic elephant slowly comes into sight... She is still weeping for some reason. Then, she dismounts the cosmic elephant and offers to perform a special magic show to you "for free."

C: 「黏土玩偶」随着「抓夹」上升...成功了！
E: The clay doll rises together with the claw... You've got it!

C: 你看到他身后还有不少新采掘出的咕咕钟……
E: There are a lot of newly excavated cuckoo clocks behind him...

C: 一盏烛火被点亮，司美之神隐约阔绰的面容在碎片中摇曳…你看得更清晰了，但此时，一位揽镜人的面容却突然从巨大碎片中出现！
E: As one of the candles is lit, a vague image of the God of Beauty's broad face flickered within the fragment... Just as the image gets clearer, the face of a Mirror Holder suddenly appears within the massive fragment!

C: 你的无线电接通成功了。
E: You get through to your partner using the radio.

C: 「总有一天，『博识尊』会看到我！」他继续说着，似乎已经陷入癫狂，「但『真理医生』却认为我是个白痴——他看谁都这样！如果有天你遇到他，记得做出你的选择。不不不——你现在就得做出选择！」
E: "One day, Nous will notice me!" He continues as if hysterical, "But Dr. Ratio thinks I'm an idiot — he sees everybody that way! If you ever meet him, remember to make your choice. No, no, no... You'd better make the choice right now!"

C: 售货机骄傲地履行着它的职责，直到你的到来，打破了不用上班的美好时光。
E: The vending machine carries out its duties with great pride. That is until your arrival destroys its luxury of never having to work.

C: 「功夫不负有心人，裘斯博士还是找到了唯一解。」
E: "Though nothing can stop a motivated man, Doctor Joss finally came to his one and only solution."

C: 「设置已完成。本行为首次开通服务的客户准备了礼品，请到前台窗口处凭储蓄卡领取。」触手将一张防水套里的银行卡递给你。
E: "Configuration complete. This bank has prepared a gift for customers who activate this service for the first time. Please go to the front desk window and use your debit card to retrieve your reward." The tentacle reaches forward to give you a bank card enclosed in a waterproof envelope.

C: 「感谢您对时间代理银行的支持——请时刻牢记，时间就是金钱。」
E: "Thank you for your support of Time Agency Bank. Always remember: Time is money."

C: 自我，部分文明为其赋予了「灵魂」的描述。不同个体的自我存在巨大的差异，这一差异决定了个体的运动轨迹，以及思维模式。
E: The self. Some civilizations granted it the descriptor of "soul." Selves from different individuals exhibit massive differences. This difference determines the movement patterns and thought processes of the individual.

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 王与王的战争。
E: A war of kings.

C: 永夜笼罩尘世，失去理性的神明将所有生命都视作假想敌。曾力战黑潮，捍卫翁法罗斯的征服者，终究也成为了黑潮的帮凶，点燃无意义的战火。
E: An eternal night shrouds the mortal realm, and the god now devoid of reason sees every life as an adversary. The defender of Amphoreus against the black tide eventually turn traitor and assistant to the black tide, igniting futile wars.

C: 可要当心扎格列斯和它的眷属，除却塞纳托斯，唯有它们在死者的世界来去自如。
E: But beware of Zagreus and their kin. Apart from Thanatos, only they can roam freely in the realm of the dead.

C: 刻法勒喝得沉稳，它唯一一次在微醺后睡去，还险些被扎格列斯偷走黎明机器。尼卡多利钟情口感锐利的陈酿，它总在豪饮后挥舞长矛，要和血亲们来场生死竞技。
E: Kephale drinks steadily. The only time they slumbered slightly tipsy, they nearly had their Dawn Device stolen by Zagreus. Nikador loves the sharp taste of the aged brew, and they always brandish their spear after a heavy drink, challenging their kin to deadly games.

C: 宴会已至高潮，奏响那曲雨与雪欢腾之歌，颂唱众神的荒诞游戏。
E: The banquet reaches its climax, with the song of Delight of Rain and Snow echoing, celebrating the gods' absurd games.

C: 它若是跳跃，便坠落向天空，若是奔跑，便陷落进泥沼。直到全能的刻法勒心生怜悯，又或是窥见了未来的隐秘，才在十二个昼夜后放出那该死的扎格列斯。
E: If they jump, they fall toward the sky. If they run, they sink into the marsh. Only when the omnipotent Kephale shows mercy, or glimpses a secret of the future, do they release the cursed Zagreus after twelve days and nights.

C: 要走向善的道路，而非恶的；要打开勇敢的门，而非懦弱。人们沿着道路向前，在谕示之下，打造万世的伟业。
E: Choose the path of virtue over vice, and open the doors of courage rather than cowardice. As people venture forward on these paths, guided by divine mandates, they craft legacies that will endure through the ages.

C: 「呀，真不巧了，宝贝又卖掉一件。您要还有看上的，可得抓紧出手啊。」商人拼命怂恿你。
E: "Ah, too bad! Another prized treasure just left the shelves. If you've got your eyes on something, don't wait too long!" The merchant prods.

C: 「你放弃了一个绝好的机会，但或许你的天平本来就是平衡的。」修士不禁赞赏。
E: "You've passed up a golden opportunity, but perhaps your scale was already in perfect balance." The friar gives you a knowing nod of approval.

C: 直到欧洛尼斯实在无法忍受，它便只将预言告诉那些资深祭司，因为只有他们才能分辨自己的真身。
E: That is, until Oronyx could no longer bear it and only shared the prophecies with the senior priests, for only they could discern Oronyx's true form.

C: 欧洛尼斯的神隐早有端倪。最开始，预言的内容由具体变得越来越模糊，面对这些不知所云的文字，有时候连老祭祀都束手无策。
E: The signs of Oronyx's withdrawal were there from the beginning. At first, their prophecies grew increasingly vague, reduced to cryptic fragments that even the seasoned priests struggled to decipher.

C: 劳模泰坦啊。
E: The very model of what a Titan should be.

C: 在所有的法律和规则中，有一条至关重要——有始即有终。
E: In the order and laws above all things, there is one essential maxim: All matters have a beginning as well as an end.

C: 如今的吉奥里亚已经陷入永恒的沉睡中，它无法再看到曾经拯救过的土地和人类。
E: Now, Georios has sunken into eternal slumber. They can no longer see the land and people they once saved.

C: 全自动体检服务舱正在为您服务，当前排队人数为：0。
E: Fully automated medical examination service pod at your service. Current number in line: 0.

C: 你决定——
E: You decide to...

C: 等一下！那个，刚刚你是在哭吗？
E: Hang on! Were you crying just now?

C: 「神奇马桶」的水箱里。
E: In the tank of the Magical Toilet.

C: 屏幕上弹出一行大字：「预约成功！」。
E: A row of characters pops up on the screen: "Booking complete!"

C: 你要知道，这张协议可不仅仅具有法律效应——你必须遵守的是「虚数」的法则，它超乎于一切社会法则与自然法则之上，即使公司也不能打破。
E: Please bear in mind that this agreement is more than a legally binding contract. You must also abide by the law of the Imaginary, which is above the social and natural laws. Not even the IPC can override it.

C: 卢卡小哥可是奥列格首领的得意门生，还是「地火」最靠得住的干部之一！即便如此，他还是以性格平易近人著称——这可不是件容易事！
E: Luka is the favorite student of Chief Oleg, and one of the most reliable members of Wildfire! He's also known for being approachable despite it all. That's not an easy ask!

C: 回见，{NICKNAME}！希望还有机会在下层区遇到你。
E: See you later, {NICKNAME}! I hope I'll have a chance to see you in the Underworld again!

C: 「你在害怕。」她向你伸出手。你发现自己的手臂没有应势而动。看来是她将连接切断了。你思忖着，又见她勾动四指。「来吧，」她很沉静，「像以前那样。」
E: "You're scared." She extends her arm in your direction, but your arm does not move in response. It seems like she has cut off the connection. While you are deep in your thoughts, she beckons you over. "Come on," she invites in a serene tone, "let's do it like the old days."

C: 你很清楚这诸多硅基生命为何如此愤怒，自己又如何成为众矢之的——根据反有机方程，统治星系的哲学家联合必将倾覆于机械帝国的铁蹄下——就是这么简单。
E: You are well aware of what has triggered the wrath of these silicon-based lifeforms and why you have become the target of public condemnation. According to the Anti-Organic Equation, the Philosopher Union that rules the star system will certainly be destroyed by the Machine Empire — it is as simple as that.

C: 道德模范谁爱当谁当，反正没钱你不当——你又将目光重新聚焦于那不断刷新滚动的手机屏幕。她正在打字…你聚精会神，努力辨识对话框中的内容：
E: Whoever wants to be a saint can be one. You ain't gonna be one unless the act gives you money — you re-focus your gaze on the constantly refreshing phone screen. She is typing... You concentrate and try to read the messages:

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：大快朵颐。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "A feast."

C: 不过如此…
E: Is this all...

C: …啊？您哪位啊？
E: ...Huh? Who are you?

C: 理解，我理解…太不幸了！你离胜利就差那么一点点……
E: I get it. I really do... What a shame! You were right on the cusp of victory...

C: 女人露出了一个狡黠的眼神…但她的眼角很快又恢复了平整。
E: The lady gives you a sly look... but her expression quickly returns to normal.

C: 朴素的木桌上摆放着纸，笔，和黑色的墨水。
E: Paper, pens, and a pot of black ink are laid out on a plain wooden table.

C: <size=36>石头——剪刀——布——！</size>
E: <size=36>Rock! Paper! Scissors!</size>

C: 这是个秘密…
E: That's a secret...

C: 女性似乎吃了一惊——因为她那不绝于耳的哭声竟骤然消失了。
E: The woman seems in shock. Her incessant cries abruptly stop.

C: 不，不可能，你连制服都没穿！我就没见过哪个银鬃铁卫大白天穿着奇装异服闲逛的。
E: N—No way. You aren't even in uniform! I've never seen a Silvermane Guard who walks around during the day in weird clothes.

C: 你怎么这么聪明！不愧是希露瓦大人的粉丝！
E: You're so smart! Just what I'd expect from a fellow fan of Lady Serval!

C: 看见那火了吗？它大概多久燃起一次？
E: See that fire over there? How often does it light up?

C: 一小口…只要一小口——喝了这知识的蜜露，期末测试就不在话下了喀！趁着这里没人，赶紧……
E: One little sip... just a tiny taste of this Honeydew of Knowledge, and I'll ace the final exam! Now, since nobody's around...

C: 这个水车可真有意思，玩上一整天都不会腻喀！
E: This waterwheel is fascinating. I can spend forever here, crrrk!

C: 这幅壁画的内容非常有趣…或许在遥远的黄金时代，这里的蝴蝶远比现在多喀！
E: This mural's content is fascinating... perhaps in the distant Golden Age, there were far more butterflies here than now, crrrk!

C: 伟大的吾主…
E: O Great Master...

C: 「他的荣誉随作品一同逝去」…不知他当初做出了怎样的作品。
E: "His honor faded with his works." ...One can't help but wonder what he once created.

C: 「用生命探索爱的真谛」…令人钦佩的精神。
E: "He devoted his life to uncovering the true essence of love." ...What an admirable spirit.

C: 如此想着，你屏住呼吸，紧闭着双眼，翻身钻进硕大的垃圾箱，在充斥着黑暗与铁锈味的空间中蜷成一团。
E: With that thought in mind, you hold your breath, close your eyes, and dive into the huge dumpster. You curl up in this dark space that smells of rust.

C: 记住，下次一起玩的话，千万不要再随便钻进垃圾箱了哦！
E: Remember, the next time you play, don't ever dive into a dumpster!

C: 喀！你怎么就走了喀！真是的，好不容易遇到个能听我说话的喀……
E: Hey! Don't go! I thought I'd finally found a good listener, crrk...

C: 有位贤人说得好：「偷懒一时爽，一直偷懒一直爽」…喀？怎么又到了写工作报告的时间了…完全不想干活喀……
E: A sage once said: "Why work hard when you can hardly work?" Crrrk... Oh great, another report deadline. I'm SO not feeling this right now, crrk...

C: 抬头看看月亮吧~
E: Behold the moon~

C: 吼吼，你要进入「聪明绝顶的巴特鲁斯发现的隐藏房间」吗？
E: Hoho, are you going to enter "The Hidden Room Discovered by the Brilliant Bartholos"?

C: 不行，不能哭。我已经是一只成熟的蝶了，我要像红土一样坚强嗡。
E: No, I can't cry. I'm a mature butterfly now. I'll be strong, like redsoil.

C: 因为这里根本就没有人了嗡。
E: Because there's no one left here.

C: 你也是来听水漫琴的嗡？他们都忙着逃跑，除了你和我，似乎没有人愿意停留了嗡……
E: You're here for the water lyre too? Everyone else is too busy fleeing... Seems like it's just you and me who are willing to stay...

C: 你也很清楚，在以后的日子里，无论你是否会遇见它，你都很难将它认出来，毕竟鹤运物流的机巧鸟长得都一样，这一别，可能是永别。
