E: You also know that after all this, even if you do encounter this cycrane again, you won't be able to know that cycrane is the one you met, because all of the cycranes from Heron Express look exactly the same. When you part ways, it could be forever.

C: 原来是这样吗，那说明我从一开始就做出了错误的判断——竟然还真的有人想要买机巧鸟的周边。
E: Oh is that so? That means I made a mistake from the very beginning — there really is a market out there for cycrane merchandise.

C: 不对。
E: Wrong.

C: 不过你也不用太沮丧。实际上，在你来之前，我就在考虑要不要回到鹤运物流，一直很难下定决心…这是出于我自己的意愿。
E: You shouldn't be too sad though... but even before you came, I was already thinking about going back to Heron Express. It's so hard to make up my mind... This is my own decision.

C: 但是他们实在是太占内存了，甚至没有多少空间给我的系统运行……
E: But they're all so memory-hungry that they don't leave any space for my firmware to run...

C: 你在做什么呀？
E: What are you doing?

C: 我不相信。你如果不是来找我的，那我们现在的对话又算是什么呢？别装了，我知道梓桥让你来找我们回去是吧。
E: I don't believe you. If you weren't here to find me, why even are we talking right now, then? Quit being cute, I know Ziqiao sent you here to bring me back, right?

C: 那你的天才俱乐部编号是？
E: Oh really? What's your membership number in the Genius Society?

C: 老大，{F#她}{M#他}是不是在骂你？
E: Boss, is {F#she}{M#he} being sarcastic?

C: 老大，我们没做完的课后作业里还有一道附加题，要不要让{F#她}{M#他}来做做看？
E: Boss, there's a bonus question in our unfinished homework. How about we let {F#her}{M#him} have a try?

C: 让我想一想……
E: Let me think it over...

C: 吾主派遣老朽来此探查，不曾想天地剧变，被困于此，已经千年之久。有朝一日竟又能得见天空遗民还乡，老朽着实是喜不自胜。
E: My master sent me here to investigate, but who would have thought that the world would change so drastically? I have been trapped here for a thousand years. To see the Skyfolk return to their homeland once again fills my heart with boundless joy.

C: 居住在离天幕最近的地方，终日与雪花共舞…在通风口吹冷风，让我好像回到了那段潜入冬之民城邦的时光。
E: Living so close to the sky, dancing with snowflakes all day... The cold wind blowing over me in the ventilation shaft, all these make me feel like I'm back infiltrating the Winterfolk's city.

C: 所谓翼兽…
E: The so-called winged beast...

C: 看来本姑娘要赢定咯！
E: Looks like I am gonna win!

C: 已经完成了？好嘞！那就让我们正式进入「作战」环节吧——
E: Already? Wow! Then let's begin the Combat phase, then...

C: 有些事情还是不要知道比较好。
E: Some things are better off left unknown.

C: 梓桥展示了鹤运物流准备好的信件，如同梓桥所说，信件内容真诚恳切，并没有任何追究责备的意思…看上去就差一个署名了。
E: Ziqiao presents a letter prepared by Heron Express. As Ziqiao said, the contents are sincere with no intent of placing any blame... All it's missing is a signature to sign off.

C: 总有过路的旅人提醒我，我混淆了正反，走在了颠倒的路上。
E: Travelers passing by always remind me that I've mixed up my directions, walking an inverted path.

C: 系好安全带，伙计们。我们将探索未知的新世界，探寻未知的文明，前往前所未至之处——
E: Strap in, everyone. We are about to explore uncharted worlds, seek out unknown civilizations, and venture where none have gone before—

C: 有什么声音从硬盘…不，从那些泛着蓝光的大型结构中传了出来。
E: I hear something coming from the hard drive... no, from those large structures with blue light.

C: 你们在说什么呢？
E: What are you two talking about?

C: 我忍心！
E: I do!

C: 但是，记住——后果自负！
E: But, remember this: Do it at your own risk!

C: 我是过来人，我就给他分析了工造司的优点——你想啊，里面的匠人都是靠手艺吃饭的，有门技术傍身安多好啊！
E: I've been there before, so I gave him a brief breakdown of the pros of the Artisanship Commission. You see, the craftsmen earn their living with their craftsmanship. Wouldn't it be great to have a skill you could always rely on?

C: 这人素质也太差了。
E: What a horrible person.

C: 他们派了人来保护我，就埋伏在附近呢，可惜…可惜这怂包一直不敢露面！
E: They sent people to protect me. They're just lying low nearby. What a shame this coward doesn't dare to show his face!

C: 唔，我得跟附近的云骑兄弟们说一声，我倒要看看他家长怎么收拾他。
E: Hmm, I need to inform the nearby Cloud Knights. Let's see how his parents will deal with him.

C: 喂，你怎么把我的粉丝们给打跑了？
E: Hey, what are you doing driving away all my fans like that?

C: 隐约间耳边似乎传来一阵低喃：「谁在这种地方开远光灯啊，真没素质！」
E: There's a faint mumble off to one side: "Who uses high-beam lights in a place like this? How trashy!"

C: 我原来在苜蓿草…
E: I used to be with the Alfalfa...

C: 可得把大伙都叫来，好好地欢送你一波。
E: We have to call everyone together and give you a good send-off!

C: 静静俯瞰这座城市…
E: Looking down upon this city in silence...

C: 那些最杰出的人因它而死，那些最伟大的灵感也因它而生。
E: The most outstanding people died for it, and the most brilliant of souls were born because of it.

C: 饿…饿死了…
E: S—Starving...

C: 你不下来玩吗？
E: Aren't you coming in to have fun?

C: 来吧，我…我不怕！
E: Bring it on. I'm... I'm not afraid!

C: 命运泰坦指引我们…
E: The Fate Titans show our path...

C: 别闹了，让开让开。你看见星槎后面那个「玦轮」了吗？只要将硬币投入玦轮，就可以让接下来的旅途平安顺利。看我——丢！
E: Quit whinnying and get outta my way. See that jade wheel behind the starskiff? Just toss a coin into it and the upcoming journey will go completely smoothly. Check it out — hah!

C: 从色泽来看，应该是你掉的。
E: Judging by the color, they belong to you.

C: 感觉还行，六分起步吧…
E: You're pretty good. I'll give you six out of ten...

C: 谢谢你，{NICKNAME}乘客…没想到{NICKNAME}乘客这么温柔。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}... Pom-Pom never knew you could be so kind.

C: 只是有点担心你的危险，所以、所以记得定期回来跟列车长报平安哦！
E: Pom-Pom's just a little worried about your safety, s—so remember to come back often and check in with your favorite conductor, okay?

C: 哎…哎…哎……
E: *sigh* *sigh* *sigh*

C: 维持列车上平静而有序的生活，是列车长的职责——等你以后在外冒险久了，你就会明白这种难得的平静有多珍贵了。
E: It's the duty of the conductor to maintain a peaceful and orderly atmosphere aboard the Express. Once you go outside on your adventures again, you'll understand how precious and rare a commodity peace is.

C: 这样才是合格的列车长帕！好啦，你先站着别动，让我检查下你的状况——
E: That's what a professional conductor should do! Alright, just stand still and let Pom-Pom give you a check —

C: 能够帮助帕姆的只有{NICKNAME}乘客了！拜托了！请去问问看空间站的医疗科人员吧！
E: {NICKNAME}, you're the only one who can help Pom-Pom! Please contact the Medical Department of the space station for Pom-Pom!

C: 无尽的黑暗突如其来，周遭一切都堕入了黑暗……
E: The surroundings suddenly plunge into total darkness...

C: 刹那之间列车车厢变为纯粹的绿色，绿得浓郁，绿得张狂。
E: In a flash, the inside of the coach is painted in a pure and intense shade of green.

C: 列车长的工作可不仅仅是保洁这么简单。
E: The conductor's job is more than that.

C: 这个重任我承担不起。
E: I am busy with something else.

C: 关于瓦尔特杨：尴尬的过去
E: About Welt Yang: An embarrassing past

C: …精彩，不愧是你，用了这么短的时间就突破了我们精心布设的封锁线。
E: ...Marvelous. As expected, you've cut straight through our carefully-laid blockade in no time at all.

C: 控制栈桥的终端就在禁区里的某处。期待你的表现，{NICKNAME}教官。
E: The terminal that controls the gear bridge is somewhere in the restricted zone. I look forward to your performance, Drillmaster {NICKNAME}.

C: *电波滤音*我这边一无所获。您似乎发现了些线索，请继续调查，我随后赶到。
E: *electronic voice* I've found nothing on my end, but it seems you've found some clues. Please keep it up. I'll be arriving soon.

C: 总之，我谨代表地衡司上下，感谢您迄今为止的帮助！拿着吧，这是您应得的酬劳。
E: Anyway, on behalf of the Commission, I just want to thank you for all your help so far! Here's your well-deserved reward.

C: （看来这孩子只是在单纯地享受猜拳游戏的快乐……）
E: (Looks like this child is simply having fun...)

C: 啊…啊啊……
E: Ah... agghh...

C: 我就知道，你的歉意都是装出来的！
E: I knew all that apologizing was an act!

C: 没错，没错！瞧瞧，你已经完全上道了！
E: Yes, yes! Now you finally get it!

C: ——你先等会，我有话要问！
E: ...Hang on. I've something to ask you!

C: 你耐心等着愿望实现。长长的时间过去了，什么都没有发生，你得到的只有虚无。
E: You patiently wait for your wish to come true. A long time passes but nothing at all happens, and ends up with a fistful of nothingness.

C: 哈，你钱包里还剩几个子儿？
E: Save it. How much do you have left in your purse?

C: 外来者，终于等到你了！
E: Outsider, you're finally here!

C: 仿佛被你一脸无所谓的神气激怒，男人也变得认真起来。
E: The man grows serious, as if angered by your indifferent expression.

C: 怎么清理都清不掉，还越弹越多。
E: I can't wipe any of it, and if I try, more of them would just pop up.

C: 无妨、无妨，久居螺蛳壳中，固是怡然自得，竟也会偶感无趣。你来扰我清闲，也未必不是我想要的。
E: No matter. No matter. Living in a snail's shell is pleasant enough, but I still perceive boredom once in a long while. Your disturbance is not unwelcomed, it seems.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈，甚好！不为声名绊，一心讨钱帛！放心好了，我虽避世数千载，但也还不至于付不出那一点酬劳。
E: Hahaha, very well! Unfettered by repute or fame, focused solely on worldly wealth! Don't worry. I may have been out of this world for a few thousand years, but I can still afford a small sum as thanks.

C: 罐中仙陷入了沉默。
E: The Immortal falls silent.

C: 「无忧堂」的信件往来即将到此为止——你伛身退出昏暗的铺面，放下门帘，径自离去。
E: This is the end of your correspondence in the House of Nepenthe — You duck out of the dingy storefront, let down the curtain over the door, and leave.

C: 那么话不多说，我们准备开工吧。我需要您操纵机巧鸟，找到丢失的货物。
E: Let's get ready to work then. I need you to control the cycrane and find the missing cargo.

C: 这下就算是修好了…真是辛苦您了！
E: It's finally fixed...thank you so much for your hard work!

C: 信号监测系统提示，货物遗失在穹仪附近。根据经验数据，机巧鸟建议您搜索<color=#dbc291ff>穹仪下方</color>、传输带之间的空域。
E: The signal monitoring system indicates that the goods were lost near the Meridian Pin. Based on past data, the cycrane recommends that you search <color=#dbc291ff>under the Meridian Pin</color> and between conveyor belts.

C: 总之这次工作应该是轻松愉快的啦！不会出什么问题的！
E: Anyway, this job should be easy peasy lemon squeezy! There won't be any problems!

C: …你怎么知道我弄丢了一枚重要的零件。
E: ...How did you know that I lost an important component?

C: 他承诺我，会将我最美的回忆存在「忆泡」之中，而这「忆泡」会小心保存在一个铁盒里，蜕生之后，我便能用那「忆泡」回到过去的记忆里。
E: He promised me that he'd store all of my most beautiful memories inside this Memory Bubble which he'd be keeping for me inside this iron box — and that after my hatching rebirth, I could use this Memory Bubble to return to the memories of my past.

C: 谢谢你，我打算回鳞渊境了。
E: Thank you. I'm heading back to Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 虽说这是一味药材，但是市面上贩卖药材都看上去都珠光宝气，为了迎合传说故事而清澈得稍显刻意，也许这就是「过犹不及」吧。
E: These are pharmaceuticals, but on the open market they always end up looking like sparkly jewels — all scrubbed up nice and pretty to pander to those hunting for legends. Or perhaps that's going a bit too far.

C: 看来，是我有些急于求成了。
E: Seems like I'm a little impatient for results here.

C: 有逃避现实醉生梦死的，有满嘴谎言虚情假意的，还有又哭又闹求安慰的…也对，哪个靠谱的人会到梦里来？
E: There are daydreamers escaping from reality, liars and hypocrites, and tantrums from squabblers desperate for comfort... That's right. What kind of dependable person would ever venture into a dream?

C: 现在你想通了？
E: Have you got everything figured out now?

C: 呜呼！这里的生活果然像糖浆一样甜美！
E: *Sob* Life here really is sweeter than syrup!

C: 我感觉酒店的氛围似乎有些奇怪，本打算先去大堂那边看看情况，可惜还没到半路就被这群家伙围住了。
E: The atmosphere of the hotel felt a little bit strange to me. I'd been meaning to go to the lobby and check out everything there first, but unfortunately these things surrounded me before I could get halfway.

C: 皮皮西专注地望着你，好似你就是他整个世界的中心。
E: The Pepeshi stares intently at you, as if you were at the very center of his universe.

C: 有件事我犹豫很久了…恕我冒昧，但我是否有幸与您成为朋友呢？
E: There's something I've been thinking about for a long time... Pardon me for being so forward, but would I be able to consider you a friend?

C: 我会倾听您的心声与诉求，并力所能及地为您提供帮助。
E: I will listen to your thoughts and wishes, and provide as much help as I possibly can.

C: 有时候我真庆幸自己来到了匹诺康尼…因为在梦里就可以不用再做梦了。
E: Sometimes I'm really glad that I came here to Penacony... Because I don't have to worry about having any dreams when I'm inside my dream.

C: 刺激一点的…我想想……
E: Thrilling, eh... Let me see...

C: 这原理解释起来可就复杂了…知道{RUBY_B#台球}撞洞球{RUBY_E#}吗？就跟那个差不多，但我要打的是有史以来最精妙，最传奇的一杆！
E: This principle is quite hard to explain... Do you know {RUBY_B#Billiards}billiards{RUBY_E#}? It's just like that, but the shot I was gonna make would be the most exquisite, legendary shot in all history!

C: 不，要真那样的话就算不上惊险了……
E: No, if it were that alone, it wouldn't count as being thrilling...

C: 有教育意义的。
E: One that's educational.

C: 我仔细一看，才发现那家伙已经死了。它长得像是有手脚的鱼，外表似乎很适合在宇宙中生存。
E: Upon closer look, I realized that this guy was dead. It looked like a fish with arms and legs, and its exterior seemed as though it would have no problem surviving out in the universe.

C: 是吧？相比于爱情，我更喜欢这种不寻常的浪漫。
E: Right? I prefer this kind of unusual romance over traditional love.

C: 喂，别以为你有那装置就安全了，公司武装人员有的是办法进去。早点投案自首，对大家都好啊！
E: Hey, don't think you're safe just because you have that device on you. IPC guards have plenty of ways to get in. Surrender now, for the sake of everyone!

C: 愿赌服输，挨打立正，看来咱们兄弟俩是没资格再插手此事了。走吧……
E: We played stupid games and won stupid prizes. Looks like this one's beyond our pay grade now. Let's get out of here...

C: 哎，别急，我还有秘密要讲，记得吗？
E: Ah, relax. I've still got secrets to tell you, remember?

C: 我想起了一个被毁灭的星球。直到最后一刻降临前，那里的人们仍在挣扎着求生…至少大部分人如此。
E: I was just reminded of a destroyed planet. Until its very last moments, there were still people there struggling to survive... at least, most of them.

C: 雅利洛…哦，是你说过的那颗冰封星球。
E: Jarilo... Oh, the frozen planet that you mentioned before.

C: 我改日再听。
E: I'll listen another day.

C: 来吧，赶紧动起来，脚下还有一方热土等着我们去建设！
E: Come on. Let's get our hands dirty! The land beneath us is waiting to be developed!

C: 伟大的梦境，就得配上伟大的演绎方式！相信我，过去的几十年都是这么过来的…人们喜欢这种感觉！
E: Only a grand portrayal befits this magnificent dreamscape! Believe me. We've been doing it this way for decades... People love it!

C: …嗯？哦，没什么。我刚才突然感觉…异乎寻常地清醒。
E: ...Eh? Oh, nothing. I suddenly felt... enlightened just now.

C: 是什么？
E: What is it?

C: 随便让外面的人说去吧…我相信我的团队。我们只管稳步把项目做完就行，别的什么都别想。
E: The outsiders can say whatever they want... I have faith in my team. We should focus on completing the project without letting other things distract us.

C: 苏萨先生他…是位厨艺高超的大善人，在匹诺康尼还是颗监狱星的时候，为了救赎犯人只身来到这里。
E: Mr. Sousa was a philanthropist and also an amazing cook. At the time when Penacony was still a prison planet, Mr. Sousa came here by himself to help the prisoners.

C: …近日，在「黄金的时刻」发生了多起诈骗事件，犯罪嫌疑人以老年游客为目标群体，诱骗受害者高价购买劣质珠宝。
E: ...Recently, there have been multiple cases of fraud in Golden Hour. The suspects targeted elderly tourists and deceived the victims into purchasing low-quality jewelry at exorbitant prices.

C: 我抹黑他？我是有多闲才会去干这种无聊的事打发时间？
E: Me? Badmouth him? Do you think I have time to do meaningless stuff like that?

C: 诈骗？刚刚那则新闻说的不会就是……
E: Scam? That news program earlier...

C: 乞丐也是有尊严的。
E: Even beggars have dignity.

C: 咻咻…分析完成！本次分析对象：「通用匹诺康尼建筑墙面」。
E: Beep... Analysis complete! Object identified: Generic architectural wall-covering in Penacony.

C: 你…你！你觉得我怎么样？你…你觉得老艾默里奇值不值得尊重？
E: You... You! What do you honestly think of me? Do... do you think ol' Emmrich deserves some respect?

C: 为什么…为什么明明我发明出了那么多好东西，大家还是不重视我？
E: Why... Why is it that people still don't take me seriously, even with all the awesome stuff I've invented?

C: 我需要一张你的照片。
E: I need a photo of you.

C: 很明显，这位莫里斯先生不能很好地掌控自己的情感流向。想必在他的人生中曾不止一次萌生过无法得到回应的情愫。
E: Obviously, Mr. Morris is losing control of his emotions. He must have had plenty of unrequited feelings in his life.

C: 来吧，帮我完成这最后一片拼图吧。让我成为她的猎物…她眼中唯一的那只兔子……
E: Please, complete this last piece for me. Let me become the rabbit she's after... the only thing that captures attention...

C: 想红就得先吃苦！
E: You've got to go through the grind if you want to shine!

C: 听说那里是筑城者们守护的世界，那你也算是为「存护」做出过贡献的朋友了。
E: I heard that place is protected by the Architects. In this case, you can count as a friend who had contributed to Preservation.

C: 褒贬不一。
E: Their reviews are mixed.

C: 但总有一天我会让她后悔，我会成为独一无二的艺术权威，去定义新的「主流」——哪怕抛弃「纯美之歌」，也要站在比她更高的地方，撕碎她的傲慢！
E: But one day, I will make her regret it. I will become an authority, redefining the new "mainstream." Even if I have to abandon the Song of Beauty, I will rise above her and pulverize her arrogance!

C: 在一次救援行动中，我射击嫌疑人的车辆，却意外击中了被劫持的人质——一个可怜的小女孩。
E: In a rescue operation, I accidentally hit the hostage, a poor girl, when I was firing at the suspect's vehicle.

C: 永别了，卢•阿彻警官。
E: Farewell, Detective Archer.

C: 家族可没闲心给一个失败的警探做心理辅导。
E: The Family doesn't have the time to arrange psychological therapy for a failed detective.

C: 要是有机会，我非好好治治他们不可！这个你拿着，防身用。
E: I'll knock some sense into them if I have the chance! Please keep this. You can use it to defend yourself.

C: 深陷战争的人们总会祈求和平，希望有什么东西来拯救自己。
E: Those caught in the throes of war always yearn for peace, hoping that someone or something will come to their aid.

C: 大家都说「筑梦边境」是荒凉的半成品。但我觉得，这里是我见过最美的地方。
E: Everyone sees the Dream's Edge as a dreary piece of unfinished work, but I think it's the most beautiful place I've ever seen.

C: 但是一切都结束了，再去思考这些也晚了。唉……
E: Everything is over, so there's no point in mulling over such a possibility. *sigh*

C: 「侦测到垃圾投放，开始执行回收程序。」
E: "Trash detected. Disposal program started."

C: 一直以来没什么人愿意同我讲话——从前大概是因为我太阴沉，而现在…人们在看我时，眼里总有种混合着恐惧的敬畏。
E: No one has ever agreed to chat with me. I suppose I was too gloomy before, but now... When people set their eyes on me, they see me with a mixture of fear and respect.

C: 我知道了。如果有需要，随时来找我。
E: Got it. Let me know if you need something.

C: 我也只是个普通人…每天面对那些奇形怪状的玩意，这么久还没疯已经很不容易了。
E: I'm also just a normal person... It's miracle I haven't gone insane, seeing those grotesque things everyday.

C: 原来这就是我的痛苦源泉。我现在全都记起来了…我再也不用每天盯着这张照片，却找不到心脏为之阵痛的原因了。
E: It turned out that this here was the source of all my pain. I can remember it all, now... No longer shall I stare into this photo without knowing the reason behind why my heart is broken.

C: 麦考…麦考……
E: McCoy... McCoy...

C: 煽动战争也是慈善的一部分？
E: Is inciting war part of your charity?

C: 阿图罗先生重新陷入了歇斯底里的状态，把待客的礼节抛到了脑后……
E: Mr. Arturo sinks into hysteria once more and completely forgets about the etiquette of hospitality...

C: 你就让他好好想想，作为折纸大学的一份子，究竟是为了什么而读书？匹诺康尼重点培养他，是希望他能留下来建设同谐的美好梦境，不是给别人做嫁衣！
E: Ask him to think through his decision again, about what drives him to learn as a student at Paperfold University. Penacony has nurtured him so intently in the hopes that he will stay and build Harmony's wonderful Dreamscape, not for him to turn around and work for someone else!

C: 或许等到将来的某天，他们回想自己年轻时做过的这些错事，会得出不一样的感悟…可那时后悔也晚了。
E: Perhaps they'll look back on the errors of their youth some day in the future and come to a different realization... Though it'll be far too late for regrets by then.

C: 他说的对，我抓住那些学生的脚，生怕他们飞到沟里去，并把这当成是对他们的保护…或许反倒激起了不少人的叛逆心理吧。
E: But he's right. I've shackled the feet of the students in the name of protection, fearing that they would crash when they take flight... Perhaps this was what stirred up the rebellious attitude in so many of them.

C: 有人说他最后在偏远的梦境安度了晚年，也有人认为他遭遇了可怕的意外…但现在来看，这些猜测都不对，他只是把「未来」交给了小鸟们，然后飞回了自己的树林。
E: Some people say that he ended up living out his old age peacefully in a remote dreamscape, while others believe that he had met with a terrible accident... But now it seems like none of those theories are correct. He simply left the future to the fledglings before flying back to his own forest.

C: 虽然大守护者说不必紧张，可毕竟那群人打的是整个星球的主意。我还是不太信任他们。
E: The Supreme Guardian said it was no reason to panic, but they were planning to take our whole planet! I still don't quite trust them...

C: …这个…刚开始会有一点，但久了就习惯了。
E: ...Well, a bit at first. But I've gotten used to it over time.

C: 刚才的事…还有我说的话你就当没发生过吧啾，不许跟别的小鸟讲喔！
E: Just pretend none of that ever happened... And don't tell the other birds!

C: 你被关进了实验舱中，那股吸力仍未消失，不断抽取着舱中的空气。
E: You are trapped inside the research pod, and that sucking sound does not abate as it continues vacuuming the air out of the pod.

C: 是黑塔，还是艾丝妲，亦或是…阮•梅？这会是意识溃散前的幻觉吗？
E: Is it Herta, or is it Asta, or could it be... Ruan Mei? Are these just hallucinations before you pass out?

C: …有点太高了…我够不着……
E: ...It's still a little high... I can't quite reach...

C: 你没被它消化掉吗？
E: How'd you avoid getting digested?

C: 在未来的重建工作中，造物引擎的规模和数量是最重要的。有了它，驾驶员的培训压力会低很多。
E: In future reconstruction work, the number and scale of the Engines of Creation will be of utmost importance. With this design, the pressure on training the operators will be greatly relieved.

C: 可是贝洛伯格哪来的树？
E: And where will Belobog be getting these trees from?

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 不过，我们要怎么利用这种力量呢......
E: Although, how are we supposed to harness this energy...?

C: 有了啾！下次再来找找我在哪里吧，会给客人准备脸红心跳的惊喜啾~
E: Got it, tweet! Try to find where I am next time, and I'll have a surprise for you that'll set your pulse racing. Tweet~

C: 我已经在梦乡里了。
E: I'm already dreaming.

C: 哼！
E: Hmph!

C: 拜托客官了，如果您在宾馆见到其他小鸟，请把它们叫回大树这里，人家一定会好好感谢您的啾！
E: Please, dear guest — if you see any of the other birds in the hotel, please call them back to the big tree. I will definitely make it worth your while, tweet!

C: 让我想想…对了，有个内向的孩子不喜欢宾馆里来来去去的客人，于是总躲在<color=#dbc291ff>角落书架的最高层</color>——哎呀，那可是人家也难找到的地方啾！
E: Let's see... Oh yes, there's an introverted child who dislikes the guests going in and out of the hotel, so it always hides <color=#dbc291ff>at the bottom-most shelf of the bookshelf in the corner</color>... Oh dear, that's a hard spot for anyone to find!

C: 猫头鹰老师的样子…看来得回去问问赤红大哥了啾！
E: What does Professor Owl look like... Seems like I have to go back to ask Boss Red, tweet!

C: 啾？啾！竟然能识破我的伪装——我明明已经完美地和苏乐达融为一体了啾！
E: Tweet? Tweet! You can see through my disguise? I'm clearly perfectly blended in with SoulGlad, tweet!

C: 登上美梦小镇最高处啾！
E: To the top of Dreamville, tweet!

C: 这是哪里？
E: What is this place?

C: 太好了，这样在下就能好好地想起来了啾——
E: This is great. I'll be able to remember it now, tweet!

C: 哼哼…没错，有个喜欢寻宝的助手声称在金叶广场中藏了许多小宝藏，但不知道为什么，那些奖品都被塞在了<color=#dbc291ff>「垃圾桶」里面</color>啾…
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a helper who loves treasure hunting. It claims to have hidden many treasures in the Goldleaf Plaza. But who knows why, those treasures were all stuffed <color=#dbc291ff>into trashcans</color>, tweet...

C: 再见啦，我要回去把这首歌唱给其他小鸟了啾~
E: See ya, I'm off to sing this song to the other birdies, tweet~

C: 啾~啾啾啾~
E: Tweet~ Tweet tweet~

C: 想看仓鼠球骑士大战哈努兄弟啾…
E: I wanna see Hamster Ball Knight versus Hanu... Tweet~

C: 挑树枝！
E: Pluck a branch!

C: 哈努兄弟被选为小镇最酷镇民！
E: Hanu got voted as the coolest kid in town!

C: 真没想到！
E: I never would have guessed!

C: 前面一盏灯~后面一盏灯~旁边再来一盏灯~
E: A light at the front~ A light at the back~ And another light next to it~

C: 比如说木头老爷的树桩，就是在下设计的——您有空也可以去看看啾~
E: For instance, Old Man Wood's tree stump was designed by me... You can go and take a look if you get time, tweet~

C: 啾…啾啾……啾啾啾啾……对了！有个可爱的孩子，它的朋友要过生日了，说不定偷跑出去就是为了准备惊喜礼物啾？请去<color=#dbc291ff>「堆放礼物盒」的地方</color>找找看吧~
E: Tweet... Tweet tweet... Tweet tweet tweet... Oh yeah! There's one child that is very sweet. Their friend is about to celebrate their birthday, maybe they've run off to go and prepare a surprise present for them? Please head to <color=#dbc291ff>the area with a stack of gifts</color> and take a look~

C: 哼哼…没错，钟表公园中有一个特别擅长操控灯光的小助手呢！对一部完美的影片来说，它的帮助必不可缺啾！快去<color=#dbc291ff>「仓鼠球骑士区」</color>那边找它吧！
E: Hmm... That's right, there is one assistant in Clock Garden that is really good with lighting! If you want a perfect movie, their help is indispensable! Go and find him around the <color=#dbc291ff>Hamster Ball Knight area</color>!

C: 呀，那边又有小鸟需要引导了，没有翅膀的朋友，再见啾。
E: Ooh, there's another birdie that needs some guidance over there. See you later, my wingless friend, tweet.

C: 等等啾，你不就是那位！钟表小子的好朋友，大名鼎鼎的球棒侠啾？！
E: Hold on, you're that one! Clockie's good friend, the famous Baseballer, tweet!?

C: 试试一旁的<color=#dbc291ff>拼图</color>吧，让小鸟知道，人类可是能使用工具的生物。
E: Try the <color=#dbc291ff>jigsaw puzzle</color> at the side, let's properly educate the birdie that humans are creatures that use tools.

C: 不过垃圾桶待久了是有点味儿，回大树以后老被湛蓝爵士念叨啾。
E: But I do smell a bit after spending too much time in the trashcan. I was reprimanded by Dr. Blues when I went back to the Great Tree, tweet.

C: 这灯接线不好吧？
E: Is the wiring faulty with this light?

C: 店不会再开了。
E: The shop is closed forever.

C: 还是我的狗狗比较强。
E: My dog's stronger than them.

C: 我恐高啾啾…
E: I have a fear of heights, tweet tweet...

C: 呃...你是在跟我说话吗？
E: Uh... Are you talking to me?

C: （为它指引回家的路）
E: (Point out the way home for it)

C: 你好像拽住了一个沉甸甸的物体，摸上去还有些温热。
E: You seem to have pulled at a heavy object. It feels quite warm to the touch, too.

C: 你在和谁说话？
E: Who are you talking to?

C: 丹枢大人说，她只能陪着小鱼一个人。其他人是见不到她的～
E: Lady Dan Shu said that she would only accompany me, and that nobody else could see her.

C: 仿佛幸运女神眷顾，从你手里掉落的书本巧合地合上了，书合上的一瞬间，不适感也烟消云散了。你用了数秒才勉强稳住心神。
E: Fortunately, by pure chance, the book falls from your hand and closes. At that moment, the discomfort immediately dissipates. It takes you a few moments to regain your composure.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「曜青」，它挟风驭雷，自九天之外疾驰而来。甲板上无数狐人披甲站立，威风凛凛势不可挡。
E: You are seeing the Xianzhou Yaoqing, which is advancing at a dazzling speed, carrying the momentum of tempest and thunder. Countless foxians, fully armed, are standing on the deck in a majestic posture.

C: 你想说的是「命运不会改变」吧，我明白了。
E: I think what you were trying to say is, "your fate is in your own hands," right? But yeah, I understand.

C: 大概也是他「倒霉」的一部分吧？我也没想到。
E: No, I think this is more likely a part of his "bad luck?"

C: 可惜啊，都没听闻哪家拳法要用这「高筋面粉」的。咱也有点搞不懂了，这面粉是怎么个练法，莫非是辅助练暗劲的？可这不对啊……
E: Unfortunately I've never heard of any boxing that needs "high gluten flour." I don't really get how this flour's used in training, unless it's used to train some obscure moves. That doesn't sound right...

C: 噢！咱悟了，这是揉面的法子，不是什么拳法！有些客人牙口好，爱吃有劲头的面点，这必须得用高筋面粉仔细揉面，否则做出来就没那种劲道的口感了。
E: Oh! I got it. This is a method for kneading dough, not any kind of boxing school! Some customers have strong teeth and prefer chewy noodles. That has to use high gluten flour with careful kneading, otherwise you can't stretch out that chewy texture.

C: 但是你知道的我只是岁阳——我能咀嚼琴师留下的情绪与记忆，但不能创作。
E: But as you very well know, I'm just a heliobus... I can chew through the emotions and memories left behind by the guqinist, but I cannot create.

C: 也许到时候，它会要求你背下这出戏的唱词。要不趁这个机会提前预习一下？
E: Maybe when the time comes, it will ask you to memorize the lyrics to this opera. Do you want to take this chance to rehearse beforehand?

C: 小小册子，不看也罢。
E: It's just a little booklet. Who cares?

C: 的确如此，戏曲被时代淘汰了。
E: It really is like that. Opera is growing obsolete with the times.

C: 你打不过我又不是我的错。
E: It's not my fault if you can't beat me.

C: 嚯哈哈哈！我被你发现了！
E: O-hoho! You found me!

C: 你附身吧，我带你过去。
E: Come on then, and I'll carry you over.

C: 皮皮西大吃了一惊，头顶的绒球因愤怒而来回旋转，脚下止不住地跺着，大有要跺穿地面的决心。
E: The Pepeshi is startled as the fluff ball on his head twirls back and forth in rage. His feet stamp and stomp, determined to stomp right through the ground.

C: 皮皮西人就一定有钱吗？你的刻板印象是不是太离谱了些——我就是个没钱的皮皮西！
E: Do you think all Pepeshi are rich? That stereotype's a little too much — I don't have any money and I'm a Pepeshi!

C: 这次真多亏了我结实的身体——碳基生物可扛不住这一下，哈哈哈！
E: I really have to hand it to my sturdy body this time — carbon-based lifeforms can't handle that, haha!

C: 何况…何况我觉得，只有我俩的日子也很充实幸福呀。要不是那些老照片，我甚至已经快忘了妈妈的样子了……
E: What's more... What's more, I feel like we are perfectly happy just the two of us. If it weren't for those old photos, I would have almost forgotten what mother looked like by now...

C: 老人的质问如此滚烫，仿佛连梦境世界的空气都沸腾了起来。你感到胸口有些闷热。
E: The old man's interrogation grew so heated that it was as if the very air inside the Dreamscape began to boil. You feel a burning sensation inside your chest.

C: 对不起，小佩。我记得你出生的那天…我看着你，悄悄地对自己说：或许这才是我该坚守的幸福；或许那个被强加在我身上的、名叫梦想的诅咒已经被解开了。
E: I'm sorry, Pennie. I remember the day that you were born... As I looked at you, I quietly said to myself: Perhaps this is the happiness that I should stick with. Perhaps I have already been freed from that curse that haunts me, that curse that calls itself a "dream."

C: 也别太自责了。我看你这纤弱的身板，以前肯定很少干体力活吧？
E: Don't be too hard on yourself. Looking at your slender frame, you can't have done much manual labor before, right?

C: 比我想象得还要奢华…
E: It's even more luxurious than I imagined...

C: 瞧瞧它！瞧瞧这懒东西，像条死狗似的瘫坐在地，如此疲软、如此堕落！
E: Look at it! Look at this useless thing! Lying around like a dying dog all weak and pathetic!

C: 如果…您真想为我做点什么，那能不能…请您带我从这逃走呢？
E: If... If you really wish to do something for me, could you... could you help me escape from here?

C: 就从<color=#dbc291ff>筑梦边境</color>开始吧。听说那儿的风景很独特，但不对宾客开放，只能拜托您偷偷带我过去了。
E: Let's start with the <color=#dbc291ff>Dream's Edge</color>. I hear that the scenery there is like no other, but it is not open to guests, I will have to ask you to sneak me in.

C: 今天我就要把酒瓶撕破，看看谁才是最香醇的好酒。
E: Today, I will tear open some bottles and we will see who is the finest wine of the three!

C: 是啊，无糖兄，口味太甜，糖甚至黏住了他们的脑袋。
E: Indeed, Brother Sugar-Free. They are all too sweet. The sugar in their minds has made their brains sticky.

C: 螺丝咕姆？天才俱乐部的天才——这可是位大忙人…但你也可以试着联系一下。
E: Screwllum? Genius of the Genius Society? Now that is a busy man, but you can try contacting him?

C: 尽管面对镜头微笑对一些人来说真的很难，但你还是收获了一张绝好的合影。
E: Though staring into a lens and smiling is very difficult for some people, you still managed to get a wonderful group picture.

C: 荒谬！你的外貌跟桶毫无关系，灵长目的古怪的身体怎能与桶王光滑完美的圆柱神躯相提并论！
E: Absurdity! Your appearance is nothing like a can. How could an odd-shaped primate body be compared to the King of Cans' smooth and perfect cylindrical body?

C: 家族的人要是能追杀我到这儿来，我倒立喝苏乐达给你看。
E: If the members of The Family are capable of coming here to punish me, I would drink SoulGlad upside down for you.

C: 好汉饶命，我这就给！
E: Spare my life, sir! Here is your money!

C: 全匹诺康尼最具优秀的苏乐达齐聚一堂，在疯狂的厮杀中选拔出「巨星苏乐达」。
E: The most outstanding SoulGlads in all of Penacony are gathered together and engage in a vicious battle to find the SoulGlad Superstar.

C: 你的脸色看起来不太好。
E: You don't look so good.

C: 都好说！相遇就是缘，互相帮助是应该的。所以你看…原价的五倍怎么样？
E: No biggie! Karma brought us together. It's only right that we scratch each other's back. So then... what do you say — how about five times the sticker price?

C: 咳咳，作为唱片公司的合作仓库经理，利用职务便利囤积居奇，扰乱市场，非法销售，总算逮到现行了。
E: Ahem, misusing your position as the collaborating warehouse manager of the record company to stockpile albums, manipulate markets, and conduct illegal sales... You've been caught red-handed.

C: 停！说人话…
E: Stop! Speak human, please...

C: 哎！这…冤枉、冤枉啊！我们自动乐团向来主打一个爱岗敬业、吃苦耐劳，怎么可能上班摸鱼呢？可真是天——大的误会！
E: Hey! I... It's not like that at all! The automated orchestra has always been loyally industrious and hardworking to a fault! We wouldn't slack off during work hours! This... This is truly a horrible misunderstanding!

C: 你下意识地松了口气，确信这并不是哪位假面愚者的恶作剧——虽然你在拆开包裹前还是无法断言……
E: You subconsciously let out a sigh of relief, now knowing that this is not a prank by one of those Masked Fools... Though you cannot be absolutely certain either, at least not until the contents of the package are revealed.

C: 就在大脑飞速运转时，你听见一阵急促的脚步声，夹杂着某种气喘吁吁的声音在向你靠近。
E: As your mind works overtime, you hear rapid footsteps and the sound of ragged breathing approaching.

C: 然而，就在这千钧一发之际，仙舟联盟的突然出现，以雷霆万钧之势出现，清除了一切危机。
E: Then, just in the nick of time, the Xianzhou Alliance appeared, ending the crisis with overwhelming force.

C: 不知不觉间，{NICKNAME}也成长起来了，现在都能独当一面了。
E: It seems that {NICKNAME} has matured more than we had realized and is much more independent now.

C: 要是还有压缩梦泡就好了，这种精彩的画面，重映多少次我都不会腻！
E: If only we had a compressed dream bubble. I wouldn't be bored with such an exciting moment, no matter how many times they're replayed!

C: 想必她也很难把握到底该用什么语气同你说话——要是语气尊敬一些，万一你是嘟嘟怎么办；要是语气严厉一些，万一你是真的{NICKNAME}怎么办？
E: She's probably also having a hard time figuring out the appropriate tone with you — what if she's respectful to you, only to find that you're Doot-Doot in disguise? Conversely, what if she adopts a stern demeanor, only to discover you're the genuine {NICKNAME}?

C: 犯人的收押和转移有严格的检查流程，其随身携带的物品都会登记在册，所以不会有这种可能。
E: All prisoners go through a rigorous checking process for their admission and transfer, and their belongings are registered, so this is not possible.

C: 这世间的偶然与可能性太多了…
E: There are numerous possibilities in this world...

C: 喂，你是逃犯吧。
E: Hey, you're an escaped prisoner, aren't you?

C: 不过你若是有空，随时都可以回来再调查一番，你不会上当的。
E: However, you can always come back and investigate once you're free. After all, you'll never fall for it.

C: 虽然这并非你的本意，但你赋予我们第二次艺术生命，我愿称你为我的艺父。
E: Although it wasn't your intention, you have given our artistic careers a new lease of life. I am willing to address you as our artistic parent.

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 在幽囚狱里坐过牢的朋友应该都知道：「不要进入证物仓库的集装箱，至少，不要『独自』进入集装箱。」
E: Any prisoner who's been in the Shackling Prison long enough knows a certain rule: "Never enter the freight containers in the evidence storage warehouse... At least, not alone."

C: 我就「嗯」到这里了，你有头绪了吗？
E: And that's about it, mm-hmm. Have you any clue about how to go about this?

C: 让我再考虑考虑。
E: Let me think.

C: 老白你看看，你看你把人孩子吓得！咱们一句话还没提，人家就把咱们嘴堵上了。
E: Look what you've done, Old Bai. You've got them all shaken up! We've not even said anything, and they've shut us down.

C: 没了没了，就这几句。
E: Alright, I'll make it quick.

C: 不行，需求也分先来后到的，你得先和我对需求。
E: No! First come, first served. You have to do what I want first.

C: 这玉兆，就交到你的手里了。请务必，千万，一定要把它插进控制室的系统里。
E: I'll hand this jade abacus over to you. Please, you absolutely, definitely, undeniably must insert it into the control room system.

C: 除开右舷第二组舰炮的炮声略显沉闷，其余都堪称完美。
E: The second group of cannons on the starboard side sounded a little dulled, but otherwise, that was perfection.

C: 我会用老白的钱包打白条的。
E: I'll give you an IOU from Old Bai.

C: 你闭嘴！
E: Shut your trap!

C: 怎么可能，你再仔细看看。哦，我明白了，你肯定是用手机在看，对吧？
E: How? Take a closer look! Oh, I get it. You've been watching on your phone, haven't you?

C: 老头，叫你的下一个孙子进来吧！
E: Old man, call in your next grandson!

C: 这劫匪太狡猾了！看来只有我们兄弟同心才能解决。
E: This kidnapper is tricksy! It looks like we will have to use our sibling bond to deal with him!

C: 帮人签到还能有钱赚？
E: You can make money by helping others take attendance?

C: 你与这位友好的皮皮西同学拍摄了合影，并慷慨地在照片后方签上了自己的名字。
E: You take a photo with your friendly Pepeshi classmate, and generously sign your name at the back of the photograph.

C: 啾！
E: Tweet!

C: 这是未遂！
E: You still made an attempt!

C: 红色酒瓶来担任主角。
E: The red bottle will play the protagonist.

C: 你没有理会好心路人的劝阻，自顾自地触碰着面前的圣烛。
E: You ignore the kind passerby's words and touch the holy candle per your own volition.

C: 什么情况？
E: What's the issue?

C: 心理测试是假的，但我喜欢！
E: Psychological assessments cannot be trusted, but I enjoy doing them!

C: 眼前温暖舒适的大床，像一个显而易见的陷阱似的引诱着你。也许你该顺从自己的本心，躺在床上，好好睡一觉。
E: The warm, cozy bed in front of you beckons like an obvious trap. Perhaps you should follow your heart, lie down, and get a good sleep.

C: 能睡多久睡多久。
E: As long as possible.

C: 至于涨价的部分…可没有哪条法律规定这也在要还的范围内啊。
E: As for the price hike... nowhere in the legal constitution does it state it needs to be repaid.

C: 哦、哦吼，这、这只是故意设置的圈套…绝、绝没有亵渎泰坦神明的意思，吼吼……
E: Oh, oh-ho! Th—This was an intentional trap... I—I would never dare blaspheme the divine Titans, ho-ho...

C: 阿格莱雅的答案如此简单而笃定，你不禁细想起了背后的深意…元老院能靠权力打倒别人，但站不起来是指…算了，这种笑话想得太细就不好笑了。
E: Aglaea's answer is simple, yet determined. You can't help but contemplate the deeper meaning behind it... The Council of Elders crushes others with its authority, but it can't stand because... Forget it, jokes stop being funny when you dissect them.

C: 来吧！让你考考我。
E: Alright! Let's do this.

C: 吼吼吼，真的吗？拿到零分考卷的人，虽然没有奖励，却说不定有惩罚在等着，怎么能算一无所有呢？瞧瞧，本狮的惩罚这就要开始了——
E: Ho-ho-ho, is that so? While a person who scored zero on an exam gets no rewards, there may be punishment awaiting them. How is that nothing? Let's see, this lion's punishment is about to commence...

C: 「动摇的信念」，的确是战士们必须摒弃的事物，可这头狡诈的狮子真的会认同这一点吗？再问问其他人的想法吧。
E: "Wavering will" is indeed a concept that soldiers need to be rid of, but will this conniving lion accept this perspective? Let's ask another person for their view.

C: 本狮差点被你绕进去了！单纯的旧硬币，和有收藏价值的古董怎么能相提并论？这个答案完全错误吼！
E: I was almost taken in by your wily train of thought! How could a plain old coin and a collectible antique be of comparable value? This answer is totally wrong!

C: 万敌瞪了狮口一眼便离开了。
E: Mydei gives the lion a dagger stare and leaves.

C: 吼，很传统的视角。但那些小时候调皮捣蛋，长大后却极为杰出的人类又该怎么解释？太过片面，这个答案根本不行吼！
E: Ho, a classic angle. But how do you explain instances where humans may be mischievous when young, but turn out to be exemplars when they're all grown up? Your answer is too poorly thought-out and therefore unacceptable!

C: 吼吼，题目有点长，要认真听吼——
E: Ho-ho, the question is a little long, so listen carefully...

C: 遐蝶仍有些疑惑，但还是向你行了个礼，悠悠地离开了。
E: Left with lingering suspicions, Castorice nonetheless bows to you and saunters off.

C: （全部吃掉）
E: (Eat it all)

C: 你是个大垃圾啊。
E: You are but a piece of trash.

C: 我就是个废桶…
E: I'm just a basket case...

C: 哈，现在家族最严酷的惩罚也就这招了——不痛不痒！
E: Ha, that's about the harshest punishment one can get from The Family, but it doesn't have much deterrent effect.

C: 不，深层梦境的危险远比你想象中恐怖……
E: No, the dangers of the Deep Dreamscape are horrifying beyond your imagination...

C: 我要跟家族举报你！
E: I will report you to The Family!

C: 我最近偶有感悟，融合了过往的见识，创造了一套全新的「桶之体术」，师傅你能否为我指点一二？
E: Recently, I've come to realize some things. By combining these realizations with my experiences, I've created a brand-new set of Trashcan Combat Techniques. Master, perhaps you could offer a few pointers?

C: 然后是中间…中间部分是一篇文章中最关键的。咪发迷想知道怎么修理信箱，这信箱是该修修了。
E: Now for the middle... The heart of any letter. Mifamem wanted to know how to fix the mailbox — and honestly, it could use some fixing.

C: 最后是结尾…该说的都说过了，好像没什么需要回复的了。
E: Finally, the closing... Everything's been said. Not much left to reply to, really.

C: 行云流水！不知道咪发迷收到回信会是什么表情？
E: Smooth! I wonder what kind of face Mifamem will make when they get the reply?

C: 气氛已经烘托到位，史诗般的战斗就要打响了——
E: The moment is set, and an epic battle is about to begin—

C: 嗯？这么没防备地睡着了…可是会被坏人盯上的，要小心哦。
E: Hm? Dozing off like that without a care in the world... Gotta be careful, you might draw attention from the wrong sort of people!

C: ——不试试怎么知道呢？
E: Well, there's only one way to find out.

C: 不觉得这样很浪漫吗？海面上的波纹就像有魔法，如果盯着看，时间不知不觉就会过去很久。
E: Don't you find this romantic? The ripples on the sea surface are like magic. If you stare at them, time flies by before you even realize.

C: 毕竟哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，去往其他城邦，我们一定能找到更高的观景台吧？
E: Aedes Elysiae is just a small village. If we visit a different city, we can definitely find a higher observation deck, right?

C: 欸，你要垃圾桶做什么？
E: Huh? What do you want trashcans for?

C: 记得你和人家抱怨过有本名叫「版本」的书，也总会在最勾人心弦的地方中断。或许这就是命运的常态吧？
E: You complained to me before about a book called Versions that always stops at the most captivating parts. Perhaps that's just how fate works, huh?

C: 我记得屋顶的瓦片硌屁股。
E: I remember how the roof tiles were painful to sit on.

C: 不知道在黑暗中颠簸了多久，正当你感觉自己快要吐出来的时候，木马突然被重重地丢在了地上，随之而来的是整齐的列队声。
E: You have no idea how long you've been bumping around in the dark. But, just as you feel like you can't hold the contents of your stomach back any longer, the wooden horse comes suddenly crashing to the ground, followed by the sound of soldiers in neat formation.

C: 你相信，那座「永恒之城」会接纳所有愿意在刻法勒光芒下安居的人们，哪怕他来自不同信仰的城邦，哪怕他的手中曾沾满鲜血。
E: You firmly believe that the Eternal City will take in anyone willing to live under the light of Kephale, even those from cities of other faiths... Even those with blood on their hands.

C: 你意识到，方才与你对话的存在已经远去。但过段时间回来看看，或许…会有新的发现？
E: You realize the being that just spoke to you has disappeared. But maybe when you return after some time, there might be... new discoveries?

C: 唉，谁说得准究竟会发生什么呢？未来是个不紧不慢的邮差，我们永远只有在它到来时，才能看清那封信的落款。
E: *sigh* Who can truly say what will happen? The future is like a mail carrier who neither hurries nor delays, we can only read the signature on the letter when it finally arrives.

C: 不必担心，多余的食材还很多，排好队，人人都有份。还好有活火，可以让大家吃上一顿热乎饭。
E: No need to worry, there are plenty of extra ingredients. Line up, and everyone will get their share. Thankfully, with the Living Flames, we can all have a hot meal.

C: 你在找什么吗？
E: Are you looking for something?

C: 当然还是在围绕珍稀物种领域啦。那些小家伙们可比你们这种大人有意思多了！
E: Rare species of course. Those little creatures are so much more interesting than human grown-ups!

C: 你可以与他多多交流沟通，想必会收获很多有趣的知识。
E: I am sure you will gain a lot of interesting knowledge if you talk to him more.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 从你的眼神里，我能看出焦躁不安。这是一种来源于恐惧的情绪，我能理解。
E: I can see anxiety in your eyes. This emotion originates from fear. I can understand it.

C: 一旦想到她们失望的眉眼，我的心比刀割还要刺痛。所以我不会，也绝不能前往避难。
E: It pains me whenever I think of the disappointment in their eyes. I will never take refuge.

C: 大家总之会被我的一些肢体语言或者是眼神所吸引注意，这一点我也十分困扰。
E: People always get attracted by my body language and my eyes. I find it really frustrating.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 关于莱斯莉的传闻。
E: About rumors on Lesley.

C: 不过是哪位患者呢…啊，好像忘记了。
E: But which patient was it for...? Ahh, I forgot.

C: 他觉得面对你很有压力。
E: He feels great pressure when you are present.

C: 萍萍姐有空的时候会跟我讲空间站里的事，不过她不是随时都有空，所以……
E: Ms. Wenfry tells me about the space station whenever she has time, but she's not always free, so...

C: 你怎么又来了？是又要送我去什么垃圾回收站吗？
E: Why are you here again? Are you sending me to some recycling station again?

C: 烦死了嗷嗷！
E: I've had enough!

C: 等一切都修好的那一天，她要是回来看…她一定会为我们感到自豪。
E: If she visits us when everything is fixed, I'm sure she'll be proud of us.

C: 有点急的脸上露出一副不可思议的神色，但随之又被诡异攀爬至脸颊的红晕所遮盖。
E: A look of incredulity appears on Bit Busy's face, but the expression is soon concealed by the blush that creeps mysteriously up to its cheeks.

C: 修复工程正在推进机器人的事我知道了没事你就往边上站着别碍事，懂了吗？
E: The restoration work is in progress and I already know what happened to the robots. Don't get in my way if you don't need anything else from me, understand?

C: 没关系，以后再聊呗。
E: No problem. Let's do this again next time.

C: 快点，快点——拿起「最强之矛」，刺向「最强之盾」吧！
E: Stop stalling! Thrust the Strongest Lance at the Strongest Shield!

C: 原来如此…
E: I understand now...

C: 其余长矛全都败下阵来，盾牌却依旧巍然不动。
E: All other lances have been defeated, yet the shield remains steadfast and unshaken.

C: 要是你的先祖当时得到了某种神启，将城邦换个名字，「阿卡索斯」就不再存在，怎么能说这个概念可以和数学知识相类比呢？
E: If your ancestors had received divine inspiration and changed the name of the city, "Icatus" would not exist. How can you say that this concept is comparable to the truths of mathematics?

C: （驳斥：你在循环论证。）
E: (Rebuttal: You are making a circular argument.)

C: 没错，我就是这么认为的。
E: That's right. That's what I think.

C: …我知道了，谢谢你们，这件事就交给我处理吧。
E: ...I see. Thank you, and please leave this matter with me.

C: …波瑟芬妮…我的波瑟芬妮……
E: ...Possephone... My Possephone...

C: 你…！你若不珍惜自由，那我来替你安排。婚宴开始前，好好反省反省！
E: Why, you...! If you don't cherish your own freedom, then allow me to make some arrangements. And think about what you've done before the wedding begins, would you!

C: 我想把它们交给见证了一切的你来保管。当合适的时机来临，请替我们公开这些信件。
E: I want to give them to you, as someone who witnessed everything. When the time is right, please, can you publicize these letters?

C: 女孩讲了许多离谱的故事，比如尼卡多利曾经爱上塔兰顿、和吉奥里亚互为情敌…也不知道是从哪听来的。
E: The girl tells a series of outrageous stories, such as Nikador falling in love with Talanton and fighting Georios in a love triangle... Who knows where she got all those from.

C: 这些东西大都值点钱，但不多，勉强能买下一面盾牌与一根长矛。容器的主人似乎只想把它们储存起来，而且已经这样坚持了好些日子。
E: Most things are worth at least a little money, but not much — barely enough to buy a shield and spear. Their owner seems only interested in collecting things — and has clearly been doing so for some time.

C: 女孩沉默不语，这让你确定了那段记忆的真实性。
E: The girl stays silent, confirming the veracity of that memory.

C: …怎么会，黑潮怪物围过来了…什么时候把大家都……
E: No... When did the black tide monsters... The others... they're all...

C: 知道用了多少心思、砸了多少钱吗！老东西，就知道浪费！心疼得我声音都打颤了……
E: All that care... all that money... Do you know how much money I wasted for that, old fool? Gods! It hurts just talking about it...

C: 所以究竟是什么情况？
E: So what exactly is going on?

C: 停停停，什么叫「过时」？这都是最新的条文，你不信去查查。
E: Hold on a minute. What does "outdated" mean? These are all the latest up-to-date articles. Go take a look if you don't believe me.

C: 您老别急啊，我已经问过维修科的人了。
E: Don't worry about it. I've chased up the maintenance department.

C: …事情就是这样了！
E: ...That's how it went!

C: 很明显，你注意到这位饲养员正偷偷用眼角的余光瞟你，似乎早有打算。
E: It's quite obvious that this caretaker is sneaking glances at you, as if he already has something in mind.

C: 和你没关系，只是到时间了。去老地方吧。
E: No, it's just that the time has come. Let's check its usual spot.

C: 完了，万策尽了，能用的办法都用过了，可那头失恋的大地兽仍旧义无反顾地在道路上狂奔，不由得让我想起了曾听过的一首民谣……
E: It's hopeless — we've tried every idea, and yet the heartbroken dromas continues to sprint down the road with reckless abandon. That reminds me of an old ballad I once heard...

C: ——奥赫玛的城门口，我会带着科可波阁下在那等你们，想随我返乡的，就自己来吧。悬锋城不会拒绝勇士，但也不欢迎懦弱之徒。
E: At the gates of Okhema, I'll wait with Kokopo. Come to join me if you want to return. Castrum Kremnos welcomes warriors but does not tolerate the cowards.

C: 嗡嗡…嗡嗡嗡！
E: Grumphh... Grumphhh!

C: 呜呜…太感动了，太好哭了，我终于明白了——
E: Oooh... I'm so moved, so tearful... I finally understand —

C: 又见面了，小赛飞儿。
E: We meet again, little Cipher.

C: 当然，您是元老院专门嘱咐过、记录在册的贵宾。听说您和其他黄金裔一同击败了尼卡多利，我哪敢怠慢呢。
E: Of course. You're a VIP the Council of Elders specifically mentioned and recorded. I heard you and the other Chrysos Heirs defeated Nikador — there's no way I'd slack off around you.

C: 老爷爷，我想请问，刻法勒和我们…究竟是什么关系呢？
E: Grandpa, may I ask what exactly the relationship between Kephale and us is?

C: {RUBY_B#泰坦嘶吼}Dilas{RUBY_E#}！
E: {RUBY_B#Titan roars}Dilas{RUBY_E#}!

C: 仓促间，你看见对面的守卫也在袭击中苦苦支撑。
E: In the chaos, you see the guards there struggling against the attack as well.

C: 这里也有盾牌，捎上吧。
E: There's a shield here too. Stack it up as well.

C: 希瑞雅，你听到什么了吗？我怎么一点儿声音也没听到。
E: Serena, hear anything? Silence here.

C: 她写的每一首诗，阿波罗尼都会细细装裱，并给予她鼓励。
E: Apollonius would carefully frame every poem she wrote and give her encouragement.

C: 为了能让这份独特重现在欢宴之上——万事拜托了，救世主阁下。
E: For the sake of bringing this unique experience back to our revelry... we're counting on you, Great Deliverer.

C: 你是说音乐吗？我只是偶尔听听，称不上什么行家。
E: About music? I'd say I'm more of a casual listener than a hardcore enthusiast.

C: 收费倒不贵，只是切换起来太麻烦了，还不如留声机呢——只要有碟片，想听什么就放什么，还能满足收藏欲。
E: It's not like they're expensive or anything. It's just a hassle to switch between them to find the song you like. With a Phonograph, it's essentially just plug-and-play. It also scratches the itch to collect things I guess.

C: 站在列车上时，我能感受到其实你们也和我们一样，正凭借自己的力量在宇宙中创造未来。
E: When I stand aboard the Express, I can feel that you and I are really the same — manifesting our own futures in this universe to the best of our abilities.

C: 是啊，只是……
E: I could, but...

C: 列车组随时欢迎你！
E: Join us anytime!

C: 这里好适合玩捉迷藏！
E: This place is perfect for playing hide-and-seek!

C: 呣呣呣…虎克还得再抓几个人来才行！列车这么大，不玩捉迷藏的话…不是浪费了嘛！
E: Hmm... Hook needs to find more people! The Express is huge, it's a waste of space to not play!

C: ——虎克决定啦，等虎克和鼹鼠党的大家找到了宝藏，也帮老巫婆翻新一下诊所好了，就当是报答一饭…一饭……
E: I've made up my mind. When The Moles find treasure under my leadership, we'll help the old witch make her clinic shiny and sparkly...

C: 可以用来运输物资。
E: You could use it to transfer supplies.

C: 调度士兵…吗？听起来确实很快捷……
E: Deploy troops... huh. That's not a bad idea.

C: 都聊了些什么？
E: What did you guys talk about?

C: 我…咳。说是讨厌好像有点不礼貌…但我也确实不喜欢那个味道。
E: Ahem... I'm okay, thanks. Not what I'm used to.

C: 还有克里珀之外的星神……
E: And the other Aeons apart from Qlipoth...

C: 谢谢你邀请我来。
E: Thank you for inviting me here.

C: 真不错啊，这复古的列车设计，这舒适的车厢，唔，如果我们的飞船能这么改造就好了……
E: Astounding! The retro design of this locomotive, the comfort of its cabins! If only our own spacecraft could be modified in such a way...

C: 什么意思！
E: What's that supposed to mean!?

C: 哈哈，商人嘛，信息也是商品的一种。
E: Haha, what can I say, I'm a merchant, and information is also a commodity.

C: 还挺有同伴意识，我喜欢。
E: A strong sense of awareness for your companions — I like that.

C: 你在说谁？哦，是我啊……
E: Who are you calling an intruder? Oh, me...

C: 我只是来串门的，没有恶意。
E: I mean no harm — I'm just visiting.

C: 无名客向来礼貌待人！
E: The Nameless have always been hospitable hosts.

C: 现在想来，那次赏鲸之旅，也是我成为斗舰飞行士的契机之一吧。人生还真是奇妙啊……
E: Thinking back, that trip to see the void song whales was one of the turning points which set me on the path to becoming a fighter pilot. Life truly is full of wonders...

C: 你喜欢和呜呜伯聊天吗？
E: Do you enjoy chatting with Wubbaboo?

C: 我有些事情想问你…
E: I have a few questions for you...

C: 来吧！尽情地倾诉吧！把你的困扰、苦痛，统统都告知我，让我来化解它们吧！
E: Come! Confess it all to me! Tell me all your frustrations and pain, and let me soothe them for you!

C: 我不是一个喜欢为自己贴金揽功的人，希望你能明白这一点。
E: I'm not someone who likes to reap benefits for myself, and I hope you understand that.

C: 但既然你主动发问，我还是为你解答——毕竟我生而为人的职责，就是解答他人的困惑！
E: But since you asked, I will answer — After all, my life's duty is to dispel others' confusion!

C: 总之，我没有能说出一句话，也没有给出任何回应。
E: Anyways, I couldn't say anything to him and gave him zero responses.

C: 在宇宙中的感觉非常奇妙…罗浮对彦卿而言那么辽阔，但是在宇宙中，也不过是小小一隅而已。
E: Being surrounded by the universe feels... amazing. The Luofu feels like a small corner of something much, much bigger.

C: 以后还是要多找丹恒老师聊聊天，也许聊得多了，他就能打开话匣子了吧。
E: I'll keep talking to him — maybe I can eventually unlock his chattier side!

C: …看这种小说怎么了！没看过《奇谭》的灵魂是不完整的！
E: ...What's wrong with those novels? You're not complete unless you've read the Tale series!

C: 总之，你只要记住卡波特是个大坏蛋就对了！
E: Anyways, just remember that Capote is despicable!

C: 等着瞧吧卡波特！等我忙完手里的工作，整理完奇物报告，再去忙完收容回收检查，最后再和阿德勒去一趟…哎哟！世玲怎么还有那么多事要忙呀！
E: Just you wait, Capote! When I finished my work, tidied up the Curio report, supervised Curio reclamation, and went with Adler to... Ugh! How come I still have so much work to do!?

C: 什么古恩那家伙年轻的时候风风火火的样子，还有伯纳德刚来的时候那身板才叫一个结实……
E: How energetic Gunn used to be... And how strong Bernard was when he first joined us...

C: 也许没什么用。
E: Maybe they won't be of much use.

C: 你是说…吉姆•罗杰？
E: Do you mean... Jim Roger?

C: 那就常来坐坐。
E: Then come visit more often.

C: 这列车上的饭……
E: The meals on the Express...

C: 列车上的饭，分量也太少了！
E: The portion sizes on the Express are too small!

C: 我倒是觉得，詹姆斯-真贺田体系本身就存在问题，以此为根基的形式体系也必然在可靠性上存在缺陷。
E: However, I feel the James-Magata System contains fundamental issues, causing any formal systems derived from it to inevitably contain irregularities.

C: 光是想想就让人激动！我猜大伙儿肯定会喜欢这个计划的。
E: It's exciting just thinking about it! I'm sure everyone will love the idea.

C: 尾巴大爷可真是稀客呀。
E: You're quite the infrequent visitor, Mr. Tail.

C: 长期技术顾问
E: A permanent technical consultant.

C: 欢迎远道而来的客人，为他们扫去旅途的辛劳，给他们营造良好的体验，虽然只是微小的工作，但米沙依然觉得十分有意义。
E: It's my job to make our guests who've come from afar feel comfortable. It might not seem like much, but it means a lot to me.

C: 听说你在找这种彩色「石头」，路过旅行禁区的时候刚好看到，就顺手带来了。
E: I heard you were looking for "stones" of this color. I saw it when I was passing the restricted zone, so I brought it with me.

C: 这个故事怎么样？我还编了一个恐怖版的，想不想听听？
E: How'd you like that story? I even came up with a scary version — wanna hear it?

C: 合作对象储备库…
E: The Partner Database...

C: 真有吗？我不好说…
E: Does it really exist? I'm not sure...

C: 是啊，真的是助手！别这么不放心嘛，我看上去有这么不靠谱吗？
E: Yeah! An actual assistant! C'mon, don't be so distrusting — do I look like someone people can't rely on?

C: 那好办，我在面具上写个「勿扰」，避免和人交流就可以了，对吧？
E: That's easy. I'll just write a "Do Not Disturb" on the mask and avoid interacting with people, right?

C: 记录和绘制？
E: Record and draw?

C: 有缘自会再见！
E: We shall meet again!

C: 智库得大更新了。
E: The data bank needs a major update.

C: 有趣！想尝试！
E: Interesting! I want to try!

C: 感觉像被卖家骗了。
E: Feels like you were ripped off.

C: 谢谢你能邀请我登上列车！以后有机会，记得来朱明做客！
E: Thank you for inviting me onto the Express! If you have the chance, don't forget to come and visit the Zhuming!

C: 我瞧它汁色浓郁，品尝起来个中滋味也沉浮多变…能否请教恩公，它是谁做的呀？
E: I see that it has a deep and rich color, and it tastes as though it contains layers of various flavors... Benefactor, may I ask who concocted this?

C: 我身上也有这种「胎记」，我们会不会是失散多年的兄妹？
E: I've got that kind of "birthmark" on my body, too. Could we really be long-lost siblings?

C: 噢，那个啊，你不说我都忘了，实在是件小事……
E: Ah, I almost forgot. Well, it's nothing important after all...

C: 我好不容易爬到这个位置，我绝不能犯错！
E: It took me so long to get where I am now. I can't afford to make a mistake!

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 对了，和你聊了这么多，你应该没看过《地底动物百科》吧？
E: Oh, yes, I've just been rambling on. You probably haven't read the Underground Encyclopedia of Zoology, right?

C: 如今新任守护者已经上任——据我了解，她有极大概率会支持开发新城区的战略，而我是行政区唯一的地产中介……
E: Now, the new Guardian has taken office. As far as I know, she will highly likely be in favor of developing new districts. Combining that with how I am the only property agent in the Administrative District...

C: 文学方面？
E: Literature?

C: 什么？实在太可惜了…这两部可都是上过「贝洛伯格必读榜」的名作啊。
E: What? That's a pity. These are must-reads on the list of "Books You Should Read in Belobog."

C: 你说的也有道理。
E: Fair enough.

C: 可不是？你耐心听我说。
E: Of course. Now let's not get ahead of ourselves.

C: 就能拿到研究投资！
E: That you can get research funding!

C: 「啥雪国冒险奇谭，不过是地摊文学而已，我随随便便就能给你写个十几二十万字，小意思！」——好不容易接到个活，我当时头脑一热，就这么答应下来了。
E: "Ha! Tale of the Winterlands is just some cheap folklore compiled together. I can give you one hundred thousand to two hundred thousand words with ease. Piece of carrot cake to me." — That was my response when I took the job. You know how hard it is to finally get something going. I was just trying to impress them but ended up getting way ahead of myself.

C: 编辑后来找了我好几次，我实在交不出稿子，完全不敢见她。
E: The editor has made several attempts to contact me since then, but I managed to avoid her each time because I just couldn't deliver.

C: 嗯，最近有点感冒，是有点不舒服，谢谢你的关心。
E: Yeah, I've been a little under the weather recently. Thanks for your concern.

C: 你好像开心了很多。
E: Someone is a happy camper.

C: 我的工作内容就是要帮希露瓦小姐处理一些机械屋的订单，基本上都是一些维修机械的活，比如供暖器、汽车引擎之类的。
E: My job is to help Serval with handling some workshop orders. It's mostly repairing mechanism, like heaters and car engines.

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 别激动，有什么诉求坐下来谈…
E: Take it easy. If there's an issue, we can sit down and discuss it...

C: 算了，你就当是听我说梦话吧。现在贝洛伯格治安可好得很，就算真撞上了大案也轮不着我来审……
E: Forget it. Just pretend like I'm talking nonsense. Belobog is too safe to have cases like that. Even if there is a big case, it's out of my reach...

C: 最近？最近那可是过得红红火火，哈哈…您也知道吧？这贝洛伯格的情况简直是要翻天覆地啦！
E: Recently? I've been living large. Haha... You've heard, right? Belobog is about to go through some big changes!

C: 我有点好奇…
E: I'm surprised that...

C: 矿头不用去矿场监工吗？
E: Don't you need to supervise the miners?

C: 行吧，你不是来打拳的，那就是来观赛的咯？
E: If you're not here to fight, you must be here to watch.

C: 这地下的大环境就是这样——富贵险中求！你要是想挣大钱，要么自己把命搭进去，要么让别人给你卖命，懂吗？
E: That's how things are down in the Underworld — it's high risk, high reward! If you wanna make it big, you have to either stake your life on it, or stake someone else's life on it. Get it?

C: 呵欠…问题好像变复杂了，弄得我又有点困。今儿就聊到这儿吧，我先休息了……
E: *yawn*... Looks like the problem's become complicated, and it's gotten me all sleepy. Let's talk another time. I'm taking a nap...

C: 走过路过，不要错过，数量有限的珍稀…哎、哎哟，哪个不长眼的来烦我？
E: Don't miss out on this rare item... Hey! How dare you distract me!?

C: 我作为虎克老大的得力干将，怎么能透露这种重要的信息！{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}还是放弃吧！
E: As the right-hand man to Boss Hook, I would never reveal such important information! You might as well give up!

C: 那个姐姐是叫布洛妮娅吗？我记住了！
E: Her name was Bronya... Now I remember!

C: 上下层区解除封锁…在我看来是件好事啊。下层区能搞到的机械零件就那么点，要不就是垃圾堆里翻出来的残次品……
E: Reuniting the Overworld and the Underworld... seems like a good idea to me. There's hardly any spare parts down in the Underworld. Just piles of defective junk...

C: 不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 我没什么事了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 你试过捉洞螈以外的兼职吗？
E: Have you ever tried any other part-time job than catching olms?

C: 但我能感受到，她的确是打心底在为这颗星球的未来着想——哪怕她坚持的方式无法被所有人接受。
E: However, I can feel that she is sincerely working for the future of this planet from the bottom of her heart, even if not everyone can accept her methods.

C: 你当时差点就签了合同。
E: You almost signed the contract back then.

C: 下次见，希儿。
E: See you next time, Seele.

C: 又见面了，{NICKNAME}。别来无恙？
E: We meet again, {NICKNAME}. How have you been?

C: 「机械热潮」——怎么样，酷吧？
E: We're called Mechanical Fever — cool eh?

C: 原因嘛，和可可利亚有点关系…具体的细节就不方便透露啦。
E: And it's got something to do with Cocolia... I can't really say more than that.

C: 没什么想问的了。
E: That's all questions I have.

C: 在你们深入北方的裂界之后，我和老弟带着铁卫又勉强抵挡了几波攻势，最后瞅准了时机才把禁区大门重新关上。
E: After you went north into the Fragmentum, Gepard and I held off several waves of attack with some Silvermane Guards. We finally took our chances and shut off the entrance to the restricted zone.

C: 有一说一，那场面可真是太惊险了…怪物没完没了地从裂界里涌出来，冲向禁区——我差点以为我们要撑不住了，好在有老弟兜底……
E: To tell the truth, the whole thing was thrilling... Endless monsters pouring out from the Fragmentum, rushing to the restricted zone. I almost thought we weren't gonna make it, but luckily I had my best guy with me...

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 就听到这里吧。
E: That's enough for me.

C: 没事了。
E: It's okay.

C: 啊，克拉拉忘记说了…！
E: Ah, I forgot to mention this...!

C: 当然有啦，而且有很多！
E: Plenty!

C: 那可真是段光辉岁月啊…不谦虚地说，在我的全盛年代，部队里应该没人不知道「快拳奥列格」这个称号。
E: Those were the glory days... I don't mean to brag, but in the prime of my youth, everyone knew of my repute as "Swiftstrike Oleg."

C: 哟，又见面了，{NICKNAME}！
E: Hey, we meet again, {NICKNAME}!

C: 屋子里仅剩的一块面包，心情似霉点，扩散发酵
E: No more food left in the cupboard, the mood is dire

C: 要守护你，要守护她，乌有的女王说空虚的话
E: You to protect, her to defend, queen of oblivion lies with no end

C: 到这儿吧，别以为你又行了
E: That's enough from me. Don't try to match this genius

C: 嘿，亲爱的——你最近可有听说？
E: Yeah, baby — have you heard the news?

C: 「机械热潮」的前一任键盘手是邓恩大哥。他毕业以后军务缠身，就离开了乐队——而我补上了键盘手的位置。
E: Dunn was the keyboard player for Mechanical Fever before I joined, but he got caught up in military duties after graduation and had to leave the band, so I filled in.

C: 好呀，正好我今天没有科考任务。你想聊什么？
E: Sure, I don't have any research tasks today. What do you wanna talk about?

C: 然后？然后你只需要尽享这丝滑的操作系统就行了！
E: And then voilà! Now, enjoy its ultra-smooth operating system!

C: 我们是永远的好朋友。
E: We're friends forever.

C: 预备——唱！
E: Ready — sing!

C: 咱在这儿坐多久了？
E: How long have we been sitting here?

C: 哎，异想天开！我看这贝洛伯格是要完啊……
E: Ah, the absurdity! It's the end of the road for Belobog...

C: 「机械热潮」重组有望啊。
E: The Mechanical Fever is planning a comeback.

C: 外面高手如云啊。
E: Well, there are so many great players out there.

C: 晶体管的再利用…
E: Repurpose those transistors...

C: 欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆。找我这位馆长有什么事吗？
E: Welcome to the Belobog History and Culture Museum. Is there anything an old curator like me can help you with?

C: 我是贝洛伯格的大英雄。
E: I'm the hero of Belobog.

C: {NICKNAME}……
E: {NICKNAME}...

C: 我，贝洛伯格的大守护者，谨代表贝洛伯格和她的全体子民向你表示诚挚的谢意。
E: As the Supreme Guardian of Belobog, I would like to express my sincerest gratitude to you on behalf of Belobog and all her people.

C: 我想了解幽囚狱的历史。
E: I want to learn about the Shackling Prison's history.

C: 嗯？咱就随口那么一说，还真未见得有什么商业机密……
E: Hmm? I was just saying that! I don't think I have anything you'd call a business secret...

C: 尚滋味决不搞这一套，您要真想知道某道菜是怎么做的，咱都可以细细讲给您听。一次学不会没关系，搜索「尚滋味燕翠」，那有咱的教学视频。
E: Spices Supreme employs no such tactics. If you really want to know how a dish is made, I'll even give you a step-by-step. Doesn't matter if you don't get it the first time: Just look up "Spices Supreme Yancui" online and my recipes' videos are all there.

C: 有不过口味这东西十人十色，咱的推荐未必符合您的胃口。但是咱们尚滋味有千种滋味，总有一款属于您的菜。
E: Everyone's tastes are different, and my recommendations might not suit your palate. But we've got myriads of flavors, so I'm sure there's one that'll pique your fancy.

C: 除此之外，咱还喜欢油爆飞海葵、果木炙烤夏塔恩恐鸟翅根、视肉糖球炒腊肉…哦对，这个视肉虽然个体极小，但会造出可怕的幻觉，极难对付……
E: Apart from that, I also like deep-fried flying sea anemone, fruitwood-grilled Shantak moa drumettes, viscorpus sugar balls stir-fried with cured meat... Oh right, these viscorpi may be really tiny, but they sure can conjure horrifying hallucinations. What a ride...

C: 前者咱当然乐见，但后者嘛…咱这一世最讨厌的就是厨师抱团搞什么行业规范，所以就敬谢不敏啦。
E: I'm glad to have more customers. As for the "Council," however... I hate the idea of chefs grouping together to come up with "industry standards" or something like that, so I've refused their offer.

C: …这样不好，这样不好…要咱说还是现在这样，大家都安生了才好。看大家吃得香，咱在后厨料理食材才有劲儿。
E: ...That was definitely a terrible time... But now, everyone has calmed down, and I feel happy and motivated to see how they enjoy my dishes.

C: 而这些「坏掉的程度」往往需要卓越的技巧以及高昂的价格…简而言之，修理并不划算，购买新的更加便宜也更加方便。
E: And their state of disrepair often requires great skill and a high price to get it fixed... Simply put, repairs are not cheap, and buying something new works out cheaper and more convenient.

C: 我不是很理解，可能这就是推理的魅力吧？
E: I don't really get it. Perhaps that's the charm of mystery novels?

C: 总之呢，我喜欢一个姑娘。但她不喜欢我这样的男人…她喜欢的男人，能用奇怪的韵律将一些奇怪词汇组合在一起，然后摇头晃脑地吟诵出来……
E: Anyway, I like this girl. But she doesn't like guys like me... The guys she likes use strange melodies to string together all these strange words, and they just recite them all from memory...

C: 那么静斋…
E: What about Jingzhai...

C: 我们隶属于「香薷幻娱」，是罗浮上最大的托蝶幻境制作工坊。我是个制片人，他是个导演。
E: We're affiliates of Elsholtzia Fantasy Entertainment, the greatest Butterfly Immersia production studio in all of Xianzhou. I'm the producer, and he's the director.

C: 哦对了，我们不收现金——毕竟收了我也用不了。幽囚狱里的硬通货是「奇巧零食」，您拿这个跟我交换就好。
E: By the way, we don't accept cash here. We can't spend them anyway. The common currency in The Shackling Prison is Trick Snacks, so you can use that to buy things from me.

C: 你犯了什么罪？
E: What crime did you commit?

C: 不要就拉倒。
E: Just let it go if you don't want it.

C: 哈哈，这都被您看出来了。
E: Haha, is it that obvious?

C: 说穿了不过是打听家长里短，搬运米粮，打扫卫生和报时通知之类的细碎活儿。
E: To be blunt, it's just a bunch of everyday chores like listening to daily problems, allocating food stocks, cleaning up after people, and notifying the public about the time.

C: 仙舟人都这么搭讪的吗？
E: Is this how Xianzhou people try to flirt?

C: 那我问问你…
E: Then let me ask you this...

C: 唉…怎么说呢，咱姐弟俩就是性格太像了……
E: Alas... How should I put it? Our personalities are way too similar...

C: 我记得你这张脸！别提醒我，我能想起来！让我想想你犯了什么事…虽然有点模糊，但我隐约记得你的江湖匪号！叫什么「无命客」来着？
E: I remember your face! Don't remind me, let me think... Let me think about what transgression you committed... Thought it's a little blurry, I remember you had a title of some kind. What was it called? The "Lifeless"?

C: 这么多档案，该怎么管理呢？
E: How do you manage this many files?

C: 嗯…这件事有关大毫大人的个人履历。请问您是想听到地衡司执事的正式回复，还是我个人的小道消息？
E: Mm-hmm... That's about Official Dahao's personal life. May I ask, would you like to hear the formal response from a Realm-Keeping Commission officer, or a personal gossip from me?

C: 先代宰相维森纳女士有一句名言：「谁用双脚丈量过祖国的土地，谁就愿将鲜血撒在这里。」她所言非虚…咳咳……
E: The late Madam Wiesener, once said, "Whosoever has measured the soils of the motherland with their feet, is willing to spill their blood there." What she said is true... *cough*...

C: 那两个商人啊…他们俩常年在罗浮做进出口贸易，想要贸易的货物重叠度比较高，所以关系相当紧张。
E: Those two merchants... They've been trading on the Luofu for years, and they often trade in the same stuff, so their relationship is pretty tense.

C: 直到后来，「埃伊加汗国」的雄主普朗克•埃伊加可汗觉得，大家同文同种，也都信仰「存护」，何不统一成一个强大的联盟呢？
E: Until one day, the almighty Planck Aigaia Khan, hero of the Aigaian Khanate, realized an ambition — with everyone utilizing the same language, culture, and all worshiping the Preservation, why not unite under a powerful alliance together?

C: 有机会下次再聊吧。
E: Catch you again next time.

C: 天舶司的条例好像又更新了一版，主要修订了因建木生发的相关滞留和赔偿内容，看起来没有和商业批文有关的内容……
E: Seems like the Sky-Faring Commission has updated their regulations yet again, mostly about detentions and compensation due to the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth. But there doesn't seem to be anything about document approvals...

C: 这种时候你还出来接单？
E: What are you doing out taking orders at this time?

C: 你是没见过人脸皮厚的时候。
E: You have no idea how shameless some people can get.

C: 我记得你和青雀打过几次交道。你又是怎么看她的呢？
E: I remember you dealing with Qingque a couple of times before. What do you think of her?

C: 我记得你和青雀打过几次交道。你又是怎么看她的呢？
E: I remember you dealing with Qingque a couple of times before. What do you think of her?

C: 说真的，我刚才差点就没过脑子就直接讲给你听了。事关太卜司的高压线，我应该更加谨慎一些的…现在想起来，还有点后怕。
E: To be honest, I almost just rattled all that off to you without even thinking things through. I should be more careful when it comes to top secret info about the Divination Commission... Thinking about it now, I'm starting to get a little uneasy.

C: 静斋看着跟没事人似的，我愣是没看出有什么问题来，你们合起来瞒着外人呢？
E: Jingzhai looks fine to me, and I can't see any problems. Are you two keeping a secret?

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'd better leave you to it.

C: …这不是随云骑军缉拿叛党的{NICKNAME}大人嘛！我听说过大人的威名，调任鳞渊境后，我还想着能不能有幸见上一面，没想到这就见到了。
E: ...If it isn't the mighty {NICKNAME} who rounded up the rebels with the Cloud Knights! I've long heard of your reputation. After being transferred to Scalegorge Waterscape, I wondered if I'd get the chance to meet you. And well, here we are!

C: 思来想去，还是我不够了解他。所以我申请调任鳞渊境，想在他曾经战斗的地方，为他再做点什么……
E: Thinking back over it, I still didn't understand him well enough. So I volunteered to transfer over to Scalegorge Waterscape. I want to be where he once fought, and do something for him...

C: 但咱们无法一个个详加盘问，毕竟这里名义上是属于持明族共治的洞天。
E: But we can't just interrogate them one-by-one. After all, this delve is under Vidyadhara rule, at least on paper.

C: 先不打扰你了。
E: I'll stop bothering you for now.

C: 客官，您随便看看，有什么需求随时叫我好吧。
E: Dear customer, take a gander around and call me over if you need anything at all.

C: 鳞渊境的药材听上去很奇妙。
E: The medicines of Scalegorge Waterscape sound simply miraculous.

C: 鳞渊境的药材听上去很奇妙。
E: The medicines of Scalegorge Waterscape sound simply miraculous.

C: 结果几个月前联系不上了…等我到了罗浮，去她家问她的下落，她家人也说，这孩子下落不明了。
E: I lost contact with her a few months ago... It was only when I was back at the Luofu and visited her home when her family told me that she had gone missing.

C: 呃，我只是路过。
E: Um, I was just passing by.

C: 就拿幽囚狱来说吧，虽然这里的安全措施已经复杂到令人发指的程度，但那个步离人不是照样跑出去了么……
E: Take The Shackling Prison for example. Even though their security measures are so complicated they can drive a man insane, that borisin still managed to escape, no?

C: 想跟您打听一些事儿…
E: I'd like to ask you a few things...

C: 所以，您来找我做什么呢？
E: So, what do you want from me?

C: 我还有事，先走了。
E: I'm busy, so I'll be heading off.

C: 不会吧，你不会是在盯着我吧？哟，我们可是正——经——商会。你先别走，要是给不出个像样的说法，你就摊上事了。
E: Hold up. You're not staring at me, are you? Hey, we're a respectable merchant guild over here. Don't ya think of running away. Gimme one good reason for what you've done, or you'll be in big trouble.

C: 我打算要找事做。
E: I'm actually looking for a job.

C: 没错，咱们尚滋味是咱金人巷的老字号招牌。客人您是化外民，可能听说过咱们店主打的「醒园菜」。
E: Right you are! You are now at Spices Supreme, one of the oldest and most famous restaurants in Aurum Alley. Even though you're an Outworlder, you might have heard of our special Xingyuan-style dishes.

C: 好啊，好啊，我最喜欢品茶了。
E: Sure! I'm a tea-lover.

C: 您这说法就像是说「话题总是被人冥冥引导，有心之人得到了想要的情报」，说实话，我很少会遇到这样的情况。
E: You make it sound like some smart person would subtly steer conversations in their favor to get useful information out of other people. Frankly, that's hardly the case here.

C: 接下来想充分利用店内的空间和预约限流的方式保证到店顾客的体验，我也没有本事接待太多人嘛。
E: Next, I'd like to make full use of the space in my store and limit the crowd through a reservation system to ensure a satisfactory experience for my customers. I'm not capable of serving too many customers at once either.

C: 我是不是什么问题都可以问你？
E: Am I allowed to ask you any questions?

C: 标准回答。
E: The official answer.

C: …你好，请问你是有事找我吗？
E: ...Good day. Do you have something for me?

C: …抱歉，因为老师的事，我实在是没什么心情闲聊了。你若是没什么重要的事，还是先请回吧，容我一个人静静。
E: ...I'm sorry, but I'm not in the mood for pleasantries right now. If there's nothing important to discuss, please leave me alone for a while.

C: 尽管老师的一些想法我无法理解，有时候我感觉他似乎有点太过执拗，因而显得有些不近人情了。但我知道他并无恶意，他只是个纯粹的学者。
E: Although I didn't always understand his ideas and sometimes he seemed too stubborn, I knew that he meant no harm, and that his aloofness was simply because he was a pure scholar.

C: 好的，请您保重。
E: Alright, take care.

C: 玉兆开始转动，某种看不见的屏障隔绝了你与外界的联系。在突如其来的宁静里，某个模糊的画面渐渐清晰了起来——
E: As the jade abacus starts spinning, some kind of invisible barrier separates you from the outside world. In the midst of the sudden tranquility, a blurred yet unmistakable image gradually becomes clear...

C: 哎呀呀～我刚好像说了些不该说的话…就麻烦你当做没听见吧，谢啦！
E: Oops, I might have said a bit too much. Can we pretend we never had this conversation? Hehe, thanks!

C: 算到你要来了。又是来问本座问题的吧？
E: I already foresaw your visit. You have questions for me again, right?

C: 我该走了，给我算一卦吧。
E: Please do a divination for me before I go.

C: …其实我要抱怨的只有一件事，就是，最近太卜大人开始过于关注我了。
E: ...There's only one thing I'm upset about, and that is the excessive attention I've had from the master diviner lately.

C: 小神医最近很忙吗？
E: Have you been busy lately?

C: 别担心，我能保护好自己。
E: Don't worry. I can take care of myself.

C: 十王敕命，幽囚狱重建事宜，须由可靠之判官亲自督办。故而吾将暂时驻守于幽囚狱，督办相关工作。
E: By the Ten Lords' order, the Shackling Prison's repairs must be personally presided over by a trusted judge. I've thus been temporarily stationed here to supervise the repairs.

C: 虽说镇妖塔、造化洪炉之类捕获装置能够收容岁阳，但它最主要的目的是防止岁阳与人类的情感和欲望接触。
E: Although capture devices such as the suppression towers and the Creation Furnace can hold heliobi, the main goal is to prevent them from ever coming into contact with human emotions and desires.

C: 在你反应过来之前，你已经身处黑暗之中。
E: Before you can react, you find yourself surrounded by darkness.

C: 十王司针对不同的星界生物准备了一系列有针对的标准流程，效果不同的驱魔道具…这也是十王司比地衡司、云骑军更擅长处理岁阳灾害的原因。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission has prepared a series of targeted protocols and exorcism tools with different effects for different astral beings... This is also why the Ten-Lords Commission is more skilled at dealing with heliobus disasters than the Realm-Keeping Commission or the Cloud Knights.

C: 没有吧…我只是喜欢发发牢骚罢了。
E: I don't think so... I just like to grumble.

C: 这样说来，可能以前的绥园也没有我记忆中那么好…只是过去的好时光给它蒙上了一层滤镜罢了。
E: Come to think of it, Fyxestroll Garden might not be as good as I remembered... Perhaps it was my own rose-tinted glasses that filtered away its eeriness.

C: 我是站岗的啊！不然呢！…呃，具体来说，我是十王司的武弁。
E: I'm a guard, of course! ...Uh, specifically, I'm a warden in the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 至于我是哪一种出身嘛…就随你想象咯。
E: As for which category I belong... That's up to your imagination.

C: 我现在就去问问景元老兄。
E: I'll just go ask my bro Jing Yuan about this.

C: 抱歉！原来您是景元将军的朋友啊！误会了呀！我不让您试成衣，那都是因为店内只有普通货色，实在是配不上你这张{F#俏脸}{M#俊脸}，不看也罢！
E: Ooh, please forgive me! You're a friend of General Jing Yuan's! This is all a misunderstanding! I wouldn't let you try ready-made clothes because they're all run-of-the-mill fashion lines. How could they be a match for someone who looks as {F#gorgeous}{M#dashing} as you! Away with them, I say!

C: 您看您方便的话，留个地址和时间，我帮你预约一下呗？放心，已经给你安排了「特快通道」，怎么样，您还有什么别的需求吗？
E: If it would please you, how about you leave an address and time, and I shall make an appointment? Don't worry. I've already arranged for express passage for you. How about it? Is there anything else you need?

C: 我这里换个说法：仙舟的玉兆就相当于化外民用的计算机，这样就能理解吗？亲不理解也没有关系，我再给亲亲介绍一下。
E: Let me put it this way: Xianzhou's jade abacus is basically an Outworlders' computer terminal. Can you understand it that way? It's okay if you don't understand. I'll give you another rundown, sweetheart.

C: 这款「瑞兆<unbreak>15</unbreak>」采用的就是今年才推出的最新配色：羊脂白。整体材质触感细腻，油脂感比较强。「羊脂白」就是让周围人知道你买了全新玉兆的最佳途径。
E: This model, the Auspicious XV, uses the latest color scheme of mutton suet white and is smooth and creamy to the touch. Mutton suet white is the best way to show people that you're the owner of a brand-new jade abacus.

C: 那为什么不反过来…
E: Why not sell the other way round then...

C: 「但是没有讨教到『无罅飞光』，我还不能从这擂台上撤下，哪位好汉是『无罅飞光』，快来让本大爷长长见识。」
E: "But I can't leave this ring without having learned a thing or two from the Transcendent Flash. Who among you is the Transcendent Flash? Hurry up and let yours truly witness your strength."

C: 没错。
E: I thought so.

C: 思前想后，最后我还是决定豁出去了。要是连相信自己的老百姓都保护不了，那「仙人」还不如留在罗浮做个缩头乌龟好了。所以我……
E: I thought long and hard before I decided to give it my all. If I, as a celestial, couldn't even protect the villagers who put all their faith in me, I might as well have stayed behind on the Luofu as a coward. So I...

C: 啊对，这事儿我们俩还没来得及好好谢谢您呢。
E: Ah, yes. We haven't thanked you properly for that.

C: 「要尊重当地人的风俗规矩，否则后果自负」每次出差前，公司同事都这么叮嘱我，出门在外，你也小心些吧！
E: Before every business trip, my colleagues always remind me to respect the local customs, or be ready to bear the consequences. You should be careful with your actions when travelling, too!

C: 好呀，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}有什么想聊的话题吗？
E: Sure! {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, what do you wish to talk about?

C: 据说在咱出生前很久，有一年，天空里最北边的星星的位置突然亮了起来，据说当时照的夜空像白昼。
E: Legends say that long before I was born, the northernmost star in the sky suddenly shone so brightly that it turned night into day.

C: 怪事，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，底下有洞的船还能开吗？不管这些啦，总之冬生就钻了进去。结果一觉醒来，就被带到了仙宫！
E: It's weird — {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, how can a ship still sail with a hole in it? Anyway, I climbed in and fell asleep. The next thing I knew, I was here at the Celestial Hall!

C: 周大善人到处寻医问药，但是都没有人能治好他儿子。最后他听说了神仙姐姐的事迹，就求到了咱们村子里。
E: Kind Zhou asked everywhere for help, but no one could cure his son. Then he heard about what the celestial lady could do, and he made his way to our village.

C: 您一定也能发现了，城市越发达、生活越便捷，就越是依赖货运系统的支撑。如今的仙舟可根本承受不起物流系统停摆，咱的责任也更重了。
E: You must also find that the more developed and convenient a city becomes, the more its citizens come to rely on logistical support. Today, Xianzhou can't afford to pause onboard logistics, and our burden is even heavier.

C: 今天找我有什么事吗？尽量长话短说哦，我现在还是有点忙的。
E: What can I do for you today? And make it snappy, please — I'm kinda busy today.

C: 结果后来那位老板被地衡司带走了，也没有给我把工资结了，还蛮亏的。
E: In the end, that business owner was taken away by the Realm-Keeping Commission, and I didn't get paid. All that work down the drain.

C: 别说的你好像不感兴趣一样。
E: You say it like you were not interested in immortality at all.

C: 即使我千不信万不信，也不能任由驭空大人陷在这件事当中。
E: Even though I don't believe it, I won't have Madam Yukong getting too deeply involved in the matter alone.

C: 气死了，这天舶司上层的人成天说谜语，负责接待的人成天说绕口令。
E: What a circus. The higher-ups of the Sky-Faring Commission speak in riddles, and the receptionist prattles out tongue twisters.

C: 仙舟不就是狐人之都吗？
E: Isn't Xianzhou the capital of the foxians?

C: 样样都有，样样都全。
E: Everything. We've got whatever you need.

C: …啊，你可别吐出来了。
E: ...Ah, hold it in.

C: 响亮但不够文雅。
E: It's loud, but not elegant enough.

C: 现在情况如何？
E: How are things going at the moment?

C: 地衡司公廨又该怎么走…
E: How to get to the Realm-Keeping Commission Chancery...

C: 一个繁荣的矿业星球…
E: A thriving mining planet...

C: 这您可冤枉我了，您上网看看，咱要饭的过程都是全程录制，保证合法合规。
E: Oh come on, just go on the net. We beggars have to record our entire process, we're absolutely legal.

C: 如此不择手段的攻击，啧啧称奇！如此毫无限制的打斗，厉害异常！如此新型独特的器械，令人叹服！宁当疯狗，不当懦夫，希望你也能掌握无限制格斗术！
E: Such underhanded attacks, truly astounding! Such unbridled brawling technique, extraordinarily formidable! And what unique, cutting-edge equipment you possess! Resignedly impressive! One would rather be a rabid hound than a coward, I hope you, too, will master the art of the Lawless Brawler!

C: 打算深入了解一下。
E: Decide to gain a more in-depth understanding.

C: 别担心，我禁止法制观念浅薄者学习。
E: Don't worry, I forbid those who have a pale understanding of the law from learning.

C: 离开镇妖塔。
E: Leave the suppression tower.

C: 爬就爬，我最会爬了。
E: I'm the best climber there is!

C: 没有…哎……
E: No...

C: 我打算待会去码头整点油炸土豆条。
E: I'm gonna go get some fried potato sticks at the docks.

C: 你确定不去？这家「尚滋味」口碑挺好的呀，我想去试试它家的新品诶……
E: Are you sure you don't want to go? Spices Supreme has great reviews, and I want to try their new dish...

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 嘟嘟！
E: Doot-doot!

C: 你还是见识短浅了。猜猜看，如今悬锋之王迈德漠斯下厨时，用的是什么刀具？
E: You're still quite narrow-minded. Care to guess what kind of knife the King of Kremnos, Mydeimos, uses when he cooks these days?

C: …吾无话可说。
E: ...I'm speechless.

C: 至于「那刻夏」，它看上去仅仅是一个称呼，实际上它是一次「认知」调整。
E: As for "Anaxa," while it appears to be just a name, it is in fact an adjustment of "Cognition."

C: 也许，奥赫玛的领袖更加需要能够饱览万物的金丝；而一位普通的织者，却只需要一双明媚的眼眸。
E: Perhaps the leader of Okhema needs golden threads that can see all things, while an ordinary weaver only needs a pair of bright eyes.

C: 哎呀你刚才还信誓旦旦的，怎么这时候笨嘴拙舌起来了？灰子，你也替我说两句！
E: Hey, you promised so confidently just now, why are you suddenly tongue-tied? Gray Mystery, help me out here!

C: 因为有很多的*我们*，所以*我们*三个已经等了好久好久。
E: Because there are so many of us, the three of us have been waiting for a very long time.

C: 呀~是小灰！
E: Ah~! It's Little Gray!

C: 我准许你将这个头衔带去星海，此种特权在其他星球享有同等效力。
E: I hereby grant you permission to carry this title across the stars. This privilege holds equal authority on all other planets.

C: 若有人问起，就说这是由翁法罗斯的凯撒颁赐的——呵，要开具证明的话，就让他们亲自来谒见我吧。
E: If anyone asks, tell them it was bestowed by the Imperator of Amphoreus. Heh, and if they want proof, let them come and seek an audience with me themselves.

C: 辛苦你守望了昨日。
E: Thanks for keeping watch over yesterday.

C: …唔…痛、痛快！法吉娜的窖藏，果然名不虚传！
E: Mmm... W—Wow! That really hit the spot! Phagousa's collection really lives up to its reputation!

C: 没关系。宴席结束之后，我们也将奔赴新的宴席，不是么？
E: Don't worry. After this feast ends, we'll be off to another one, won't we?

C: 但是现在，一切都不一样了。
E: But now, everything is different.

C: 倘若有一天它能孵化，从中诞生的新生命，或许是翁法罗斯第一个真正步入银河的生命吧？
E: If it hatches one day, perhaps the new life born from within will be the first Amphorean life to truly step into the cosmos?

C: 小灰鱼，你也要来一杯吗？
E: Little Gray Fry, care for a cup as well?

C: 你还阳假攒了多少天？
E: How many days of reanimation leave have you earned?

C: 我是来向你学习的，也许你有能帮到我的地方。
E: I'm here to learn from you. Perhaps there's something you can help me with.

C: 坏了，是不是这几十年一直背错了？
E: Oh no, could it be that I've recited the wrong phrase for several decades?

C: 不少武术是用动物命名…
E: Many martial arts are named after animals...

C: 三回合就结束了。
E: The match ended in three moves.

C: 这个不能。
E: Unfortunately no.

C: 那你看，主办里咱有人。
E: Look, I know someone in the organizing committee.

C: …右眼会用来忘记那些刑满释放的凡人。
E: ...while the right eye is used to forget the mortals who have completed their sentences.

C: 星历<unbreak>7801</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7801</unbreak>

C: 猿猴大盗。
E: The great ape thief.

C: 被随意码放的快递箱，很可能是某人冲动的代价。
E: The randomly placed courier package is likely to be the result of someone's impulsiveness.

C: 一只被遗弃的快递包装盒可怜巴巴地躺在你面前。在完成了它存护货物的使命后，安然吐出了腹中最后一口气。哦对了，它还有遗言：「小心、轻放」。
E: There is an abandoned courier package lying forlornly in front of you. It breathes its last after completing the mission of storing the goods. By the way, these are its last words: "Handle with care."

C: *仙舟粗口*！退钱！
E: *Xianzhou profanity* I need a refund!

C: 不讲武德，我还在蓄力！
E: Where's your martial sportsmanship? I'm still charging up!

C: 人家毕竟叫「铁臂」嘛！
E: After all, he's not called "Strongarm" for nothing!

C: 要不要一起去看比赛？
E: Do you want to watch the match together?

C: 卢卡选手我们爱你！
E: Luka, we love you!

C: 「二手旧货，精明生活的选择。」
E: "Pre-loved goods are the savvy choice."

C: 收纳齐整的展阅，还是不要乱动为好。
E: It's best not to touch the neat array of flexible displays.

C: 你信手抽出了其中一枚卷轴。展开时，一个丝绢质感的合成声音自你脑内成形。
E: You pull out a random scroll. When you open it, a synthetic voice as smooth as silk forms in your mind.

C: 「视肉，原质目 • 原虫科 • 胶状原虫亚种。世外妖魔族类的一支。」
E: "Viscorpus: Eukaryote, protozoan, colloidal protozoan subspecies. They are one of the races of the Extraneous Demons."

C: 「关于视肉的最早记录上可追溯至仙舟漂泊的『孤航时代』。岱舆与圆峤两座仙舟均曾受视肉侵蚀，人口锐减。」
E: "The earliest record of viscorpi can be traced back to the Lone Voyage Era when Xianzhou was wandering around. The population of the Daiyu and the Yuanqiao once declined drastically due to the corrosion of viscorpi."

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 学会」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Intelligentsia Guild."

C: 这一列案牍库的铭牌上标注着「盟助 • 游侠」。
E: The plate on this file repository is labeled "Ally — Rangers."

C: 「太古之时，仙舟曾是众多求药使团一员。万方有疾，病同己身。我等深知老病死三苦之酷烈，也在获取长生后深感把握『治愈』界限之艰难。」
E: "In ancient times, Xianzhou used to be one of the many members of the Elixir Seekers. We could feel the pain of the people suffering from diseases, so we understood the misery of old age, illness, and death. After attaining longevity, we realized the difficulty of setting the boundaries of healing."

C: 一只被塞得满满当当的快递盒，光从盒子被撑圆的纸盖，你就猜出里面装了不少东西。
E: This courier package is stuffed to the brim. Judging from the bulging of the box, you surmise there must be lots of things inside.

C: 首先是成打的玩具模型。这些人像造型各异，唯一的共同点是从未被拆封把玩；包装盒被细细裹上了保护膜，以及穿得比较清凉。
E: First of all, there're dozens of toy figurines. Each has a different shape, and the only thing they share is that they're all unopened and in pristine condition. A protective film covers the whole of this section, and they're dressed pretty skimpily.

C: 再往下…没了。只有一封信，信上写着一行令人心碎的字眼：
E: And even further down... Nothing. Just a letter that opens with a heartbreaking line:

C: 「但我无法接受你们写死静流这个角色。这是送给各位的蛋糕和礼物，聊表心意。」
E: "But I simply cannot accept that you've killed off the character Jimlieu. Here is a cake and a gift for everyone, to show how I feel."

C: 大概是某个可怜鬼在出差中途被辞退了吧，你不需要在意这个。
E: Some poor guy might have been fired during a business trip. It's not something you should be concerned about.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
