E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 是不是快到时间了？
E: Is it almost time?

C: 这失落的第三张字条并非关于爱的心碎控诉，而是…一张谛听保修卡。抱歉，让你失望了。同功坊能修好谛听，但永远修不好破裂的关系。
E: This lost third note is actually not another list of heart-broken accusations. It is... a Diting warranty card. Sorry, I know you're disappointed. Artistry Hardware can repair a Diting, but we will never be able to repair a broken relationship.

C: 带我们回家吧…
E: Bring us home...

C: 你听到巨大的敲击声，叮叮咚咚、断断续续，似乎暗藏着某种节律；
E: You hear a thunderous, percussive sound from behind the door. Stopping and starting, there seems to be some kind of hidden rhythm;

C: 这台电梯通往酒店数之不尽的其他楼层，不过现在你并不想去。
E: This elevator goes to the endless other floors of the hotel, but you have no desire to leave right now.

C: 或许你需要满足一些条件才能使用这座电话亭，比如装一条机械臂、纹个纹身、或者养几只宠物什么的。
E: Maybe you need to fulfill certain criteria to use this phone booth. Try installing a robotic arm, getting a tattoo, or raising a few pets.

C: 架子上摆着许多书本，内容大部分是天马行空的童话。
E: Many books are on display on the shelf, in which most of them are written fantastical fairy tales.

C: 一扇紧锁的房门，门后传来浓郁的香气，不知是来自花朵还是高档香水…或许你需要某些凭证才能将它打开。
E: A thick and heady fragrance drifts from the space behind the firmly locked door. You wonder whether it is the scent of flowers or a premium perfume... Perhaps, you need some sort of permit to unlock the door.

C: 一般而言，这种水塔里既不会有泡发的尸体，也不存在美人鱼。
E: Usually speaking, such water towers won't have corpses soaked in them, nor will they house mermaids.

C: 这确实是个不容易发现的地方。向你介绍这里的人一定非常珍视你们的关系、才会把这幅美景与你分享。
E: It's not an easy place to find. The person who introduced it to you truly values your friendship by sharing this view.

C: 殊不知，他们只需学会「观察」就能在梦中拥有自己所想的一切。
E: Little do they know, they can have everything they want here just by learning to "observe."

C: 宇宙间的智慧生命存在一个共性——他们或多或少都会被个人情绪所左右。在梦中，本就举足轻重的情绪会被放大、搅乱，随时可能淹没脆弱飘摇的「本我」。
E: All sentient beings in the universe have one thing in common — they are more or less at the mercy of their emotions. These emotions, which are already influential, are amplified and disrupted in dreams to the extent that they can easily overwhelm the vulnerable and wavering "id."

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，寒冽的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his cold gaze piercing through your face.

C: 可以，你想聊什么？
E: Sure. What do you want to talk about?

C: 就先聊到这吧。
E: Let's end it here for now.

C: …这句是个玩笑，你别紧张啊。不过说真的，你有空能多来和我聊聊天吗？
E: ...Don't take it so seriously. I'm just kidding. In all seriousness, would you mind coming by often to chat with me when you're free?

C: …别走呀！要是对理财没信心，我还有保险套餐可以推荐！再给我两分钟就好！
E: ...No, wait! If you have no confidence in our financial policies, I still have an insurance package to recommend! Please give me another two minutes!

C: 啊，您是想问产品收益会以什么形式发放吧？别担心，我们的交易全程由家族担保，利润结算可以按您指定的任意方式进行。
E: Ah, you wish to ask about how the proceeds are going to be distributed to you? Don't worry. Our entire transaction process is guaranteed by The Family. You can choose how you want to receive the interest earned.

C: 我们执着于为客户创造可能。苜蓿草银行——您最好的理财伙伴。
E: We are dedicated to the creation of possibility for our clients. Alfalfa Bank — your most trusted financial partner.

C: 我就像是美梦剧团里拿肚子敲鼓的茶壶，烧头发照明的蜡烛，用愚蠢的行为逗人发笑，从掌声里博得可怜的存在感，还沾沾自喜以为得到了认同。
E: I am like that teapot in the Sweet Dreams Troupe that plays its own belly like a drum, and the candle that burns its own hair to light the room, employing silly antics to make people laugh, garnering meager ounces of worth from their applause, yet still revels in it as recognition.

C: 我、我…不是废物！
E: I, I... am not worthless!

C: …依我的观察，您不是本地人，也不像抱着发财愿望前来的逐梦客；既没有沉陷在香甜的夜色中，也对向上爬不感兴趣。您有自己的想法。
E: ...From my observations, you aren't local, and don't resemble any of those Dreamchasers who harbor fantasies of fortune. You're not caught in the sights of night, and have no interest in climbing the social ladder — you've got other plans.

C: 我觉得我是。
E: I feel like I am.

C: 咕呜…咕？
E: Groohoo... Groo?

C: 趁它还没有想到新的恶作剧方法时，赶紧溜走吧。
E: Sneak off before it comes up with a new way to prank you.

C: 拨通了某个你很熟悉的号码。
E: It dials through to the number of someone you know very well.

C: 看起来你别无选择。
E: It looks like you don't have any choice.

C: 汪！汪汪汪……
E: Woof! Woof ruff ruff...

C: 咳咳…内部消息，不要跟其他人说。
E: Ahem... I mustn't divulge internal matters to outsiders.

C: 听什么？
E: To what?

C: 这瓶子质量不行。
E: The quality of this glass bottle needs to be improved.

C: 垃圾桶。
E: A trashcan.

C: 回想起来，我在匹诺康尼…已经待了很久啊。
E: Come to think of it, I have been in Penacony... for quite a long time.

C: 有些话想和你聊聊。
E: I need to have a chat with you.

C: 唉，大恩难报啊……
E: *sigh* How can I ever repay their kindness...?

C: 再见。
E: Thank you.

C: 但在与命中注定的她相遇后，我才明白那些信誓旦旦的广告词到底有多虚伪！
E: But, after I met my true love, I suddenly realized how much of a sham all of the promises these advertisements make are!

C: 什么蜜月，什么忠诚，什么真挚不渝！假的广告，假的爱情！
E: So much for "honeymoons," "loyalty," and "true love"! It's all false advertising! Fake love!

C: 真希望能与这位伟大的同僚亲自见上一面。
E: I truly wish that I could meet this great fellow craftsman in person.

C: 一位优雅绅士不紧不慢地开口。
E: A sophisticated gentleman spoke nonchalantly.

C: 过马路的时候请小心。虽然在梦中受伤并不会导致肉体死亡，但被车撞的疼感可是相当拟真的……
E: Be careful when you cross the road. Your body won't die if you get wounded in a dream, but the pain from a car crash still hurts like the real thing...

C: 就算真有什么值得说道的…我始终没被财势迷了眼，这应该能算得上一种好品质？
E: Even if I did have something tangible to say... I didn't get blinded by the allure of untold wealth, so I guess it was ethical on my part?

C: 感觉够呛。
E: That's deep.

C: 不再多逛逛嘛，我觉着呀，您和这些豪车就是绝配！都散发着苜蓿币的香味！
E: Don't you want to take a closer look? Personally, I feel our luxury cars and you are a match made in heaven! It radiates with the fragrance of Alfalfa credits!

C: 这样一款马桶的设计者，估计脑子里从来都没想过「艺术性」这三个字，但这款马桶，毫无疑问是真正的艺术品。它在美学意义上绝对是完美的！
E: I imagine that the designer of such a toilet would never have the word "artistic" cross their mind, yet this toilet would without a doubt be a work of art. In terms of aesthetics, it is undoubtedly perfect!

C: 如果是这样的话，就请您不要妨碍我执行公务。以及……
E: If that is the case, then I would ask you not to interfere with my professional duties. What's more...

C: 好的。作为家族的贵客，您当前的房间位于「红心十二区」<unbreak>666</unbreak>号白金套房内。
E: Certainly. Since you are a valued guest of The Family, your room is Platinum Suite <unbreak>666</unbreak>, located in Zone <unbreak>12</unbreak> of the Red Heart.

C: 在梦中，您可使用您的「梦境护照」账户直接进行线上交易，十分便捷。
E: While in Dreamscape, you can conveniently use your Dreamscape Pass for online transactions.

C: 安静地继续欣赏。
E: Immerse yourself in the melody.

C: 悄然离开。
E: Leave in silence.

C: 但如果您刚从梦中醒来，请牢记——此处为现实。
E: However, upon waking up from a dream, please remember that you are back in reality.

C: 再见。
E: Thank you.

C: 什么？！竟然真有人不知道机动球！你到底是从哪个没通网的偏远星系来的……
E: What!? You don't know what Roboball is? Which peripheral planetary system did you come from...?

C: 动力炮椅？
E: A Kinetic Propulsion Chair?

C: 可惜那次我绑的炮管数量不够多，只飞到云端就落下来了。
E: Well, in my case, I didn't attach enough cannons that time, so I only made it up to the clouds before falling back down.

C: 绒球吗？虽然不知道你在想什么，但要摸就摸好了。
E: Fluff ball? I'm not sure what you have in mind, but go ahead and touch it if you really want to.

C: …停！请您打住，停在这里就刚刚好！
E: ...Stop! Please just stop right there!

C: 从听筒中爆发出震耳欲聋的欢呼声。银狼站在舞台中央享受着这一切，喊出了她的决胜台词——
E: You heard thunderous cheers from the receiver. Silver Wolf, standing at the center of the stage and reveling in the moment, shouts her victorious line...

C: 这下听懂了。
E: Now you understand.

C: 叮铃铃——感谢您使用窥梦电话服务！欢迎您下次再来！
E: *ring* Thank you for using the Dreampeek Call service! Please come back next time!

C: 「苏乐达——欢乐的源泉、美梦的精华！」
E: "SoulGlad — the source of joy, the quintessence of dreams!"

C: 金黄色的饮料如火山般喷发——苏乐达似乎非常喜欢这个宣传设计，就连它们的工厂也是这幅造型。
E: The golden drink erupts like a volcano. SoulGlad seems to love this advertising design, and even their factory is designed this way.

C: 快走吧，我要等不及了！
E: Let's go, I can't wait any longer!

C: 送我去「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」。
E: Bring me to The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.

C: 你和这只蓝色的小鸟面面相觑。它似乎没有要开口的意思。
E: You come face-to-face with a blue bird, but it does not look like it's going to speak anytime soon.

C: 几秒钟后，帕姆的心情似乎平复了下来，神态也恢复了正常。
E: Pom-Pom manages to pull themselves together several seconds later.

C: 但他们都这么说！
E: But that's what they all say!

C: 真是可笑——明明从选择付诸暴力的那时起，他就已经先背弃了美梦。
E: What a joke. He was the one who forsook the dream first the moment he chose violence.

C: 因为我想和钟表小子一起工作？还记得我小时候每天最期待的事，就是提前坐在客厅的沙发上，等着准时收看钟表小子动画。
E: Because I wanted to work with Clockie? I still remember when I was younger, the thing I most looked forward to every day was to sit myself in front of the living room sofa and wait for Clockie's cartoon to air.

C: 说什么「只要努力就会有回报」…哈，这种鬼话也就傻子才会相信！
E: All that talk about how "hard work begets rewards"... Ha, only a fool would believe such lies!

C: 总的来说，现在的我对他们而言还有些价值…而且为艺人洗白、重新造势这种事情，他们向来擅长得很，根本花不了多大成本。
E: Anyway, I'm still of some value to them in my current state... They've always been excellent at resetting an artist's career and creating some new hype for them anyway. It doesn't cost that much to them.

C: 哈、哈啊…是啊…我究竟还要自欺欺人到什么时候呢……
E: Ha... Haha... Yeah... When am I going to stop fooling myself?

C: 至于其它时刻嘛…喜欢自然风光就去「绿洲」、喜欢选秀节目就去「热砂」、想艳遇就去「蓝调」、想购物就去「薄暮」……
E: As for the other Moments... If you like natural scenes, check out the Moment of Oasis. If you like talent shows, then go to Moment of Scorchsand. If you want a romantic affair then go to Blue Hour. If you want to go shopping, then go to Moment of Dusk...

C: 至于吃的…如果是为了打卡的话，肯定得试试钟表披萨和橡木蛋糕卷——虽然那个蛋糕卷嚼着跟啃木头差不多。
E: As for food... If you just want to check out some popular foods, you have to try Clockie Pizza and Oak Cake Rolls... Even if eating those cakes is a bit like chewing on wood...

C: 假如你从出生起就开始喝苏乐达，那这玩意对你而言，不就和白水没什么区别了吗？
E: Imagine you've drunk SoulGlad your whole life since you were born. Then, to you, drinking SoulGlad would be no different to just drinking plain old tap water, wouldn't it?

C: 买零食送兄弟？
E: Do brothers come free with the snacks?

C: 明明平时看着挺机灵一个人，怎么在这种事上半点也不灵光，啧啧。
E: Some of these people are actually very intelligent. But when it comes to things like this, all sense just completely deserts them, tsk tsk.

C: 我真是——受、够、了！！！
E: I'VE HAD IT!!!

C: 那为什么来到了「美梦小镇」之后，我反而再也快乐不起来了呢……
E: Then why is it that ever since I came to Dreamville, I've lost all my happiness?

C: 离家出走的天环族，和某个年迈的皮皮西富商…在数据层面可以是同一个人！普通人都能看出来的差别，系统指标却分辨不出，实在是太可笑了。
E: A Halovian who ran away from home and an old, wealthy Pepeshi merchant... They could be exactly the same person in terms of data! The fact that system parameters cannot identify differences that any regular person could visually spot is truly laughable.

C: 好嘞，薯条圣代一份，您慢慢吃！
E: Okay, one Potato Fries Sundae, bon appétit!

C: …诶呦，没想到竟能得您厚爱，可真是我的荣幸。不过嘛，我两个哥哥可能不太喜欢别人对我这么做。
E: ...Oh my, I did not expect you to be so kind. This is truly an honor. Although, my two brothers don't really like people treating me this way...

C: 这座雕像似乎被某种巨大的外力推倒在地，但依旧完好无损。
E: This statue seems to have been tipped over by some great force, but it remains undamaged.

C: 这尊雕像象征着坦特里斯，鸢尾花家系的第一位家主。传说他的武艺是六大家系中最顶尖的，却也多愁善感。他与公司员工坠入爱河，而这段恋情最终招来了血腥的内战。
E: This statue symbolizes Tantris, first Family Head of the Iris Family. Legend states that though his martial prowess exceeded that of all of the other Families, he was a kind and gentle man. He fell deeply in love with an IPC employee. This romance eventually led to a bloody civil war.

C: 公馆的共享书架。家族成员们会捐赠出自己的私人藏书，供众人自由翻阅。
E: The pavilion communal bookshelf. Family members will donate books from their own private collections for others to read freely.

C: 怪我！怪我！没及时向您报告。我寻思着酒吧的门常敞开，要是顾客到来却没人招待，那怎么能行！所以就擅自行动了。
E: My bad! My bad! I didn't report back to you earlier. I was thinking about the fact that the lounge door is always open, it's no good if guests arrive and there is no one there to greet them! So, I took action.

C: 抱歉，我又扔偏了。
E: My bad, I missed again.

C: 关于「秩序」。
E: About Order.

C: 他往这边看了——让你久等了，老同学，这是你要的苏乐达。
E: He's looking this way. Sorry to keep you waiting, dear classmate. Here's the SoulGlad you wanted.

C: 稍有疏忽，不忠的种子就会在家族里生根发芽…要撕破他们的伪装，让他们露出丑恶的真面目，可不是个容易活。
E: If we aren't vigilant, the seeds of disloyalty will take root in The Family... Ripping off their disguise and exposing the truth of their wickedness is easier said than done, though.

C: 哎呀，如果不是大剧院需要维修，我恐怕连走进那扇门都做不到。如此华贵的场所，和我完全是两个世界的造物。
E: Well, if it weren't for the fact that the Grand Theater needs renovating, I don't think I could even get through the door. An opulent place like this exists in an entirely different world from me.

C: 你要走了吗，亲爱的？真可惜，我还想多听听你那美妙的嗓音呢。
E: Leaving so soon, darling? What a pity, I was hoping to enjoy your mesmerizing voice a bit longer.

C: 唉，看来你也是没有艺术灵光的腐朽之人——我的意思是工作太无聊了，丝毫没有浪漫的情调！
E: *sigh* It appears that you are also not one touched by the enlightenment of art. I meant that work is so boring, and devoid of any romantic ambience!

C: 朋友们，你们也很开心吧？我们马上就能登上「谐乐大典」的舞台啦！
E: Friends, are you all happy too? We'll soon be center-stage at the Charmony Festival!

C: 皮皮西指挥家看起来有些落寞。
E: The Pepeshi conductor looked a little defeated.

C: 就算你没发现任何变化，你的数据中也已被埋下病毒，以后睡觉别睡太死。
E: Even if you don't notice any changes, your data's already been corrupted with a virus, so don't sleep too soundly in the future.

C: 一阵刺耳的哨声响起，像极了机动球赛场边情绪激动的观众们制造出来的噪音。你被吓得一激灵，四下寻找发出噪声的源头——
E: There's a piercing screech, like the screams of a hyped-up crowd at a Roboball match. You tremble with fear and scour your surroundings for the source of the noise...

C: 教你一招，等会儿开拍的时候，你找准那几个明星的机位，对着它们拼命做鬼脸——到时候你就知道什么叫震耳欲聋的哨声了！
E: I'll teach you a life hack. Once we start shooting, find out which cameras the celebs will be facing, and pull faces at them. You'll soon know the meaning of a loud scream!

C: 试图向他搭话。
E: Try to speak with him.

C: 啧，过上男耕女织的生活就这么难吗？
E: Tsk, is it really this hard to enjoy an old-fashioned, traditional life?

C: 我之所以这么热衷于劳动，是因为我出生在一个农业星球。那里环境不好，必须经常开垦新的田地、精耕细作，不然就会闹饥荒。
E: The only reason I am so passionate about hard labor like this is because I was born on a farming planet. The environment there is poor and new fields must be cultivated constantly and carefully to avoid famine.

C: 梅隆的眉头紧皱成一团，仿佛隆起的田埂。
E: Mellon's brows furrow into a frown, like the raised banks of a cultivated field.

C: 噢不，我只是一位退休的音乐教师。
E: Oh, no. I'm just a retired music teacher.

C: 忆质就像是精神领域的液体，它会流动，蒸发，汇聚，它能溶解、沸腾、凝固。它能够影响意识，塑造幻觉，产生梦境……
E: Memoria is like a fluid on the mental dimension. It will flow, evaporate, and converge. It can dissolve, boil, and solidify. It can influence consciousness, shape illusions, and produce dreams...

C: 流梦礁的调查研究告一段落，是留下继续研究拉扎莉娜的手稿，还是前往别处研究新的话题……
E: The investigation and study of the Dreamflux Reef have come to an end. Should I stay to continue studying Razalina's manuscripts or travel elsewhere to study new topics...?

C: 他们一会儿勾肩搭背，一会儿又因为晚饭吃什么吵起来，经常吵得我写不进东西。
E: At times, they'd wrap their arms around each other's shoulders, only to later bicker over dinner choices. More frequently, I found it impossible to write while assailed by constant commotion.

C: 好了，大概就是这样啦…你还有什么想了解的吗？
E: Well, that's about all there is... Anything else you'd like to know?

C: 哈哈哈，您可真幽默。我们小本经营，顾客都是老居民，要是不诚信早就被大家赶跑啦。
E: Haha, you're a funny one. We're a small owner-operated business and our customers are all long-time locals. If we weren't honest, we would have gotten driven away years ago.

C: 竟然有人在我们的精神食粮里以次充好，甚至想要用忆质食品全面取代现制菜品！
E: There are actually people out there selling counterfeit copies at a mark-up, and even some who want to replace all food with memoria fuel!

C: 算了，既然来了，那领个任务再走吧。
E: Never mind, since you're here, take this mission before leaving.

C: 嗯…有只小鸟总站在在<color=#dbc291ff>电梯附近的路灯上</color>，那里是最佳的观景点——视野开阔，而且没有人打扰。
E: Hmm... There's a bird that's always standing <color=#dbc291ff>near the lamp post by the elevator</color>. That's the best vantage spot for the sights — a panoramic view with no one around to disturb you.

C: （拿出一枚艾迪恩代币）
E: (Take out an Aideen Token)

C: 太好了，可以提前杀青了——记得拿好本鸟的谢礼，慢走不送啾。
E: Excellent, now I can wrap up early. Don't forget to take my gift, and don't let me keep you, tweet.

C: 知道星辰游乐园和安谧禁闭室吗？都是我带着小鸟们一起搭建的啾。
E: Do you know Stardust Amusement Park and the reflection room? It was I who led the birds in building those, tweet.

C: 小鸟冲你露出它水汪汪的大眼睛，仿佛感动得下一刻就会哭出来。
E: The bird directs its watery big eyes at you, as if it'd cry in sheer gratitude.

C: 有时音符小姐也会来表演，给小鸟们传授唱歌的技巧，所以剧场里有很多慕名而来的观众啾。
E: Miss Note sometimes performs here too, where she teaches the birds the art of song. It's also the reason the theater's always packed with audiences from afar, tweet.

C: 那是个落后、粗犷的星球，却蕴含无限生机，却能包容一切自由，人人心怀浪漫的渴望——就像流梦礁一样。
E: But on that primitive, savage planet, bountiful life prevails, and it is inclusive of all freedoms, where everyone's hearts brim with romantic desire— just like Dreamflux Reef.

C: 我曾于矫揉的幸福里寻觅幸福，在虚假的自由中探求自由\n却只见金纸压垮了黄金的脊梁，见声色泥泞了谐声的鸣奏
E: I once sought happiness in arranged happiness, freedom in false freedom.\nYet only saw gold spines crushed by gold paper, sounds that sullied the melodies of harmony.

C: 赔偿？不让他们赔偿公司的损失已经够人道了！不过作为苜蓿草旗下品牌，我们当然也有「同谐」的人情味——
E: Severance? Not making them pay for the company's losses is generous enough! But seeing as we need to be on-brand with the Alfalfa Family, we must also express compassion that's aligned with the Harmony...

C: 集团的法务部都是干什么吃的，竟然连这么简单的案件都打不赢！回去之后，我一定要好好地优化他们！
E: Is the Enterprise's Justice Department incompetent? They can't even win such a simple case! When I return, I'm definitely going to take my time optimizing them!

C: 你怎么来流梦礁的？
E: How did you come to the Dreamflux Reef?

C: 天呐！您的话语比我的金属外壳还冰冷，他们怎能不痛苦呢？
E: Heavens! Your words are colder than my metal chassis. How could they not be suffering?

C: …您可真美。
E: You're so... gorgeous.

C: 也不是不行。
E: I'm fine with that.

C: 而那层泡沫般的光影之下，更深处根本空无一物……
E: However, beneath that bubbly shadow, there is only emptiness...

C: 我看见他们的头颅绽放，猩红玫瑰花瓣在星光与灯光间如此娇艳欲滴……
E: I saw roses bloom from their heads, the petals vivid shades of crimson amid the glow of starlight...

C: 倘若您此刻不忙，不妨一起来放松片刻。
E: If you're not busy, perhaps you'd like to relax with me for a brief moment?

C: 我爱我的弟弟和妹妹——虽然我们的血脉不尽相同——他们也同样爱我…我们彼此信赖、相互帮扶，但我们之间永远有所隔阂……
E: Even though we are not related by blood, I love my siblings, and they love me too. We trust each other and help one another out wherever we can, but there will always be a gap between us...

C: 还真是很有地域特色的选择啊，那么——
E: A regional selection, I see. In that case...

C: 我可明白得很啊…但要想在烹饪上推陈出新，我这才是最保守的法子吧？
E: Oh, but I do get it. To innovate in the culinary arts, my method is the most conservative way.

C: 显然，尽管没有付诸行动，但你的气势已经足以使人开始警惕。
E: Despite the lack of activity right now, your presence is apparently enough to put her on alert.

C: 或许，相比他们，我们并没有懂得更多？
E: Maybe we don't actually know more than they do?

C: 嗯…这确实是美食，可惜这种甲虫已经绝迹了。
E: Hmm, that does sound tasty. It's unfortunate that this beetle is now extinct.

C: 怎么突然给人发好人卡…
E: Are you giving me a medal of good citizenship?

C: 就算发生了像买纪念品被宰、在高科技星球的地铁里晕头转向这种事…但到底也是宝贵的经历。这种值得会心一笑的瞬间，或许就是旅行的意义所在。
E: Even things like being ripped off for souvenirs or getting lost in high-tech planetary subways are valuable experiences. These fun moments may just be the true purpose of traveling.

C: 有时候我在想，要是能回到五年前就好了…回到还在快餐店打工的时候…只要每个月准时发薪，我就会知足……
E: Sometimes, I wish I could go back five years to when I worked in fast food... A regular paycheck was enough happiness for me...

C: 可笑！荒唐！丑陋！居然真有人以为自己生来就是高贵的大人物…抱着他们那一套愚蠢的身世论入土去吧！
E: It's just stupid, absurd even! I can't believe some folks actually think they're born above everyone else! That silly idea of being superior by birth should just be laid to rest with them!

C: 对于这次「出差」，虽然我不能跟你透露工作细节，但我可以告诉你，这是一次相当有趣的经历。只能说，在我看来，未来的匹诺康尼…商机无限！
E: I may not be able to share details of my work trip this time, but I can tell you that it was a rather interesting experience. Let me put it this way, Penacony will soon welcome never-ending business opportunities, at least the way I see it.

C: 比如有位船员过去是在空艇的后厨工作，但总喜欢偷吃。经常被前任船长批评，久而久之，前任船长也有一些冷酷无情之类的负面评价。
E: We used to have a crew member back in the airship's kitchen. He was always sneaking bites of food, something the former captain constantly criticized him for. As time went by, the former captain became associated with negative labels like being cold and unfeeling.

C: 你的记忆怎么了？
E: What's wrong with your memory?

C: 没事，还有母带的吧？
E: That's not a big deal. Wouldn't you still have the master tape?

C: 如果真如我所想…它美好得像一个电影的结局，不是吗——邪恶商人的阴谋被揭穿，正义的伙伴名扬天下，从头开始，幸福又快乐地追逐着梦想……
E: If everything went the way I imagined it, it would have been like the perfect ending of a movie. After all, we had exposed the shenanigans of unscrupulous merchants and under the banner of justice, we could happily chase after our dreams with a clear conscience all over again...

C: 没有钱是万万不能的。
E: But without money, you can't buy anything.

C: 再想想…可问题在于——这世上大多数的苦我都吃不消，哪有深耕派对行业来得轻松啊。
E: Let's keep thinking, but honestly, hard work isn't my style. It's way easier to just focus on partying!

C: 我还是更喜欢另一个版本：这辆球笼搭载了忆质作为动力源，那是过去散溢忆质的残存，被皮皮西人私藏，观众目睹的胜利不过是忆质燃烧时产生的集体梦中梦。
E: There's another version I like even more, though: That my Spheroid is equipped with memoria as a power source. It is a secret stash of remnant memoria that was gathered by the Pepeshi. They say that the victory that the spectators witnessed was nothing more than a dream within a dream created by the combustion of memoria.

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. See ya.

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's all. See ya.

C: 听上去就是个跑龙套的…
E: You just sound like an extra?

C: 没想到前辈们的思路竟如此清奇，老实说我也是才发现，原来广告还有这么多花式植入的方法…要我说，只要段子质量高，广告多点也无妨嘛。
E: I didn't expect our seniors to have such an out-of-the-box idea. Honestly, I've only just realized how many creative ways there are to integrate ads... If the jokes are good, I don't mind having more ads.

C: …「缭乱」不会解散，但她才是我们乐队的核心啊。
E: ...The Dazzling will not disband, but she is the lead of our band.

C: 财富学院还有为难你吗？
E: Is Fortune Academy still giving you a hard time?

C: 嗯。经理想聊天的时候，随时找我就好。
E: Sure. You can look for me any time you wish to chat.

C: 都是我应该做的。
E: I was just doing my job.

C: 关于财富学院代表…
E: About the Fortune Academy representative...

C: 占用学校最多的资源，教学活动的经费也最为充足，结果无论是发表的论文数，还是学生就业率都远远比不上我们筑梦学院。
E: They hog most of the school's resources, and they always have ample teaching event budget. And even then, their number of published papers and student employment rates far pale in comparison to the Dreamweaver Academy's.

C: 别勉强自己。
E: Don't be too hard on yourself.

C: 自私自利的家伙，骗子！利用了我对艺术的追求，还有对艾尔菲的关爱，反复跟我说你们的音乐不符合要求，是要被家族处罚的，所以我就……
E: That selfish, self-aggrandizing liar! He took advantage of my passion for art, my care for Arfey, and was constantly harping on how your music didn't meet requirements and The Family would exact punishment on you. That's why I...

C: 只要补考能过，我就不用退学…但愿这次我能及格。
E: If I can pass this make-up exam, I won't have to quit school... I really hope I can pass this time.

C: 嘿嘿…假以时日，我指不定能和苜宿草家系的大人物打交道，要是能合作，扩大我们的商业版图…接下来…说不定我能成为匹诺康尼有史以来最年轻的首富！
E: Hee-hee... With time, I might be able to work with the big names from the Alfalfa Family. If we can collaborate and expand our business empire... who knows, I might be the youngest richest-person-in-Penacony in history!

C: 嘿嘿，这都是{NICKNAME}同学和乱破同学的功劳。要是没有你们，也不会有机会让芮克先生认可我……
E: Hee-hee, this is all thanks to the efforts of {NICKNAME} and Rappa. Without you both, there wouldn't be a chance for Mr. Reca to recognize me...

C: 我知道您很好奇当时究竟发生了什么，抱歉我无法向您说明原委。恐怕，还是等到您与他见面时，亲自问他比较妥当。
E: I know you are very curious as to what exactly happened. I apologize that I am unable to explain the whole incident to you. It might be better for you to ask him yourself when you meet him.

C: 在那时的人类当中，有一位最伟大的魔法师。他不止能操纵自然万物——他还能操纵一切「命运」。
E: Among the humans of that time, there was one greatest sorcerer. Not only could he control the forces of nature, but he could also manipulate all of "fate."

C: 与列车长的交谈中，我越发了解无名客的历史，丹恒则为我展示了智库中的诸多学识。甚至那位三月七女士，我也从她身上学到……
E: The conductor taught me about the history of the Nameless, Dan Heng showed me the extensive knowledge stored in the data bank, and even from Miss March 7th, I've learned...

C: 你是指在到达目的地后，是否要下车随行吗？当然，我毕竟在进行苦修，更希望能多看看这尘世。
E: You mean, will I disembark when we reach the destination? Absolutely, I want to explore more of the world for the sake of my ascetic journey.

C: 是不是还可以做成珀金、钻石和水晶版的钟表小子？你好像发现了不得了的商机。
E: Say, could we make platinum, diamond, or crystal versions of Clockie? You seem to have discovered a great business opportunity.

C: 你拨弄抽屉的锁扣，有声音在你耳畔响起：「这里没有你要找的金色垃圾。」奇怪，它是怎么知道你心里所想的？
E: You pull at the drawers' locks, and a voice rings in your ears: "There is no golden trash that you seek here." Strange, how does it know what you're thinking?

C: …那个，没什么事的话我先走了啾，啾、啾…那个，请不要再跟我搭话了，我、我不知道该说什么…我、我该回去了，再见啾！
E: ...Then, if there's nothing else, I'll be off, tweet, tweet tweet... Umm, you don't have to keep talking to me... I—I don't know what to say... I—I should be heading back. Goodbye, tweet!

C: 你久久地望着那道创口，仿佛置身于炙热的阳炎照亮树庭的一刹那，似乎还有一声呐喊：「我焚烧一切，只为净化这虚伪的黄金！」
E: You gaze at the wound for what feels like an eternity, as if caught in that moment when scorching sunlight illuminated the Grove. And there was seemingly a bellow: "I shall incinerate everything, all to purify this False Chrysos!"

C: 你这词从电影里学的吧？
E: Did you learn these lines from a movie?

C: 我也要变苏乐达！
E: I want to become SoulGlad, too!

C: 不错，一片欣欣向荣~
E: Good, good, everything is thriving.

C: 这里什么梦都有…
E: You'll find all sorts of dreams here...

C: 那当然啦，虽然我们才认识不到一星期，但你已经是我最好的朋友啦。
E: Of course I won't. Even though we've only known each other for less than a week, you're already my best friend.

C: 哎，这玩意怎么还骂人呐？！
E: Hey, why is this damned machine jinxing me!?

C: 你可真上照。
E: You're so photogenic.

C: 比我旗下的艺人差远了…
E: My artists are so much better...

C: 比赛已经结束，但盛会永不中止。
E: The competition may have been over, but the festivity will never end.

C: 这机器是不是只会出三个一样的？
E: Does this machine only produce three of the same things?

C: 商量什么？用你一年的工资去补人家一个系统时的出场费？
E: What's there to discuss? You want to use your one year's worth of salary to make up for a system hour of their appearance fee?

C: 以上，就是本次盛会海选的全部内容——下面，有请本台的特别评论员，「低热量」老师为大家带来深入分析。
E: And that was all that happened in this Festivity Audition. Next up, we welcome the special judge of our TV station, Professor "Low Calorie," to give us a thorough analysis.

C: 亏我还高价请人抢的票，预支了两个月的假期，这下钱和假都打水漂了。
E: And to think I even asked people to nab tickets at such insane prices and overdrafted a two-month vacation in advance. Guess my money and vacation days are gone with the wind now.

C: 这就是命，你不得不信。
E: That's fate. You have to believe in it.

C: …我看不到啊！
E: ...I can't see anything!

C: 据说会有神秘的当铺…
E: I hear there'll be a mystery pawnshop...

C: …真不打算入股吗？
E: ...You really don't intend to get in on this business?

C: 抱歉，请降低音量……
E: Sorry, please lower your voices...

C: 二位不妨挪步餐厅再聊？
E: How about heading to the restaurant to resume your conversation?

C: 「旁白」字数太多，就会变得「白白旁旁」——与「白白胖胖」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
E: If the narration gets too long, it turns chubby — which then turns flappy and funny.

C: 社团建立得很顺利，但最终，出于各种各样的原因，整个社团只剩下你与另外一名部员。尽管如此，她仍旧对你不离不弃，从未想过离开。
E: The club is formed without trouble, but eventually, due to various reasons, you and one other person are all that's left of the entire club. Even so, she insists on staying with you, never leaving your side.

C: 你期待的社团生活就这样普通地开始了，没有任何玫瑰色，有的只是漫无止境的阅读时光。你们坐在教室里安静看着书，偶尔说几句话，仅此而已。
E: The club life you hoped for starts just like that. No fanfare, no roses, just endless reading time. You two sit in the classroom, reading quietly, occasionally exchanging words, but that's it.

C: …说什么呢！最近学校在抓教学质量，我是来做检查的。这位同学，你被老师拉出来罚站，是不是犯了什么错误啊？
E: What are you talking about? Since the school has been paying more attention to teaching quality as of late, I am here to conduct an inspection. Why have you been sent out of class? What did you do?

C: 明白。寒鸦大人，狱中环境阴暗，路途岐长，请跟在我后方，以防遭遇凶险。
E: Understood. Madam Hanya, it's dark in the jail, and the walk is long. Please follow behind me, in case we run into trouble.

C: 清晰的水花声从另一侧传来，你猜这位追求纯粹思维的教授此刻正泡在浴缸里。
E: The distinct sound of splashing water can be heard from the other side. You're guessing that professor who pursues pure thought is being submerged in the bathtub right now.

C: 哈哈，你现在当然不明白。复仇不用找借口，只有恶徒才需要理由。
E: Haha, of course you don't get it. There ain't no reason needed for vengeance. Only baddies need reasons.

C: 喝——开拓之力，突破！你出关了，银河间将再度响彻球棒侠的传说！
E: Drink — Harness the trailblaze power and ascend! You've emerged, and the legend of Galactic Baseballer will once again echo throughout the cosmos!

C: 陪伴你出生入死的球棒，银河球棒侠最好的伙伴。
E: The baseball bat that accompanies you through thick and thin, the best partner of the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 你轻轻拨动船头，模型在悬浮力场里滴溜溜地打了个转。
E: Gently nudging the bow, the model spins gracefully in the hovering force field.

C: 你的目光扫过收藏架上的藏品，最后停留在「造物引擎模型」上。
E: As you cast your gaze across the collectibles on the display shelf, it lands on the "Engine of Creation model."

C: 这位客人，最后一只黄金裔陶罐刚刚卖出。如果你是为此而来，对不住让你白跑一趟了！
E: The last Chrysos Heir dolium just got snatched up, dear customer. If that's what you came for, I'm sorry for the disappointment!

C: 欸，千万莫认为是瑟希斯的问题，我的喷涌的灵感也由博古通今的「裂分之枝」赐予。
E: Hey, don't blame Cerces. All my overflowing inspirations actually come from the Bough of Rift, which can see into the past and future.

C: 哈哈，没关系，欢迎下次光临。
E: No worries! Looking forward to your next visit.

C: 一刻钟后，一个拼盘被端到你面前。盘中的菜肴分为内外两层：外层半圈是切好的蛋卷、半圈是齐整的肉排；内圈是去皮的苹果块，上面淋着琥珀色的粘稠酱汁。
E: A quint later, a platter is served before you. The dish is presented in two layers: Egg rolls and flank steak bisect the outer edge in half, while peeled apple chunks doused in a rich amber sauce sit in the center.

C: ……口齿不氵青。
E: ...Your words are slurrrring.
[★★★★★] Very satisfied

C: 你走吧，这里已经没有你的事了。
E: Well, take your leave then.

C: {NICKNAME}退化——奥赫玛的双耳陶瓶！
E: {NICKNAME} regresses — an Okhema twin-eared vase!

C: 你挺能打啊！
E: You fought well!

C: 问问世界的前途。
E: Ask about the future of the world.

C: 哦，你想打听这圣城里的事，对吧？照理来说应该推荐你几本书读，不过这年头，传信石版比书可好用多了。来，老身念几段{RUBY_B#公益广告}导善铭文{RUBY_E#}给你听听——
E: Oh, you're interested in this holy city? Books are great for learning about the city, but these days, teleslates make things so much easier. Here, let me read you a bit from the {RUBY_B#public service announcements}goodwill inscriptions{RUBY_E#}.

C: 「热烈的爱恋岂能辜负，真挚的情意安可亏欠——少女抉择不定，惴惴难安。」
E: "How should I respond to their love, so fervent and true? Adonia hesitated, turmoil in her heart anew."

C: 摇了摇仍旧有些发昏的头，你重新回到了公共浴场……
E: Shaking your still-dizzy head, you notice you have returned to the public bath...

C: 申请！想更了解缇宝一些！
E: I would like to know more about you, Tribbie!

C: 不过…就在几天前，我看到他一个人对着墙说话，听到他在小声说「对不起」，虽然不知道是在对谁说，但我突然觉得他可能比我还可怜。
E: Although... A few days ago, I saw him alone speaking to a wall. I heard him quietly say: "I'm sorry." I don't know who he was speaking to, but I suddenly felt like he had suffered even more than I have.

C: 无论如何，谢谢你来看我。在这个世界上，能有人记得我们曾经战斗过，这就足够了……
E: Either way, thank you for coming to see me. Just knowing that there is someone in this world that remembers our past battles is enough for me...

C: 杯身隐约刻着「法吉娜的祝福」的模糊字样。注意到你的异样，西塞罗清了清嗓子，压低了声音。
E: There is a faint engraving on the cup that reads: "Blessing of Phagousa." Noticing your suspicion, Cicero clears his throat and lowers his voice.

C: 不…你不明白…我不是法吉娜的虔诚信徒，在我心里只有艾格勒泰坦的全知全能才能俘获我的灵魂。
E: No... You don't understand... I am not a devout disciple of Phagousa. In my heart, only the omniscience and omnipotence of the Titan Aquila can capture my soul.

C: 什、什么…你是不是偷偷调查过我？！说，谁指使你做的，你究竟想……
E: Wh—What... Have you researched me in secret or something!? Tell me. Who put you up to this? Just what are you...

C: 最纯净的橄榄油，最纯净的草木灰，再加上一点点提振精神的香料——就能搓出来这世上顶好的肥皂。
E: The purest olive oil, the purest wood ash, and a pinch of invigorating spices — that'll give you the best soap there is in the world.

C: 人生或许真的是一个故事，但大部分人可能都不是故事的主角。
E: Life may really all be one big story, but most people aren't the protagonists of their own story.

C: 所有人的生活都是这样——醒来睁开眼睛，思考第一顿饭要吃什么；吃完了第一顿饭稍微做点自己的事，又开始为第二顿饭发愁…直到最后上床睡觉，然后开始新的循环。
E: Everyone's life is the same: Wake up, open your eyes, think about what to have for breakfast, eat that, catch up on personal affairs, then start worrying about what to have for your second meal... All the way up until bedtime, when the cycle starts again.

C: 泪葱就是泪葱啊，奥赫玛种了几千年的调味料…你家炒菜不放葱吗？
E: Tear onions are just tear onions. They're a herb that's been used in Okhema for thousands of years... You don't eat onions where you come from?

C: 我又不小心……
E: I acci—...

C: 你想起侍者说的话——
E: You remember the words of the attendant...

C: 我看见战士们被那黑色的泥潭吞噬，连尸体都没能留下，而后狰狞的怪物从黑水中浮现…等回过神来时，队伍里只剩下我了。
E: I saw soldiers devoured by that quagmire of the black tide. Not even their corpses remained. Then, fearsome monsters emerged from the black waters... When I came to, I was the only surviving member of my squad.

C: 再说了，一昧格挡可不是战士之道，进攻才是最好的防守。如果每次战斗都带上它，我哪还有机会追求荣耀之死？
E: Besides, blocking and parrying isn't a warrior's way. Offense is the best defense. If I had to bring it into every battle, where would I get a chance to pursue a glorious death?

C: 雅努斯的信徒还喜欢一种名叫「轮回棋」的游戏，用扔木棒来走棋。他们说下棋能精进自我、陶冶情操…无聊透顶。
E: Janus' disciples prefer a game called Cyclicality Chess, throwing wooden sticks to move chess pieces. They say that chess can elevate oneself and cultivate one's character... How banal.

C: 更好的武器，威严、冷酷…如同王座，战车。
E: Majestic and cold, a better weapon is... Like a throne, the chariot is.

C: 山之民，喜欢矿石、土壤，不喜欢炸药，不喜欢冷水。
E: Ores and soil, Mountain Dwellers like. Explosives and cold water, Mountain Dwellers hate.

C: 多的很呐！店里摆着些借翻飞之手从遗迹挖出来的老古董。有些还残留有其他泰坦的权能，简直就是宝贝库——虽然多数不知道有什么用，你得碰运气。
E: Plenty! The antiques displayed around the shop were all excavated from ruins by the Whimsy Hand. Some of them even retain vestiges of the other Titans' authority. It's a veritable vault of treasures. Though many of their uses are unknown — you'll have to try your luck.

C: 你真是太厉害了！
E: That's incredible!

C: 或许，需要更多的尝试才能激起你们言语的交互。再试一次吧！
E: Perhaps more attempts are required to initiate a conversation. Give it another go!

C: 无意义的诡辩。你的提问无非是在混淆概念。
E: A meaningless argument. Your line of questioning is conflating different concepts with each other.

C: 一段时间后……
E: Some time later...

C: 类似的事件其实还蛮常发生的，要不怎么说大地兽是人类最好的朋友呢。顺便一提，奇美拉没这个称呼，据说是因为它们的交友标准更高……
E: Things like this happen pretty often. That's why they say dromases are humans' best friends. By the way, chimeras don't get that title. Apparently, their standards for friendship are way higher...

C: 呃…我可不是开玩笑啊，前几天传信石版上有人说，有个外地人在客房里蹲了两星期没出门，把自己活活饿死了……
E: Uh... I'm not joking. Just the other day, someone on the teleslate mentioned an outlander who holed up in a hotel room for two weeks without leaving and starved to death.

C: 或许吧…可你别说，我刚来奥赫玛的时候，因为在黑潮里受了惊吓，也是足足缓了一个星期才敢出门——总是害怕有什么怪物从地里、水里突然就冒出来。
E: Maybe... but honestly, when I first arrived in Okhema, I was so shaken by the black tide that it took me a full week before I even dared to go outside. I kept imagining some creature would suddenly pop out of the ground or water.

C: 「宁战死，毋荣归」——多帅气啊！
E: "Valorous death before glorious return" — how cool is that!

C: 重要的是，他还愿意教我怎么锻炼！用什么来称赞万敌哥哥都不为过！
E: Most importantly, he's willing to teach me how to train! No amount of praise for Brother Mydei is too much!

C: 主要是以小玩意居多…你很好奇，是不是？好，好，我来讲讲。
E: Mostly small trinkets... You're curious, aren't you? Well, well, let me tell you about them.

C: 我知道了，谢谢你。走吧伊菲斯，有什么事我们回去再说。
E: I see. Thank you. Let's go, Ifris. We'll talk later if you need.

C: …「塔拉萨波利斯」，对吧？
E: ...Thalassopolis, right?

C: 是啊，为什么呢？
E: Yes. Why?

C: 流水声不会打扰默想，反倒使思维更加清晰……
E: The sound of flowing water doesn't interrupt quiet contemplation. It actually clears the mind...

C: 讲讲这里的馆藏？
E: Can you tell me about the collection here?

C: 最近，他们甚至怂恿我在这书库四周辟出个角落当做饮食区，提供躺食的餐点…哈哈，虽说这要求其实还算合理，但我这心里总也有块疙瘩。
E: Recently, they've even urged me to set up a corner around this repository as a dining area, offering meals that can be eaten while lying down... Haha, though this request seems reasonable enough, I can't shake the discomfort in my heart.

C: …我原本还想为您再做些更深入的介绍，但忽然想起，即便在奥赫玛，水漫琴也仅剩这一台。多做讲解，也不过是无用的知识罢了。
E: ...I thought to give you a more elaborate introduction, but I suddenly remembered that there is only one such water lyre left, even in Okhema. It's pointless to tell you more about the instrument.

C: 跟你说，前些日子，我的心情不太好，那些奇美拉就不停地围着我转，还主动用头上的角在我腿上蹭来蹭去，逗得我直笑…哈哈，能做这的园丁可太幸福了！
E: Let me tell you, some days ago, I was feeling a bit down. Those chimeras kept hovering around me, and even started rubbing their horns across my leg to cheer me up... Haha, I'm so fortunate to be a Gardener here!

C: …抱歉，我好像把事情越说越难懂了。你愿意稍稍留步，听我略加解释吗？
E: ...Sorry, I'm making it harder to understand. Would you be willing to stay a while and listen to my explanation?

C: 知识应当是自由的，石板上的内容就应该无偿公开，藏私像什么话？哎，我说大家怎么就是不明白呢？
E: Knowledge should be free, and the contents on tablets should be made public without remuneration. Keeping it in a private collection, what nonsense is that? Bah, why can't everyone understand what I'm saying?

C: 你在嚷嚷啥呢？
E: What are you muttering about?

C: 那当然，塔米拉小姐对小女子的恩情，小女子这辈子都不会忘的。
E: Absolutely, I'll always be grateful to Miss Tamila for her kindness.

C: 不过这样也有问题，波月古海毕竟是传播持明族文化的重地，很多正常参观旅游的人也被赶走了。
E: That said, it's created another issue. Lunarescent Depths is a key site for Vidyadhara cultural outreach, and now even regular visitors and tourists are being turned away.

C: 就拿这雅努萨波利斯来说吧，这里是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}用万径之门的神力测算出的大地中心——从这里往任何方向走，抵达世界尽头的距离都是差不多的。
E: Let me take Janusopolis as an example: This is the center of the earth as defined by {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} using the divine power of the Gate of Infinity... If you travel in any direction from here, the distance to the end of the world is almost the same.

C: 妈妈的事啊…那个关于圣女大人是如何拯救她的故事，我听过无数遍了，但是每次听她讲，我都觉得特别温暖。
E: The story of how the Holy Maiden saved my mother... I've heard it countless times, but it still warms my heart every time I hear it.

C: 这我可不能收。
E: I'm afraid I can't accept this.

C: 有同僚嘲笑我的行为，说祭司们有私心，我这样的行为毫无意义。但是…「虔诚的信念，比起对错更为重要。」这是我的家人教我的第一课，我对此无比感激。
E: Some of my peers make fun of me, saying the priests are self-serving and that what I'm doing is pointless. But my family always taught me that "faith is about devotion, not about being right or wrong," and I'm truly grateful for that lesson.

C: 让您见笑了，这是我在脑中模拟了千百遍的情形，路线图我早就规划好了。阁下，事不宜迟！我们……
E: You caught me. This is a scenario I've rehearsed in my mind a thousand times, and I've planned the route in detail. Esteemed one, there's no time to waste! We should...

C: 缇宝、缇宁，以及…缇安。
E: Tribbie, Trinnon, and... Trianne.

C: 我本想重建那疗愈人心的庭院，但或许是我太爱操心，总要给每位来访的朋友解决身体上的问题。因为我希望当他们离开时，从心灵到身体都能焕然一新。
E: I wanted to recreate that heart-healing courtyard, but maybe I'm just too much of a worrywart — I can't help but try to address everyone's physical ailments whenever they visit. I hope that they're renewed both in body and spirit when they leave.

C: 嘿嘿，也有人觉得这样的场景能带来扫去烦躁的清凉感哦。
E: Hehe, and others might say such a scene would give them a cool and refreshing feeling, one to wash away their worries.

C: 那批英雄前辈，以生命铸成伟业，为人们积攒了信心、指引了前路。
E: Those heroic predecessors laid the foundation for greatness with their lives, gave the people confidence, and pointed the way forward.

C: 在我刚来的时候，有个元老，名字我就不方便说了，年事已高，元老院指派了一名活泼开朗的年轻人去照料他的起居。
E: When I first joined, there was a senior senator — I'll skip his name — who was quite elderly. The Council assigned a bright, cheerful young person to look after his daily needs.

C: 很多人瞧不上这个，觉得我不地道——但恕我直言，如果没有我，谁能帮上他们？如果我没有收钱，谁能持续帮助他们？
E: A lot of people look down on this kind of work, calling it unscrupulous. But let me be blunt — without me, who else could help them? And without charging, who could sustain this kind of assistance?

C: 啧…等我改变奥赫玛的行政效率时，你就会知道的。
E: Tch... Well, you'll understand when I've streamlined Okhema's governance.

C: …像我这样的外乡人还挺多的？
E: ...Are there many outworlders like me here?

C: 我离开自己家乡的时间已经太长了，很多关于家乡的印象已经开始模糊，和奥赫玛渐渐重合在了一起…我需要有一处将它们区分开的「地标」——
E: I've been away from my homeland for so long that my memories of it have started to blur, merging with my impressions of Okhema. I need a "landmark" to keep them distinct.

C: 如果说真的有什么故事是我拒绝创作的——那大概只有「无论如何都无法让我获得感动」这一种情形吧。
E: If there's one kind of story I absolutely refuse to write, it's the kind that fails to move me — no matter what I do.

C: 我还记得一些逝者的*墓志铭*，如果你感兴趣的话，我可以告诉你。
E: I still recall some of the deceased's epitaph. I can tell you if you're curious.

C: 这个简单！
E: Easy-peasy!

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: That's all I wanted to ask.

C: 我找齐了这里的所有若虫。
E: I've found all the nymphs here.

C: 他的名字叫狄摩西尼，兴许阁下此前在浴场见过这位瘦削的青年。
E: Demosthenes. You may have seen this thin young man at the baths before.

C: 能和我说说现在的情况吗？
E: Can you tell me about the situation?

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 客人，我知道…您也身手不凡。要是您不介意现在这个状况，不妨去找个池子泡泡，对于平复心情…很有帮助。
E: Guest, I know... you are quite skilled yourself. If you don't mind the current situation, why not find a pool and take a soak? It's quite helpful for calming the mind.

C: 有些怪物闯了进来…和「纷争」那次不同，它们出现得很突然。客人们有些慌乱， 但一道「虹彩色的屏障」把怪物和人们分隔开了。
E: Some monsters broke in... Unlike the "Strife" incident, they appeared very suddenly. The guests panicked a bit, but a "prismatic barrier" separated the monsters from the people.

C: 信徒们冒着生命危险把我救出来，喊着「救救祭司大人」。真是可笑…一个无法换来神明回应的祭司，有什么值得救的？
E: The followers risked their lives to rescue me, shouting "Save the high priest." How absurd... what's the point of saving a priest who can't even get his god to answer?

C: 但愿再创世后，他们真的能够站上奥赫玛小贩业的顶点。到那时候，你也一定要去看看「奥凯纳斯运动会」的盛况啊！
E: I hope that after Era Nova, they truly rise to become the finest merchants in Okhema. When that happens, you absolutely must witness the grandeur of the Okeanas Games!

C: 我，我不能走。有些大家伙们被吓坏了…得有人来照顾它们。
E: I—I can't go. Some of these big fellas are startled... Someone needs to take care of them.

C: 务必小心，贵客。您能平安归来，于我们而言便是最好的消息。
E: Please be careful, honored guest. Your safe return would be the best news for us.

C: 在茫茫天空中寻得艾格勒的眼眸，重新开辟通往天空壁垒的门径……
E: Searching for the eyes of Aquila amidst the vast clouds, reopening the passage to the sky barrier...

C: 风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
E: The winds carried your message along the golden threads. Honored guest, any progress to share?

C: 这是为你准备的奖励，拿着吧，希望我们在新世界还能相遇。
E: Here's a reward prepared just for you. Take it, and may we meet again in the new world.

C: 即使我也不得不承认，你确实是位尽职的英雄。愿你行于坦途之上。
E: Even I must admit, you are indeed a dutiful hero. May your path be smooth.

C: 贵客，我注意到你已经完成了预言的试炼…请代我向地上的其他衣匠们问好。
E: Honored guest, I see you have completed the prophecy's trial... Please send my regards to the other Garmentmakers on the ground.

C: 村长不告诉我们迷！
E: The chief won't tell us, memi!

C: 看到那边的石堆了嘛？是我的杰作嘤~
E: See that stack of stones over there? That's my masterpiece, eep~

C: 你是否好奇，晒不到太阳的树洞里为什么会有关于太阳的壁画呢？
E: Ever wonder why there's a mural of the sun inside a tree hollow where no sunlight reaches?

C: 遗忘远比铭记困难。当前所追踪的若虫正占据着我的思绪，还是优先将其唤回吧。
E: Forgetting is far more challenging than remembering. My mind is consumed with the nymph I'm currently tracking. Let's focus on recalling it first.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me more hints?

C: 没问题！闲逛之余，也做点什么吧。回忆总在不经意间留下，不是吗？
E: Absolutely! And while we're hanging out, let's do something fun. Memories are often made when we least expect them, aren't they?

C: 好呀。人家会一直在这里。{NICKNAME}需要的时候，就来找我吧。
E: That's okay. I'll be waiting right here. Look for me whenever you need me, {NICKNAME}.

C: 对了，这场宴会的许多事宜都是由我这个逐火军参谋负责的，我已应几位伙伴的需求为宴会增设了些项目，倘若阁下有什么需要，也可以找我。
E: Right, a lot of events at this banquet have been organized by me, advisor of the Flame-Chase Army. I already set up a few projects according to the requests of a few people for the banquet. If you have something you want, you can come find me too.

C: 好啊，那我就不打扰阁下了，再会！
E: Alright. I won't bother you anymore, great one. Another time!

C: 你知道真相？
E: You know the truth?

C: 来来来，阁下起个话头，让本狮娓娓道来吧！
E: Come over here, talk to me about anything at all, and we can discuss it with gusto!

C: 据神话所述，在那遥远的黄金世，乃至是灾厄三泰坦降世之前——翁法罗斯也曾纷争遍布，只见那汪洋化作血海，浅滩遍布硝烟吼——
E: According to legends, in the distant Era Chrysea, before the Three Titans of Calamity descended, war was once rife in Amphoreus, oceans were dyed by blood, and the shores were shrouded by ashes from gunfire.

C: 至于另一位主厨…他刀法果断强硬，常常用大火翻炒，看来是听凭手感、信任直觉的豪放型厨师迷。
E: As for the other chef... his knife work is sharp and decisive, and he loves stir-frying over high heat. He seems like the type who cooks with instinct, guided by feel alone. A bold and free-spirited chef, mem.

C: 你的名字好奇怪…
E: Your name is a bit unusual...

C: 加油，不打扰了。
E: Keep it up. I won't bother you any longer.

C: 人们说情爱会使人盲目，而这份黯淡却恰与灿烂的永夜相称。若您愿接受一份典雅的热情，还请…回应我的心意。
E: People say love renders us blind, but this dimness is the perfect ambience that complements the shimmering night sky. If you would accept a passion of elegance, please... respond to my affection.

C: 要我说，当初就该求阿格莱雅女士多设计几件，永恒之城需要她的永恒之美。
E: If you ask me, we should've asked Lady Aglaea to design more pieces when we had the chance. The Eternal City needs her eternal beauty.

C: 这池子里的水，你有试过偷偷喝两口吗？
E: The pool water here... Have you ever tried sneaking a sip of it?

C: {RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}说让我在黎明机器熄灭之后去找它私聊。所谓天机不可泄露……
E: {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} asked that I speak with them privately after the Dawn Device goes out. Such divine secrets cannot be revealed...

C: 无聊。
E: Boring.

C: 新朋友！
E: New friend!

C: 咕咕——
E: Hoot hoot...

C: 咕咕——太好了，孩子们全都乖乖回来了！
E: Hoot hoot... Excellent, all the children have obediently returned!
Hoot...

C: 相信我，只要你前往主城区，你就会明白的。那里有许多如鲜花般绚烂的少女，正期许着我能够支撑起她们心灵的天空。
E: Trust me, you'll understand when you get to the town center. Many beautiful young ladies are expecting me to be the pillar of their souls.

C: 接下来你打算怎么做？
E: What are you going to do?

C: 外面来的家伙…我闻到了阴谋的味道。嘘，不要打扰我思考。
E: Outsiders... I smell a conspiracy. Shh, don't interrupt my train of thought.

C: 更何况，寰宇之间，应该很难有比这里更加安全的地方了吧？
E: Besides, I don't think there's any other place in the universe safer than here.

C: 不过也好，这样我就有更多的时间去追求她，并等待她的回应啦！
E: It's good though. That way I can have more time to pursue her and wait for her response!

C: 没有什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any other questions.

C: 如何评价这次的入侵。
E: How do you evaluate the invasion?

C: 唉…陪我聊聊天就好，安慰我的心，这就是对安提西尼最好的支持！
E: *sigh* Just chat with me for a bit and comfort me... That's the best way to support Antisthenes!

C: 准确地说，我的毕业论文就在神悟树庭的水里。
E: To be precise, my thesis is in the waters of the Grove of Epiphany.

C: 可恶，被天外的力量制裁了喀！
E: Drats, I've been punished by forces from beyond the sky, crrk!

C: 嗯…有位织者醉心于研究电子元件。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>布线复杂的电路板上</color>，赞美这精密的结构呢。
E: Hmm... There's a weaver who is obsessed with electronic components. The golden thread brings tidings: It's perched on <color=#dbc291ff>a tangled circuit board</color>, singing praises of its intricate design.

C: 神识之蝶栖息在原地，无声亦无息。
E: The Butterfly of Divine Mind perches motionlessly, making neither sound nor breath.

C: 海洋、天空与大地。支柱三泰坦的符文刻印在罗盘上方。
E: Ocean, Sky, and Earth. The runes of the Three Titans of Foundation are engraved above the Compass.

C: 克拉特鲁斯、太过谦虚。从未松懈、你多年来。
E: Krateros, too modest, you are. Slack off, you've never done, all these years.

C: 你的手艺谁不夸…咦？你答应啦！太好了，我们这就加紧筹备，在场的可都要来啊！
E: Everyone loves your cooking... Wait, you said yes!? That's great! We'll start preparing now. Everyone here is officially invited!

C: 是啊，想起香喷喷的缤纷沙拉、南瓜甜饼、香汁烤鸡…我就要流口水了哪！
E: Yeah, just thinking about that fragrant Colorful Salad, pumpkin pie, and juicy roast chicken... I'm already drooling!

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「你在说什么？不许奖励它们豹！」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "What are you talking about? Don't you reward them!" )∋

C: 谢谢你，我有信心多了。不然，上台前手心里还捏着一把汗迷！
E: Thanks, I feel more confident now. Otherwise, my palms would've been super sweaty before going on stage, mem!

C: 好啊，我就先按灰子你这一身，设计一套「救世主同款」的天外来客套装！咦，没准我还挺有生意头脑的？
E: Great! I'll model it after your Gray Mystery style and design a "Deliverer-inspired" sky-beyonder outfit! Hey, maybe I've got some business sense after all?

C: 有人还写过普逃馅饼的错别字？
E: Didn't someone misspell "graype pies" before?

C: 当然有啦！
E: Of course!

C: 很可惜，这次恐怕我无法回应你啦。
E: I'm afraid I won't be able to say yes to you this time.

C: 有时，我会梦见自己变成了一颗小小的种子。
E: Sometimes, I dream of becoming a tiny seed.

C: 放心，诸位的关系我自有判断。
E: Don't worry, I can figure out everyone's relationships on my own.

C: 一直以来…辛苦了。
E: Thank you for your hard work all this while.

C: 我觉得大家读得很津津有味啊。
E: I think everyone's really getting into it.

C: 都是阁下眼熟的东西，有书签，抱枕，还有毛毡娃娃。因为赶工制作得有些粗糙，我本来想和参加交流会的大家互相交换。
E: These are all things you're familiar with: bookmarks, cushions, and felt dolls. They're a bit rough around the edges because I made them in a rush, but I was hoping to exchange them with everyone at the meetup.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请你收下这副花冠。
E: Please accept this flower crown, {NICKNAME}.

C: 关于实质…
E: About its nature...

C: 帕姆生气的模样可是非常可怕的…对，非常可怕……
E: Pom-Pom is terrifying when they get angry... Yes, terrifying...

C: 我一度将故乡的敌人与星神混淆，但很快发现两者本质并不相同；反物质军团的一名大君就能燃烧星系，手下的浩劫先锋单枪匹马足以灭星。
E: I once confused the enemy of my home with the Aeons, but I soon discovered the two are different in nature. An Overlord in the Antimatter Legion can incinerate entire star systems, while their Calamity Vanguards are perfectly capable of destroying a planet by themselves.

C: 姬子小姐是什么时候登上列车的？
E: Himeko, when did you first board the Express?

C: 哼，你什么都不懂。
E: Humph, you big grownup dum-dum don't know anything.

C: （「三把兵器便是一座岛屿」…这岛屿可真够随便的。）
E: ("Three weapons make an island"... What a lazy metaphor.)

C: （原来如此，小鼹鼠们就这样找到了德雷克的宝藏。）
E: (I see. So this is how the Mole Team found Drake's treasure.)

C: 在路径前方侦测到敌敌敌敌意反应——
E: Hostile enemy t—t—t—targets detected ahead...

C: 没什么事了。
E: It's nothing.

C: 我有些问题想问…
E: I still have some more questions...

C: 师傅给你准备了报酬，就在那边。这是你应得的。
E: The master has a reward for you. It's over there. You've earned it.

C: 师傅他好像准备了新的谜题。有兴趣的话就去问问他吧。
E: The master has a new puzzle. Go ask him about it if you're interested.

C: 操作控制器、换轨道、前进……
E: Operate the controller, change the track, move forward...

C: 打败石头老板不是一朝一夕就能完成的，必须从长计议才行。
E: Defeating Boss Stone will not happen overnight. We will need a properly devised plan.

C: 滴、答！来吧，把你的礼物和签名板都递上来吧！
E: Tick, tock! Come, shower me with your gifts and boards to autograph!

C: 我绝对不会错过版本活动。
E: I'll never miss a patch update.

C: 哇！真的吗，这么快？请…请问您体验如何？
E: Wow! Really, that fast? So... how was it?

C: 这和短信有什么关系？
E: What's that got to do with text messages?

C: 如何，你能理解现状了吧？
E: What do you think? Do you understand what's going on now?

C: 我想问别的…
E: I want to ask about something else...

C: 反正，如果你想解决问题，就去找艾丝妲；如果你想解决人，那也找艾丝妲。
E: Anyway, if you want to fix a problem, find Asta. If you want to fix a person, find Asta, too.

C: 什、什么？ 你不会指的是这里的事吧……
E: Wh—What? You can't mean what's going on here, can you...

C: 哈哈，那倒不至于。雷比尼他平生最痛恨的就是闭门造车——但凡有机会，他是一定会出门写生的。
E: Haha. Unlikely. He hates doing his work in isolation. If possible, he will definitely paint outdoors.

C: 我拿到油画《晨曦》了。
E: I've got Ray of Dawn.

C: <size=36>这不是岩烧洞螈吗？！</size>
E: <size=36>Isn't this a stone-grilled olm!?</size>

C: 现在，我要为下一幅作品寻找灵感去了。有缘再见，陌生人！
E: Now then, I'm off to search out some inspiration for my next masterpiece. May we meet again, stranger!

C: 展品所在的大概位置，我写在了藏宝图背面。就麻烦你跑一趟了，{NICKNAME}。
E: I've written its approximate location on the back of the treasure map. I have to trouble you with another trip, {NICKNAME}.

C: 只是，如果画像作为展品加入博物馆，那么它便需要简单介绍。
E: However, if the portrait is to be added as an exhibit to the museum, it will need a brief introduction.

C: 让我们把话题扳回来吧——你觉得，在介绍中该如何描述母亲大人执政后的经历比较好呢？
E: Let's get back on topic. How do you think we should describe mother's experiences during her rule in the introduction?

C: 嗯，拜托你了。
E: Sure, take as much time as you want.

C: 看看虎克的简历。
E: Check out Hook's resume.

C: 再庞大的机器也是由微小的部件驱动的，就像贝洛伯格与她的人民。
E: Even a huge machine is driven by the tiny components with which it is made, just like Belobog and her citizens.

C: 你在这里没有看到皮箱里的东西。大概是策展人为了显得展品够多，把它们放在了其他展柜里了。
E: You don't see anything inside the leather case. The curator probably placed it in other display cases to bolster their number of collections.

C: 「——『铁腕』斯维特兰娜•兰德。」
E: "— Iron Fist, Svetlana Rand."

C: 他们无私奉献，不求回报。在解决了星核危机后，他们便又重新踏上旅途，随星穹列车一道化作象征祈愿与希冀的流星。
E: They gave selflessly, not asking for anything in return. After resolving the Stellaron Crisis, they returned to their journey, becoming shooting stars symbolizing blessings and hope aboard the cavalcade from outer space.

C: 驭空大人，我们在迴星港看到了幽灵星槎，您…您有什么头绪吗？
E: Madam Yukong, we saw a phantom starskiff at Stargazer Navalia. Do... Do you have any idea about it?

C: 听说你不许职员谈论它…
E: I heard that you don't allow your staff to discuss the skiff...

C: 这就是灵异照片吧…
E: These are supernatural photos, no...?

C: 你看这照片能行吗？
E: How's this shot?

C: （奇怪，照片上为什么会有呜呜伯？）
E: (Strange, why is a Wubbaboo in this photo?)

C: 你还能醒来本身就是个奇迹，而叮叮车的铃声仿佛是它对你的斥责——
E: The fact you're still alive is already a miracle, and the tram's bell seems to be scolding you...

C: 经过这么多天的练习，你应该已经很熟练了吧？记得要拍得可爱一点哦！
E: After all these days of practice, you should be pretty good by now, right? Make sure I look cute, okay?

C: 不愧是三月七。
E: You never fail to impress!

C: 蒜苗五花肉脆瓜胡辣鸡丁星芋扣肉红油乱斩牛杂陈婆豆腐…哎，我舌头都要打结了！背药名都没这么利索的……
E: Ooh! Garlic-infused Pork, Crisped Melon and Diced Chicken, Star Taro Braised Pork, Chili Oil Beef Offal Stew, Granny Chen's Tofu... Ugh, I'm getting tired saying them all! Reciting medicine ingredients is easier than this!

C: 「节流」就是降低成本，如各位所见，码头也没有全部开放，而工人嘛……
E: Cutting costs means reducing expenses. As you can see, the dock isn't even fully utilized, and the workers, well...

C: 我看这金人巷，还得靠我啊。
E: Looks like Aurum Alley is counting on me again.

C: 我亲眼见过您的能力，您绝对不用担心。
E: I've already seen your abilities — there's nothing to be nervous about.

C: 什么？！
E: What!?

C: 怎么还见不到会长啊？急死了。
E: When are we gonna get to see the president?

C: 这和现在的话题无关吧。
E: This has nothing to do with the topic at hand.

C: 你当我傻吗，我不信。
E: Hmph, what do you take me for? I'm not falling for that.

C: 汪汪嗷嗷呜——
E: Woof woof owwww—

C: 他认为继续升级码头，这做法与公司没有本质差异，只会破坏金人巷的特色。
E: He believes that continuing to upgrade the dock, a strategy that is not fundamentally different from that of the IPC, will only destroy the unique character of Aurum Alley.

C: 还是应该继续升级码头。
E: We have to keep upgrading the dock.

C: 这里，这里！
E: Over here!

C: 你不是没有身体吗？
E: You don't have hands to shake.

C: 小少爷，你会投入天价的资金去建设港口，你会赶走大部分的本地商铺，去换来你承诺的「复兴」，但那时金人巷还是金人巷吗？
E: The revival you envision involves throwing pots of money into building a port while forcing away most local businesses. Wouldn't that erase the very identity of the Alley?

C: 难道不是我们太厉害了吗？
E: Things worked out because of our hard work.

C: 什么嘛，我书读得少，但是我娘给我讲过的道理可不少！
E: Hmph, I may not be as well-read as you, but my mom taught me a thing or two!

C: 看什么看，没见过云骑军吗？
E: What are you looking at? Never seen a Cloud Knight before?

C: 不好意思，再说一遍？
E: I'm sorry. Could you repeat that?

C: 我竟然哑口无言…{NICKNAME}，我们还有其他的证据吗？
E: I'm actually speechless... {NICKNAME}, do we have any other evidence or anything?

C: 哦，你是想说公司是在给金人巷商会下套吗？
E: Oh, are you implying that the IPC was setting a trap for the Merchant Guild?

C: 码头已经改善了运输效率，发货量也在不断增加。
E: The dock has improved shipping efficiency and transaction volume is increasing.

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 过度开发只会影响游客体验，导致实际来到街道的游客减少，这就是现实。
E: The reality is — overdevelopment can only adversely impact customer experience, making the Alley less appealing.

C: 如果人类无法从历史里学会经验，那金人会教给你们。
E: If humans are unable to draw wisdom from history, aurumatons can teach them.

C: 你确定你要从第一句话就开始反驳我吗？
E: No need to be quite so aggressive...

C: 鹤运物流的垣风大哥给我们发来了「客制运单」的需求，要是能顺利完成，能成为其他商户进一步合作的范例。
E: Yuanfeng from Heron Express will send us the details for custom orders. By completing them, we'll be able to work even better with our other customers.

C: 出巷口左转便是！
E: Go straight out and turn left. It's right there!

C: 这里是后院，得调头绕回去。
E: This is the rear courtyard. You'll have to turn around and skirt across.

C: 好了好了，扰鸟清梦就算了，还这么过分…别催了别催了，我这就回去。
E: All right, all right. I get it. My nap time is over... Sheesh, no need to push me. I'll get back to work now.

C: 「偷懒」？没有啊，你认错鸟了吧？
E: "Slacking off?" No, you must be thinking of the wrong cycrane.

C: 喂，这个谁，你怎么称呼来着——算了，这不重要，总之，这里另外两位机巧鸟是我刚认识的朋友，你是来抓我的，要抓就抓我好了，别伤害它们！
E: Hey, you there! What's your name... Ah, forget it. It doesn't matter. Anyway, these Cycranes are my friends, and if you're here to catch someone, just take me and leave them alone!

C: 最后小组长说，我这次的报告交上去之后，就帮我申请科室独立实验资金。你瞧瞧，已经提前给我放权了！
E: In the end, the team leader said that after I finish this round's report, they're going to help me with funding for my independent research. You see, they're starting to move me up now!

C: 哎哟乖乖，这个还是不要乱动比较好哦？博物馆里的东西，可都是不得了的！
E: My dear, best to leave it alone, okay? Anything that can be in a museum is not something to play with!

C: （异常情况应该不在这个地方。）
E: (The anomaly is not here.)

C: 根据我的「小宇宙时间隧道」理论，宇宙是多个相互关联的平行实体。
E: My small universe time tunnel theory holds that the universe consists of multiple interconnected entities that are running in parallel.

C: 困死了……
E: So tired...

C: 在黄金歌剧院工作的朋友还和我抱怨，说最近大家闲时消遣都爱往博物馆钻，连去看歌剧的观众都变少了……
E: A friend of mine who works at the Golden Theater was ranting to me about how everyone spends their free time going to the museum that even the number of opera-goers has decreased...

C: 嘘，别打岔，故事还没讲完呢！
E: Shh, don't interrupt. The story isn't finished yet!

C: 这里就是通往核心区域的管道了，让我们一起为哈努兄弟助力吧。
E: This is the way to the core area. Let's offer our support to Hanu!

C: 滴答，但其他主管的员工应该也拿到了这种奇怪的积木…好心的宾客，如果您今后再遇到故障的迷钟，也请帮帮它们吧！
E: Tick-tock, but the other supervisors' personnel should have gotten these strange blocks too... Kind-hearted guest, if you run into any faulty Dream Tickers in the future, please help them out too!

C: 辛格勒深吸了一口气。
E: Singler inhales deeply.

C: 咳咳，你好，我是乌玛，家族的新闻主持人，最近匹诺康尼电视台陷入了一点…混乱的局面，编导让我来求助一位「场外嘉宾」，没想到原来是你。
E: *ahem* Hi, I'm Uma, a news anchor from The Family. Penacony TV has been caught in a bind lately, so the director sent me to ask for help from a "special guest." I didn't expect it to be you.

C: 嘿，那边的——
E: Hey there...

C: 嗯，是时候教你「进阶课程」了。
E: Hmm, it's time to give you the "advanced lesson."

C: 你…是认真的吗？你希望…我，如此善良热情的乖孩子，去向那只傻狗低头认错？
E: Are you... serious? You want me... an innocent and passionate kid to bow my head and apologize to that idiot pooch?

C: 这个不是理由吧？
E: That's not a good reason, you know?

C: 真期待啊…你会为我调出什么样的饮品呢？
E: I can't wait to see... what kind of drink you make me.

C: 你们好，我是专程来……
E: Hey there, I've come all the way to...

C: 先前不是挺会说话的嘛？
E: I thought you were good at talking.

C: （得先想办法让它冷静下来，去它的内心世界里看看吧。）
E: (I've got to figure out a way to calm him down... Let's delve into his inner world...)

C: 汪！看起来没事了。明明平时都有来酒吧，为什么会突然失去理智哇！
E: Woof! Looks like he's okay. He's a regular at the lounge, but why did he lose his mind all of a sudden?

C: 我们的职责是维护梦境安全！
E: It's our duty to keep this Dreamscape safe!

C: 「惊梦剧团」就是怪物，到处游荡，伺机伤人，不少宾客都被袭击过，现在你说它们很安全？没人会信的。
E: Dreamjolt Troupe is just a bunch of monsters! They roam around and attack people, and many guests have been attacked. And now you're saying they're safe? No one will believe that nonsense.

C: 你这种不肯吃亏的样子，让我想起了一些老朋友。
E: That face you're making reminds me of some old friends. They were reluctant to work for no pay, too.

C: 挺好玩的。
E: Yeah, it's pretty fun.

C: 我倒是认识一些长生的无名客，他们可能还活着吧…我肯定已经没了，没了没了没了，毕竟我又不是什么长生种嘛。
E: I've met some long-living Nameless in my day. Maybe they're still alive... I'm certain that I've already died. Dead, gone, kaput. I'm not from a long-life species after all.

C: 似乎还有一些不认识的人……
E: Looks like there are still some unfamiliar faces...

C: 想要知道更多的线索，您可以去会场寻找我的同伴，他们会给你指引方向！
E: If you need more clues, then go look for my companions at the venue. They'll point you in the right direction!

C: 小时候，钟表小子说会来找我玩…但我等了很久很久，它都没有出现……
E: When I was young, Clockie said that it would come and play with me... But I've waited for a long long time and it never came...

C: 哈哈，是吗？可惜我学识尚浅，看不出来太多头绪。
E: Haha, really? I'm afraid I'm not knowledgeable enough to pick up any clues.

C: 那必须给我面子！
E: I'm sure they'll listen to me!

C: 想想看，当年他用印着钟表小子的金纸片把「烫金的时刻」弄得鸡飞狗跳，现在又要用钟表小子的动画制造混乱——这种人会在乎自己的追随者吗？会在乎钟表小子的影迷吗？
E: Remember years ago when he used golden papers with Clockie's image printed on them and made a mess of Gilded Hour? Now, he's wreaking havoc again with Clockie's animation. Would such a person care about his followers? Would he care about Clockie's fans?

C: {NICKNAME}导演，还有鸢尾花家系的…米莫萨顾问，接下来的工作就拜托你们了！
E: Director {NICKNAME} and... Consultant Mimosa from the Iris Family, I'm counting on you two for the remaining work!

C: 好怀念那悦耳的引擎声呀……
E: I long for the roar of the revving engine...

C: 滴答！任务完成，罗盘号——返航！
E: Tick-tock! Mission complete. The Compass — return!

C: 总之，我这边拍得差不多了。不过另外两个片场的导演还缺人手，建议你赶紧过去看看。
E: Anyway, I'm almost done filming here. But there are two other directors with scenes that need more hands. I suggest you hurry over to take a look.

C: 你可以挑选扮演敌人的演员拍摄打戏，让他们提前退场。
E: You can pick the actors to play the enemies for this fight scene, and have them exit partway.

C: 一共有三部广告，如何？能成吗？
E: A total of three commercials. How about it? Will that work?

C: 我知道您习惯精益求精，所以特意让他们晚点再拆布景，方便您后续修改或者补拍镜头。
E: I know you're a stickler for perfection, which is why I told them not to tear down the set yet — to make it convenient for you to make subsequent revisions or reshoots.

C: 再拍一次吧。
E: Let's reshoot that.

C: 唉，该死的工作，该死的石头老板！
E: Tsk, curse this job and curse Boss Stone!

C: 我们继续后面的故事——「面对向自己宣战的镇民，石头老板选择了用暴力镇压 / 从中挑拨离间 / 推行民主制度…但他最后还是失败了，镇民们把他赶出了小镇。」
E: Let's continue with our story: "Faced with townsfolk openly hostile against him, Boss Stone decided to suppress with violence / stir up discord / push for democracy... But in the end, he failed. The townsfolk chased him out of town."

C: 太好了，这下外传就能开拍了，苦差事总算有着落了。
E: Great, we can start shooting the extra story now that all the tough stuff is out of the way.

C: 导演，真不是我怠慢这份工作，对于哈努兄弟的故事，一直有些问题困扰着我——你说，哈努兄弟到底是什么样的人呢？
E: Director, it's not that I look down on this job, it's just that there are a few things about the Brother Hanu story that still bug me. Tell me, what kind of person is Brother Hanu exactly?

C: 喂，这么捉弄人可一点都不酷！
E: Hey, don't make fun of me. That ain't cool!

C: 在当年的边陲监狱，犯人们的怒火压抑到了顶点，但没人敢打响反抗的第一枪…直到一只失控的狼闯进监狱，咬伤了公司的安保，直接引发了囚犯哗变。
E: At the frontier prison, suppression of inmates had reached a zenith. However, nobody dared to fire the first shot... until an out-of-control wild wolf stormed into the prison and bit an IPC guard, triggering mutiny among the inmates.

C: 关于哈努兄弟。
E: About Brother Hanu.

C: 关于*哼*。
E: About *hmph*.

C: 家族的权力在扩张。
E: The Family's power grows ever more encompassing.

C: 想重启钟表小子系列…
E: I want to reboot the Clockie series...

C: 怎么到处都有你？
E: Why do I see you everywhere?

C: 好久不见，乔瓦尼先生。
E: Long time no see, Mr. Giovanni.

C: 目前首次测试正在开放中。怎么样，要来试试这次的新玩法吗？
E: The open beta is out now. How about it, wanna try out this new gameplay?

C: 差评！退钱！
E: Terrible! I want a refund!

C: （…但真有玩家会选一看就是错误选项的「黑暗球棒」吗？）
E: (...But would any players actually choose the obviously wrong "dark bat" as an option?)

C: 接下来，你们将面对「肢体」的考验！
E: Up next, you'll be challenged with a body language test.

C: 咦？我们还什么都没做……
E: Huh? We haven't even done anything...

C: <size=36>卡！！！</size>
E: <size=36>CUT!</size>

C: 在即将放弃的时候，一场大雨令二位嗅到了商机，你们开始进军雨伞行业，可生意刚有起色，就遇到了竞争对手——打败对方，为自己赢得商战！
E: Just as you're about to give up, a downpour sparks a business idea — you enter the umbrella business! But just as things are looking up, you encounter a competitor. Defeat them and emerge victorious from this trade war!

C: 你知道吗？哈努兄弟心爱的火箭筒恰好就在那间储藏室里，快去吧！
E: Guess what? Hanu's favorite bazooka just so happens to be in that storage room! So get a move on!

C: …呃，不是，没什么。我们赶紧去下一关吧。
E: ...Uhm, never mind. Let's hurry over to the next stage.

C: 让我一个人静静吧，钟表小子。我实在不知道该如何面对你…因为我只是一个失败品。
E: Please... just leave me be, Clockie. I just don't know how to face you... because I'm just a failure.

C: 他有着卓越的审美和魔法般的技艺，只是性格有些古怪……
E: He has outstanding taste in aesthetics and almost supernatural skill. It's just that he can be a bit eccentric...

C: 你闭上双眼，耳边响起送葬的哀歌。即使是联觉信标，也无法告诉你那些歌词的真实含义。你感到自己逐渐下沉，远离真实世界，但过去擦肩而过的死亡，却逐渐迫近。
E: You close your eyes and hear an elegy. Even the Synesthesia Beacon can't fathom the meaning of the lyrics. You can feel yourself sinking, getting further away from the real world. However, you find the deaths you once narrowly escaped drawing closer.

C: 究竟是谁最先发射了导弹已经无从考据了。人们只记得，明明本意终止忆质灾祸的飞弹却成了这场旷日持久战争的导火索。
E: There was no way to verify who first fired the missile. People only remember that the missile, originally intended to subdue the disaster of the memoria, became what started the prolonged war thereafter.

C: 星神和凡人，命途平等地束缚着等号的两端，为他们戴上镣铐。逻辑：从这一角度分析，二者确实具备同等的价值。但若要问谁才是解开谜题的关键……
E: Aeons and mortals... Paths constrain these two ends of the equal sign and shackle them both without bias. Logic: When analyzed from this perspective, they indeed both hold equal value. However, if asked which one holds the key to solving the puzzle...

C: 一想到正在运转的我们也是这首长诗的一部分，就连我的「内心」也不可抑制地跳动了起来。
E: The realization that we, who are churning along in our lives, are also integral parts of this extensive hymn, makes even my "heart" pound with unstoppable impulses.

C: 嘿嘿，我要是学成回去，大家还不得对我刮目相看。
E: Hehe, just wait until I go back, everyone's going to be so wowed by my new skills.

C: 请继续加油。
E: Keep up the good work.

C: 住手！你这有些欺人太甚了！
E: Stop! You've gone too far!

C: 你们公司的机甲只会搞团建。
E: Your mechs are only good for show.

C: 再说了，你就算学一辈子花拳绣腿，还不如早点花钱投资买下我司的民用型机甲，不出几日，你就能把你师父打得下跪求饶。
E: Instead of wasting your life learning useless swordplay, why not invest in our civilian mechs? You'll have your master kneeling and begging for mercy in no time.

C: 助教有助教的工资吗？
E: Do I get paid as an assistant teacher?

C: 云璃师父，咱们气势可不能弱下去啊！
E: But we can't lose our momentum, Master Yunli!

C: 三月好棒！掌握了独门绝技！
E: You're amazing, March! You learned your own secret move!

C: 不错，三月小姐撑到了现在，你通过了。
E: Not bad! You've made it this far, Miss March. You've passed the exam.

C: （去找青雀）
E: (Ask Qingque for help)

C: 谢谢藿藿，你愿意教咱学会摆弄除魔道具，就已经帮了我很多了！多亏了各位相助，本姑娘虽然学剑没有多长时间，但击败公司的机甲我还是有信心的。
E: Thanks, Huohuo! You've already been a huge help by teaching me how to use the exorcising tools! Even though I've only been learning swordplay for a short time, I'm confident I can take down the IPC mechs.

C: 尾巴，你到底把他怎么了？
E: What have you done to him, Mr. Tail?

C: 第二位受害者，他也是演武仪典的报名选手。受害人是前云骑军成员，擅使长枪，被发现时正拿长枪练习撑杆跳。
E: The second victim is also a Wardance combat registrant. He is a former Cloud Knight proficient at the spear. He was discovered practicing pole-vaulting with his spear.

C: 破案了，肯定是岁阳！
E: Mystery solved! It must be a heliobus!

C: 都怪我学剑太不用功了！
E: It's all my fault! I didn't train enough!

C: 拉克什米…？「浓雾背后有一盏绿灯若隐若现」…难道她是斯科特心心念念的爱人？
E: Rakshmi...? "Glimpsing a faint green light through the thick fog..." Could it be that Rakshmi is the love of Skott's life?

C: 莫非曜青的医术里有什么秘方能助我一臂之力？
E: Wait, could it be that the Yaoqing people have some secret formula that could help me?

C: …但内心深处有点痛快。这是不是堕入黑暗面的开始？
E: ...But deep down, it feels kinda good. Is this what slipping into the dark side feels like?

C: 这我可太熟了！带薪撸宠，支持跨星际办公，定期组织星际旅游…想不到吧！
E: Oh, now you're asking the right person! We're talking getting paid to play with pets, remote work across the cosmos, and regular interstellar trips... You wouldn't believe it!

C: 唔呃…好吧，我试试吧……
E: Um... Okay, I will try it...

C: 你要是不喝，我也不喝了——我们俩是一条心。
E: If you're not drinking it, neither am I. We're on the same page.

C: 我算是看明白了，这不会是你们俩为了讲什么道理而设计的考验吧？
E: I see it now, is this some test that you two came up with to teach me some kind of lesson?

C: 地衡司里应该有很多类似的受骗案例，鄙人不过是取其精华，去其糟粕罢了。
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission probably has many records of such fraudulent incidents. I was simply learning from the cream of the crop.

C: 这一次我打算和某个仙舟老玩家*线下见面*的，跟你们关系不大。
E: I'm here at the Xianzhou to meet a veteran player at a game in person. It has nothing to do with you.

C: 就像是卡牌集换游戏里的「闪卡」，只要是核心玩家肯定是要去收集的。
E: It's like the holographic cards in a card collection game. Those hardcore players will never miss out on them.

C: 我就知道会遇到麻烦……
E: I knew things would not be that simple...

C: 你不是说自己是先天灵感圣体吗？你来吧——你负责唯心的部分，我负责唯物的部分。
E: Didn't you say you've got a strong sensitivity to spirits? So, you do it — you'll take care of the metaphysical part, while I'll take care of the physical part.

C: 银狼的投影就此消失，而公输师傅也不吭声地离开了。
E: Silver Wolf's holographic projection disappears, and Master Gongshu leaves the place silently.

C: 三月七翻翻找找，忙碌到最后，算是小有收获。
E: March 7th browsed the materials intently and after a long period of searching, found something that could be of some use.

C: 哎，你这小姑娘，想要拯救一个过去留在书中的故事？有意思，妾身可以帮助你，不过你得先告诉我你会怎么做，否则我是不会同意的。
E: Ah, so it is your intention to rescue this story that was left abandoned in the pages of a book, young lady? Interesting. I can assist you, but you must first tell me what it is that you intend to do, or I shall not agree.

C: 还真有啊，不过我要强调一下，我可不会什么剑斗哦！
E: You actually have something? I'll tell you again, I don't know anything about sword fighting!

C: 好吧，如果还需要补拍，欢迎随时过来。
E: Alright. If you need to retake any pictures, you can come back anytime.

C: 我拒绝。
E: I refuse.

C: 这就对了，欢迎来到大人的世界！
E: That's more like it. Welcome to the adults' world!

C: 好问题…如果夹层世界的一切…都是现实世界扭曲而形成的意识体……
E: A fine question... If everything in the Betweenwhere is a consciousness formed from a distortion of the physical world...

C: 预测…未来？这么高大上的部门！我原本以为她是不擅长社交，看来只是不喜欢社交。
E: Predicting... the future? I guess they're kind of a big deal! At first I thought she was a little awkward, but I guess she just doesn't like socializing.

C: 咱们接下来该干什么呢…先去看病还是先去太卜司？
E: What should we do first... See a doctor, or go to the Divination Commission?

C: 你一个在太卜司里摆残局的人，也好意思说我？
E: You're one to talk, setting up endless scenarios in the Divination Commission!

C: 我、我还年轻，医生，我还不想死……
E: I—I'm too young to die, Doc...

C: 彦卿绝对不是我的对手！
E: YANQING WON'T DEFEAT ME!

C: 他不打算参加复活赛了。
E: He's decided not to participate in the repechage.

C: 卢卡选手，你这是怎么了？
E: Luka, what's with you?

C: 你们人类是很脆弱的——当然岁阳也是，但这不是重点，重点是…
E: You humans are very fragile. Heliobi are too, of course, but that's not the point. The point is...

C: 听起来更像是为了增加收视率。
E: Sounds more like a gimmick for publicity to me.

C: 伊戈尔试图抓住所有微小的希望，他希望能有人来救救他的家园……
E: Igor grasped at every tiny sliver of hope for someone to rescue his home world...

C: 我理解！当年我参加星际和平娱乐第七十五轮面试的时候，也是这个感受！
E: I get you! I felt the same way for my seventy-fifth round of interviews with Interastral Peace Entertainment!

C: 我们来迟了，真是遗憾。看来只能之后看重播了……
E: We're too late. Looks like we'll have to catch the replay later on...

C: 金人巷，杜氏茶庄。
E: Du's Teahouse, Aurum Alley.

C: 我说不出什么慷慨激昂的战前宣言，彦卿兄弟。
E: I don't have a stirring pre-battle speech, Yanqing.

C: 比赛当然会有输赢的判断，我已经尽力了，我做到了！不停挥拳、挥拳、直到最后！回到贝洛伯格后，在未来的某一刻，我还有下一场比赛，我还有很多战斗要打！
E: Winning and losing are part of any match. But I gave it my all, I did it! I kept throwing punches, punch after punch, until the very end! When I go back to Belobog, there will be another fight waiting for me in the future, and many more battles to come!

C: 下次我亲自参赛吧。
E: I'll be the contestant myself next time.

C: 不、不行！这是比武竞技，是我承诺的责任，你给我乖乖在台下等着。听好了，如果我不呼叫，你不许擅自行动，也不要随便回答别人的问题。
E: No, no way! This is a martial arts tournament, and it's a duty that I've committed myself to. You be good and wait by the stage. Do not move and do not answer any questions without my call.

C: 无法理解。已知：借助演武仪典，你们想请愿让丹轮寺加入仙舟联盟。
E: Failure to comprehend. Known: With the Wardance as your podium, you intend to petition for Claretwheel Temple to join the Xianzhou Alliance.

C: 我不止一次破犯杀戒…我宁可让自己的手被佩戴的戒环箍断，也忍不住要撕开敌人的喉咙。
E: I broke the vow against killing more than once... I would rather have my hand snapped apart by the commandment ring I wear, than resist the urge to rip my enemy's throat open.

C: 破戒的先例一旦打开，无数的借口便会沿着缝隙生长，如同成瘾的鸩毒，将最初的底线侵蚀得千疮百孔，再无回头的余地。
E: If there is precedent of the commandments being broken, countless excuses will grow along the cracks like an addictive poison. It will erode the initial boundaries till there is no turning back.

C: 她说的不错。我承诺过协议，我也可以撕毁协议。
E: She's right. I have made my vows and signed the agreement, but I can also go back on it.

C: 一幅摄影作品，摄制于距今七百年前，展现了仙舟联盟与贝洛伯格之间不朽的友谊。
E: A photograph taken seven hundred years ago, depicting the enduring friendship between the Xianzhou Alliance and Belobog.

C: 据我所知，卢卡选手并没有产生幻觉。这是谣言，请大家放心。
E: From what I know, Luka has not been hallucinating. That's just a rumor, so please be at ease.

C: 「顿派菲昌英」这个个人品牌，我构思了整整一年，连训练都荒废了！没想到…还是敌不过你的铁臂！
E: I spent one whole year conceptualizing my personal branding "Gigantus Shieldus," and I even sacrificed my training! I can't believe... I still lost to your Iron Arm!

C: 如果你把构思你那个破谐音梗的时间花在训练上，搞不好就打得赢了。
E: If you spent the time you used on conceptualizing those lame puns on training instead, you might actually have won.

C: 扑满…听起来战斗力不是很强。
E: Trotter... They don't sound very strong.

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: …因为《曜青体育》的记者临时有事，我过来顶班，你叫我业余记者就好。
E: ...The journalist at Yaoqing Sports had some last-minute business, so I'm just here as a substitute. Please call me Amateur Journalist.

C: 卢卡退赛！
E: Luka, just withdraw!

C: 这家伙满嘴谎言，卢卡差点被他害了。
E: This guy's full of lies, Luka almost became his victim.

C: 但请你放心！只要你参加了咱们的「庙会游戏」，一定会发自内心地大喊一句——「妙啊！」
E: But don't you worry! As long as you join our temple fair games, your heart will surely be shouting: Fair-bulous!

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 当然了！这可是货运物流的绝佳广告位！虽然…到目前为止只有两个客人来过。
E: Of course! There's no better advertising spot for a logistical service! Though... we've only had two customers till now.

C: 的确如此，祖宗。
E: That is correct, top dog.

C: 你也是枘凿六合的老玩家了，我这引导员也确实没什么能「引导」的。
E: You're also a Hexanexus veteran. There's nothing much that I can guide as a... guide.

C: 啊？注入…监测木马…？
E: Eh? You injected... a monitoring trojan...?

C: 我愿给这个游戏打出满分。
E: I can only give this game a perfect score.

C: 来局大衍万象吧！
E: Come play a round of Mutare Magnus!

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 呵呵，那音乐派对的三场乐队演出，就拜托你们了。正好来自各个学院的乐队成员都在排练室做准备，现在就去和他们见见吧。

C: …猴子。
E: ...Monkeys.

C: 关于音乐派对…
E: About the music party...

E: Tweet! The protags in popular band manga are all guitarists. That's unfair to the rest of the band, tweet!

C: 经过上次演出，我确定乐队风格和我的追求相距甚远，并且没有任何改变的可能。
E: After our last performance, I realized that the band's style is way different to what I'm looking for, and there's no chance of that changing.

E: Ah, Miss Rappa... You have your persistence, while I have my enjoyment. If everyone sees things in different ways, then there's no point in forcing us to stay together.

C: <size=36>喔！！！</size>
E: <size=36>YEAAAAH!!!</size>

C: 不管怎么样，乐队还得办。
E: The band must still perform, no matter what.

C: 阁下说得甚好！在下也来助兴！
E: Well said! Allow me to join in the fun!

C: 行了，我不想跟你们浪费时间。要说的事很简单——经学院代表投票决定，取消乱破及其乐队的登台资格，勒令解散，即刻生效！
E: Enough. I don't wish to waste any more time with you lot. The matter is simple — as per the voting decision by the academy's representatives, Rappa and her band are hereby disqualified from performing, and are ordered to disband, effective immediately!

E: When the time comes, I will try speaking to the new band members in an attempt to sway them into giving us stage time.

C: 喔。
E: Huh.

C: 还是被发现了吗？
E: Did we still get found out in the end?

E: I watched the previous two performances remotely and they were fantastic. I didn't expect you to have the talent for being a band manager.

C: 别紧张，赶场迟到是常有的情况。实在没办法，我也可以临时加入你们乐队。
E: Don't be nervous. It's not uncommon to be late for a show. As a last resort, I can join your band temporarily.

C: 看来你的演艺梦想终究是要止步于此了。
E: Looks like your dream of performing is about to be put to an end here.

E: Thank you, meow! I've finally learned how to sing in a chorus. It won't be a problem later on!

E: Arrange to meet offline for a chat.

C: 大惊小怪？！藿藿可是为了找你茶不思饭不想的，现在还被另一个坏东西乘虚而入了！
E: Surprised!? Huohuo has been worried sick trying to find you, and now something else has gone after her!

C: 老子本想，既然都逃出来了，也该换个身体好好逍遥自在一下了。但是——
E: Since I'd slipped the leash, I thought I might as well change bodies and savor a bit of freedom. But then—

C: 一旦它在精神层面认为自己已经输掉了，即便是再强大的岁阳也再难像这样聚合起来。
E: The moment they sense even a hint of defeat, it's over — they'll break into pieces, regardless of how powerful they are.

C: 至此，捉鬼小队的工作也算是告一段落了，请允许我作为十王司判官，感谢各位连日来的辛苦劳作，将岁阳灾害的影响降到了最低。
E: The ghost-hunting squad can now rest easy for a while. Speaking as a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, I must thank you all for the dedication you've shown these past few days. You really minimized the impact of the heliobi crisis.

C: 尾巴，你怎么…你怎么在这里，你不是早已经…我明白了，这次要离开的人是你。
E: Tail? How are you... how are you still here? ...I see now... You're leaving me too...

C: 不，你也太小看自己了，你那何止是长进啊，你简直是胆大包天！一个人就敢来做这么危险的事？我怀疑你不是没有勇气，你只是没脑子！
E: No, you're selling yourself short! You're daring! How you had the courage to do something so dangerous amazes me! It's not bravery you lack, but sense!

C: 这里是哪里呀…尾巴，尾巴，你在这里吗？
E: Where... where am I? T—Tail, are you here?

C: 投子认负吧，你已经输了。
E: Accept your defeat, you are bested.

C: 这岁阳的战斗方式颇为特别，不过如此水平实在让彦卿提不起兴致，看来「岁阳之乱」已经是过去了啊。
E: This heliobus's fighting style is quite unique, but too low-level to entertain me. It seems the "Heliobi Wars" are finished.

C: 也有一定可能性，确实彦卿和老师实力非同小可，不是一般岁阳能碰瓷的。
E: That is possible. Our power together is indeed considerable. No regular heliobus could pull one over on us.

C: 结果竟然是一个不知道「下棋为何物」的臭棋篓子，谁能想到呢？
E: Turns it was some chess fanatic that didn't even know what chess is! Who'd have thought it?

C: 让我考虑考虑……
E: Let me think about it...

C: 我以为你会跑掉。
E: I thought you'd run off.

C: 你感觉现场的气氛不太对劲，一阵狂热的情绪从心底涌上来了。
E: You sense an abnormal atmosphere around you as a wave of manic emotion bursts forth from the bottom of your heart.

C: 说回正题！{NICKNAME}，如果不是多年前遇到你，我不会鼓起勇气辞职创业，那句话怎么说来着？命运的齿轮开始转动……
E: Back to the point! {NICKNAME}, if I hadn't met you all those years ago, I would never have gathered the courage to quit my job and start my business. What was it you said to me back then? "The gears of fate are beginning to turn..."

C: 牌手们打开随机的箱子，就会有机会获得牌型中欠缺的琼玉牌，一抽之间便能决定胜负！
E: Players will open random chests and have a chance to receive Jade Tiles missing from their decks. One draw can mean the difference between victory and defeat!

C: （求求你，出货啊…）
E: (Please, this time...)

C: 网络上真真假假的信息混淆不清…咱们还得实际走访之后才能有结论。
E: It's so hard to tell what's true and what's not on the network... We should go and visit before reaching a conclusion.

C: 要是能做，我就同意你们探访凶宅如何？
E: If you do that, then I'll allow you to visit the haunted house. What do you think?

C: 不过，一张卡芙卡通缉令出现这里，在一个像是「鬼打墙」的民宅院里。你和小伙伴们都应该对它的突兀感有所警惕。
E: However, a wanted poster for Kafka appearing here, in the courtyard of an apparent haunted house, should raise some caution among you and your companions due to its unexpected nature.

C: 四下没有旁人，它究竟是如何出现的？你将它捡起来，立刻意识到它可能是重要线索。
E: There is no one around. Just where did this come from? As you pick it up, you realize that this is probably an important clue.

C: 好难啊…{NICKNAME}，要不是用手比划比划？「M」是这样的，「N」是那样的。
E: This is so tough... {NICKNAME}, why not try drawing them with your hands? "M" is like this, and "N" is like that...

C: （这好像不太对，再想想该怎么办吧。）
E: (Something doesn't seem right. Have another think about what to do.)

C: 以你对素裳的了解，她是一个不擅长读书的好姑娘，同理，她对这些挑战智慧的脑筋急转弯应该束手无策才对。
E: From what you know of Sushang, she is a good young girl, but she struggles with studies. By this logic, it makes sense that a brainteaser like this would bring her to her wit's end.

C: 要是能在直播的时候接到当场打来的恐怖通讯…肯定很有节目效果！
E: If I get a scary prank call while live on stream... it'll definitely be good for the show!

C: 没什么了。
E: Um... Nothing.

C: 总算结束了。接下来咱们也该分道扬镳了，再见了各位！
E: It's finally over. Now it's time for us to part ways. Goodbye, all!
