E: OMG! Midnight Ghostly Crying Exposed: You Won't Believe What's Behind It!

C: 不过十王司那边…可能需要你解释一下。这小家伙也没做过什么坏事。
E: But with regard to the Ten-Lords Commission... you probably need to give them an explanation. And besides, this little guy didn't cause any harm.

C: 希望{NICKNAME}也能来帮忙，你点子多，见识广，正好帮我来选选提问，录制下视频什么的——你也要跟我一起出镜！
E: I hope {NICKNAME} can help out too, as you have lots of ideas and general knowledge. You can help me choose questions, record video content and stuff... like being on camera together with me!

C: 我社恐，能拒绝吗？
E: I get social anxiety. Is it cool if I don't?

E: Ahem, minors watching my stream is what scares me the most. Every few days, I'll get their parents requesting a refund and I'll get stung with the processing fee, meaning all my hard work streaming amounts to nothing.

C: 签收人已找你代收。
E: The recipient asked for you to sign it on behalf of her.

E: Yes

E: It was just a little experiment. I added some... special ingredients that help calm him down. Seems like it worked pretty well on our grumpy customer, although maybe I added a bit too much.

E: I knew it, I knew it! She just can't get enough of that blasted poet! Is his pretentious literary accent so fascinating that she's still holding onto it?

E: Oh, I love gossip!

E: I'm being serious.

E: Yes.

E: You've been in this lounge for some time. What have you noticed?

C: 装置的维修要很长一段时间，但里面的文件都有急用，必须得赶快抢救出来。

C: …银狼？
E: ...Silver Wolf?

C: 那我先回去啦，啾啾——
E: I'll be off then, tweet tweet!

C: 战略投资部希望聘请卢卡选手成为我们的品牌代言人，并在整个产品线上进行深度合作。
E: The Strategic Investment Department would like to hire Luka as our brand ambassador, working closely with him across our entire product line.

C: 在擂台上能证明什么呢？舆论场上，立场大于事实、标签大于观点、感性大于理性，情感宣泄大于深度讨论…你要证明给谁看呢？

C: 各位请稍安勿躁！

C: 好家伙！卢卡选手干脆利落应下了这场战斗！
E: Alright! Luka decisively accepts the fight!

C: 确实要感谢她。

C: 有些头绪，但不多——博识学会的黑历史倒见着不少。

C: 当然不是字面意思上的「复活」。收集学派战争的数据，在模拟宇宙仿造出完整的「权杖」系统，重现帝皇的外置思维单元。

C: 如果发现情况不对，马上往回跑，不用管我。还有，千万不要回头。
E: If you sense something amiss, turn around and run back with all you've got. Don't worry about me, and do NOT look behind you.

C: 只要我还走在「智识」的命途上，想必总有一日会和她再度相遇的。只是不知道，下次见面她会准备什么样的手段来招呼我呢……
E: So long as I walk along the Path of Erudition, I think I'll end up meeting her again one day. I just don't know what she'll do to greet me next time...

C: 这车厢的名字好热闹啊…

E: I actually just bought some new coffee beans recently, and I've already ground them. {NICKNAME}, let's give it a try together!

C: 准备好了吗，{NICKNAME}乘客…无比激动人心的「卫生大评比」！
E: Ready, Passenger {NICKNAME}? The incredibly thrilling Hygiene Showdown is here!

C: 换上了新衣服？
E: Did you change into new clothes?

C: 什么，真的有？能、能让我看一看吗……

C: 就用这个。
E: Let's go with that.

C: 说来惭愧，我原本应聘了餐馆的主厨职位，却因为手艺不精，没能通过村长的考核。
E: I'm a bit embarrassed to say it, but I actually applied to be the restaurant's chef. Unfortunately, my skills didn't pass the village chief's assessment.

C: 真正的米其林不是升星制吧？
E: The real Michelin system doesn't increase stars like this...

C: 小白，别太爱沙拉了。大家还有其他想法吗？
E: Snowy, stop being so obsessed with salads. Anyone else got ideas?

C: 白厄是个不错的人选。
E: Phainon might be a good fit.

C: 咱们的餐馆已经小有名气啦，日常经营也走上了正轨，是时候尝试些更有意思的内容了。
E: Our restaurant's starting to make a name for itself, and day-to-day operations are running smoothly. I think it's time we try something more fun.

C: （不举手）
E: (Don't raise your hand)

C: （赞成缇宝的观点）
E: (Agree with Tribbie)

C: 甜蜜蜜节到今天就结束啦。感谢各位的光临！
E: Sweetie Festival wraps up for the day. Thanks for stopping by, everyone!

C: ——迷！迷迷！我们会守护白厄主厨的一切！
E: Mem! Memem! We'll protect everything Chef Phainon stands for!

C: 好啊。「盐炙火腿配无花果」，请品尝！
E: Alright then. "Salt-Seared Ham with Figs," dig in!

C: 没想到海瑟音小姐才是隐藏的大胃王。好在危机总算化解了。
E: Never saw it coming. Turns out Miss Hysilens is a secret competitive eater. But anyway, at least this crisis is finally averted!

C: 知道自己错了吗？
E: You get why that's a problem now?

C: 农田里的巨型蔬菜产量实在太高，多到连厨房都堆不下。餐馆日常营业根本用不完这么多食材，快要放坏掉了，大家正在为此而发愁呢。
E: The giant vegetables are overproducing drastically. We've run out of storage space in the kitchen. There's no way we can use all these ingredients during regular service, and they're starting to rot. Everyone's totally stressed about it.

C: 所以，去吧——在这场宴会落幕前，别留下遗憾呀。
E: So before the feast comes to an end, make sure you don't leave with any regrets.

C: 好呀好呀！小风堇，就由你来给大家做个榜样吧。
E: Great, Cinny! You can go first and show everyone how it's done!

C: 也许不想加入其中，只是害怕愉快的时光转瞬即逝，不知不觉就会戛然而止。
E: Maybe it's not that you don't want to be part of it, but that you're afraid the good times will vanish before you know it, ending all too soon.

C: 用进废退，用进废退啊！你说，以后我还能重拾起老本行吗？…迷？
E: Use it or lose it, huh? Think I'll ever get back into my old groove... Mem?

C: 在那黎明照拂的城邦，异邦的英雄成为了逐火的一员。\n自旅途间诞生的灵感，前往书中将其写下。
E: In that dawn-kissed city-state, a hero from the outlands became one of the Flame-Chasers.\nInspired by the journey, they recorded their tales in the pages of a book.

C: 成为悬锋祭典的冠军，\n是千里挑一…不，万里挑一的殊荣。
E: To be crowned champion of the Kremnos Festival\nwas an honor that only the cream of the crop could attain.

C: 不可使敌人发觉你的血液滴落，\n以此使人深信，\n眼前之人<color=#9e5738>无可匹敌</color>。
E: Do not let your enemy notice that you're bleeding,\nAnd thus convince them,\nThat you are someone <color=#9e5738>unsurpassed</color>, a warrior supreme.

C: 「不，*我们*是缇宁。」\n缇宁的话最少。
E: "No, we're Trinnon."\nTrinnon is the quietest of the trio.

C:
眼前晃过几缕泡影——

自己曾在漫无边际的河中漂流，
而后驾着孤舟，驶出湍流。

自己曾在尸横遍野的疆场游荡，
而后寻见生路，踏出荒冢。
E:
Illusions dance across her eyes—

She had once drifted in an endless river,
Then drove her single boat out of the deluge.

She had wandered in the battlefield covered in corpses,
Then recovered the path back to life.

C: 直至某日，\n少女偏头望向窗外，\n一抹幽蓝闯入她的视野。
E: Till one day,\nWhen the girl looks outside,\nShe sees a dash of dark blue most brave.

C: 「你明天担上几匹布，」\n「去那城里，试试这些小聪明。」
E: "Why don't you take some of our goods\nAnd go into the city tomorrow to try out those pranks?"

C: 翻飞的硬币颓然落地，\n诉说一段应验的宿命。
E: The whimsical coin fell to the ground,\nTelling the tale of fate fulfilled.

C: 原来，它就在这里呀。\n不知不觉，从西风尽头采来的花，\n变成了一颗种子啊。
E: So, this is the place.\nWithout my realizing it, the flower I picked from the end of the west wind\nhas become a seed.

C: 直到有一日，巨龙昂首，\n以低沉的喉音，\n恳求瞥见光亮。
E: Until one day, they raised their head,\nAnd with a low, guttural voice,\nPleaded to glimpse light.

C: 「你的受苦，救不了此世生灵。」\n巨龙曾在泰坦胸脯宣誓效忠。
E: "Your pain cannot save the lives in this world."\nThe Giant Dragon once swore an oath at the Titan's breast.

C: 「别怕，别怕…」\n熟悉的声音于镜中响起——
E: "Don't be scared, please don't be afraid..."\nA familiar voice rings out in the mirror —

C: <color=#9e5738>谁会赢？</color>\n初露锋芒的少女，\n亦或百战不殆的霸主？
E: <color=#9e5738>Who would win?</color>\nA young girl emerging from her sheath and showing her edge,\nOr a tyrant who has emerged victorious from a hundred battles?

C: 「来一盘？若棋逢对手， 便称你一句小友。」 怪人声音嘶哑。 「若你能打败我，便敬你一句吾师。」 王女骄傲回敬。
E: "Fancy a game? If you are my match, Then I'll call you my friend." The stranger's voice was husky and coarse. "If you can beat me, then I'll call you my teacher." The princess proudly retorted.

C: 王的身后常有好事的弄臣，\n打听浮沉下的旧邦往事。
E: There were often jesters behind the king,\nCurious about her past in her old city lost to time.

C:
难道这不是神的谋划？
令英雄自相残害，
好躲在旧律的窠臼里，
嬉笑冷眼。
E:
Who's to say this was not the gods' plan?
To have the heroes at each other's throats,
So the divine could hide in old laws' lair,
And laugh, play, and gloat.

C:
啊，您一如既往的果断。
这真是太好了。
神的囚笼翁法罗斯，
与所有乏善可陈的世界，
都需要一位魄力的君王。
E:
Ah. You are as resolute as always.
Good! As ever!
This prison of gods, Amphoreus,
And all mundane and average worlds
Need someone like you, a daring ruler.

C: 「你既重获了曼妙的歌喉，」\n「便再不能清醒地将宴乐享用。」
E: "Since you've regained your melodious voice,"\n"You can no longer enjoy a feast while sober."

C: 「老爱犯笨的好学生。」\n莲食学派贤人的评价。
E: "A good student who often did stupid things."\nWas the assessment from the Lotophagist Sage.

C:
不久以前，
当浪漫的半神阖上眼目，
少女将自己的泪水保藏，
再度敞开昏光的庭院。
E:
Not long ago,
As the romantic demigod closed her eyes,
The girl bottled her tears in sorrow,
And once more opened the dim-lit garden wide.

C:
她牵着两人的手，
并到一处。

微薄的气力，
握不住两簇敌视的火。
她不气馁，
只是莞尔望向天穹。
E:
Their hands in hers,
She held them tight,

Yet flames of hatred burned too bright.
She did not waver or despair,
She just smiled and gazed upon the sky.

C: 他也曾寻求悲恸的感情，\n与最卑微的人同行，\n「今后，你们的不幸便是我的不幸。」
E: He once sought out emotions of sorrow,\nAnd walked with the lowliest of people,\n"Henceforth, your misfortune shall be my misfortune."

C: 「面对神的敕令，我亦身不由己。」 未经任何指引，他第一次得以瞬悟…… 「而我深信，此事并非我的宿命。」 此物便是亵渎的因。
E: "Faced with a god's edict, even I cannot resist." With no guidance given, he reaches enlightenment for the first time... "Yet I sincerely believe this is not to be my destiny." That became the cause of the blasphemy.

C: 那咒文的确罕见，名为——\n掀翻干草车的秘术。
E: That spell was rare indeed, for it was —\nA secret way to overturn a cart of hay.

C:
「衣匠」们依旧妍丽轻盈，
将血与尘的厮杀，化作翩跹的轮舞。
如此，她们才能在明日身着新衣，
如此，浪漫才不会落幕。
E:
The "Garmentmakers" are elegant still.
They turn bloody and stained slaughter into lithe rondos,
For only then can they still dress in new gowns.
Only then can romance survive into the morrow.

C:
破碎支离的宅舍，
所余无几的家门。

曾青睐她的贵族，
无一肯解囊相助，
浪漫、美丽、才华、尊贵，
于灾厄中，又有何用？
E:
She had a broken mansion
And an empty house.

The nobles who once loved her,
None now willing to help her.
All the romance, talent, peerage, and beauty,
What use are they in a disaster?

C: 「我的面包…连小奇美拉都不肯吃吗？」
E: "Even the little chimeras... won't eat my bread?"

C: 黑衣剑士再度叹气，口中喃喃。「雅辛忒丝…你的建议，我已铭记于心。我试图保护属于我的自我，可是，看啊…卡厄斯兰那的心愿，从未变过……」
E: The black-clad swordmaster sighed again, muttering under his breath. "Hyacinthia... your advice, I've taken it to heart. I tried to protect my sense of self, but look... Khaslana's wish has never changed..."

C: 「放心吧，小伊卡，只要有我一口吃的，就……」
E: "Don't worry, Little Ica, as long as I have a bite to eat, I'll..."

C: 「别说了，万敌，别说了。」
E: "Stop, Mydei. Just stop."

C:
以无机生命为初始变量，完全有序的思维模式在固定阶段后，仍会产生无序行为。
在进化中，无机生命的思维模式出现了不同程度的有机化趋势。

【结论：第一阶段完成，基于现有数据，将初始变量调整为有机生命。】
E:
Starting from inorganic life as the initial variable, a fully ordered cognitive model will still eventually give rise to disordered activities after a set phase.
Throughout evolution, the cognitive patterns of inorganic life began to exhibit signs of organic behavior with varying degrees.

[Conclusion: Phase One complete. Based on existing data, the initial variable will now be adjusted to organic lifeforms.]

C: 不知是谁人的回忆被编织成了一座迷宫，只差一点就将你困在其中。\n如果你的记忆也能拥有形体，你觉得它会是……
E: Some unknown individual's memories have been edited into a maze that almost trapped you within.\nIf your memory can take shape, you think it will be...

C: 「{NICKNAME}，没想到会在这里遇到你。这个遗迹给下层区带来了很多危险，身为『大守护者』，不能总在城堡中袖手旁观，我会亲自解决这里的危险——{NICKNAME}，可以助我一臂之力吗？」
E: "Hey {NICKNAME}, I didn't expect running into you here. The ruins here brought much dangers and troubles to the Underworld. As the Supreme Guardian, I can't just watch from inside Qlipoth Fort. I'll take care of the dangers here myself. {NICKNAME}, can you help me?"

C: 「{NICKNAME}，寻宝之旅怎么样了？要是没找到什么古代遗物，我也可以便宜卖给你几件，刚刚出土，货真价实，童叟无欺！」
E: "{NICKNAME}, how goes your treasure hunt? If you couldn't find any ancient relics, I can sell you a couple for cheap. They are fresh out of the ground and genuine, I swear!"

C: ——镇守遗迹的强敌藏匿着门卡，想要将其击败，就先破坏强化它们的掩体吧。

C: 负重跑的过程中，会出现加速序列，<color=#f29e38ff>按照序列正确按下方向键</color>就可以让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大走起来，连续正确时可以使驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大成功跑起来。
E: During the weighted run, an acceleration sequence will appear. <color=#f29e38ff>Press the directional keys in the correct order</color> to get Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas walking. A consecutive, correct sequence will allow Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas to start running.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>隧洞遗器</color>是被裂界保存后再次构造的幻之装备，能为角色提供属性，若组成套装，则可对装备者提供额外的增益效果。在开拓的过程中有机会获取<color=#f29e38ff>隧洞遗器</color>，挑战<color=#f29e38ff>侵蚀隧洞</color>可以更高效地获得。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Cavern Relics</color> are phantasmal equipment preserved and re-constructed by the Fragmentum. They can offer stat boosts to a character, and provide extra buffs when worn as a set. You have a chance to receive <color=#f29e38ff>Cavern Relics</color> as you trailblaze. You may also challenge <color=#f29e38ff>Caverns of Corrosion</color> to obtain Cavern Relics more efficiently.

C: 在翁法罗斯的探索中，可以通过许多方式寻得「仙馔秘酿」。诸如完成开拓任务、冒险任务、世界任务、开启世界中的战利品、击败时而出现的贼灵巴特鲁斯、搜集创生若虫、以及完成真言狮口的谜题等等。
E: In the exploration of Amphoreus, Celestial Ambrosia can be obtained through various means, such as completing Trailblaze Missions, Adventure Missions, World Missions, opening treasures in the world, defeating Spirithieves Bartholos that occasionally appear, collecting Creation Nymphs, and solving the brainteasers of Verax Leo.

C: 借助星穹列车的<color=#f29e38ff>导航</color>系统，开拓者可以在不同世界和区域间移动。
E: Thanks to the <color=#f29e38ff>Navigation System</color> of the Astral Express, you can travel between different worlds and areas.

C: 遭遇敌人的时候机巧鸟会自动返航。
E: When encountering enemies, the cycrane will automatically return.

C: 冥火流窜过程中扭曲的折叠空间，试图穿行可能造成空间坐标的偏移，你将出现在未知的地点
E: The folded space results from the spatial distortion during the spread of the infernal fire. Trying to pass through it may result in a drift in the spatial coordinates, with you transported to somewhere unexpected

C: 旋转线索，拼合出图案，使得<color=#f29e38ff>进度条填满</color>后，便可<color=#f29e38ff>快速移动至目标</color>。
E: Rotate the clues and assemble the pattern. Once the <color=#f29e38ff>progress bar is full</color>, you can <color=#f29e38ff>quickly move to the target</color>.

C: 在战斗内，部分角色在<color=#f29e38ff>满足条件</color>时，会<color=#f29e38ff>自动触发</color>的1次额外的攻击，称为<color=#f29e38ff>追加攻击</color>。反击也属于追加攻击的范畴。
E: During combat, some characters will <color=#f29e38ff>automatically trigger</color> an additional attack, known as <color=#f29e38ff>Follow-Up ATK</color>, when certain <color=#f29e38ff>conditions are met</color>. Counters are also considered a type of Follow-Up ATK.

C: 打开<color=#f29e38ff>相机</color>，也可以切换至<color=#f29e38ff>涂鸦</color>模式，进行<color=#f29e38ff>喷涂</color>创作。
E: Open the <color=#f29e38ff>Camera</color> or switch to <color=#f29e38ff>Graffiti Mode</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>spray</color>.

C: 末日幻影为<color=#f29e38ff>周期性更新</color>的一系列<color=#f29e38ff>高难度挑战关卡</color>。
E: Apocalyptic Shadow is a series of <color=#f29e38ff>highly difficult challenge stages</color> that are <color=#f29e38ff>refreshed periodically</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「战意汹涌」</color>将持续一定<color=#f29e38ff>行动值</color>。\n在退出此阶段时，会根据过程中<color=#f29e38ff>击败敌方数量</color>，返还一定的<color=#f29e38ff>「战意值」</color>，返还存在上限。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Surging Grit</color> will last for a certain amount of <color=#f29e38ff>action value</color>.\nUpon exiting this phase, a portion of <color=#f29e38ff>Grit Value</color> will be returned based on the <color=#f29e38ff>number of enemies defeated</color> during the phase, with a limit on the amount returned.

C: 每局探索共用一定数量的额外轮次，额外轮次消耗完毕后，敌人会进入狂暴状态，大幅提升攻击力。
E: Every round of exploration has a certain number of extra Cycles. When all extra Cycles are used up, the enemy will enter a Berserk state and greatly increase their ATK.

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>物理、火</color>属性击破弱点时<color=#f29e38ff>击破伤害</color>会更高。
E: When Weaknesses are Broken by <color=#f29e38ff>Physical or Fire</color> attacks, the <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG</color> will be higher.

C: 触发<color=#f29e38ff>【破谜离场】</color>机制后，可将<color=#f29e38ff>「关卡增益」</color>提高1个档位。\n随着「关卡增益」档位提升，「关卡增益」的<color=#f29e38ff>评级</color>也将提升。
E: After triggering <color=#f29e38ff>"Solved Departure,"</color> you may upgrade your <color=#f29e38ff>Stage Buff</color> by 1 rank.\nAs you increase your Stage Buff rank, the <color=#f29e38ff>rating</color> for the Stage Buff will also increase.

C: 在联机模式的多人乱斗中，所有对战道具将默认强化至3星效果。

C: 我不想…一个人……
E: I don't want to... be alone...

C: 好啦…我不会再胡闹啦！
E: Alright... I'm done messing around!

C: 那时，除了列车，我没有其他落脚之处。
E: At that time, I had nowhere to go but the Express.

C: 下一次可就没那么简单了。
E: It won't be so easy next time.

C: 放轻松。
E: Relax.

C: 嗯？看他们蠢蠢欲动的样子……
E: Huh, they don't look happy to see us...

C: 这是阶段训练的成果…为了保护大家，我会继续努力的。
E: The fruits of my training. I'll keep it up.

C: 种子岛的新口味蚯蚓干今天上架，现在去能赶个早场，不用排队。
E: Seed Isle's latest flavors of dried earthworm hit the shelves today — we should head over before the queue starts. The early bird catches the... anyway.

C: 这个俱乐部好就好在什么都不问我要，甚至不在乎有没有我。
E: The good thing about this club is that it doesn't ask me for anything. In fact, it doesn't even care if I'm a member.

C: 真是不长记性。
E: You don't learn, do you?

C: 值得大费周章吗？
E: Was that really worth the fuss?

C: 你会为此付出代价。
E: You'll pay for this.

C: 哟，我是希儿，贝洛伯格下层区「地火」的成员，你要和我一同见证下层区的未来么？
E: Hey, I'm Seele. I'm a member of Wildfire down here in the Underworld. Wanna help me forge a future for the people?

C: 镰刀要磨得够快，枕着睡觉才够安心。
E: I like to keep my scythe sharp so I can get a good night's sleep on it.

C: 我…还能……
E: I can still fight...

C: 老弟要是能对自己的事上心一些就好啦，免得姐姐我来替他操心…算啦算啦，我让他操心的事也不少，就这么扯平吧。
E: If he paid more attention to his affairs, it'd save me a lot of headaches... I guess I do create a few headaches for him too... Maybe we're even.

C: 趁着巡逻的间隙，抓紧休息一会吧。
E: If we're not on patrol, we should get some rest.

C: 地下的人们已经习惯苦中作乐，所以我总会提醒自己，我们已经过上自己想要的生活么？
E: People in the Underworld have gotten used to making the best of a bad situation. That's why I have to keep reminding myself that we're nowhere near where we need to be.

C: 专注于眼前的路，才能走向远方。
E: Stay focused, push forward.

C: 清点完毕。
E: Inventory complete.

C: 不冒点风险，又怎么尝得到甜头？
E: How're you gonna win if you don't take any risks?

C: 荣誉队员克拉拉！准备好一起大冒险了吗？
E: Honorary member Clara! Ready for an adventure?

C: 漆黑的虎克大人驾到，让开让开让开…呜呼~
E: Pitch-Dark Hook the Great has arrived — make way, make way... Woo-hoo~ BANG!

C: 诶？还没玩够呢！
E: Huh? I wanna play again!

C: 希儿！咱俩合作，没有打不赢的架。
E: Seele! Oh, this is gonna be easy!

C: …有点意思！
E: ...Now we're talking!

C: 翡翠女士可以算是我的贵人，能干又漂亮，从不吝啬于提携后辈，人还特别亲切！想起第一次见她的时候，我还是会不自觉地紧张一下…时间过得真快啊。
E: Lady Jade is like nobility to me, beautiful and capable. She is always so kind and willing to guide and support the younger generation! When I think about the first time I met her, I still get nervous... Time does fly.

C: 算了也白算，等等牌就来~
E: Wait for the tiles before you start counting~

C: 还在犹豫什么？
E: What is it we're waiting for?

C: 还好，没事。
E: Nothing major.

C: 该出奇兵了。
E: Time for the masterstroke.

C: 莽莽撞撞是真，满腔热诚也是真。别小看她，年轻时光凭这股劲，便能完成很多事。
E: She is indeed reckless, but she is also passionate and eager. Don't underestimate her. Youth can accomplish a lot simply by relying on such energy.

C: 风起，云鸢就位。
E: The wind is rising.

C: 干戈未止。
E: There'll be more to come.

C: 太卜司的不成文规矩「三不占」中有「不义不占」这条，若是要测彩票号码、行情涨跌之类的问题，恕本座一律不答。
E: One of the Divination Commission's unwritten rules is the "three taboos" — which includes "no unjust divination." So, if you want me to divine the winning lottery numbers, future market conditions, or the like, forgive me for declining to offer my services.

C: 可能性分化成的种种虚影，命途中人应有的流向…在你的身上，这些痕迹我统统看不见，真是奇怪……
E: The shadows of future possibilities and the direction of one's path should normally be readily apparent... I can't detect any traces of these on you. Strange...

C: 技多不压身，功到自然成~
E: The more you can do, the easier life gets~

C: 下回见！我给你留着第一排的位置。虽然咱们撂地摆摊也谈不上什么「第一排」吧……
E: See you next time! I'll save you a front-row seat. Oh, uh, it's a makeshift outdoor stand, "front-row" sounds a little fancy...

C: 本次演出大获成功！
E: That was a heck of a performance!

C: 椒丘大夫身上的未解之谜太多了…为什么他每顿饭都吃得那么辣，却硬是不怎么上火？喔！难怪他眼睛总是眯成缝，原来是因为辣的！
E: There are so many mysteries surrounding Dr. Jiaoqiu... How does he manage to eat so much spicy food without even breaking a sweat? Hey, maybe that's why he's always squinting his eyes — he eats too much spicy food!

C: 啊，这就要回去了么…再待一会儿，就一小会儿嘛！
E: Huh? I have to go back now...? Please, just a little a bit longer!

C: 补补~身子~
E: Gotta get those vitamins.

C: 三月，记得…罢了，反正每次你都不记得。
E: March, remember that— *sigh* Forget it, you never remember.

C: 原来是你，幸会。这副模样会为汝招惹许多麻烦吧？
E: It's you, how fortunate. This new look of yours must surely stir up trouble, does it not?

C: 伏诛罢。
E: Execution.

C: 好东西，藏这么深。
E: Why keep such good things so hidden?

C: 你是说应星？我没见过他本人，只听爷爷提起过无数次，算是他最有名的徒弟吧…有机会真的好想摸摸那柄「支离剑」。
E: You mean Yingxing? I've never met him in person, but Grandpa has mentioned him countless times. He's probably one of his most famous apprentices... I'd love to chat with that Shard Sword of his if I get the chance.

C: 何为忘归人？是未能重回故地的人，还是遗落了自我的人？
E: What is a Fugue? Is it someone who can't return to once familiar places, or someone who has lost herself?

C: 生命纵如微尘，亦能翩然起舞。
E: Though life is as a speck of dust, it dances still in grace.

C: 我不会忘记那个瞬间，奔赴星海、巡游四方的念想，从过去到现在，仍是一切的原点。
E: I will never forget that moment. The desire to journey across the stars and explore far and wide, from the past to the present, remains the starting point for everything.

C: 我最喜欢在匹诺康尼的街上闲逛，看这儿的每个人做他们的白日梦…我也曾想过去当个星际大流氓，狠狠大闹一场，大不了就是蹲公司的牢子…哈哈，现在还想着呢！
E: I love strolling the streets of Penacony, watching everyone here lost in their own daydreams... I've toyed with the idea of being an interstellar villain, creating chaos throughout the universe. Worst-case scenario would be a stint in the IPC's prison. Heh, that's an idea I'm still entertaining!

C: 多少人被她「隐士」的自称所蒙蔽？在我看来，她想要探究的远不止生命——拭目以待吧，她才是天才俱乐部真正的野心家。
E: How many people have been fooled by her claim to fame as a hermetic genius? It seems to me that she wants to explore much more than just life. Just wait and see — the Genius Society member with all the real ambition is her.

C: 大家都喜欢聪明人，对吧？
E: Everyone likes a clever girl, right?

C: 你将承受代价。
E: Retribution will find you!

C: 从那里醒来时，海的尽头残存雷鸣，漫天血雨刚好飘落——唯有这一刻的所见，无比清晰地留在眼底。
E: When I awoke from that place, the sea's horizon still held faint thunder, and the falling blood rain was easing — the sight of that moment lay strikingly clear before me.

C: 从彼岸醒来时，海的尽头残存雷鸣，漫天血雨刚好飘落——唯有这一刻的所见，无比清晰地留在眼底。而那之前与之后的记忆，都黯然失色，逐渐褪去。
E: When I awoke from that place, the sea's horizon still held faint thunder, and the falling blood rain was easing — the sight of that moment lay strikingly clear before me. All other memories, both prior and subsequent, paled and slowly ebbed away.

C: 所有或一无所有…我会拭目以待。
E: All or nothing... time will tell.

C: 听雨从红叶跌落，滴在伞上的声响萧萧索索，从中…我得到片刻宁静。
E: As the raindrops tumble from the crimson leaves, their pitter-patter on my umbrella whispers gently to me. In these moments... I find brief serenity.

C: 晚上好，我是来自家族的歌者知更鸟。不必拘谨，这只是一次舞台下的私人问候，能为我抽些时间吗？
E: Hello, good evening! I'm Robin, a singer from The Family. No need for formalities, this is just a friendly off-stage chat. Can you spare me a moment?

C: 希望这次不会搞砸…
E: I hope I don't mess this up...

C: 请…请让一下！
E: E—Excuse me, please...!

C: 银河地理杂志每一本我都会看…特别是最近一期，那条大鲸鱼还会吞食星球，真的太厉害了！不知道什么时候才能看到下一期……
E: I make sure to read every issue of Stellar Cartography Magazine... in the most recent one there's a huge whale that can actually eat entire planets, it's incredible! I'm not sure when I'll get to read the next issue...

C: 约定的时间已经过了，爷爷什么时候能回家呢……
E: He's already late... I wonder where Grandpa has gotten to...

C: 愿你我行于坦途，终抵繁星。
E: May our journey be free of troubles and lead us starward.

C: 重要客户上门了。
E: Oh, look, a VIP has dropped by.

C: 世上只有两种人——要么手枪上膛…要么自掘坟墓！
E: There are only two kinds of people in the world — those with a loaded gun... and those who dig their own grave!

C: 我有很多藏室，有多少？不记得了。在哪里？宇宙各处。我将那些玩意收来，只是因为喜欢——只要有意思的，我都喜欢。
E: I have lots of storerooms. How many? I don't remember. Where are they? All over the universe. I keep things only because I like them — and I like anything that's interesting.

C: 行啊你。
E: Impressive... almost.

C: 很有气势。走吧，战个痛快。
E: Such spirit. Let's go, and fight to our hearts' content.

C: 过去，我不曾想到自己会与悬锋的敌国联合，征战四方。奥赫玛是座繁荣的城邦，只是…无法成为所有人的归宿。
E: In the past, I never would've thought that I'd join forces with the enemy nations of Kremnos and wage war across the land. Okhema is a prosperous city-state, but... it cannot be a home for everyone.

C: 是泰坦又如何？她仍是树庭的学生。
E: So what if she's a Titan? She's still a student of the Grove.

C: 怎么了？有事吗？
E: What's the matter?

C: 原来，这位就是大名鼎鼎的「粉霞天女」？怪不得看起来那么亲切，我可是听着她的传说长大的呀。不过怎么想…都好像乱了辈分……
E: So this is the famous "Rosy Celestial Maiden"? No wonder she looks so friendly. After all, I grew up listening to stories of her. But... hold on. Who's older than who again...?

C: 别了，伙伴。愿再见面时，我们都能成为彼此心中的英雄！
E: Goodbye, my friend. When we meet again, may we both become the heroes we aspire to be!

C: 一尾身姿灵巧的小猫鱼，还不会被鲜美的鱼饵钓起…或许有一天，它会成长为一条了不起的大鱼呢。
E: A nimble little kitten fish that won't be caught by even the most tempting bait... yet. Perhaps one day, she will grow into a giant of the sea.

C: 尽管我们身量悬殊，王者的选择却殊途同归…若能对弈一局，我定然能找回棋逢对手的酣畅。
E: Though our statures differ greatly, we made the same choice as rulers... If we could face each other in a game of chess, I would surely regain that delightful feeling of finding an evenly-matched opponent.

C: 困兽之斗。
E: Flailing beast.

C: 身为王储的他，还是身为战士的他，都肩负着太多关于仇恨的记忆。但当他履行自己的职责时，却从未将过往与未来混为一谈。
E: Whether as a crown prince or as a warrior, he carries too many memories of hatred. Yet when fulfilling his duties, he never confuses the past with the future.

C: 悄悄告诉你，第一次见面时，人家就被你的目光吸引了！别动喔，让我再看一次，好漂亮的眼睛，它们倒映出的明天，也同样美丽♪
E: I'm gonna let you in on a secret... I was completely mesmerized by your gaze the first time we met! Hold still. Lemme see it again. Such pretty eyes... and the tomorrow reflected in them is equally beautiful, too ♪

C: 当有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔……
E: When there is the chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret...

C: 机不可失。
E: This is our chance.

C: 「存护」…由行动来决定。
E: Preservation is determined by our actions.

C: 好友阵容
E: Friend's Lineup

C: 钟末视界
E: Ticker's Vision

C: 김도희
E: 김도희

C: 心，是最好的坟茔
E: The Heart Makes the Finest Tomb

C: 海的裙摆飘荡
E: Undine's Fluttering Hem

C: 我方可【离场】角色不足，催眠失败！
E: Insufficient ally characters that can be "Departed," hypnosis failed!

C: 消灭敌方后排【贼灵】<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>次并通关
E: Defeat "Spirithief" in the enemy back row <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> time(s) and clear the stage

C: 我梦见一片焦土，
E: I dreamed of a scorched earth.

C: 一切造物的工已经完毕。
E: All the work of creation has been completed.

C: 坏脾气
E: Bad-Tempered

C: 烤实蛋串
E: Yolkless Egg Skewers

C: 黄金大炒饭
E: Chrysos Fried Rice Max

C: 无需惊惶，浪潮总会逆转。
E: Do not be alarmed. The tides are bound to turn.

C: 青铜
E: Viridian Bronze

C: 使1只奇美拉经验+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: Increases 1 chimera's Experience by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 穿戴者每次进入商店时：使我方<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1>金币+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>
E: Each time the wearer enters the store: Allies gain <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelCoin id=0 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Gold Coin(s)</color>.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的比格椰自身<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>，并对随机1名对手造成<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的伤害
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Vigethos in the team causes its own <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to increase by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> and deals DMG equal to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> to 1 random opponent.

C: 回合开始或被召唤时：咕噜鱼儿对<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值</color>最高的对手造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn or when summoned: Gurgling Fish deals <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to the opponent with the highest <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>.

C: 胶糖卷不能陷入【忘却】状态。对战开始时：队伍中最强的胶糖卷使所有对手陷入【忘却】状态。同伴攻击/追加攻击时：若攻击目标处于【忘却】状态，则立即对其造成1次等同于<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的伤害
E: Gummy Roll cannot enter the "Oblivion" state. At the start of battle: The strongest Gummy Roll in the team inflicts the "Oblivion" state on all opponents. When a companion uses attack/Follow-Up ATK, if the attacked target is in the "Oblivion" state, immediately deal 1 instance of DMG equal to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color>.

C: 自身受到伤害时：自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>
E: When this unit takes damage: This unit's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK increases by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 使1只奇美拉<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力+<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>，<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: Increases 1 chimera's <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>, <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1>HP by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>

C: 自身受到伤害时：减少<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点受到的伤害，最低为1，并有<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>的概率使自身<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值+<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>
E: When this unit takes DMG: Reduces DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> (down to 1) and has a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> chance to restore <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP

C: 回合开始时：我方奇美拉在本场对战每发动<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>次攻击/追加攻击，队伍中最强的苹果糖向对手发射<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>枚攻击随机目标的导弹，每枚导弹造成<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点伤害
E: At the start of turn: For every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of attack/Follow-Up ATK launched by ally chimeras in this battle, the strongest Candied Apple in the team launches <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> missile(s) targeting random opponents, each dealing <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG.

C: 升级！
E: Level up!

C: 首先，叫我努努斯。
E: First off, call me Nanus.

C: 合成模式
E: Synthesis Mode

C: 当前好友列表为空
E: Friend List currently empty

C: 解锁了更高稀有度的奇美拉，道具与装备！
E: Higher-rarity chimeras, items, and equipments unlocked!

C: 毁却
E: Obliteration

C: 若我选无可选
E: If I were to have no choice,

C: 背道者的来信
E: A Letter from an Apostate

C: 哦不对
E: Oh, wait, no

C: 我转告她
E: I'll let her know

C: 想阻挡我的征途？呵，看你是否有这个实力吧
E: Trying to stand in my way? Hah, let's see if you've got what it takes

C: 无妨，我会扫清凯撒前方的一切障碍
E: No matter, I'll clear all the obstacles in the Imperator's way

C: 在那夜最后一粒火星泯灭时
E: That night when the last spark extinguished

C: 你一定经验丰富
E: You must be really experienced

C: 毁灭绝非壮烈的一瞬…但它的美丽一定毋庸置疑
E: Destruction isn't a glorious moment... but its beauty is undoubtedly indisputable

C: 由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血。刚猛的身躯是军阵的盾牌，以坚石之身阻隔敌军，以粗大臂膀搬运战场的口粮，也常被悬锋的士兵当作练武的对象。
E: A Titankin sculpted by "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. Their robust bodies are the shields of the army, and they use their stony corpus to cut off their foes, while their powerful limbs carry rations across the battlefield. They are also used as sparring partners by the soldiers of Kremnos.

C: 传说中的海妖掠夺者，能以歌声勾引意志动荡的船员。迷狂者将纵身跃入洋面，成为深海的肴馔。
E: Legend has it that the plundering sea sirens can sing to lure sailors with wavering wills. Those who fall into madness will leap into the ocean and become a delicacy for the deep sea.

C: 示死祸源：深魇蝗灾
E: Harbinger of Death: Swarm Nightmare

C: 进入蓄力状态，下回合施放【翩翩起舞的】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses "Volteggiando" in the next turn.

C: 对我方全体造成少量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Ice DMG to all targets.

C: 像威猛暴怒的雄狮
E: Resembling Furious Lion

C: 末路既定
E: Fated End

C: 末路既定
E: Fated End

C: 万界之癌（现象）
E: Cancer of All Worlds (Phenomenon)

C: 大丽花发现黄泉等人，并认出黄泉是「虚无」令使。流萤必须让你远离黄泉，这是她的「零点任务」，并为此不惜经受「第一次死亡」。
E: Upon finding Acheron and the others, The Dahlia recognized Acheron as an Emanator of Nihility. Firefly had to keep you away from Acheron, which was her "Zero-Point Mission," even if it meant enduring her first death.

C: 限时大礼
E: Time-Limited Prize

C: 立刻获得#2个随机火漆奇物。
E: Immediately obtain #2 random Sealing Wax Curio(s).

C: 获得#2个1-2星奇物。
E: Obtain #2 Curio(s) of 1- to 2-star rarity.

C: 去城外闯荡。
E: Venture out beyond the city.

C: 弱点记录：物理<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>次，火<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>次，冰<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color>次，雷<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>次，风<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color>次，量子<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>次，虚数<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color>次。
E: Weakness Record: Physical <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), Fire <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), Ice <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), Lightning <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), Wind <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), Quantum <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), Imaginary <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).

C: 可负载
E: Overloadable

C: 失能+
E: Depowered+

C: 美梦燃烧了永火官邸，也带走关于「她」的点滴。\n「毁灭」、「记忆」…背叛的花朵盛放在所经之地——\n重返无人知晓的梦境，将她再度点燃的会是何方？
E: The sweet dream burned down the Ever-Flame Mansion, taking with it every trace of "her."\nDestruction, Remembrance... flowers of betrayal bloomed wherever they passed.\nTo return to the dreamscape no one remembers, who will be the one to set her aflame again?

C: 前往派对车厢寻找「花姐」
E: Head to the Party Car to find the one who's making a sparkly return

C: 与清醒的人们会面
E: Meet up with the people who are awake

C: {NICKNAME}——你可算来了，花姐都念叨了你好几次了！
E: {NICKNAME}! You're finally here! Big Sis Dahlia has been asking about you nonstop!

C: 坏事，在美梦中，家族近乎全知全能。
E: There's bad news. The Family is borderline all-knowing and all-powerful in the sweet dream.

C: 不是不能创造，但问题在于，你太强了。
E: It's not that we can't create one. The problem is that you're too powerful.

C: 你刚才看见的景象，多半是一种海市蜃楼。
E: What you saw just now was probably a mirage.

C: 我会的。
E: Got it.

C: 但多留几个心眼。那家伙是个假面愚者，指不定……
E: But watch your back. That one's a Masked Fool. Who knows what they might...

C: （真蛰虫死于高热反应，而且这道伤痕……）
E: (The True Sting died from a high heat reaction, and this scar...)

C: 你是说，掩埋这桩罪行，让他付出了很大的代价，让全知全能出现了缺陷…倒是很有可能。会和「钟表匠的遗产」有关吗？
E: So you're saying that burying this crime took a heavy toll on him, leaving a flaw in his supposed omniscience and omnipotence... That does sound plausible. Could it have something to do with the Watchmaker's Legacy?

C: 嘘——小心些。怎么了，此时此刻，{F#她们}{M#他们}的同行，给我们省去不少麻烦。
E: Shh... be careful. What's wrong? Right now, their journeying together is actually saving us a lot of trouble.

C: 这不难，找个热闹的地方就行，需要我带路吗？
E: That's easy! Just head to where all the action is. Want me to show you the way?

C: 自那之后，我踏上了「同谐」命途，以行者的身份，行使相应的力量。
E: Since then, I've walked the Path of Harmony as a Pathstrider, wielding its power.

C: 我也觉得强人所难——如果你认为有必要，可以借助「调律」，在我们的意识中留下保险，确保我们不会另有企图。
E: I also think it's too much to ask. If you deem it necessary, you can use "Tuning" to leave a safeguard in our minds, preventing any ulterior motives.

C: 如同毁灭那般，「背叛」也仅是一瞬。而在它到来之前，无论冥火大公、歌斐木，还是流萤…我都不是假装，而是发自真心，暂时「成为」了他们的同伴。
E: Like the Destruction, "betrayal" is but a fleeting moment. And before it came, whether with Duke Inferno, Gopher Wood, or Firefly... I wasn't pretending. I truly, wholeheartedly "became" their companion.

C: 有个叫做「剧本」的东西，我倒是很有兴致——星核猎手的合作者。
E: There's this thing called the "Script." Now that, I find quite intriguing... Stellaron Hunter collaborator.

C: 每当有逐梦客误入忆域，他们会因此漂往能实现他们「渴求」的地方。
E: When Dreamchasers wander into the Memory Zone, they'll drift towards places that can fulfill their "desires."

C: 哦？难道你也喜欢「毛绒绒」，有品位——最好别走太远。
E: Oh? So you're into "fluffies" too? You've got taste! Better not wander too far though.

C: 去找你的那位舞伴，亲爱的。阴差阳错，梦主的计划将要实现，要想对付他……
E: To find your dance partner, darling. By an unexpected turn of events, the Dreammaster's plan is about to come to fruition, and to deal with him...

C: 但愿一切顺利——我们就此告别吧。
E: I hope everything goes well. This is goodbye then.

C: 如果不能，我也不会逃开。如果那一击必然到来，在这场噩梦里死去的，只会是我一个人。
E: If I can't, I still won't run away. If that strike is inevitable, I'll be the only one who dies in this nightmare.

C: 生亦有时。
E: Life, too, has its time.

C: 如果站在那里的，是你呢？
E: What if you were the one standing there?

C: 倘若自愿沉沦
E: If you willfully sink to ruin

C: 若我选无可选
E: If I were to have no choice

C: <color=#dbc291ff>濒临死地，但仍然幸存。</color>她的第二次死亡还未到来，却又近在眼前。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>She had almost reached her demise, yet she survived.</color> Her second death hadn't come yet. It would be upon her soon.

C: 而我，也将无法再给予你任何帮助。
E: And from that moment forth... I would also no longer be able to help you.

C: 「梦主」在美梦中唤醒了寰宇蝗灾，并随着太一之梦，在每个入梦者的内心投下了阴影。根植在人们心中的原始恐惧，使他们开始呼唤「秩序」的庇护。
E: The Dreammaster has awakened the Swarm Disaster within the sweet dream, and cast shadows into the hearts of all dreamers through Ena's Dream. The primal fear taking root in people's hearts had led them to call out to the Order for protection.

C: 会有无数流星划破天际，那是巡海游侠集结的火光。他们从银河四方赶来，不问缘由，不计代价，只因我们遵守一条共同的底线——
E: Countless meteors will streak across the sky. Those "meteors" are Galaxy Rangers coming from all corners of the Cosmos, driven by a shared purpose, without questioning the cause or counting the cost. Because we abide by a bottom line...

C: 但琥珀纪不会因此翻开下一页——<color=#dbc291ff>今日的锤击，不是星神的怒火，而是人反击的号声。</color>
E: But a new Amber Era will not arrive because of that. <color=#dbc291ff>Today's Hammer Strike is not the wrath of an Aeon, but humanity's battle cry of defiance.</color>

C: 没关系，你还有时间细细咀嚼此刻的心情。等准备好了，就直面最后的舞台吧。
E: That's alright. Take your time to contemplate this moment. Once you feel ready, let's step onto the final stage.

C: 对于一个普通的少女，平凡的幸福不该仅仅是偶然。
E: For an ordinary girl, simple happiness shouldn't just be a matter of chance.

C: 指令：撕碎。
E: Order: Dismember.

C: 他正在创造一条前所未见的命途……
E: He's forging a Path that's never been observed before...

C: 三月七
